Result: 时变屏障证书相比现有方法提供更不保守的安全概率下界，在非线性系统与动态障碍物的实证评估中，时变证书始终获得紧致保证，在准确性和可扩展性上优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 提出的随机屏障函数框架为动态障碍物环境下的随机系统提供了有效的安全验证方法，时变公式通过凸优化实现紧致概率保证，显著提升了安全分析的准确性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Safety of stochastic dynamic systems in environments with dynamic obstacles is studied in this paper through the lens of stochastic barrier functions. We introduce both time-invariant and time-varying barrier certificates for discrete-time, continuous-space systems subject to uncertainty, which provide certified lower bounds on the probability of remaining within a safe set over a finite horizon. These certificates explicitly account for time-varying unsafe regions induced by obstacle dynamics. By leveraging Bellman's optimality perspective, the time-varying formulation directly captures temporal structure and yields less conservative bounds than state-of-the-art approaches. By restricting certificates to polynomial functions, we show that time-varying barrier synthesis can be formulated as a convex sum-of-squares program, enabling tractable optimization. Empirical evaluations on nonlinear systems with dynamic obstacles show that time-varying certificates consistently achieve tight guarantees, demonstrating improved accuracy and scalability over state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [296] [Toward Safe Autonomous Robotic Endovascular Interventions using World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20151)
*Harry Robertshaw,Nikola Fischer,Han-Ru Wu,Andrea Walker Perez,Weiyuan Deng,Benjamin Jackson,Christos Bergeles,Alejandro Granados,Thomas C Booth*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TD-MPC2模型强化学习在自主机械取栓导航中表现优于SAC算法，在模拟和体外实验中均显示出更高的成功率和更低的接触力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机械取栓面临血管几何结构多变和实时控制精度要求的挑战，现有强化学习方法在多样患者解剖结构和长导航距离下鲁棒性有限。

Method: 采用基于世界模型的TD-MPC2强化学习框架，结合规划和学习动力学，在多种导航任务上训练，并与SAC算法进行对比，同时在体外患者特异性血管模型中进行荧光引导验证。

Result: 模拟中TD-MPC2成功率显著高于SAC（58% vs. 36%），接触力0.15N远低于1.5N血管破裂阈值；体外实验中TD-MPC2成功率68%与SAC的60%相当，但路径比更优，代价是手术时间更长。

Conclusion: 这是首个在保留模拟数据和荧光引导体外实验中验证的自主机械取栓导航研究，证明了世界模型在安全、通用AI辅助血管介入中的潜力。

Abstract: Autonomous mechanical thrombectomy (MT) presents substantial challenges due to highly variable vascular geometries and the requirements for accurate, real-time control. While reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for the automation of endovascular navigation, existing approaches often show limited robustness when faced with diverse patient anatomies or extended navigation horizons. In this work, we investigate a world-model-based framework for autonomous endovascular navigation built on TD-MPC2, a model-based RL method that integrates planning and learned dynamics. We evaluate a TD-MPC2 agent trained on multiple navigation tasks across hold out patient-specific vasculatures and benchmark its performance against the state-of-the-art Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm agent. Both approaches are further validated in vitro using patient-specific vascular phantoms under fluoroscopic guidance. In simulation, TD-MPC2 demonstrates a significantly higher mean success rate than SAC (58% vs. 36%, p < 0.001), and mean tip contact forces of 0.15 N, well below the proposed 1.5 N vessel rupture threshold. Mean success rates for TD-MPC2 (68%) were comparable to SAC (60%) in vitro, but TD-MPC2 achieved superior path ratios (p = 0.017) at the cost of longer procedure times (p < 0.001). Together, these results provide the first demonstration of autonomous MT navigation validated across both hold out in silico data and fluoroscopy-guided in vitro experiments, highlighting the promise of world models for safe and generalizable AI-assisted endovascular interventions.

</details>


### [297] [Strain in Sound: Soft Corrugated Tube for Local Strain Sensing with Acoustic Resonance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20017)
*Michael Chun,Ananya Nukala,Tae Myung Huh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 软波纹管传感器通过气流激发声学共振，利用频率变化估计局部应变，机器学习算法实现高精度测量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种能够准确估计软体非均匀变形的传感器，特别是针对局部应变测量，以应用于柔性机器人、可穿戴设备等领域

Method: 设计软波纹管传感器，气流通过时波纹腔引起压力振荡，激发驻波共振模式产生声调。拉伸改变共振频率（长度变化）和频率-流速关系（腔宽变化）。通过控制流速扫描收集不同拉伸条件下的共振频率数据，使用梯度提升回归器进行机器学习分析

Result: 双周期管设计（3.1mm和4.18mm波纹周期）达到0.8mm平均绝对误差，单周期管（3.1mm）达到1mm平均绝对误差。在人偶手指测试中能够区分多关节配置，展示了对软体非均匀变形的估计能力

Conclusion: 软波纹管传感器结合声学共振和机器学习，能够高精度估计局部应变，在柔性机器人、可穿戴传感和软体变形监测方面具有应用潜力

Abstract: We present a soft corrugated tube sensor designed to estimate strain in each half segment. When air flows through the tube, the internal corrugated cavities induce pressure oscillations that excite the tube's standing wave resonance mode, generating an acoustic tone. Stretching the tube affects both the resonance mode frequency, due to changes in overall length, and the frequency-flow speed relationship, due to variations in cavity width, which is particularly useful for local strain estimation. By sweeping flow rates in a controlled manner, we collected resonance frequency data across flow speeds under various local stretch conditions, enabling a machine learning algorithm (gradient boosting regressor) to estimate segmental strain with high accuracy. The dual-period tube design (3.1 mm and 4.18 mm corrugation periods) achieved a mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.8 mm, while the single-period tube (3.1 mm) provided a satisfactory MAE of 1 mm. Testing on a mannequin finger demonstrated the sensor's capability to differentiate multi-joint configurations, showing its potential for estimating non-uniform deformations in soft bodies.

</details>


### [298] [Efficient Reinforcement Learning using Linear Koopman Dynamics for Nonlinear Robotic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19980)
*Wenjian Hao,Yuxuan Fang,Zehui Lu,Shaoshuai Mou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于模型的强化学习框架，通过Koopman算子理论学习线性提升动力学，集成到actor-critic架构中进行策略优化，使用单步预测而非多步传播来降低计算成本和模型误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对非线性机器人系统的最优闭环控制问题，传统模型自由RL样本效率低，而基于模型的方法需要精确系统动力学。需要开发既能利用模型优势又不需要精确系统动力学的框架。

Method: 1) 通过Koopman算子理论学习线性提升动力学模型；2) 将学习到的模型集成到actor-critic架构中进行策略优化；3) 使用单步预测而非多步传播来估计策略梯度，降低计算成本和模型误差；4) 构建在线小批量策略梯度框架，从流式交互数据中改进策略。

Result: 在多个模拟非线性控制基准测试和两个真实硬件平台（Kinova Gen3机械臂和Unitree Go1四足机器人）上评估。结果显示：相比模型自由RL基线提高了样本效率；相比基于模型的RL基线具有更优的控制性能；控制性能与依赖精确系统动力学的经典基于模型方法相当。

Conclusion: 提出的基于Koopman算子的模型强化学习框架能够有效平衡样本效率和控制性能，在不需要精确系统动力学的情况下实现接近经典模型方法的控制性能，为非线性机器人系统的闭环控制提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a model-based reinforcement learning (RL) framework for optimal closed-loop control of nonlinear robotic systems. The proposed approach learns linear lifted dynamics through Koopman operator theory and integrates the resulting model into an actor-critic architecture for policy optimization, where the policy represents a parameterized closed-loop controller. To reduce computational cost and mitigate model rollout errors, policy gradients are estimated using one-step predictions of the learned dynamics rather than multi-step propagation. This leads to an online mini-batch policy gradient framework that enables policy improvement from streamed interaction data. The proposed framework is evaluated on several simulated nonlinear control benchmarks and two real-world hardware platforms, including a Kinova Gen3 robotic arm and a Unitree Go1 quadruped. Experimental results demonstrate improved sample efficiency over model-free RL baselines, superior control performance relative to model-based RL baselines, and control performance comparable to classical model-based methods that rely on exact system dynamics.

</details>


### [299] [Radar Odometry Subject to High Tilt Dynamics of Subarctic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19962)
*Matěj Boxan,William Larivée-Hardy,François Pomerleau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对旋转FMCW雷达里程计在平坦地面假设下的局限性，提出了一种新型雷达-惯性里程计方法，在动态地形条件下实现了最先进的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有旋转FMCW雷达里程计方法通常假设平坦地面条件，这在城市环境或平坦矿区等场景中足够，但在亚北极环境的动态地形中面临挑战。这些环境中的俯仰角和横滚角变化显著，标准特征提取和状态估计技术难以应对。

Method: 提出了一种新型雷达-惯性里程计方法，采用倾斜邻近子图搜索技术，并在扫描点与估计旋转轴之间的垂直位移上设置硬阈值。该方法在现有三种雷达里程计方法基础上进行了改进，特别针对动态地形条件。

Result: 实验结果显示：1）在动态轨迹上，新方法比第二好的比较方法提升了0.3%；2）在城市基准测试中实现了最先进的性能；3）在具有高横向滑移和陡峭沟渠穿越的复杂雷达序列上，四种评估方法的表现均得到了分析。

Conclusion: 提出的雷达-惯性里程计方法通过倾斜邻近子图搜索和垂直位移硬阈值，有效解决了动态地形条件下的里程计问题，在亚北极环境等挑战性场景中表现出优越性能，为旋转FMCW雷达在非平坦地形中的应用提供了改进方案。

Abstract: Rotating FMCW radar odometry methods often assume flat ground conditions. While this assumption is sufficient in many scenarios, including urban environments or flat mining setups, the highly dynamic terrain of subarctic environments poses a challenge to standard feature extraction and state estimation techniques. This paper benchmarks three existing radar odometry methods under demanding conditions, exhibiting up to 13° in pitch and 4° in roll difference between consecutive scans, with absolute pitch and roll reaching 30° and 8°, respectively. Furthermore, we propose a novel radar-inertial odometry method utilizing tilt-proximity submap search and a hard threshold for vertical displacement between scan points and the estimated axis of rotation. Experimental results demonstrate a state-of-the-art performance of our method on an urban baseline and a 0.3% improvement over the second-best comparative method on a 2-kilometer-long dynamic trajectory. Finally, we analyze the performance of the four evaluated methods on a complex radar sequence characterized by high lateral slip and a steep ditch traversal.

</details>


### [300] [SL(C)AMma: Simultaneous Localisation, (Calibration) and Mapping With a Magnetometer Array](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19946)
*Thomas Edridge,Manon Kok*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出两种基于磁力计阵列的SLAM滤波算法：SLAMma用于磁定位与建图，SLCAMma同时估计磁力计校准参数，显著减少漂移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内定位面临GNSS信号衰减和航位推算传感器积分漂移问题。虽然基于磁场的SLAM通过回环检测减少漂移，但在未探索区域仍具挑战性。磁力计阵列能直接估计里程计，但传感器间测量不一致性影响里程计估计和回环检测

Method: 提出两种滤波算法：1) SLAMma：基于磁力计阵列的SLAM；2) SLCAMma：扩展SLAMma以联合估计磁力计校准参数。通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证校准参数估计精度，实验验证算法性能

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟显示，在足够方向激励下能准确估计校准参数，磁力计实现传感器间测量一致性。10个数据集实验验证了结果，在单磁力计SLAM失败的情况下，SLAMma和SLCAMma提供良好轨迹估计，相比航位推算传感器积分减少80%以上漂移

Conclusion: 提出的磁力计阵列SLAM算法能有效解决室内定位漂移问题，通过联合校准参数估计提高测量一致性，显著改善轨迹估计精度

Abstract: Indoor localisation techniques suffer from attenuated Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals and from the accumulation of unbounded drift by integration of proprioceptive sensors. Magnetic field-based Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) reduces drift through loop closures by revisiting previously seen locations, but extended exploration of unseen areas remains challenging. Recently, magnetometer arrays have demonstrated significant benefits over single magnetometers, as they can directly estimate the odometry. However, inconsistencies between magnetometer measurements negatively affect odometry estimates and complicate loop closure detection. We propose two filtering algorithms: The first focuses on magnetic field-based SLAM using a magnetometer array (SLAMma). The second extends this to jointly estimate the magnetometer calibration parameters (SLCAMma). We demonstrate, using Monte Carlo simulations, that the calibration parameters can be accurately estimated when there is sufficient orientation excitation, and that magnetometers achieve inter-sensor measurement consistency regardless of the type of motion. Experimental validation on ten datasets confirms these results, and we demonstrate that in cases where single magnetometer SLAM fails, SLAMma and SLCAMma provide good trajectory estimates with, more than 80% drift reduction compared to integration of proprioceptive sensors.

</details>


### [301] [UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19734)
*Boyu Chen,Yi Chen,Lu Qiu,Jerry Bai,Yuying Ge,Yixiao Ge*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UniT框架通过视觉锚定建立统一物理语言，解决人形机器人数据稀缺问题，实现人类到人形机器人的跨具身知识迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形基础模型扩展受限于机器人数据稀缺，而大量人类自我中心数据提供了可扩展替代方案，但跨具身（人类与人形机器人）之间的运动学不匹配构成了根本性挑战。

Method: 提出UniT框架，采用三分支交叉重建机制：动作预测视觉以将运动学锚定到物理结果，视觉重建动作以过滤无关视觉干扰；融合分支将净化后的模态协同到共享的离散潜在空间中，形成具身无关的物理意图表示。

Result: 在策略学习（VLA-UniT）中，通过预测统一token有效利用多样化人类数据，在人形仿真基准和真实世界部署中实现最先进的数据效率和鲁棒OOD泛化，展示零样本任务迁移能力；在世界建模（WM-UniT）中，通过统一token作为条件对齐跨具身动力学，实现直接的人类到人形机器人动作迁移。

Conclusion: UniT通过诱导高度对齐的跨具身表示（t-SNE可视化证实人类和人形机器人特征收敛到共享流形），为将大量人类知识提炼为通用人形机器人能力提供了可扩展路径。

Abstract: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by the scarcity of robotic data. While massive egocentric human data offers a scalable alternative, bridging the cross-embodiment chasm remains a fundamental challenge due to kinematic mismatches. We introduce UniT (Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring), a framework that establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer. Grounded in the philosophy that heterogeneous kinematics share universal visual consequences, UniT employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics to physical outcomes, while vision reconstructs actions to filter out irrelevant visual confounders. Concurrently, a fusion branch synergies these purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space of embodiment-agnostic physical intents. We validate UniT across two paradigms: 1) Policy Learning (VLA-UniT): By predicting these unified tokens, it effectively leverages diverse human data to achieve state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on both humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments, notably demonstrating zero-shot task transfer. 2) World Modeling (WM-UniT): By aligning cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions, it realizes direct human-to-humanoid action transfer. This alignment ensures that human data seamlessly translates into enhanced action controllability for humanoid video generation. Ultimately, by inducing a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation (empirically verified by t-SNE visualizations revealing the convergence of human and humanoid features into a shared manifold), UniT offers a scalable path to distill vast human knowledge into general-purpose humanoid capabilities.

</details>


### [302] [Mask World Model: Predicting What Matters for Robust Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19683)
*Yunfan Lou,Xiaowei Chi,Xiaojie Zhang,Zezhong Qian,Chengxuan Li,Rongyu Zhang,Yaoxu Lyu,Guoyu Song,Chuyao Fu,Haoxuan Xu,Pengwei Wang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MWM（Mask World Model）通过预测语义掩码而非像素来学习机器人控制策略，利用几何信息瓶颈过滤视觉噪声，提升泛化能力和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于RGB视频预测的世界模型容易过拟合于动态背景、光照变化等无关因素，导致泛化能力差、控制策略脆弱。需要一种能捕捉核心物理动态而过滤视觉噪声的方法。

Method: 提出Mask World Model（MWM），利用视频扩散架构预测语义掩码的演化而非像素。通过几何信息瓶颈强制模型学习物理动态和接触关系，并与扩散策略头集成实现端到端控制。

Result: 在LIBERO和RLBench仿真基准测试中显著优于最先进的RGB世界模型。真实世界实验和鲁棒性评估（随机token剪枝）显示MWM具有优越的泛化能力和对纹理信息损失的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过预测语义掩码而非像素，MWM能够更好地捕捉物理动态，过滤视觉噪声，从而产生更可靠、泛化能力更强的机器人控制策略。

Abstract: World models derived from large-scale video generative pre-training have emerged as a promising paradigm for generalist robot policy learning. However, standard approaches often focus on high-fidelity RGB video prediction, this can result in overfitting to irrelevant factors, such as dynamic backgrounds and illumination changes. These distractions reduce the model's ability to generalize, ultimately leading to unreliable and fragile control policies. To address this, we introduce the Mask World Model (MWM), which leverages video diffusion architectures to predict the evolution of semantic masks instead of pixels. This shift imposes a geometric information bottleneck, forcing the model to capture essential physical dynamics and contact relations while filtering out visual noise. We seamlessly integrate this mask dynamics backbone with a diffusion-based policy head to enable robust end-to-end control. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the superiority of MWM on the LIBERO and RLBench simulation benchmarks, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art RGB-based world models. Furthermore, real-world experiments and robustness evaluation (via random token pruning) reveal that MWM exhibits superior generalization capabilities and robust resilience to texture information loss.

</details>


### [303] [Learning Hybrid-Control Policies for High-Precision In-Contact Manipulation Under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19677)
*Hunter L. Brown,Geoffrey Hollinger,Stefan Lee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MATCH方法，通过混合位置-力控制策略动态选择每个控制维度使用力或位置控制，显著提升脆弱插孔任务的成功率并减少损坏


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于姿态的强化学习控制策略在处理如脆弱连接器插入等涉及力约束的任务时存在局限，主要依赖精心调校的低级控制器来避免损坏动作，缺乏对力的显式控制

Method: 提出混合位置-力控制策略，学习动态选择每个控制维度使用力或位置控制；引入MATCH训练方法，调整策略动作概率以显式反映混合控制中的模式选择行为

Result: 在极端定位不确定性下的脆弱插孔任务中，MATCH比姿态控制策略成功率提高10%，损坏减少5倍；在1600次仿真到真实实验中，高噪声环境下成功率翻倍（33% vs 68%），比可变阻抗策略平均施力减少30%

Conclusion: MATCH方法通过混合位置-力控制策略有效解决了脆弱连接器插入等涉及力约束的任务，在保持数据效率的同时显著提升了任务成功率和安全性

Abstract: Reinforcement learning-based control policies have been frequently demonstrated to be more effective than analytical techniques for many manipulation tasks. Commonly, these methods learn neural control policies that predict end-effector pose changes directly from observed state information. For tasks like inserting delicate connectors which induce force constraints, pose-based policies have limited explicit control over force and rely on carefully tuned low-level controllers to avoid executing damaging actions. In this work, we present hybrid position-force control policies that learn to dynamically select when to use force or position control in each control dimension. To improve learning efficiency of these policies, we introduce Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH) which adjusts policy action probabilities to explicitly mirror the mode selection behavior in hybrid control. We validate MATCH's learned policy effectiveness using fragile peg-in-hole tasks under extreme localization uncertainty. We find MATCH substantially outperforms pose-control policies -- solving these tasks with up to 10% higher success rates and 5x fewer peg breaks than pose-only policies under common types of state estimation error. MATCH also demonstrates data efficiency equal to pose-control policies, despite learning in a larger and more complex action space. In over 1600 sim-to-real experiments, we find MATCH succeeds twice as often as pose policies in high noise settings (33% vs.~68%) and applies ~30% less force on average compared to variable impedance policies on a Franka FR3 in laboratory conditions.

</details>


### [304] [Multi-Cycle Spatio-Temporal Adaptation in Human-Robot Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19670)
*Alex Cuellar,Michael Hagenow,Julie Shah*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAPIDDS框架通过联合建模个体的空间行为（运动路径）和时间行为（任务完成时间），在任务级和运动级同时优化人机协作计划，提高效率并减少近距离干扰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人机协作优化方法通常孤立地考虑任务级和运动级适应：任务级方法优化分配和调度但忽略空间干扰，运动级方法专注于避碰但忽视任务上下文。需要统一这两种方法以更好地适应个体化的人类能力和偏好。

Method: 提出RAPIDDS框架，通过多周期交互学习个体的空间行为（运动路径）和时间行为（任务完成时间），然后联合适应任务调度并引导机器人运动的扩散模型，以最大化效率并最小化近距离干扰。

Result: 通过仿真消融研究和7自由度机械臂的物理机器人场景验证了双重适应的重要性。用户研究（n=32）显示，与非自适应系统相比，在客观指标（效率和近距离）和主观指标（流畅性和用户偏好）上均有显著改进。

Conclusion: RAPIDDS通过统一任务级和运动级适应，实现了更有效的人机协作计划优化，能够考虑个体化的空间和时间行为，显著提升了协作效率和用户体验。

Abstract: Effective human-robot teaming is crucial for the practical deployment of robots in human workspaces. However, optimizing joint human-robot plans remains a challenge due to the difficulty of modeling individualized human capabilities and preferences. While prior research has leveraged the multi-cycle structure of domains like manufacturing to learn an individual's tendencies and adapt plans over repeated interactions, these techniques typically consider task-level and motion-level adaptation in isolation. Task-level methods optimize allocation and scheduling but often ignore spatial interference in close-proximity scenarios; conversely, motion-level methods focus on collision avoidance while ignoring the broader task context. This paper introduces RAPIDDS, a framework that unifies these approaches by modeling an individual's spatial behavior (motion paths) and temporal behavior (time required to complete tasks) over multiple cycles. RAPIDDS then jointly adapts task schedules and steers diffusion models of robot motions to maximize efficiency and minimize proximity accounting for these individualized models. We demonstrate the importance of this dual adaptation through an ablation study in simulation and a physical robot scenario using a 7-DOF robot arm. Finally, we present a user study (n=32) showing significant plan improvement compared to non-adaptive systems across both objective metrics, such as efficiency and proximity, and subjective measures, including fluency and user preference. See this paper's companion video at: https://youtu.be/55Q3lq1fINs.

</details>


### [305] [A Gesture-Based Visual Learning Model for Acoustophoretic Interactions using a Swarm of AcoustoBots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19643)
*Alex Lin,Lei Gao,Narsimlu Kemsaram,Sriram Subramanian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个基于手势的视觉学习框架，用于与多模态声学机器人平台进行无接触人-群体交互，通过视觉语言模型实现手势识别并映射到触觉、音频和悬浮三种模态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有声学机器人（AcoustoBots）虽然能够提供空中触觉、定向音频和声悬浮功能，但依赖于脚本命令，缺乏实时人机交互的直观界面。需要开发一种无接触的人-群体交互系统，使人类能够直观地控制多模态机器人群体。

Method: 结合ESP32-CAM手势捕捉、PhaseSpace运动追踪、集中式处理，以及基于OpenCLIP的视觉学习模型（VLM）配合线性探测，对三种手势进行分类并将其映射到触觉、音频和悬浮三种模态。系统通过手势识别实现多模态切换控制。

Result: 验证准确率从约67%（小数据集）提升至近98%（大数据集）。在两个声学机器人的集成实验中，系统在90次试验中实现了87.8%的整体手势到模态切换准确率，平均端到端延迟为3.95秒。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了基于视觉语言模型的手势界面用于多模态人-群体交互的可行性。虽然当前系统受限于集中式处理、静态手势集和受控环境评估，但为更具表现力、可扩展和易访问的群体机器人界面奠定了基础。

Abstract: AcoustoBots are mobile acoustophoretic robots capable of delivering mid-air haptics, directional audio, and acoustic levitation, but existing implementations rely on scripted commands and lack an intuitive interface for real-time human control. This work presents a gesture-based visual learning framework for contactless human-swarm interaction with a multimodal AcoustoBot platform. The system combines ESP32-CAM gesture capture, PhaseSpace motion tracking, centralized processing, and an OpenCLIP-based visual learning model (VLM) with linear probing to classify three hand gestures and map them to haptics, audio, and levitation modalities. Validation accuracy improved from about 67% with a small dataset to nearly 98% with the largest dataset. In integrated experiments with two AcoustoBots, the system achieved an overall gesture-to-modality switching accuracy of 87.8% across 90 trials, with an average end-to-end latency of 3.95 seconds. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using a vision-language-model-based gesture interface for multimodal human-swarm interaction. While the current system is limited by centralized processing, a static gesture set, and controlled-environment evaluation, it establishes a foundation for more expressive, scalable, and accessible swarm robotic interfaces.

</details>


### [306] [Autonomous UAV Pipeline Near-proximity Inspection via Disturbance-Aware Predictive Visual Servoing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19618)
*Wen Li,Hui Wang,Jinya Su,Cunjia Liu,Wen-Hua Chen,Shihua Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉模型预测控制的自主四旋翼无人机三维管道近距检测框架，通过扩展状态卡尔曼滤波处理视觉更新率低和干扰，结合地形自适应速度设计，在仿真和真实实验中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 管道检测对能源运输安全至关重要，但面临距离长、地形复杂、人工检测风险高等挑战。无人机虽提供灵活传感平台，但可靠的自主检测仍具挑战性，特别是在三维场景下需要处理视觉更新率低、测量噪声和环境不确定性等问题。

Method: 提出基于图像视觉伺服的模型预测控制（VMPC）框架，将四旋翼动力学与图像特征运动学耦合为统一预测模型。开发扩展状态卡尔曼滤波与图像特征预测（ESKF-PRE）处理视觉更新率低和干扰，并将估计的集总干扰纳入VMPC预测模型，形成ESKF-PRE-VMPC框架。引入地形自适应速度设计，在未知地形坡度下维持期望巡航速度并生成垂直速度参考。

Result: 在高保真Gazebo仿真和真实实验中验证了框架有效性。真实测试中，无风直线管道检测时，管道方向RMSE降低52.63%，图像横向偏差RMSE降低75.04%。在风干扰和弯管任务中，基线方法失败而本方法成功完成。使用开源纳米四旋翼进行室内实验验证。

Conclusion: 提出的ESKF-PRE-VMPC框架能够有效处理三维管道检测中的视觉更新率低、测量噪声和环境不确定性等挑战，通过地形自适应速度设计实现在未知地形上的稳定检测，为自主无人机管道检测提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable pipeline inspection is critical to safe energy transportation, but is constrained by long distances, complex terrain, and risks to human inspectors. Unmanned aerial vehicles provide a flexible sensing platform, yet reliable autonomous inspection remains challenging. This paper presents an autonomous quadrotor near-proximity pipeline inspection framework for three-dimensional scenarios based on image-based visual servoing model predictive control (VMPC). A unified predictive model couples quadrotor dynamics with image feature kinematics, enabling direct image-space prediction within the control loop. To address low-rate visual updates, measurement noise, and environmental uncertainties, an extended-state Kalman filtering scheme with image feature prediction (ESKF-PRE) is developed, and the estimated lumped disturbances are incorporated into the VMPC prediction model, yielding the ESKF-PRE-VMPC framework. A terrain-adaptive velocity design is introduced to maintain the desired cruising speed while generating vertical velocity references over unknown terrain slopes without prior terrain information. The framework is validated in high-fidelity Gazebo simulations and real-world experiments. In real-world tests, the proposed method reduces RMSE by 52.63% and 75.04% in pipeline orientation and lateral deviation in the image, respectively, for straight-pipeline inspection without wind, and successfully completes both wind-disturbance and bend-pipeline tasks where baseline method fails. An open-source nano quadrotor is modified for indoor experimentation.

</details>


### [307] [LiveVLN: Breaking the Stop-and-Go Loop in Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19536)
*Xiangchen Wang,Weiye Zhu,Teng Wang,TianTian Geng,Zekai Zhang,Zhiyuan Qi,Jinyu Yang,Feng Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LiveVLN是一个无需训练、通过多步动作延续增强预训练VLM导航器的框架，旨在减少导航中的等待时间，实现更连续的实体导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有导航系统在基准测试中表现良好，但在实际部署中常出现明显的"走走停停"现象。这是因为感知-推理-执行循环仍然是阻塞的：每次新观察后，控制器必须等待感知、传输和推理完成后才能继续运动。仅减少动作生成成本无法消除冗余等待。

Method: LiveVLN通过多步动作延续增强预训练VLM导航器。它不暂停等待每个完整的感知-推理循环，而是将执行与新到达观察的处理重叠，允许在可执行前缀耗尽之前传递刷新的未来动作。该框架在运行时操作，可与兼容的预训练VLM导航器集成。

Result: 在R2R和RxR数据集上，LiveVLN保持了基准性能，同时减少了等待时间并提高了动作可用性。在实际部署中，平均每集等待时间减少高达77.7%，在StreamVLN上缩短了12.6%的挂钟时间，在NaVIDA上缩短了19.6%，实现了更连贯的执行。

Conclusion: LiveVLN通过重叠执行与观察处理，解决了导航系统中的阻塞等待问题，实现了更连续的实体导航，同时保持了基准性能，显著减少了实际部署中的等待时间。

Abstract: Recent navigation systems achieve strong benchmark results, yet real-world deployment often remains visibly stop-and-go. This bottleneck arises because the sense-inference-execution loop is still blocking: after each new observation, the controller must wait for sensing, transmission, and inference before motion can continue. Reducing action-generation cost alone therefore does not remove redundant waiting. To address this issue, we present LiveVLN, a training-free framework for more continuous embodied navigation by augmenting pretrained VLM navigators with multi-step action continuation. Instead of pausing for each full sense-and-inference round, LiveVLN overlaps execution with the processing of newly arrived observations, allowing refreshed future actions to be handed off before the current executable prefix is exhausted. This design keeps actions continuously available during motion, reducing idle waiting and enabling smoother online execution. The framework operates at runtime and can be integrated with compatible pretrained VLM navigators. Across R2R and RxR, LiveVLN preserves benchmark performance while reducing waiting time and improving action availability. In real-world deployments, it cuts average episode waiting time by up to $77.7\%$ and shortens wall-clock episode time by $12.6\%$ on StreamVLN and $19.6\%$ on NaVIDA, yielding more coherent execution during deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/NIneeeeeem/LiveVLN.

</details>


### [308] [Assessing VLM-Driven Semantic-Affordance Inference for Non-Humanoid Robot Morphologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19509)
*Jess Jones,Raul Santos-Rodriguez,Sabine Hauert*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探索了视觉语言模型（VLMs）能否为形态不同于人类的机器人有效推断功能可供性，发现VLMs在非人形机器人上表现出有前景的泛化能力，但在不同物体领域性能不一致，且存在高假阴性率、低假阳性率的保守预测模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在理解人-物交互方面表现出色，但其在形态与人类根本不同的机器人系统中的应用尚未充分探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索VLMs能否为不同形态的机器人有效推断功能可供性，这对于将VLMs部署到多样化机器人应用中至关重要。

Method: 研究引入了一个新颖的混合数据集，结合了标注的真实世界机器人可供性-物体关系与VLM生成的合成场景。通过对多个物体类别和机器人形态进行实证分析，评估VLM的性能表现。

Result: 实验表明，VLMs在非人形机器人形态上显示出有前景的泛化能力，但在不同物体领域的性能存在显著差异。关键发现是：在所有形态和物体类别中，VLMs表现出低假阳性率但高假阴性率的一致模式，表明其倾向于保守的功能可供性预测。这种模式在新颖工具使用场景和非传统物体操作中尤为明显。

Conclusion: 在机器人系统中有效集成VLMs需要补充方法来缓解过度保守的行为，同时保持低假阳性率带来的固有安全优势。研究揭示了VLMs在非人形机器人功能可供性推断中的潜力和局限性。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in understanding human-object interactions, but their application to robotic systems with non-humanoid morphologies remains largely unexplored. This work investigates whether VLMs can effectively infer affordances for robots with fundamentally different embodiments than humans, addressing a critical gap in the deployment of these models for diverse robotic applications. We introduce a novel hybrid dataset that combines annotated real-world robotic affordance-object relations with VLM-generated synthetic scenarios, and perform an empirical analysis of VLM performance across multiple object categories and robot morphologies, revealing significant variations in affordance inference capabilities. Our experiments demonstrate that while VLMs show promising generalisation to non-humanoid robot forms, their performance is notably inconsistent across different object domains. Critically, we identify a consistent pattern of low false positive rates but high false negative rates across all morphologies and object categories, indicating that VLMs tend toward conservative affordance predictions. Our analysis reveals that this pattern is particularly pronounced for novel tool use scenarios and unconventional object manipulations, suggesting that effective integration of VLMs in robotic systems requires complementary approaches to mitigate over-conservative behaviour while preserving the inherent safety benefits of low false positive rates.

</details>


### [309] [Wrench-Aware Admittance Control for Unknown-Payload Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19469)
*Hossein Gholampour,Logan E. Beaver*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种针对未知负载的力矩感知导纳控制框架，通过力-力矩测量补偿负载质心偏移，改善机器人拾放操作的运输和放置精度，同时保持柔顺运动能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 未知负载（特别是质心与工具中心点不对齐时）会在机器人腕部产生偏移力矩，导致柔顺控制器误判为外部交互力矩，引起非预期的柔顺运动、更大的跟踪误差和运输精度降低。

Method: 采用力矩感知导纳控制框架：1）使用三轴平移激励项减少运输过程中的负载诱导力效应；2）抓取后先估计负载质量用于运输补偿，然后通过后续平移运动中收集的腕部力-力矩测量估计负载质心相对于TCP的偏移。

Result: 实验结果表明，与未校正的放置相比，该方法在保持柔顺运动的同时，显著改善了运输和放置性能。

Conclusion: 该力矩感知导纳控制框架能有效补偿未知负载的质心偏移，提高拾放操作的精度和可靠性，同时保持机器人系统的柔顺性。

Abstract: Unknown payloads can strongly affect compliant robotic manipulation, especially when the payload center of mass is not aligned with the tool center point. In this case, the payload generates an offset wrench at the robot wrist. During motion, this wrench is not only related to payload weight, but also to payload inertia. If it is not modeled, the compliant controller can interpret it as an external interaction wrench, which causes unintended compliant motion, larger tracking error, and reduced transport accuracy. This paper presents a wrench-aware admittance control framework for unknown-payload pick-and-place using a UR5e robot. The method uses force-torque measurements in two different roles. First, a three-axis translational excitation term is used to reduce payload-induced force effects during transport without making the robot excessively stiff. Second, after grasping, the controller first estimates payload mass for transport compensation and then estimates the payload CoM offset relative to the TCP using wrist force-torque measurements collected during the subsequent translational motion. This helps improve object placement and stacking behavior. Experimental results show improved transport and placement performance compared with uncorrected placement while preserving compliant motion.

</details>


### [310] [Forward Dynamics of Variable Topology Mechanisms - The Case of Constraint Activation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19419)
*Andreas Mueller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于可变拓扑机构动态分析的拓扑切换条件，包括冗余坐标投影方程和最小坐标Voronets方程两种形式，应用于平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机械系统在运动过程中会发生运动学拓扑变化（如理想接触、静摩擦、部件锁定等），特别是在人机交互中日益重要。预测可变拓扑机构的动态行为需要解决非光滑动力学问题，核心挑战在于拓扑切换事件时的物理意义过渡条件。

Method: 提出了两种拓扑切换条件形式：1) 使用冗余坐标的投影运动方程；2) 使用最小坐标的Voronets方程。讨论了两种方法的计算特性，并应用于平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定问题。

Result: 成功建立了物理意义明确的拓扑切换条件，能够处理机构拓扑变化时的动态行为。两种方法均能有效描述关节锁定等拓扑切换事件，为可变拓扑机构的动态分析提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 提出的拓扑切换条件为解决可变拓扑机构的非光滑动力学问题提供了有效方法，特别适用于人机交互中机构锁定等应用场景。两种方程形式各有优势，可根据具体问题选择使用。

Abstract: Many mechanical systems exhibit changes in their kinematic topology altering the mobility. Ideal contact is the best known cause, but also stiction and controlled locking of parts of a mechanism lead to topology changes. The latter is becoming an important issue in human-machine interaction. Anticipating the dynamic behavior of variable topology mechanisms requires solving a non-smooth dynamic problem. The core challenge is a physically meaningful transition condition at the topology switching events. Such a condition is presented in this paper. Two versions are reported, one using projected motion equations in terms of redundant coordinates, and another one using the Voronets equations in terms of minimal coordinates. Their computational properties are discussed. Results are shown for joint locking of a planar 3R mechanisms and a 6DOF industrial manipulator.

</details>


### [311] [M$^{2}$GRPO: Mamba-based Multi-Agent Group Relative Policy Optimization for Biomimetic Underwater Robots Pursuit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19404)
*Yukai Feng,Zhiheng Wu,Zhengxing Wu,Junwen Gu,Junzhi Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: M²GRPO：基于Mamba的多智能体组相对策略优化框架，用于仿生水下机器人协同追捕，解决长时决策、部分可观测性和协调问题，在CTDE范式下结合选择性状态空间Mamba策略与组相对优势归一化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿生水下机器人协同追捕中，传统策略学习方法面临长时决策、部分可观测性和机器人间协调的挑战，需要同时具备表达能力和稳定性。

Method: 提出M²GRPO框架：1）基于Mamba的策略利用观测历史捕获长时依赖，通过注意力机制编码智能体间交互，通过归一化高斯采样产生有界连续动作；2）组相对优势通过归一化每个episode内智能体奖励获得，通过多智能体GRPO扩展优化，在CTDE范式下实现。

Result: 大量仿真和真实水池实验表明，M²GRPO在不同团队规模和逃避策略下，在追捕成功率和捕获效率方面均优于MAPPO和循环基线方法。

Conclusion: 该框架为仿生机器人系统协同水下追捕提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，显著减少训练资源需求同时实现稳定可扩展的策略更新。

Abstract: Traditional policy learning methods in cooperative pursuit face fundamental challenges in biomimetic underwater robots, where long-horizon decision making, partial observability, and inter-robot coordination require both expressiveness and stability. To address these issues, a novel framework called Mamba-based multi-agent group relative policy optimization (M$^{2}$GRPO) is proposed, which integrates a selective state-space Mamba policy with group-relative policy optimization under the centralized-training and decentralized-execution (CTDE) paradigm. Specifically, the Mamba-based policy leverages observation history to capture long-horizon temporal dependencies and exploits attention-based relational features to encode inter-agent interactions, producing bounded continuous actions through normalized Gaussian sampling. To further improve credit assignment without sacrificing stability, the group-relative advantages are obtained by normalizing rewards across agents within each episode and optimized through a multi-agent extension of GRPO, significantly reducing the demand for training resources while enabling stable and scalable policy updates. Extensive simulations and real-world pool experiments across team scales and evader strategies demonstrate that M$^{2}$GRPO consistently outperforms MAPPO and recurrent baselines in both pursuit success rate and capture efficiency. Overall, the proposed framework provides a practical and scalable solution for cooperative underwater pursuit with biomimetic robot systems.

</details>


### [312] [Achieving Interaction Fluidity in a Wizard-of-Oz Robotic System: A Prototype for Fluid Error-Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19374)
*Carlos Baptista De Lima,Julian Hough,Frank Förster,Patrick Holthaus,Yongjun Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于虚拟现实的HRI仿真平台，具备中断与纠正、轮询、延迟测量与优化、时间精确动作重现等特性，以支持流畅的人机语音交互


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于语音的人机交互体验仍然生硬且令人沮丧，缺乏合适的开发平台来改进交互流畅性，即使在用于数据收集和原型设计的Wizard-of-Oz模式下也存在障碍

Method: 基于先前系统，提出中断与纠正、轮询能力、延迟测量与优化、基于日志数据的时间精确动作重现等关键标准，并开发了满足这些标准的虚拟现实HRI仿真环境

Result: 开发了一个用于移动机械臂的虚拟现实HRI仿真环境，该系统具备所提出的所有关键特性，能够支持流畅的错误纠正和交互

Conclusion: 通过提出关键标准并实现相应的VR仿真平台，为解决人机语音交互的流畅性问题提供了有效的开发工具，特别适用于Wizard-of-Oz模式下的数据收集和原型设计

Abstract: Achieving truly fluid interaction with robots with speech interfaces remains a hard problem, and the experience of current Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) remains laboured and frustrating. Some of the barriers to fluid interaction stem from a lack of a suitable development platform for HRI for improving interaction, even in robotic Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) modes of operation used for data collection and prototyping. Based on previous systems, we propose the properties of interruptibility and correction (IaC), pollability, latency measurement and optimisation and time-accurate reproducibility of actions from logging data as key criteria for a fluid WoZ system to support fluid error correction. We finish by presenting a Virtual Reality (VR) HRI simulation environment for mobile manipulators which meets these criteria.

</details>


### [313] [Quadruped Parkour Learning: Sparsely Gated Mixture of Experts with Visual Input](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19344)
*Michael Ziegltrum,Jianhao Jiao,Tianhu Peng,Chengxu Zhou,Dimitrios Kanoulas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究将稀疏门控混合专家架构应用于视觉机器人跑酷，相比传统MLP架构在相同激活参数下性能显著提升，成功穿越障碍的试验次数翻倍，同时保持计算效率优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人跑酷是极具挑战性的移动任务，需要处理大不连续性地形如高台阶。现有方法多采用密集激活的序列MLP架构，而稀疏门控混合专家架构在大语言模型领域已证明能有效提升可扩展性和性能。本研究旨在探索该架构在视觉机器人跑酷中的应用潜力。

Method: 在控制参数数量匹配的条件下，比较标准MLP和稀疏门控混合专家架构的控制策略。使用真实Unitree Go2四足机器人进行实验，评估两种架构在穿越大型障碍物时的性能表现。

Result: MoE策略在穿越大型障碍物时成功试验次数是标准MLP基准的两倍。要达到与MoE相当的性能，标准MLP需要扩展参数数量以匹配MoE模型总参数，但这会导致计算时间增加14.3%。

Conclusion: 稀疏门控混合专家架构在性能和计算效率之间提供了有利的权衡，能够改善视觉机器人跑酷控制策略的可扩展性，为机器人移动控制提供了更高效的架构选择。

Abstract: Robotic parkour provides a compelling benchmark for advancing locomotion over highly challenging terrain, including large discontinuities such as elevated steps. Recent approaches have demonstrated impressive capabilities, including dynamic climbing and jumping, but typically rely on sequential multilayer perceptron (MLP) architectures with densely activated layers. In contrast, sparsely gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures have emerged in the large language model domain as an effective paradigm for improving scalability and performance by activating only a subset of parameters at inference time. In this work, we investigate the application of sparsely gated MoE architectures to vision-based robotic parkour. We compare control policies based on standard MLPs and MoE architectures under a controlled setting where the number of active parameters at inference time is matched. Experimental results on a real Unitree Go2 quadruped robot demonstrate clear performance gains, with the MoE policy achieving double the number of successful trials in traversing large obstacles compared to a standard MLP baseline. We further show that achieving comparable performance with a standard MLP requires scaling its parameter count to match that of the total MoE model, resulting in a 14.3\% increase in computation time. These results highlight that sparsely gated MoE architectures provide a favorable trade-off between performance and computational efficiency, enabling improved scaling of control policies for vision-based robotic parkour. An anonymized link to the codebase is https://osf.io/v2kqj/files/github?view_only=7977dee10c0a44769184498eaba72e44.

</details>


### [314] [Multimodal embodiment-aware navigation transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19267)
*Louis Dezons,Quentin Picard,Rémi Marsal,François Goulette,David Filliat*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ViLiNT：基于多模态注意力的目标导航策略，通过Transformer融合RGB、LiDAR、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符，结合扩散模型生成轨迹，并利用路径通过性预测头进行轨迹评分，显著提升分布偏移下的导航鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于监督学习的地面机器人目标导航模型在零样本迁移方面表现良好，但在环境、机器人或传感器配置发生变化时，其避障能力会显著下降。需要开发更鲁棒的导航系统来应对分布偏移问题。

Method: 提出ViLiNT多模态注意力策略：1）使用Transformer架构融合RGB图像、3D LiDAR点云、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符；2）用Transformer输出条件化扩散模型生成可导航轨迹；3）基于自动生成的离线标签训练路径通过性预测头，对扩散模型生成的轨迹进行评分排序；4）引入机器人本体标记使模型能根据机器人尺寸生成和选择轨迹。

Result: 在三个模拟环境中，ViLiNT相比最先进的纯视觉基线（NoMaD）平均提升166%的成功率。真实世界部署中，机器人在障碍物场地导航的性能提升得到验证。多模态融合与碰撞预测机制的结合显著提高了越野导航的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ViLiNT通过多模态融合和基于机器人本体的轨迹生成与选择机制，有效提升了目标导航在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。该方法结合了互补的几何与外观线索，并通过路径通过性预测增强了避障能力，为实际部署提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Goal-conditioned navigation models for ground robots trained using supervised learning show promising zero-shot transfer, but their collision-avoidance capability nevertheless degrades under distribution shift, i.e. environmental, robot or sensor configuration changes. We propose ViLiNT a multimodal, attention-based policy for goal navigation, trained on heterogeneous data from multiple platforms and environments, which improves robustness with two key features. First, we fuse RGB images, 3D LiDAR point clouds, a goal embedding and a robot's embodiment descriptor with a transformer architecture to capture complementary geometry and appearance cues. The transformer's output is used to condition a diffusion model that generates navigable trajectories. Second, using automatically generated offline labels, we train a path clearance prediction head for scoring and ranking trajectories produced by the diffusion model. The diffusion conditioning as well as the trajectory ranking head depend on a robot's embodiment token that allows our model to generate and select trajectories with respect to the robot's dimensions. Across three simulated environments, ViLiNT improves Success Rate on average by 166\% over equivalent state-of-the-art vision-only baseline (NoMaD). This increase in performance is confirmed through real-world deployments of a rover navigating in obstacle fields. These results highlight that combining multimodal fusion with our collision prediction mechanism leads to improved off-road navigation robustness.

</details>


### [315] [Multi-Step Gaussian Process Propagation for Adaptive Path Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19148)
*Alex Beaudin,Bjørn Andreas Kristiansen,Kristoffer Gryte,Corrado Chiatante,Morten Omholt Alver,Murat Arcak,Tor Arne Johansen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于高斯过程的路径规划方法OLAhGP，用于机器人环境探索与监测，能够适应多模态环境感知数据并处理状态和输入约束，在藻华监测场景中相比现有方法显著提升信息获取效率和分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人环境探索与监测的路径规划高度依赖于对环境的当前认知，需要有效处理环境信念中的不确定性。现有方法在整合多模态传感数据和处理约束方面存在不足，需要开发能够适应复杂环境数据并保证鲁棒性的路径规划方法。

Method: 提出OLAhGP方法：基于高斯过程建模环境不确定性，将路径规划问题转化为对未来航点的优化。采用滚动时域方式优化航点序列，成本函数基于高斯过程在所有航点上的后验分布。该方法能够整合多模态环境感知数据，并处理状态和输入约束。

Result: 在自主水面艇的藻华监测场景中，使用高保真模型和现场传感数据进行验证。模拟和实验结果表明，相比现有方法，OLAhGP在相同采样数量下能生成更具信息量的路径，在叶绿素a富集水域中识别藻华的准确率显著提高，通过总误分类概率和二元误分类率等指标衡量。

Conclusion: OLAhGP方法通过高斯过程有效建模环境不确定性，结合滚动时域优化和多模态数据整合，为机器人环境探索与监测提供了高效且鲁棒的路径规划解决方案，在藻华监测等实际应用中展现出优越性能。

Abstract: Efficient and robust path planning hinges on combining all accessible information sources. In particular, the task of path planning for robotic environmental exploration and monitoring depends highly on the current belief of the world. To capture the uncertainty in the belief, we present a Gaussian process based path planning method that adapts to multi-modal environmental sensing data and incorporates state and input constraints. To solve the path planning problem, we optimize over future waypoints in a receding horizon fashion, and our cost is thus a function of the Gaussian process posterior over all these waypoints. We demonstrate this method, dubbed OLAhGP, on an autonomous surface vessel using oceanic algal bloom data from both a high-fidelity model and in-situ sensing data in a monitoring scenario. Our simulated and experimental results demonstrate significant improvement over existing methods. With the same number of samples, our method generates more informative paths and achieves greater accuracy in identifying algal blooms in chlorophyll a rich waters, measured with respect to total misclassification probability and binary misclassification rate over the domain of interest.

</details>


### [316] [Multi-Gait Learning for Humanoid Robots Using Reinforcement Learning with Selective Adversarial Motion Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19102)
*Yuanye Wu,Keyi Wang,Linqi Ye,Boyang Xing*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出选择性对抗运动先验(AMP)策略，在统一强化学习框架中让仿人机器人掌握五种步态，对稳定性关键步态使用AMP加速收敛，对高动态步态省略AMP避免过度约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿人机器人在统一强化学习框架中学习多种步态面临挑战，因为不同步态对稳定性和动态表现的要求存在冲突。传统方法难以同时满足周期性稳定步态和高动态步态的不同需求。

Method: 采用选择性AMP策略：对周期性、稳定性关键的步态（行走、正步、爬楼梯）应用AMP以加速收敛并抑制异常行为；对高动态步态（奔跑、跳跃）故意省略AMP以避免过度约束运动。使用PPO算法结合领域随机化在仿真中训练，通过零样本仿真到现实迁移部署到物理12自由度仿人机器人。

Result: 定量比较表明，选择性AMP策略在所有五种步态上均优于统一AMP策略，实现了更快的收敛速度、更低的跟踪误差，在稳定性关键步态上获得更高的成功率，同时不牺牲动态步态所需的敏捷性。

Conclusion: 选择性AMP策略有效解决了多步态学习中的冲突需求，通过针对不同步态特性自适应地应用运动先验，实现了在统一框架下同时掌握稳定性和动态性要求各异的多种步态。

Abstract: Learning diverse locomotion skills for humanoid robots in a unified reinforcement learning framework remains challenging due to the conflicting requirements of stability and dynamic expressiveness across different gaits. We present a multi-gait learning approach that enables a humanoid robot to master five distinct gaits -- walking, goose-stepping, running, stair climbing, and jumping -- using a consistent policy structure, action space, and reward formulation. The key contribution is a selective Adversarial Motion Prior (AMP) strategy: AMP is applied to periodic, stability-critical gaits (walking, goose-stepping, stair climbing) where it accelerates convergence and suppresses erratic behavior, while being deliberately omitted for highly dynamic gaits (running, jumping) where its regularization would over-constrain the motion. Policies are trained via PPO with domain randomization in simulation and deployed on a physical 12-DOF humanoid robot through zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. Quantitative comparisons demonstrate that selective AMP outperforms a uniform AMP policy across all five gaits, achieving faster convergence, lower tracking error, and higher success rates on stability-focused gaits without sacrificing the agility required for dynamic ones.

</details>


### [317] [Differentiable Satellite Constellation Configuration via Relaxed Coverage and Revisit Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19062)
*Shreeyam Kacker,Kerri Cahoy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于梯度优化的卫星星座设计方法，通过四种连续松弛技术使覆盖和重访指标可微分，相比传统方法显著减少计算需求


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有星座设计方法要么局限于对称参数化家族（如Walker星座），要么依赖计算密集的元启发式方法。梯度优化因覆盖和重访指标的非可微性（涉及二元可见性指示器和离散最大操作）而被认为不可行。

Method: 引入四种连续松弛技术：软sigmoid可见性、noisy-OR多卫星聚合、leaky积分器重访间隔跟踪和LogSumExp软最大值。结合∂SGP4可微分轨道传播器，构建从轨道要素到任务级目标的完全可微分管道。

Result: 该方法能从不规则初始化恢复Walker-Delta几何，仅通过梯度发现具有远地点驻留的椭圆Molniya-like轨道。相比模拟退火、遗传算法和差分进化基线，梯度方法在约750次评估内恢复Walker等效几何，而三种黑盒基线即使使用约四倍评估预算仍停留在显著更差的重访性能。

Conclusion: 通过连续松弛技术使星座设计问题可微分，实现了高效的梯度优化方法，显著优于传统元启发式方法，为卫星星座设计提供了新的计算框架。

Abstract: Satellite constellation design requires optimizing orbital parameters across multiple satellites to maximize mission specific metrics. For many types of mission, it is desirable to maximize coverage and minimize revisit gaps over ground targets. Existing approaches to constellation design either restrict the design space to symmetric parametric families such as Walker constellations, or rely on metaheuristic methods that require significant compute and many iterations. Gradient-based optimization has been considered intractable due to the non-differentiability of coverage and revisit metrics, which involve binary visibility indicators and discrete max operations. We introduce four continuous relaxations: soft sigmoid visibility, noisy-OR multi-satellite aggregation, leaky integrator revisit gap tracking, and LogSumExp soft-maximum, which when composed with the $\partial$SGP4 differentiable orbit propagator, yield a fully differentiable pipeline from orbital elements to mission-level objectives. We show that this scheme can recover Walker-Delta geometry from irregular initializations, and discovers elliptical Molniya-like orbits with apogee dwell over extreme latitudes from only gradients. Compared to simulated annealing (SA), genetic algorithm (GA), and differential evolution (DE) baselines, our gradient-based method recovers Walker-equivalent geometry within ${\sim}750$ evaluations, whereas the three black-box baselines plateau at with significantly worse revisit even with roughly four times the evaluation budget.

</details>


### [318] [AeroBridge-TTA: Test-Time Adaptive Language-Conditioned Control for UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19059)
*Lingxue Lyu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AeroBridge-TTA通过测试时适应解决语言引导无人机执行不匹配问题，在13种不匹配条件下显著提升OOD性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言引导无人机经常因执行不匹配而失败，即规划轨迹与控制器在真实动态变化（质量变化、阻力变化、执行器延迟、风等）时的跟踪能力之间存在差距

Method: 提出AeroBridge-TTA语言条件控制管道，包含三个部分：1) 语言编码器将命令映射为子目标；2) 基于子目标和学习潜变量的自适应策略；3) 测试时适应模块，从观测到的转移中在线更新潜变量

Result: 在5个语言条件无人机任务和13种不匹配条件下，AeroBridge-TTA在分布内与PPO-MLP基线持平，在5个分布外条件下全部获胜，平均提升22.0个百分点（62.7% vs. 40.7%）；整体增益8.5个百分点完全来自OOD机制；仅改变步长α的消融实验显示潜变量更新本身带来4.6倍的OOD提升

Conclusion: 测试时适应能有效解决语言引导无人机中的执行不匹配问题，潜变量在线更新是性能提升的关键机制

Abstract: Language-guided unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) often fail not from bad reasoning or perception, but from execution
  mismatch: the gap between a planned trajectory and the controller's ability to track it when the real dynamics differ
  from training (mass changes, drag shifts, actuator delay, wind). We propose AeroBridge-TTA, a language-conditioned
  control pipeline that targets this gap with test-time adaptation. It has three parts: a language encoder that maps the
  command into a subgoal, an adaptive policy conditioned on the subgoal and a learned latent, and a test-time
  adaptation (TTA) module that updates the latent online from observed transitions. On five language-conditioned UAV
  tasks under 13 mismatch conditions with the same domain randomization, AeroBridge-TTA ties a strong PPO-MLP baseline
  in-distribution and wins all 5 out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions, +22.0 pts on average (62.7% vs. 40.7%); the +8.5
  pt overall gain comes entirely from the OOD regime. A same-weights ablation that only changes the step size $α$
  shows the latent update itself is responsible for a $4.6\times$ OOD lift.

</details>


### [319] [RoomRecon: High-Quality Textured Room Layout Reconstruction on Mobile Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19025)
*Seok Joon Kim,Dinh Duc Cao,Federica Spinola,Se Jin Lee,Kyu Sung Cho*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoomRecon：用于3D房间模型的交互式实时扫描与纹理化管道，通过AR引导图像采集和生成式AI提升纹理质量，专注于永久性房间元素以实现可定制性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前室内3D重建技术存在局限性：无法反映细微场景变化而需完全重新捕获、缺乏语义场景理解、纹理化挑战影响视觉质量，这些问题影响了VR体验、室内设计和房地产等应用所需的真实感。

Method: 提出RoomRecon交互式实时扫描与纹理化管道，采用两阶段纹理化流程：1）AR引导的图像采集用于纹理化；2）集成生成式AI模型提升纹理质量。专注于永久性房间元素（墙壁、地板、天花板）以实现可定制3D模型。

Result: 在多种室内空间进行实验评估，定量结果和用户研究表明，RoomRecon在纹理质量和设备计算时间方面均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: RoomRecon通过创新的两阶段纹理化管道，结合AR引导采集和生成式AI，有效解决了室内3D重建的纹理质量、实时性和可定制性问题，为AR/VR/XR应用提供了更高质量的室内空间复制方案。

Abstract: Widespread RGB-Depth (RGB-D) sensors and advanced 3D reconstruction technologies facilitate the capture of indoor spaces, improving the fields of augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and extended reality (XR). Nevertheless, current technologies still face limitations, such as the inability to reflect minor scene changes without a complete recapture, the lack of semantic scene understanding, and various texturing challenges that affect the 3D model's visual quality. These issues affect the realism required for VR experiences and other applications such as in interior design and real estate. To address these challenges, we introduce RoomRecon, an interactive, real-time scanning and texturing pipeline for 3D room models. We propose a two-phase texturing pipeline that integrates AR-guided image capturing for texturing and generative AI models to improve texturing quality and provide better replicas of indoor spaces. Moreover, we suggest focusing only on permanent room elements such as walls, floors, and ceilings, to allow for easily customizable 3D models. We conduct experiments in a variety of indoor spaces to assess the texturing quality and speed of our method. The quantitative results and user study demonstrate that RoomRecon surpasses state-of-the-art methods in terms of texturing quality and on-device computation time.

</details>


### [320] [Gated Memory Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18933)
*Yihuai Gao,Jinyun Liu,Shuang Li,Shuran Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GMP是一种视觉运动策略，通过门控记忆机制选择性地激活历史上下文，使用交叉注意力构建潜在记忆表示，并通过注入扩散噪声增强鲁棒性，在非马尔可夫任务上显著优于长历史基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作任务具有不同的记忆需求，从无需记忆的马尔可夫任务到依赖单次或多次交互试验历史信息的非马尔可夫任务。简单地扩展视觉运动策略的观测历史通常会导致性能显著下降，这主要是由于分布偏移和过拟合问题。

Method: 提出门控记忆策略（GMP），包含三个核心组件：1）学习记忆门机制，选择性地仅在必要时激活历史上下文；2）轻量级交叉注意力模块，构建有效的潜在记忆表示；3）向历史动作注入扩散噪声，减轻训练和推理期间对噪声或不准确历史的敏感性。

Result: 在提出的非马尔可夫基准MemMimic上，GMP相比长历史基线实现了30.1%的平均成功率提升，同时在RoboMimic的马尔可夫任务上保持竞争力。

Conclusion: GMP通过选择性记忆激活和鲁棒的记忆表示学习，有效解决了非马尔可夫机器人操作任务中的记忆需求问题，在保持马尔可夫任务性能的同时显著提升了非马尔可夫任务的性能。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation tasks exhibit varying memory requirements, ranging from Markovian tasks that require no memory to non-Markovian tasks that depend on historical information spanning single or multiple interaction trials. Surprisingly, simply extending observation histories of a visuomotor policy often leads to a significant performance drop due to distribution shift and overfitting. To address these issues, we propose Gated Memory Policy (GMP), a visuomotor policy that learns both when to recall memory and what to recall. To learn when to recall memory, GMP employs a learned memory gate mechanism that selectively activates history context only when necessary, improving robustness and reactivity. To learn what to recall efficiently, GMP introduces a lightweight cross-attention module that constructs effective latent memory representations. To further enhance robustness, GMP injects diffusion noise into historical actions, mitigating sensitivity to noisy or inaccurate histories during both training and inference. On our proposed non-Markovian benchmark MemMimic, GMP achieves a 30.1% average success rate improvement over long-history baselines, while maintaining competitive performance on Markovian tasks in RoboMimic. All code, data and in-the-wild deployment instructions are available on our project website https://gated-memory-policy.github.io/.

</details>


### [321] [Task-Adaptive Admittance Control for Human-Quadrotor Cooperative Load Transportation with Dynamic Cable-Length Regulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18905)
*Shuai Li,Ton T. H. Duong,Damiano Zanotto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于人-四旋翼协同负载运输的新型导纳控制器，通过主动控制绞盘实现安全高效的合作运输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理人机交互研究主要集中在机械臂领域，而人-四旋翼协同负载运输研究尚处于起步阶段，需要开发能够确保安全性和有效性的控制方法

Method: 设计了一种新型导纳控制器，用于配备主动控制绞盘的四旋翼，该方法考虑了系统的耦合动力学，使四旋翼和缆绳能够在协同负载运输任务中动态适应接触力

Result: 实验验证表明，在低刚度和高刚度条件下，与使用可变和固定缆绳长度的传统方法相比，所提方法在系统响应性和运动平滑性方面表现更优

Conclusion: 所提出的导纳控制器能够增强人-四旋翼协同负载运输的能力，通过动态适应接触力提高系统响应性和运动平滑性，为这一新兴领域提供了有效的解决方案

Abstract: The collaboration between humans and robots is critical in many robotic applications, especially in those requiring physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). Previous research in pHRI has largely focused on robotic manipulators, employing impedance or admittance control to maintain operational safety. Conversely, research in human-quadrotor cooperative load transportation (CLT) is still in its infancy. This letter introduces a novel admittance controller designed for safe and effective human-quadrotor CLT using a quadrotor equipped with an actively-controlled winch. The proposed method accounts for the system's coupled dynamics, allowing the quadrotor and its cable to dynamically adapt to contact forces during CLT tasks, thereby enhancing responsiveness. We experimentally validated the task-adaptive capability of the controller across the entire CLT process, including in-place loading/unloading and load transporting tasks. To this end, we compared the system performances against a conventional approach, using both variable and fixed cable lengths under low- and high-stiffness conditions. Results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the conventional approach in terms of system responsiveness and motion smoothness, leading to improved CLT capabilities.

</details>


### [322] [Thrust Regulation Through Wing Linkage Modulation on the Aerobat Platform: Piezoelectric Slip-Stick Actuated Regulator Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18900)
*Luca Ciampaglia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究通过调节Aerobat机器人计算结构中第一半径连杆R1的有效长度来实现推力控制，建立了嵌入式滑移驱动作为独立机翼推力控制的可行方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Aerobat蝙蝠仿生扑翼机器人采用单电机驱动的计算结构设计，虽然重量轻但耦合了双翼控制，无法实现独立推力调节和非对称机动。需要开发一种方法来调节机翼推力以实现更灵活的飞行控制。

Method: 通过修改计算结构中第一半径连杆R1的有效长度来调节推力。首先进行静态实验，使用FDM打印的三种长度R1连杆在不同扑动频率下测试。然后评估多种驱动方法：弦张力驱动、微型伺服电机和压电滑移驱动。最终选择TULA-50压电滑移驱动器，并开发了直接驱动的可变长度机构。

Result: 静态实验显示R1长度增加1.5mm可使峰值升力提高37%，并改变了下扑行程中的峰值力时机。弦张力驱动因结构件柔顺性失败，微型伺服电机因脆弱性失败。压电滑移驱动最终被选中，直接驱动可变长度机构在初步台架测试中展示，但力输出不足无法在扑动中进行动态测试。

Conclusion: 通过嵌入式滑移驱动调节连杆长度是实现独立机翼推力控制的可行方法。虽然最终机构的力输出不足，但该工作为扑翼机器人的推力调节提供了新的技术途径。

Abstract: Aerobat is a bat-inspired flapping-wing robot with a wing gait generate by the computational structure, a planar linkage of carbon fiber links driven by a single motor. This design minimizes weight but couples both wings to a shared input motor, eliminating independent thrust control and preventing asymmetric maneuvers. This thesis investigates thrust regulation by modifying the effective length of the first radius link $R_1$ in the computational structure. Static experiments using FDM-printed $R_1$ links at three lengths (28.58, 29.33, and 30.08 mm) across 3,4, and 5 Hz flapping frequencies demonstrated that a 1.5 mm length increase produced a 37% increase in peak lift force and shifted peak force timing within the downstroke. An additional experiment using a string-actuated regulator mechanism was performed. Further actuation methods were evaluated: sub-gram micro-servo and piezoelectric slip-stick. After both the string-tension and micro-servo actuation methods failed due to structural member compliance and motor fragility respectively, a TULA-50 piezoelectric slip-stick actuator was selected. Multiple force-amplifying mechanisms were prototyped, resulting in a direct-drive variable-length mechanism. This final mechanism was demonstrated in a preliminary bench-top test, though insufficient force output prevented dynamic testing during flapping. This work establishes linkage-length modulation via embedded slip-stick actuation as a viable approach to independent wing thrust control.

</details>


### [323] [HALO: Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion with Learned Latent Dynamics, Poincaré Maps, and Regions of Attraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18887)
*Blake Werner,Sergio A. Esteban,Massimiliano De Sa,Max H. Cohen,Aaron D. Ames*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HALO框架通过自编码器学习周期性混合动力系统的低维潜在模型，结合潜在庞加莱映射进行李雅普诺夫分析，将稳定性结构从潜在空间提升到全阶系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统模板模型（如LIP、SLIP）只能近似混合系统动力学，而数据驱动方法虽然能提取更准确的低维表示，但难以保证潜在空间观测到的稳定性和安全性能够有意义地传递回全阶系统

Method: HALO使用自编码器识别低维潜在状态，并学习捕获步进运动动力学的潜在庞加莱映射，通过解码器将潜在空间的李雅普诺夫分析和吸引域构造提升到全阶状态空间

Result: 在模拟跳跃机器人和全身人形机器人运动实验中，HALO生成的低维模型保留了有意义的稳定性结构，并能预测全阶吸引域边界

Conclusion: HALO框架成功桥接了数据驱动降阶模型与稳定性分析之间的差距，为复杂混合系统（如腿式机器人）提供了既能保持准确性又能保证稳定性传递的建模方法

Abstract: Reduced-order models are powerful for analyzing and controlling high-dimensional dynamical systems. Yet constructing these models for complex hybrid systems such as legged robots remains challenging. Classical approaches rely on hand-designed template models (e.g., LIP, SLIP), which, though insightful, only approximate the underlying dynamics. In contrast, data-driven methods can extract more accurate low-dimensional representations, but it remains unclear when stability and safety properties observed in the latent space meaningfully transfer back to the full-order system. To bridge this gap, we introduce HALO (Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion), a framework for learning latent reduced-order models of periodic hybrid dynamics directly from trajectory data. HALO employs an autoencoder to identify a low-dimensional latent state together with a learned latent Poincaré map that captures step-to-step locomotion dynamics. This enables Lyapunov analysis and the construction of an associated region of attraction in the latent space, both of which can be lifted back to the full-order state space through the decoder. Experiments on a simulated hopping robot and full-body humanoid locomotion demonstrate that HALO yields low-dimensional models that retain meaningful stability structure and predict full-order region-of-attraction boundaries.

</details>


### [324] [DAG-STL: A Hierarchical Framework for Zero-Shot Trajectory Planning under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18343)
*Ruijia Liu,Ancheng Hou,Xiao Yu,Xiang Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DAG-STL：一种分层框架，将STL规划分解为逻辑分解、路径点分配和轨迹生成三阶段，实现未知动态下的零样本泛化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STL规划方法通常假设已知系统动态或学习任务特定行为，限制了零样本泛化能力。本文研究仅使用任务无关轨迹数据在未知动态下的离线STL规划问题。

Method: 提出DAG-STL分层框架：1) 将STL公式分解为可达性和不变性进度条件；2) 使用学习到的可达时间估计分配定时路径点；3) 基于扩散的生成器合成路径点间轨迹。还引入无滚动的动态一致性度量、有限预算下的多假设精化搜索和分层在线重规划机制。

Result: 在Maze2D、OGBench AntMaze和Cube领域实验中，DAG-STL在复杂长时域STL任务上显著优于直接鲁棒性引导扩散方法，并在导航和操作设置中展现泛化能力。在基于优化的参考环境中，DAG-STL恢复了大多数模型可解任务，同时保持相对于基于显式系统模型的直接优化的计算优势。

Conclusion: DAG-STL通过分离逻辑推理和轨迹实现，将长时域STL规划分解为更短、更好支持的子问题，实现了在未知动态下的高效STL规划，并具备零样本泛化能力。

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a powerful language for specifying temporally structured robotic tasks. Planning executable trajectories under STL constraints remains difficult when system dynamics and environment structure are not analytically available. Existing methods typically either assume explicit models or learn task-specific behaviors, limiting zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks. In this work, we study offline STL planning under unknown dynamics using only task-agnostic trajectory data. Our central design philosophy is to separate logical reasoning from trajectory realization. We instantiate this idea in DAG-STL, a hierarchical framework that converts long-horizon STL planning into three stages. It first decomposes an STL formula into reachability and invariance progress conditions linked by shared timing constraints. It then allocates timed waypoints using learned reachability-time estimates. Finally, it synthesizes trajectories between these waypoints with a diffusion-based generator. This decomposition--allocation--generation pipeline reduces global planning to shorter, better-supported subproblems. To bridge the gap between planning-level correctness and execution-level feasibility, we further introduce a rollout-free dynamic consistency metric, an anytime refinement search procedure for improving multiple allocation hypotheses under finite budgets, and a hierarchical online replanning mechanism for execution-time recovery. Experiments in Maze2D, OGBench AntMaze, and the Cube domain show that DAG-STL substantially outperforms direct robustness-guided diffusion on complex long-horizon STL tasks and generalizes across navigation and manipulation settings. In a custom environment with an optimization-based reference, DAG-STL recovers most model-solvable tasks while retaining a clear computational advantage over direct optimization based on the explicit system model.

</details>


### [325] [Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18336)
*Jiamin Zheng,Jingwen Yu,Guangcheng Chen,Hong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种免训练框架，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过局部RANSAC对齐融合原始传感器深度，解决玻璃表面导致的深度测量污染问题，并恢复精确度量尺度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内机器人导航常因玻璃表面严重破坏深度传感器测量而受影响。虽然Depth Anything等基础模型提供优秀的几何先验，但缺乏绝对度量尺度。

Method: 提出免训练框架，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，采用鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐方法将其与原始传感器深度融合，避免玻璃测量误差污染并恢复度量尺度。同时创建GlassRecon数据集，提供玻璃区域的几何真值。

Result: 广泛实验表明，该方法在严重传感器深度污染情况下，始终优于最先进的基线方法。特别是在玻璃表面导致的深度测量错误场景中表现优异。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了玻璃表面导致的深度传感器测量污染问题，通过融合深度基础模型的结构先验和传感器数据，实现了精确的度量尺度恢复。提出的GlassRecon数据集为相关研究提供了有价值的基准。

Abstract: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

</details>


### [326] [Will People Enjoy a Robot Trainer? A Case Study with Snoopie the Pacerbot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18331)
*Maximilian Du,Jennifer Grannen,Shuran Song,Dorsa Sadigh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究探索四足机器人作为跑步间歇训练教练的有效性，与Apple Watch等可穿戴设备对比，证明机器人教练能显著提高训练依从性和一致性，并获得用户主观偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人类教练的物理存在能提供直观指导和反馈，而四足机器人具有类似的物理体现和强大运动能力。研究探索机器人能否成为有效且令人愉悦的个人训练设备，特别是在需要精确性和一致性的重复性长时程任务中。

Method: 提出SNOOPIE系统——一个自主四足机器人配速员，能够运行针对用户个人能力定制的间歇训练方案。通过用户实验比较机器人教练与可穿戴设备（Apple Watch），研究物理体现在运动互动中的优势。

Result: 机器人教练相比可穿戴设备：训练配速计划依从性提高60.6%，跑步速度一致性提高45.9%。主观结果显示参与者强烈偏好机器人训练，在易用性（+56.7%）、互动愉悦性（+60.6%）和帮助性（+39.1%）等多个维度评分更高。

Conclusion: 四足机器人可以作为有效的个人训练设备，其物理体现特性在运动互动中具有显著优势，能提高训练依从性、一致性，并带来更好的用户体验。

Abstract: The physicality of exercise makes the role of athletic trainers unique. Their physical presence allows them to guide a student through a motion, demonstrate an exercise, and give intuitive feedback. Robot quadrupeds are also embodied agents with robust agility and athleticism. In our work, we investigate whether a robot quadruped can serve as an effective and enjoyable personal trainer device. We focus on a case study of interval training for runners: a repetitive, long-horizon task where precision and consistency are important. To meet this challenge, we propose SNOOPIE, an autonomous robot quadruped pacer capable of running interval training exercises tailored to challenge a user's personal abilities. We conduct a set of user experiments that compare the robot trainer to a wearable trainer device--the Apple Watch--to investigate the benefits of a physical embodiment in exercise-based interactions. We demonstrate 60.6% better adherence to a pace schedule and were 45.9% more consistent across their running speeds with the quadruped trainer. Subjective results also showed that participants strongly preferred training with the robot over wearable devices across many qualitative axes, including its ease of use (+56.7%), enjoyability of the interaction (+60.6%), and helpfulness (+39.1%). Additional videos and visualizations can be found on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/snoopie

</details>


### [327] [Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18289)
*Ravi Kumar Thakur,Luis Granados Segura,Jan Klivan,Radim Špetlík,Tobiáš Vinklárek,Matouš Vrba,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于事件相机的四旋翼相对状态估计框架，通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨区域，提取频率和几何特征，结合运动学估计实现精确的相对定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单目相机方法在视觉挑战条件下性能受限（速度慢、尺度模糊），而事件相机具有低延迟、高动态范围和微秒级时间分辨率，适合多无人机系统的快速准确相对状态估计需求。

Method: 1) 通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨区域提取感兴趣区域；2) 将区域事件流分块处理估计每个螺旋桨频率；3) 频率测量作为推力输入驱动运动学状态估计模块；4) 相机位置测量提供更新步骤；5) 从事件流提取几何基元，通过拟合螺旋桨椭圆并反投影恢复机体倾斜轴方向。

Result: 在五个真实世界室外飞行序列测试数据上，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%，为多机器人系统提供了一种基于事件相机的去中心化相对定位方法。

Conclusion: 提出的基于事件相机的框架能够准确估计四旋翼相对状态，特别是在视觉挑战条件下，通过结合螺旋桨频率测量和几何特征提取，实现了优于传统相机方法的性能，为多无人机系统去中心化定位提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

</details>


### [328] [COFFAIL: A Dataset of Successful and Anomalous Robot Skill Executions in the Context of Coffee Preparation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18236)
*Alex Mitrevski,Ayush Salunke*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: COFFAIL数据集包含咖啡制作场景中机器人执行的各种技能，包括成功和异常执行片段，部分为双手操作，用于模仿学习策略训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作数据集通常只包含成功执行片段或专注于单一技能类型，缺乏包含失败案例和多样化技能的数据集，限制了学习算法的鲁棒性评估。

Method: 在厨房环境中使用物理机器人收集咖啡制作相关的各种技能执行片段，包括成功和异常执行，部分采用双手操作，并描述了数据收集设置和数据集内容。

Result: 创建了COFFAIL数据集，包含咖啡制作场景中的多样化技能执行数据，展示了如何使用该数据集通过模仿学习训练机器人策略。

Conclusion: COFFAIL数据集为机器人学习提供了包含成功和失败案例的多样化技能执行数据，有助于开发更鲁棒的模仿学习算法，特别是在咖啡制作等日常任务中。

Abstract: In the context of robot learning for manipulation, curated datasets are an important resource for advancing the state of the art; however, available datasets typically only include successful executions or are focused on one particular type of skill. In this short paper, we briefly describe a dataset of various skills performed in the context of coffee preparation. The dataset, which we call COFFAIL, includes both successful and anomalous skill execution episodes collected with a physical robot in a kitchen environment, a couple of which are performed with bimanual manipulation. In addition to describing the data collection setup and the collected data, the paper illustrates the use of the data in COFFAIL to learn a robot policy using imitation learning.

</details>


### [329] [Chatting about Conditional Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18126)
*Yuxiang Zhao,Wei Huang,Haipeng Zeng,Huan Zhao,Yujie Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出CiT方法，通过跨时间域意图交互进行条件轨迹预测，结合自身运动信息，实现与机器人运动规划的紧密集成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法大多未考虑自身运动信息，仅基于静态信息建模交互，而人类行为具有相互依赖性，需要建模复杂社会交互来预测周围智能体轨迹

Method: 提出跨时间域意图交互方法(CiT)，对行为意图进行跨时间域的联合分析，实现不同时间域的信息互补与整合，通过社会交互信息修正自身时间域的意图表示

Result: CiT在基准测试中显著优于现有方法，达到最先进的性能表现

Conclusion: CiT方法能够生成基于自身潜在运动的所有周围智能体的可选轨迹预测结果，紧密集成机器人运动规划与控制模块，提高轨迹预测精度

Abstract: Human behavior has the nature of mutual dependencies, which requires human-robot interactive systems to predict surrounding agents trajectories by modeling complex social interactions, avoiding collisions and executing safe path planning. While there exist many trajectory prediction methods, most of them do not incorporate the own motion of the ego agent and only model interactions based on static information. We are inspired by the humans theory of mind during trajectory selection and propose a Cross time domain intention-interactive method for conditional Trajectory prediction(CiT). Our proposed CiT conducts joint analysis of behavior intentions over time, and achieves information complementarity and integration across different time domains. The intention in its own time domain can be corrected by the social interaction information from the other time domain to obtain a more precise intention representation. In addition, CiT is designed to closely integrate with robotic motion planning and control modules, capable of generating a set of optional trajectory prediction results for all surrounding agents based on potential motions of the ego agent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed CiT significantly outperforms the existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance in the benchmarks.

</details>


### [330] [Muscle-inspired magnetic actuators that push, pull, crawl, and grasp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18090)
*Muhammad Bilal Khan,Florian Hofmann,Kilian Schäfer,Matthias Lutzi,Oliver Gutfleisch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 通过激光粉末床熔融技术制造热塑性/永磁体复合材料，实现可编程刚度和磁化，开发出具有大变形、承载能力和多功能运动的肌肉仿生磁致动器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 下一代自适应软机器人需要能够实现大变形、承载和多功能运动的功能性磁复合材料。现有技术难以在同一材料系统中同时精确控制机械刚度和磁响应。

Method: 采用激光粉末床熔融技术增材制造热塑性聚氨酯/钕铁硼复合材料，通过调节激光能量尺度（1.0-3.0）精确控制机械刚度和磁响应，制造0.5毫米厚的弯曲铰链。

Result: 拉伸强度从0.28 MPa提高到0.99 MPa，同时保持30-45%的断裂伸长率。开发出两种致动器：伸长型致动器（自重1.57克）在500 mT磁场下线性收缩，可举起50克重物（32倍自重）；可扩展致动器在300 mT磁场下可逆开合，可靠抓取不同物体。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了基于LPBF的策略，可在单一材料系统中同时编程刚度和磁化，实现远程驱动、可重构和抗疲劳的软致动器，为力控、多功能的磁软机器人开辟了新可能性。

Abstract: Functional magnetic composites capable of large deformation, load bearing, and multifunctional motion are essential for next-generation adaptive soft robots. Here, we present muscle-inspired magnetic actuators (MMA), additively manufactured from a thermoplastic/permanent magnet polyurethane/Nd2Fe14B (TPU/MQP-S) composite using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). By tuning the laser-energy scale between 1.0 and 3.0, both mechanical stiffness and magnetic response are precisely controlled: the tensile strength increases from 0.28 to 0.99 MPa while maintaining 30-45% elongation at break. This process enables the creation of 0.5 mm-thick flexural hinges, which reversibly bend and fold under moderate magnetic fields without damage. Two actuator types are reported showing the system versatility. The elongated actuator with self-weight of 1.57 g, magnetized in its contracted state, achieves linear contraction under a 500 mT field, lifting 50 g (32x its own weight) and sustaining performance over at least 50 cycles. Equipped with anisotropic frictional feet, it supports movement of a magnetic crawling robot that achieves up to 100% locomotion success on textured substrates. The expandable actuator exhibits reversible opening and closing under a 300 mT field, reliably grasping and releasing different objects, including soft berries and rigid 3D printed geometries. It can also anchor in a tube while holding suspended 50 g loads. This work demonstrates a LPBF-based strategy to program both stiffness and magnetization within a single material system, enabling remotely driven, reconfigurable, and fatigue-resistant soft actuators. The approach opens new possibilities for force controlled, multifunctional magnetic soft robots for adaptive gripping, locomotion, and minimally invasive manipulation of biomedical tools.

</details>


### [331] [Unmasking the Illusion of Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18000)
*Haiweng Xu,Sipeng Zheng,Hao Luo,Wanpeng Zhang,Ziheng Xi,Zongqing Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BeTTER基准测试揭示当前VLA模型在动态场景中存在严重缺陷，其高基准分数主要源于静态评估协议对传感器运动先验的过拟合，而非真正的具身推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Vision-Language-Action模型在标准机器人基准测试中报告了令人印象深刻的成功率，但最近证据表明这些基准测试的成功与真正的具身推理之间存在系统性错位。研究者质疑这些高分是否反映了真正的认知能力，因此需要一种能够诊断真正具身推理能力的基准测试。

Method: 引入BeTTER基准测试，通过有针对性的因果干预（如空间布局变化、时间外推）并强制运动学隔离，明确解耦高层推理失败与低层执行限制。采用系统性评估和机制分析，追踪模型失败的根本原因到架构瓶颈。

Result: 最先进的VLA模型在动态场景中灾难性失败，表现出严重的词汇-运动学捷径、行为惯性和语义特征崩溃。机制分析将这些症状追溯到容量压缩和短视下采样等基本架构瓶颈，这些瓶颈系统性地降低了模型的基础语义表示能力。

Conclusion: 高度静态的评估协议通过允许优化过拟合传感器运动先验来掩盖这种退化。真实世界机器人验证证实这种表示崩溃不是模拟伪影，突显了未来VLA范式需要解决高频控制与高层推理之间的结构张力。

Abstract: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models report impressive success rates on standard robotic benchmarks, fueling optimism about general-purpose physical intelligence. However, recent evidence suggests a systematic misalignment between standard benchmark success and true embodied reasoning, raising the question of whether these high scores reflect genuine cognitive capability. To address this gap, we introduce BeTTER, a diagnostic Benchmark for Testing True Embodied Reasoning in robotic policies. BeTTER applies targeted causal interventions (e.g., spatial layout shifts, temporal extrapolation) while enforcing kinematic isolation to explicitly decouple high-level reasoning failures from low-level execution limits. Through systematic evaluation, we reveal that state-of-the-art VLAs catastrophically fail in dynamic scenarios, exhibiting severe lexical-kinematic shortcuts, behavioral inertia, and semantic feature collapse. Crucially, our mechanistic analysis traces these symptoms to fundamental architectural bottlenecks - such as capacity compression and myopic downsampling - which systematically degrade the model's foundational semantic representation. We demonstrate that highly static evaluation protocols effectively mask this degradation by allowing optimization to overfit to sensorimotor priors. Supported by real-world robotic validation, our findings confirm that this representational breakdown is not a simulation artifact, highlighting the critical need for future VLA paradigms to resolve the structural tension between high-frequency control and high-level reasoning.

</details>


### [332] [Locomotion of an Elastic Snake Robot via Natural Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17895)
*Tristan Ehlert,Arne Sachtler,Annika Schmidt,Davide Calzolari,Alin Albu-Schäffer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了如何利用弹性蛇形机器人的非线性自然动力学设计高效步态，发现基于非制动周期轨迹的步态在能量保守情况下完全高效，在摩擦存在时也优于刚性系统基线步态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然系统利用弹性和自然动力学可提高运动效率，但现有弹性蛇形机器人研究未充分利用系统的非线性动态行为。本研究的动机是探索是否及如何利用弹性蛇形机器人的非线性自然动力学来设计高效步态。

Method: 基于特征流形理论表征复杂非线性系统的自然动力学，提出了两种基于自然动力学的步态：1）在两个非线性正常模态间切换的步态；2）基于非制动周期轨迹（非制动轨道）的步态。通过动力学仿真与最先进方法进行比较。

Result: 在两个非线性正常模态间切换的步态未能提高机器人的运动效率。而基于非制动周期轨迹的步态在能量保守情况下完全高效。在包含摩擦的更现实场景中，非制动轨道步态相比刚性系统基线步态实现了更高的效率。

Conclusion: 研究表明基于自然动力学的步态设计具有潜力，特别是非制动轨道步态在现实条件下表现出优越效率。这为基于自然动力学的步态设计提供了有前景的见解，促进了该领域的进一步研究。

Abstract: Nature suggests that exploiting the elasticities and natural dynamics of robotic systems could increase their locomotion efficiency. Prior work on elastic snake robots supports this hypothesis, but has not fully exploited the nonlinear dynamic behavior of the systems. Recent advances in eigenmanifold theory enable a better characterization of the natural dynamics in complex nonlinear systems. This letter investigates if and how the nonlinear natural dynamics of a kinematic elastic snake robot can be used to design efficient gaits. Two types of gaits based on natural dynamics are presented and compared to a state-of-the-art approach using dynamics simulations. The results reveal that a gait generated by switching between two nonlinear normal modes does not improve the locomotion efficiency of the robot. In contrast, gaits based on non-brake periodic trajectories (non-brake orbits) are perfectly efficient in the energy-conservative case.
