Further simulations with friction reveal that, in a more realistic scenario, non-brake orbit gaits achieve higher efficiency compared to the baseline gait on the rigid system. Overall, the investigation offers promising insights into the design of gaits based on natural dynamics, fostering further research.

</details>


### [333] [ST-$π$: Structured SpatioTemporal VLA for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17880)
*Chuanhao Ma,Hanyu Zhou,Shihan Peng,Yan Li,Tao Gu,Luxin Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ST-π是一个结构化时空VLA模型，通过时空VLM生成块级动作提示，时空动作专家预测步级动作参数，解决机器人精细时空操作问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在精细时空操作中面临挑战，时空推理主要隐含在视觉和动作表示中，难以处理具有明确时空边界的多个顺序行为

Method: 1) 时空VLM：编码4D观测和任务指令到潜在空间，通过LLM生成包含子任务、空间定位和时间定位的因果有序块级动作提示序列；2) 时空动作专家：基于块级动作提示，设计结构化双生成器指导，联合建模空间依赖性和时间因果性，预测步级动作参数

Result: 通过大量实验验证了模型的有效性，并提出了带有结构化时空标注的真实世界机器人数据集用于微调

Conclusion: ST-π通过结构化框架实现了显式的全局时空行为规划和局部时空控制细化，显著提升了机器人精细时空操作能力

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved great success on general robotic tasks, but still face challenges in fine-grained spatiotemporal manipulation. Typically, existing methods mainly embed spatiotemporal knowledge into visual and action representations, and directly perform a cross-modal mapping for step-level action prediction. However, such spatiotemporal reasoning remains largely implicit, making it difficult to handle multiple sequential behaviors with explicit spatiotemporal boundaries. In this work, we propose ST-$π$, a structured spatiotemporal VLA model for robotic manipulation. Our model is guided by two key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal VLM. We encode 4D observations and task instructions into latent spaces, and feed them into the LLM to generate a sequence of causally ordered chunk-level action prompts consisting of sub-tasks, spatial grounding and temporal grounding. 2) Spatiotemporal action expert. Conditioned on chunk-level action prompts, we design a structured dual-generator guidance to jointly model spatial dependencies and temporal causality, thus predicting step-level action parameters. Within this structured framework, the VLM explicitly plans global spatiotemporal behavior, and the action expert further refines local spatiotemporal control. In addition, we propose a real-world robotic dataset with structured spatiotemporal annotations for fine-tuning. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model. Our code link: https://github.com/chuanhaoma/ST-pi.

</details>


### [334] [OFlow: Injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching for Robust Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17876)
*Kuanning Wang,Ke Fan,Chenhao Qiu,Zeyu Shangguan,Yuqian Fu,Yanwei Fu,Daniel Seita,Xiangyang Xue*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OFlow框架通过将对象感知的时间流匹配注入VLA模型，统一了时间预测和对象感知推理，提升了机器人操作的鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型存在两个主要限制：1）通常只在当前帧上操作，缺乏未来预测能力；2）未来预测和对象感知推理通常在分离的潜在空间中学习。这限制了机器人操作在复杂场景中的鲁棒性。

Method: OFlow框架通过三个关键步骤：1）使用时间流匹配预测未来潜在表示；2）将预测的潜在表示分解为对象感知表示，强调物理相关线索并过滤任务无关变化；3）基于这些预测条件化连续动作生成。该方法将时间前瞻和对象感知推理统一在共享的语义潜在空间中。

Result: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、MetaWorld和SimplerEnv等多个基准测试以及真实世界任务上的广泛实验表明，对象感知的前瞻能力一致地增强了机器人操作的鲁棒性和成功率。

Conclusion: OFlow框架通过将对象感知的时间流匹配集成到VLA管道中，解决了现有模型的局限性，实现了更可靠的分布偏移下的控制，为机器人操作提供了更强大的时间预测和对象感知推理能力。

Abstract: Robust robotic manipulation requires not only predicting how the scene evolves over time, but also recognizing task-relevant objects in complex scenes. However, existing VLA models face two limitations. They typically act only on the current frame, while future prediction and object-aware reasoning are often learned in separate latent spaces. We propose OFlow (injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching into VLAs), a framework that addresses both limitations by unifying temporal foresight and object-aware reasoning in a shared semantic latent space. Our method forecasts future latents with temporal flow matching, factorizes them into object-aware representations that emphasize physically relevant cues while filtering task-irrelevant variation, and conditions continuous action generation on these predictions. By integrating OFlow into VLA pipelines, our method enables more reliable control under distribution shifts. Extensive experiments across LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, MetaWorld, and SimplerEnv benchmarks and real-world tasks demonstrate that object-aware foresight consistently enhances robustness and success.

</details>


### [335] [Periodic Steady-State Control of a Handkerchief-Spinning Task Using a Parallel Anti-Parallelogram Tendon-driven Wrist](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17863)
*Lei Liu,Haonan Zhang,Huahang Xu,Zefan Zhang,Lulu Chang,Lei Lv,Andrew Ross McIntosh,Kai Sun,Zhenshan Bing,Jiahong Dong,Fuchun Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一种用于旋转柔性物体（如中国传统手帕表演）的系统，结合了专用灵巧手腕设计和控制导向的粒子弹簧模型，实现了高动态旋转操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转柔性物体（以中国传统手帕表演为例）需要在非线性动力学、摩擦接触和边界约束下实现周期性稳态运动。现有方法难以处理这种高度灵活物体的精确周期性操作。

Method: 1. 设计了基于并联反平行四边形腱驱动结构的直观灵巧手腕，实现90度全向旋转、低惯量和解耦的滚转-俯仰传感；2. 实施高低层次控制方案；3. 开发了用于控制导向抽象和策略评估的手帕粒子弹簧模型。

Result: 硬件实验验证了该框架：展开率约99%，高动态旋转中指尖跟踪误差RMSE = 2.88 mm。实现了从静止到稳态的鲁棒过渡和对高度柔性物体的精确周期性操作。

Conclusion: 将控制导向建模与任务定制的灵巧手腕相结合，能够实现对高度柔性物体的鲁棒稳态转换和精确周期性操作，为柔性物体操作提供了新方法。

Abstract: Spinning flexible objects, exemplified by traditional Chinese handkerchief performances, demands periodic steady-state motions under nonlinear dynamics with frictional contacts and boundary constraints. To address these challenges, we first design an intuitive dexterous wrist based on a parallel anti-parallelogram tendon-driven structure, which achieves 90 degrees omnidirectional rotation with low inertia and decoupled roll-pitch sensing, and implement a high-low level hierarchical control scheme. We then develop a particle-spring model of the handkerchief for control-oriented abstraction and strategy evaluation. Hardware experiments validate this framework, achieving an unfolding ratio of approximately 99% and fingertip tracking error of RMSE = 2.88 mm in high-dynamic spinning. These results demonstrate that integrating control-oriented modeling with a task-tailored dexterous wrist enables robust rest-to-steady-state transitions and precise periodic manipulation of highly flexible objects. More visualizations: https://slowly1113.github.io/icra2026-handkerchief/

</details>


### [336] [Driving risk emerges from the required two-dimensional joint evasive acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17841)
*Hao Cheng,Yanbo Jiang,Wenhao Yu,Rui Zhou,Jiang Bian,Keyu Chen,Zhiyuan Liu,Heye Huang,Hailun Zhang,Fang Zhang,Jianqiang Wang,Sifa Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为"规避加速度"的二维风险量化范式，用于自动驾驶安全评估，相比传统的一维时间碰撞方法能更准确地捕捉碰撞风险结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶安全基准主要使用时间碰撞作为风险评估方法，但这种方法将风险视为一维接近问题，无法准确捕捉碰撞风险的二维本质及其随时间演变。

Method: 提出规避加速度方法，通过评估所有可能的碰撞规避方向，将风险定义为改变相对运动所需的最小恒定相对加速度向量大小，使交互变得无碰撞。该方法无需超参数且具有物理可解释性。

Result: 使用五个开放数据集和600多起真实碰撞数据进行验证：1) EA在所有阈值下提供最早统计显著的警告；2) 对最终碰撞结果具有最佳区分能力；3) 信息保留比基线提高54.2-241.4%；4) 将EA添加到现有方法中获得的信息增益比反向添加高17.5-95.5倍。

Conclusion: EA能更好地捕捉碰撞风险的结构，为下一代自动驾驶系统提供了基础，相比传统方法提供了更多非冗余信息。

Abstract: Most autonomous driving safety benchmarks use time-to-collision (TTC) to assess risk and guide safe behaviour. However, TTC-based methods treat risk as a one-dimensional closing problem, despite the inherently two-dimensional nature of collision avoidance, and therefore cannot faithfully capture risk or its evolution over time. Here, we report evasive acceleration (EA), a hyperparameter-free and physically interpretable two-dimensional paradigm for risk quantification. By evaluating all possible directions of collision avoidance, EA defines risk as the minimum magnitude of a constant relative acceleration vector required to alter the relative motion and make the interaction collision-free. Using interaction data from five open datasets and more than 600 real crashes, we derive percentile-based warning thresholds and show that EA provides the earliest statistically significant warning across all thresholds. Moreover, EA provides the best discrimination of eventual collision outcomes and improves information retention by 54.2-241.4% over all compared baselines. Adding EA to existing methods yields 17.5-95.5 times more information gain than adding existing methods to EA, indicating that EA captures much of the outcome-relevant information in existing methods while contributing substantial additional nonredundant information. Overall, EA better captures the structure of collision risk and provides a foundation for next-generation autonomous driving systems.

</details>


### [337] [DART: Learning-Enhanced Model Predictive Control for Dual-Arm Non-Prehensile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17833)
*Autrio Das,Shreya Bollimuntha,Madala Venkata Renu Jeevesh,Keshab Patra,Tashmoy Gosh,Nagamanikandan G,Arun Kumar,Madhava Krishna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DART：首个用于托盘上物体非抓取式双臂操作框架，集成非线性MPC与优化阻抗控制，比较三种动力学建模策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类服务员看似轻松的任务对机器人仍是重大挑战。托盘上物体的非抓取操作本身困难，在双臂设置中复杂度更高。这类任务在酒店和服务机器人领域高度相关，机器人需要精确运输和重新定位多样物体。

Method: 提出DART框架，集成非线性模型预测控制（MPC）与基于优化的阻抗控制器，实现物体相对于动态控制托盘的精确运动。系统评估三种互补策略作为MPC状态转移函数：1）基于物理的解析模型；2）实时自适应在线回归识别模型；3）跨物体属性泛化的强化学习动力学模型。

Result: 在仿真中验证了框架，使用不同质量、几何形状和摩擦系数的物体。广泛评估突出了三种建模策略在稳定时间、稳态误差、控制努力和跨物体泛化能力方面的权衡。

Conclusion: DART构成了首个用于托盘上物体非抓取式双臂操作的框架。项目链接：https://dart-icra.github.io/dart/

Abstract: What appears effortless to a human waiter remains a major challenge for robots. Manipulating objects nonprehensilely on a tray is inherently difficult, and the complexity is amplified in dual-arm settings. Such tasks are highly relevant to service robotics in domains such as hotels and hospitality, where robots must transport and reposition diverse objects with precision. We present DART, a novel dual-arm framework that integrates nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC) with an optimization-based impedance controller to achieve accurate object motion relative to a dynamically controlled tray. The framework systematically evaluates three complementary strategies for modeling tray-object dynamics as the state transition function within our MPC formulation: (i) a physics-based analytical model, (ii) an online regression based identification model that adapts in real-time, and (iii) a reinforcement learning-based dynamics model that generalizes across object properties. Our pipeline is validated in simulation with objects of varying mass, geometry, and friction coefficients. Extensive evaluations highlight the trade-offs among the three modeling strategies in terms of settling time, steady-state error, control effort, and generalization across objects. To the best of our knowledge, DART constitutes the first framework for non-prehensile dual-arm manipulation of objects on a tray. Project Link: https://dart-icra.github.io/dart/

</details>


### [338] [SYMBOLIZER: Symbolic Model-free Task Planning with VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17830)
*Sami Azirar,Zlatan Ajanovic,Hermann Blum*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个结合视觉语言模型与经典规划的TAMP框架，无需手工构建符号模型，通过VLM从图像中提取符号状态，使用领域无关启发式搜索进行规划


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统TAMP系统需要手工构建符号模型，这既耗时又限制可扩展性；而VLM虽具有零样本视觉理解能力但规划能力有限，因此需要结合两者优势

Method: 使用VLM从图像中提取符号状态（基于提升谓词描述的对象关系），采用领域无关启发式搜索（目标计数和宽度启发式）进行规划，无需动作模型

Result: 在VLM基础状态空间上的符号搜索优于直接基于VLM的规划，与使用VLM启发式的方法性能相当，在ProDG和ViPlan基准测试中达到SOTA

Conclusion: 领域无关搜索能有效解决跨领域大规模组合状态空间问题，证明了结合VLM视觉理解与经典符号规划的可行性

Abstract: Traditional Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) systems depend on physics models for motion planning and discrete symbolic models for task planning. Although physics model are often available, symbolic models (consisting of symbolic state interpretation and action models) must be meticulously handcrafted or learned from labeled data. This process is both resource-intensive and constrains the solution to the specific domain, limiting scalability and adaptability. On the other hand, Visual Language Models (VLMs) show desirable zero-shot visual understanding (due to their extensive training on heterogeneous data), but still achieve limited planning capabilities. Therefore, integrating VLMs with classical planning for long-horizon reasoning in TAMP problems offers high potential. Recent works in this direction still lack generality and depend on handcrafted, task-specific solutions, e.g. describing all possible objects in advance, or using symbolic action models. We propose a framework that generalizes well to unseen problem instances. The method requires only lifted predicates describing relations among objects and uses VLMs to ground them from images to obtain the symbolic state. Planning is performed with domain-independent heuristic search using goal-count and width-based heuristics, without need for action models. Symbolic search over VLM-grounded state-space outperforms direct VLM-based planning and performs on par with approaches that use a VLM-derived heuristic. This shows that domain-independent search can effectively solve problems across domains with large combinatorial state spaces. We extensively evaluate on extensively evaluate our method and achieve state-of-the-art results on the ProDG and ViPlan benchmarks.

</details>


### [339] [Memory Centric Power Allocation for Multi-Agent Embodied Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17810)
*Chengyang Li,Shuai Wang,Kejiang Ye,Weijie Yuan,Boyu Zhou,Yik-Chung Wu,Chengzhong Xu,Huseyin Arslan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于生成对抗考试的质量记忆模型和记忆中心功率分配方法，用于多智能体具身问答中的资源分配优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有边缘资源管理方法主要关注感知、通信或计算性能指标，而多智能体具身问答强调记忆质量，需要新的资源分配范式

Method: 1) 基于生成对抗考试的质量记忆模型，利用前向模拟评估记忆检索能力；2) 记忆中心功率分配方法，在通信资源约束下最大化质量记忆函数

Result: 通过渐近分析发现发射功率与生成对抗考试错误概率成正比，从而优先分配给高质量记忆机器人。实验表明该方法在各种场景下相比基准方法在多种指标上均有显著提升

Conclusion: 提出的质量记忆模型和记忆中心功率分配方法有效解决了多智能体具身问答中的资源分配问题，通过优先考虑记忆质量而非传统性能指标实现了更好的系统性能

Abstract: This paper considers multi-agent embodied question answering (MA-EQA), which aims to query robot teams on what they have seen over a long horizon. In contrast to existing edge resource management methods that emphasize sensing, communication, or computation performance metrics, MA-EQA emphasizes the memory qualities. To cope with this paradigm shift, we propose a quality of memory (QoM) model based on generative adversarial exam (GAE), which leverages forward simulation to assess memory retrieval and uses the resulting exam scores to compute QoM values. Then we propose memory centric power allocation (MCPA), which maximizes the QoM function under communication resource constraints. Through asymptotic analysis, it is found that the transmit powers are proportional to the GAE error probability, thus prioritizing towards high-QoM robots. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MCPA achieves significant improvements over extensive benchmarks in terms of diverse metrics in various scenarios.

</details>


### [340] [ReFineVLA: Multimodal Reasoning-Aware Generalist Robotic Policies via Teacher-Guided Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17800)
*Tuan Van Vo,Tan Q. Nguyen,Khang Nguyen,Nhat Xuan Tran,Duy H. M. Nguyen,An T. Le,Ngo Anh Vien,Minh Nhat Vu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReFineVLA：通过教师引导推理增强视觉-语言-动作模型的多模态推理能力，在机器人操作任务中实现最先进性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型主要学习功能性的输入-动作映射，忽略了显式推理过程，导致在复杂长时程操作任务中的可解释性和泛化能力不足

Method: 提出ReFineVLA框架：1）使用专家教师模型为机器人数据集生成推理依据；2）用推理增强的数据集微调预训练VLA模型；3）通过注意力图可视化分析模型对齐能力

Result: 在SimplerEnv模拟环境中，WidowX和Google Robot任务上均取得最先进性能，成功率达到最高，超过次优方法

Conclusion: 通过引入教师引导的推理训练，ReFineVLA显著增强了VLA模型的多模态理解和泛化能力，在机器人操作任务中展现出卓越性能

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have gained much attention from the research community thanks to their strength in translating multimodal observations with linguistic instructions into desired robotic actions. Despite their advancements, VLAs often overlook explicit reasoning and learn the functional input-action mappings, omitting crucial logical steps, which are especially pronounced in interpretability and generalization for complex, long-horizon manipulation tasks. In this work, we propose ReFineVLA, a multimodal reasoning-aware framework that fine-tunes VLAs with teacher-guided reasons. We first augment robotic datasets with reasoning rationales generated by an expert teacher model, guiding VLA models to learn to reason about their actions. Then, we fine-tune pre-trained VLAs with the reasoning-enriched datasets with ReFineVLA, while maintaining the underlying generalization abilities and boosting reasoning capabilities. We also conduct attention map visualization to analyze the alignment among visual observation, linguistic prompts, and to-be-executed actions of ReFineVLA, reflecting the model is ability to focus on relevant tasks and actions. Through this additional step, we explore that ReFineVLA-trained models exhibit a meaningful agreement between vision-language and action domains, highlighting the enhanced multimodal understanding and generalization. Evaluated across a suite of simulated manipulation benchmarks on SimplerEnv with both WidowX and Google Robot tasks, ReFineVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, in success rate over the second-best method on the both the WidowX benchmark and Google Robot Tasks.

</details>


### [341] [OmniVLA-RL: A Vision-Language-Action Model with Spatial Understanding and Online RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17706)
*Haoxiang Jie,Yaoyuan Yan,Xiangyu Wei,Kailin Wang,Hongjie Yan,Zhiyou Heng,Daocheng Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OmniVLA-RL：基于混合专家Transformer的视觉-语言-动作模型，结合流匹配SDE与分组分段策略优化，在LIBERO基准上显著超越现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型存在空间感知不精确、多模态融合不理想、强化学习不稳定等根本性局限，需要新的架构和方法来突破这些瓶颈

Method: 提出OmniVLA-RL架构，采用混合专家Transformer设计协同整合推理、空间和动作专家；引入Flow-GSPO方法，将流匹配重构为随机微分方程过程，并与分组分段策略优化结合

Result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准上的广泛评估表明，OmniVLA-RL显著优于现有最先进方法，有效克服了当前VLA模型的基本局限

Conclusion: OmniVLA-RL通过创新的混合专家架构和Flow-GSPO优化方法，为视觉-语言-动作模型提供了更精确的空间感知、更优的多模态融合和更稳定的强化学习训练

Abstract: Visual-Language-Action (VLA) models represent a paradigm shift in embodied AI, yet existing frameworks often struggle with imprecise spatial perception, suboptimal multimodal fusion, and instability in reinforcement learning. To bridge these gaps, we propose OmniVLA-RL, a novel architecture that leverages a Mix-of-Transformers (MoT) design to synergistically integrate reasoning, spatial, and action experts. Furthermore, we introduce Flow-GSPO, which reformulates flow matching as a Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) process and integrates it with Group Segmented Policy Optimization (GSPO) to enhance action precision and training robustness. Extensive evaluations on the LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus benchmarks demonstrate that OmniVLA-RL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, effectively overcoming the fundamental limitations of current VLA models.

</details>


### [342] [A Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability-Guided Search Framework for Efficient and Safe Indoor Planar Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17679)
*Hanyang Hu,Cameron Siu,Mo Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 结合离线Hamilton-Jacobi可达性分析与在线图搜索，利用HJ值函数作为启发式和安全约束，在动态环境中实现高效安全的自主导航规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图搜索算法在复杂动态环境中计算复杂度随搜索空间维度增加而急剧增长，难以实现实时规划。需要结合离线预计算和在线搜索的优势来解决这一挑战。

Method: 将离线预计算的Hamilton-Jacobi可达性值函数作为启发式信息和主动安全约束，与在线图搜索相结合。HJ值函数分摊在线计算负担，而图搜索使可达性推理能够融入在线规划。

Result: 广泛的仿真研究和真实世界实验表明，该方法在有/无人类存在的环境中，在规划效率和导航安全性方面始终优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过结合离线HJ可达性分析和在线图搜索，克服了HJ可达性需要完全环境知识的长期挑战，实现了在复杂动态环境中高效安全的自主导航规划。

Abstract: Autonomous navigation requires planning to reach a goal safely and efficiently in complex and potentially dynamic environments. Graph search-based algorithms are widely adopted due to their generality and theoretical guarantees when equipped with admissible heuristics. However, the computational complexity of graph search grows rapidly with the dimensionality of the search space, often making real-time planning in dynamic environments intractable. In this paper, we combine offline Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability with online graph search to leverage the complementary strengths of both. Precomputed HJ value functions, used as informative heuristics and proactive safety constraints, amortize online computation of the graph search process. At the same time, graph search enables reachability-based reasoning to be incorporated into online planning, overcoming the long-standing challenge of HJ reachability requiring full knowledge of the environment. Extensive simulation studies and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms baseline methods in terms of planning efficiency and navigation safety, in environments with and without human presence.

</details>


### [343] [Novel Algorithms for Smoothly Differentiable and Efficiently Vectorizable Contact Manifold Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17538)
*Onur Beker,Andreas René Geist,Anselm Paulus,Georg Martius*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于接触丰富机器人任务的可微分碰撞检测方法，通过分析SDF基元和新型接触流形生成实现平滑可微和高度向量化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前接触丰富场景中的智能机器人行为生成主要依赖零阶方法，利用动力学的一阶/二阶信息能显著提高求解速度和计算效率，但现有仿真流程（碰撞检测、接触动力学、时间积分）存在病态问题，难以获得有用梯度

Method: 提出两种贡献：1) 高度表达性的分析SDF基元类，能高效表示复杂3D表面；2) 利用该几何表示的新型接触流形生成方法，实现平滑可微和高度向量化的碰撞检测

Result: 该方法解决了碰撞检测部分的难题，为利用一阶/二阶信息优化机器人行为提供了关键技术支持

Conclusion: 提出的可微分碰撞检测方法为接触丰富机器人任务中利用高阶信息进行高效优化提供了可行路径，是解决仿真流程梯度计算瓶颈的重要进展

Abstract: Generating intelligent robot behavior in contact-rich settings is a research problem where zeroth-order methods currently prevail. Developing methods that make use of first/second order information about the dynamics holds great promise in terms of increasing the solution speed and computational efficiency. The main bottleneck in this research direction is the difficulty in obtaining useful gradients and Hessians, due to pathologies in all three steps of a common simulation pipeline: i) collision detection, ii) contact dynamics, iii) time integration. This abstract proposes a method that can address the collision detection part of the puzzle in a manner that is smoothly differentiable and massively vectorizable. This is achieved via two contributions: i) a highly expressive class of analytical SDF primitives that can efficiently represent complex 3D surfaces, ii) a novel contact manifold generation routine that makes use of this geometry representation.

</details>


### [344] [Safer Trajectory Planning with CBF-guided Diffusion Model for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17527)
*Peiwen Yang,Shiyu Bai,Weisong Wen,Yixin Gao,Jiahao Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AeroTrajGen：基于扩散模型和CBF引导采样的无人机敏捷轨迹生成框架，显著提升安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色，但存在固有的不可预测性和潜在安全违规问题；同时需要大量安全验证的训练数据。为无人机复杂特技机动提供安全敏捷的轨迹规划解决方案。

Method: 提出CBF引导采样方法，在反向扩散过程中将控制屏障函数的安全约束梯度与扩散模型的评分函数无缝集成；采用障碍物感知的扩散变换器架构，支持轨迹历史、障碍物、机动风格和目标等多模态条件输入。

Result: 在2000个专家演示数据集上训练，多障碍物环境仿真评估显示：CBF引导采样相比无引导扩散基线碰撞率降低94.7%，同时保持轨迹敏捷性和多样性。

Conclusion: AeroTrajGen框架成功将CBF引导采样与扩散模型结合，有效解决了扩散模型的安全性和数据依赖问题，为无人机特技机动提供了安全可靠的轨迹生成方案。

Abstract: Safe and agile trajectory planning is essential for autonomous systems, especially during complex aerobatic maneuvers. Motivated by the recent success of diffusion models in generative tasks, this paper introduces AeroTrajGen, a novel framework for diffusion-based trajectory generation that incorporates control barrier function (CBF)-guided sampling during inference, specifically designed for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). The proposed CBF-guided sampling addresses two critical challenges: (1) mitigating the inherent unpredictability and potential safety violations of diffusion models, and (2) reducing reliance on extensively safety-verified training data. During the reverse diffusion process, CBF-based guidance ensures collision-free trajectories by seamlessly integrating safety constraint gradients with the diffusion model's score function. The model features an obstacle-aware diffusion transformer architecture with multi-modal conditioning, including trajectory history, obstacles, maneuver styles, and goal, enabling the generation of smooth, highly agile trajectories across 14 distinct aerobatic maneuvers. Trained on a dataset of 2,000 expert demonstrations, AeroTrajGen is rigorously evaluated in simulation under multi-obstacle environments. Simulation results demonstrate that CBF-guided sampling reduces collision rates by 94.7% compared to unguided diffusion baselines, while preserving trajectory agility and diversity. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/RoboticsPolyu/CBF-DMP.

</details>


### [345] [FLASH: Fast Learning via GPU-Accelerated Simulation for High-Fidelity Deformable Manipulation in Minutes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17513)
*Siyuan Luo,Bingyang Zhou,Chong Zhang,Xin Liu,Zhenhao Huang,Gang Yang,Zhengtao Han,Xiaotian Hu,Eric Yang,Rymon Yu,Ziqiu Zeng,Fan Shi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FLASH是一个GPU原生的仿真框架，专门用于接触丰富的可变形物体操作，通过NCP求解器实现高精度、高速、稳定的仿真，支持大规模交互式学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真框架（如Isaac Sim）在刚体操作和运动方面表现良好，但接触丰富的可变形物体仿真仍然是瓶颈。软材料的连续几何变化、大量顶点和接触约束使得难以实现大规模交互学习所需的高精度、速度和稳定性。

Method: FLASH是一个从头设计的GPU原生物理引擎，采用基于NCP的求解器强制执行严格的接触和变形约束，针对GPU并行架构优化了碰撞处理和内存布局，而非简单移植传统的SIMD求解器。

Result: FLASH在单个RTX 5090上可扩展到超过300万自由度，达到30 FPS，同时准确模拟物理交互。仅使用FLASH生成的合成数据训练的策略在几分钟内实现鲁棒的零样本仿真到真实迁移，在毛巾折叠和衣物折叠等挑战性任务上验证成功。

Conclusion: FLASH为接触丰富的可变形物体操作提供了高效仿真解决方案，实现了从仿真到真实的零样本迁移，为机器人学习提供了实用的替代方案，避免了劳动密集型的真实世界数据收集。

Abstract: Simulation frameworks such as Isaac Sim have enabled scalable robot learning for locomotion and rigid-body manipulation; however, contact-rich simulation remains a major bottleneck for deformable object manipulation. The continuously changing geometry of soft materials, together with large numbers of vertices and contact constraints, makes it difficult to achieve high accuracy, speed, and stability required for large-scale interactive learning. We present FLASH, a GPU-native simulation framework for contact-rich deformable manipulation, built on an accurate NCP-based solver that enforces strict contact and deformation constraints while being explicitly designed for fine-grained GPU parallelism. Rather than porting conventional single-instruction-multiple-data (SIMD) solvers to GPUs, FLASH redesigns the physics engine from the ground up to leverage modern GPU architectures, including optimized collision handling and memory layouts. As a result, FLASH scales to over 3 million degrees of freedom at 30 FPS on a single RTX 5090, while accurately simulating physical interactions. Policies trained solely on FLASH-generated synthetic data in minutes achieve robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, which we validate on physical robots performing challenging deformable manipulation tasks such as towel folding and garment folding, without any real-world demonstration, providing a practical alternative to labor-intensive real-world data collection.

</details>


### [346] [Think before Go: Hierarchical Reasoning for Image-goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17407)
*Pengna Li,Kangyi Wu,Shaoqing Xu,Fang Li,Lin Zhao,Long Chen,Zhi-Xin Yang,Nanning Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HRNav：一种分层推理导航框架，将图像目标导航分解为高层规划和低层执行，使用视觉语言模型生成短期计划，结合在线强化学习策略执行动作，并引入游荡抑制惩罚来减少徘徊问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端导航方法在目标距离较远或位于其他房间时，难以提取有效的视觉线索，导致智能体徘徊不前。受人类认知原理启发——复杂任务中深思熟虑的高层推理指导快速反应式执行，需要将长视距任务分解为更易处理的子任务。

Method: 提出分层推理导航框架：1）高层规划：在自收集数据集上训练视觉语言模型，生成短期计划（如"穿过门"或"沿着走廊走"）；2）低层执行：使用在线强化学习策略，基于短期计划决策动作；3）引入游荡抑制惩罚（WSP）进一步减少徘徊问题。

Result: 在仿真和真实环境中的大量实验表明，该方法在图像目标导航任务上表现出优越性能，有效解决了长距离和跨房间导航中的徘徊问题。

Conclusion: HRNav通过分层推理框架成功解决了图像目标导航中的长视距挑战，将高层语义规划与低层反应式执行相结合，显著提升了导航效率和准确性，为复杂环境下的视觉导航提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Image-goal navigation steers an agent to a target location specified by an image in unseen environments. Existing methods primarily handle this task by learning an end-to-end navigation policy, which compares the similarities of target and observation images and directly predicts the actions. However, when the target is distant or lies in another room, such methods fail to extract informative visual cues, leading the agent to wander around. Motivated by the human cognitive principle that deliberate, high-level reasoning guides fast, reactive execution in complex tasks, we propose Hierarchical Reasoning Navigation (HRNav), a framework that decomposes image-goal navigation into high-level planning and low-level execution. In high-level planning, a vision-language model is trained on a self-collected dataset to generate a short-horizon plan, such as whether the agent should walk through the door or down the hallway. This downgrades the difficulty of the long-horizon task, making it more amenable to the execution part. In low-level execution, an online reinforcement learning policy is utilized to decide actions conditioned on the short-horizon plan. We also devise a novel Wandering Suppression Penalty (WSP) to further reduce the wandering problem. Together, these components form a hierarchical framework for Image-Goal Navigation. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

</details>


### [347] [Learning Whole-Body Humanoid Locomotion via Motion Generation and Motion Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17335)
*Zewei Zhang,Kehan Wen,Michael Xu,Junzhe He,Chenhao Li,Takahiro Miki,Clemens Schwarke,Chong Zhang,Xue Bin Peng,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个结合技能学习和地形感知适应的全身人形机器人运动框架，通过扩散模型生成地形感知参考运动，并用强化学习训练全身参考跟踪器，在Unitree G1机器人上实现复杂地形穿越


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全身人形机器人运动面临高维控制、形态不稳定和需要基于感知实时适应各种地形的挑战。传统强化学习方法容易产生下肢主导行为，而基于模仿的方法虽然能学习协调的全身技能，但通常局限于重放参考运动，缺乏基于感知的在线地形适应机制。

Method: 1) 在重定向的人类运动上训练扩散模型，用于实时预测地形感知的参考运动；2) 使用这些运动数据通过强化学习训练全身参考跟踪器；3) 在闭环设置中，用冻结的运动生成器对跟踪器进行微调，以提高在不完美生成参考下的鲁棒性。

Result: 系统支持具有地形感知全身适应的定向目标到达控制，可在Unitree G1人形机器人上部署，使用板载感知和计算。硬件实验成功穿越箱子、障碍、楼梯和混合地形组合。定量结果显示了在线运动生成和微调运动跟踪器对改进泛化性和鲁棒性的益处。

Conclusion: 该框架成功解决了全身人形机器人运动中的地形适应问题，通过结合基于模仿的技能学习和在线运动生成，实现了在复杂地形上的鲁棒穿越，为人形机器人在真实环境中的部署提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Whole-body humanoid locomotion is challenging due to high-dimensional control, morphological instability, and the need for real-time adaptation to various terrains using onboard perception. Directly applying reinforcement learning (RL) with reward shaping to humanoid locomotion often leads to lower-body-dominated behaviors, whereas imitation-based RL can learn more coordinated whole-body skills but is typically limited to replaying reference motions without a mechanism to adapt them online from perception for terrain-aware locomotion. To address this gap, we propose a whole-body humanoid locomotion framework that combines skills learned from reference motions with terrain-aware adaptation. We first train a diffusion model on retargeted human motions for real-time prediction of terrain-aware reference motions. Concurrently, we train a whole-body reference tracker with RL using this motion data. To improve robustness under imperfectly generated references, we further fine-tune the tracker with a frozen motion generator in a closed-loop setting. The resulting system supports directional goal-reaching control with terrain-aware whole-body adaptation, and can be deployed on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot with onboard perception and computation. The hardware experiments demonstrate successful traversal over boxes, hurdles, stairs, and mixed terrain combinations. Quantitative results further show the benefits of incorporating online motion generation and fine-tuning the motion tracker for improved generalization and robustness.

</details>


### [348] [A Rapid Deployment Pipeline for Autonomous Humanoid Grasping Based on Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17258)
*Yifei Yan,Yankai Liao,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个端到端快速部署流水线，将人形机器人操作新物体的部署时间从1-2天缩短到约30分钟，通过整合三个基础模型组件实现自动标注、3D重建和零样本位姿跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人形机器人操作新物体需要1-2天的部署时间，涉及数据收集、手动标注、3D模型获取和模型训练等多个步骤，部署门槛高、效率低。需要降低部署障碍，使机器人能够快速适应新物体。

Method: 整合三个基础模型组件：1) Roboflow自动标注辅助训练YOLOv8物体检测器；2) Meta SAM 3D进行3D重建，无需专用激光扫描仪；3) FoundationPose进行零样本6自由度位姿跟踪，使用SAM 3D生成的网格作为模板。通过Unity逆运动学规划器生成关节命令，通过UDP流传输到Unitree G1人形机器人执行。

Result: 检测精度达到mAP@0.5 = 0.995，位姿跟踪精度σ<1.05mm，在真实机器人工作空间内五个位置成功完成抓取。在汽车车窗涂胶任务上验证了流水线的通用性。

Conclusion: 结合基础模型进行感知与日常成像设备（如智能手机），可以显著降低人形机器人操作任务的部署障碍，实现快速适应新物体。

Abstract: Deploying a humanoid robot to manipulate a new object has traditionally required one to two days of effort: data collection, manual annotation, 3D model acquisition, and model training. This paper presents an end-to-end rapid deployment pipeline that integrates three foundation-model components to shorten the onboarding cycle for a new object to approximately 30 minutes: (i) Roboflow-based automatic annotation to assist in training a YOLOv8 object detector; (ii) 3D reconstruction based on Meta SAM 3D, which eliminates the need for a dedicated laser scanner; and (iii) zero-shot 6-DoF pose tracking based on FoundationPose, using the SAM~3D-generated mesh directly as the template. The estimated pose drives a Unity-based inverse kinematics planner, whose joint commands are streamed via UDP to a Unitree~G1 humanoid and executed through the Unitree SDK. We demonstrate detection accuracy of mAP@0.5 = 0.995, pose tracking precision of $σ< 1.05$ mm, and successful grasping on a real robot at five positions within the workspace. We further verify the generality of the pipeline on an automobile-window glue-application task. The results show that combining foundation models for perception with everyday imaging devices (e.g., smartphones) can substantially lower the deployment barrier for humanoid manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [349] [MM-Hand: A 21-DOF Multi-modal Modular Dexterous Robotic Hand with Remote Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17245)
*Zhuoheng Li,Qingquan Lin,Checheng Yu,Qiangyu Chen,Zhiqian Lan,Lutong Zhang,Hongyang Li,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MM-Hand是一个基于远程肌腱驱动驱动的21自由度多模态模块化灵巧手，通过将电机移至机器人基座或外部电机中心，释放手指和手掌空间，集成多种传感器和快速维护设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高自由度灵巧手设计占用宝贵的内部空间，增加末端执行器质量，且在手部附近产生热量积累。远程肌腱驱动驱动提供了一种替代方案，可将电机重新定位到机器人基座或外部电机中心，从而为手指和手掌释放空间，容纳更多自由度、传感模块和可维护的机械结构。

Method: 采用远程肌腱驱动驱动系统，集成弹簧回位肌腱驱动手指、模块化3D打印手指和手掌结构、快速肌腱连接器用于维护，以及多模态传感系统（包括关节角度传感器、触觉传感器、电机侧反馈和手掌内立体视觉）。分析了肌腱-鞘长度变化和摩擦损失以指导路由、电机中心和闭环关节控制的设计。

Result: 实验验证了系统的传动、输出力、传感和控制能力。在1米远程鞘传输下，指尖力达到25N，展示了长距离肌腱路由下的实用负载能力。闭环关节级实验进一步评估了静态臂和臂运动期间的命令跟踪性能。

Conclusion: MM-Hand提供了一个轻量化、传感器丰富且可维护的硬件平台，用于灵巧操作研究。所有硬件设计和软件框架均已完全开源，以支持研究社区。

Abstract: High-DOF dexterous hands require compact actuation, rich sensing, and reliable thermal behavior, but conventional designs often occupy valuable in-hand space, increase end-effector mass, and suffer from heat accumulation near the hand. Remote tendon-driven actuation offers an alternative by relocating motors to the robot base or an external motor hub, thereby freeing the fingers and palm for additional degrees of freedom, sensing modules, and maintainable mechanical structures. This paper presents MM-Hand, a 21-DOF Multimodal Modular dexterous hand based on remote tendon-driven actuation. The hand integrates spring-return tendon-driven fingers, modular 3D-printed finger and palm structures, quick tendon connectors for maintenance, and a multimodal sensing system including joint angle sensors, tactile sensors, motor-side feedback, and in-palm stereo vision. We further analyze tendon-sheath length variation and friction loss to guide the design of the routing, motor hub, and closed-loop joint control. Experiments validate the transmission, output force, sensing, and control capability of the system. The fingertip force reaches 25N under a 1m remote sheath transmission, demonstrating practical load capacity despite long-distance tendon routing. Closed-loop joint-level experiments further evaluate command tracking with a static arm and during arm motion. These results show that MM-Hand provides a lightweight, sensor-rich, and maintainable hardware platform for dexterous manipulation research. To support the community, all hardware designs and software frameworks are made fully open-source at https://mmlab.hk/research/MM-Hand.

</details>


### [350] [GaLa: Hypergraph-Guided Visual Language Models for Procedural Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17241)
*Kun Wang,Yiming Li,Mingcheng Qu,Aqiang Zhang,Guang Yang,Tonghua Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GaLa是一个用于多模态程序规划的视觉语言框架，通过超图表示和TriView超图编码器，显式捕捉对象间的隐式空间关系和深层语义结构，显著提升执行成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法过度依赖视觉语言模型自身的推理能力，忽视了从多模态输入中挖掘丰富结构化语义信息的重要性，导致模型难以有效理解复杂场景中的功能空间关系。

Method: 提出基于超图的表示方法：将图像中的对象实例建模为节点，根据对象属性和功能语义聚合构建区域级超边。设计TriView超图编码器，通过对比学习在节点视图、区域视图和节点区域关联视图之间强制语义一致性。

Result: 在ActPlan1K和ALFRED基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GaLa在执行成功率、LCS和规划正确性方面显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: GaLa通过超图表示和跨视图语义一致性学习，有效利用了多模态数据中的隐式空间关系和深层语义结构，为具身AI系统中的程序规划提供了更强大的框架。

Abstract: Implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures encoded in object attributes are crucial for procedural planning in embodied AI systems. However, existing approaches often over rely on the reasoning capabilities of vision language models (VLMs) themselves, while overlooking the rich structured semantic information that can be mined from multimodal inputs. As a result, models struggle to effectively understand functional spatial relationships in complex scenes. To fully exploit implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures in multimodal data, we propose GaLa, a vision language framework for multimodal procedural planning. GaLa introduces a hypergraph-based representation, where object instances in the image are modeled as nodes, and region-level hyperedges are constructed by aggregating objects according to their attributes and functional semantics. This design explicitly captures implicit semantic relations among objects as well as the hierarchical organization of functional regions. Furthermore, we design a TriView HyperGraph Encoder that enforces semantic consistency across the node view, area view, and node area association view via contrastive learning, enabling hypergraph semantics to be more effectively injected into downstream VLM reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ActPlan1K and ALFRED benchmarks demonstrate that GaLa significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of execution success rate, LCS, and planning correctness.

</details>


### [351] [Planning Smooth and Safe Control Laws for a Unicycle Robot Among Obstacles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17212)
*Aref Amiri,Basak Sakcak,Steven M. LaValle*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个用于单轮点机器人在有障碍物环境中安全导航的框架，通过新颖的QP公式生成平滑向量场，并设计非线性反馈控制器，在输入限制下确保安全收敛到目标位置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决单轮点机器人在有障碍物环境中从几乎任何允许状态安全导航到目标位置的问题，同时考虑输入限制。现有方法可能无法保证安全集的前向不变性，或需要在线优化计算。

Method: 1. 引入新颖的QP公式生成C∞平滑向量场，减少总弯曲和总转向；2. 设计解析的非线性反馈控制器，满足Nagumo定理条件，确保安全集的前向不变性，无需在线优化；3. 控制器在硬输入限制下仍能安全收敛到目标位置。

Result: 仿真验证了框架的有效性：与基线相比，到达时间快两倍，角控制努力降低超过50%。控制器在硬输入限制下仍能安全收敛到目标位置。

Conclusion: 提出的框架为单轮点机器人提供了安全导航解决方案，通过平滑向量场和非线性反馈控制器实现了高效、低能耗的导航，无需在线优化，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper presents a framework for safe navigation of a unicycle point robot to a goal position in an environment populated with obstacles from almost any admissible state, considering input limits. We introduce a novel QP formulation to create a Cinfinity-smooth vector field with reduced total bending and total turning. Then we design an analytic, non-linear feedback controller that inherently satisfies the conditions of Nagumo's theorem, ensuring forward invariance of the safe set without requiring any online optimization. We have demonstrated that our controller, even under hard input limits, safely converges to the goal position. Simulations confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework, resulting in a twice faster arrival time with over 50\% lower angular control effort compared to the baseline.

</details>


### [352] [Modeling, Control and Self-sensing of Dielectric Elastomer Soft Actuators: A Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17199)
*Y. Zhao,G. Meng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 综述了介电弹性体驱动器（DEAs）的建模、控制和自感知方法，总结了现有问题并展望了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DEAs在软体机器人应用中具有轻量化、大应变、快速响应和高能量密度等优势，但其非线性弹性、粘弹性蠕变、迟滞和振动动力学特性使得建模、控制和自感知面临挑战，阻碍了实际应用。

Method: 综述性研究，系统梳理了DEAs的物理建模方法、现象学建模方法、开环前馈控制、反馈控制、前馈-反馈控制和自适应前馈控制等控制方法，以及基于物理模型的自感知方法和数据驱动的自感知方法。

Result: 全面总结了DEAs建模、控制和自感知领域的研究现状，系统分类了各类方法，为研究人员提供了该领域的完整技术路线图。

Conclusion: 总结了DEAs研究中存在的关键问题，指出了未来研究的新机遇，为DEAs的实际应用和进一步发展提供了方向性指导。

Abstract: Dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs) have garnered extensive attention especially in soft robotic applications over the past few decades owing to the advantages of lightweight, large strain, fast response and high energy density. However, because the DEAs suffer from nonlinear elasticity, inherent viscoelastic creep, hysteresis and vibrational dynamics, the modeling, control and self-sensing of DEAs are challenging, thereby hindering the practical applications of DEAs. In order to address these challenges, numerous studies have been conducted. In this review, various physics-based modeling methods and phenomenological modeling methods for predicting the electromechanical response of DEAs are presented and discussed. Different control methods for DEAs are reviewed, which are classified into open-loop feedforward control, feedback control, feedforward-feedback control and adaptive feedforward control. Physics-based self-sensing methods and data-driven self-sensing methods for reconstructing the DEA displacement without the need for additional sensors are discussed. Finally, the existing problems and new opportunities for the further studies are summarized.

</details>


### [353] [Web-Gewu: A Browser-Based Interactive Playground for Robot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17050)
*Kaixuan Chen,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Web-Gewu：基于WebRTC云边端协同架构的交互式机器人教育平台，通过边缘节点卸载物理仿真和强化学习训练，云端仅作信令中继，实现低成本浏览器端P2P实时流式交互，无需本地安装即可在网页中低延迟操作多形态机器人。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体智能快速发展背景下，机器人教育面临双重挑战：高计算门槛和繁琐环境配置。现有集中式云仿真方案GPU和带宽成本高昂难以大规模部署，纯本地计算则受限于学习者硬件条件。

Method: 提出Web-Gewu平台，采用WebRTC云边端协同架构：边缘节点负责所有物理仿真和强化学习训练，云端服务器仅作轻量级信令中继，实现极低成本的浏览器端P2P实时流式传输。结合预定义的鲁棒命令通信协议，提供开箱即用的教学基础设施。

Result: 学习者无需本地安装即可在网页浏览器中直接低延迟交互多形态机器人，同时实时可视化多维监控数据（包括强化学习奖励曲线）。系统具有高度可扩展性，显著降低了前沿机器人技术的入门门槛。

Conclusion: Web-Gewu为体智能提供了一个高度可扩展、开箱即用、无障碍的教学基础设施，通过云边端协同架构有效解决了机器人教育中的计算和部署难题，大幅降低了前沿机器人技术的入门门槛。

Abstract: With the rapid development of embodied intelligence, robotics education faces a dual challenge: high computational barriers and cumbersome environment configuration. Existing centralized cloud simulation solutions incur substantial GPU and bandwidth costs that preclude large-scale deployment, while pure local computing is severely constrained by learners' hardware limitations. To address these issues, we propose \href{http://47.76.242.88:8080/receiver/index.html}{Web-Gewu}, an interactive robotics education platform built on a WebRTC cloud-edge-client collaborative architecture. The system offloads all physics simulation and reinforcement learning (RL) training to the edge node, while the cloud server acts exclusively as a lightweight signaling relay, enabling extremely low-cost browser-based peer-to-peer (P2P) real-time streaming. Learners can interact with multi-form robots at low end-to-end latency directly in a web browser without any local installation, and simultaneously observe real-time visualization of multi-dimensional monitoring data, including reinforcement learning reward curves. Combined with a predefined robust command communication protocol, Web-Gewu provides a highly scalable, out-of-the-box, and barrier-free teaching infrastructure for embodied intelligence, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for cutting-edge robotics technology.

</details>


### [354] [NaviFormer: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Transformer-like Model to Holistically Solve the Navigation Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16967)
*Daniel Fuertes,Andrea Cavallaro,Carlos R. del-Blanco,Fernando Jaureguizar,Narciso García*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: NaviFormer：基于Transformer的深度强化学习模型，通过同时预测高层路线和低层轨迹来解决全局导航问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界的导航问题通常需要同时解决路线规划（高层）和路径规划（低层）子问题，但现有方法往往单独处理这两个问题，缺乏整体高效的方法

Method: 提出NaviFormer模型，基于Transformer架构的深度强化学习框架，能够同时预测高层路线（航点序列）和低层轨迹（避碰轨迹）

Result: 实验结果表明NaviFormer具有竞争力，能够理解每个子问题的约束和难点并相应改进性能，计算速度优势明显，适合实时任务

Conclusion: NaviFormer为全局导航问题提供了一种整体解决方案，通过同时处理路线和路径规划，在准确性和计算效率方面都表现出色，适合实际应用

Abstract: Path planning is usually solved by addressing either the (high-level) route planning problem (waypoint sequencing to achieve the final goal) or the (low-level) path planning problem (trajectory prediction between two waypoints avoiding collisions). However, real-world problems usually require simultaneous solutions to the route and path planning subproblems with a holistic and efficient approach. In this paper, we introduce NaviFormer, a deep reinforcement learning model based on a Transformer architecture that solves the global navigation problem by predicting both high-level routes and low-level trajectories. To evaluate NaviFormer, several experiments have been conducted, including comparisons with other algorithms. Results show competitive accuracy from NaviFormer since it can understand the constraints and difficulties of each subproblem and act consequently to improve performance. Moreover, its superior computation speed proves its suitability for real-time missions.

</details>


### [355] [Leveraging VR Robot Games to Facilitate Data Collection for Embodied Intelligence Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16903)
*Yihan Zhang,Ziyun Huang,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于Unity的游戏化数据收集框架，通过程序化场景生成、VR人形机器人控制、自动任务评估和轨迹记录，用于大规模具身交互数据收集


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统接口可访问性有限，导致具身交互数据收集成本高、难度大，需要更有效的大规模数据收集解决方案

Method: 开发基于Unity的游戏化框架，包含程序化场景生成、VR人形机器人控制、自动任务评估和轨迹记录系统，以垃圾拾取放置任务为原型验证工作流程

Result: 收集的演示数据在状态-动作空间上表现出广泛覆盖，任务难度增加导致运动强度提高和手臂工作空间探索更广泛

Conclusion: 游戏化虚拟环境可作为有效且可扩展的具身数据收集解决方案，框架验证了该方法的可行性

Abstract: Collecting embodied interaction data at scale remains costly and difficult due to the limited accessibility of conventional interfaces. We present a gamified data collection framework based on Unity that combines procedural scene generation, VR-based humanoid robot control, automatic task evaluation, and trajectory logging. A trash pick-and-place task prototype is developed to validate the full workflow.Experimental results indicate that the collected demonstrations exhibit broad coverage of the state-action space, and that increasing task difficulty leads to higher motion intensity as well as more extensive exploration of the arm's workspace. The proposed framework demonstrates that game-oriented virtual environments can serve as an effective and extensible solution for embodied data collection.

</details>


### [356] [Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation in Tendon-Driven Arms: Lightweight Design and Fault Tolerance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16887)
*Shoujie Li,Changqing Guo,Jianle Xu,Hong Luo,Xueqian Wang,Wenbo Ding,Bin Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TDMA技术通过时分复用驱动显著减少肌腱驱动机器人的执行器数量，同时保持高扭矩输出和内在容错能力，应用于MuxArm机械臂实现轻量化与高负载性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 航空航天应用的机器人需要在轻量化构造和容错操作之间取得平衡，以满足严格的重量限制并确保在远程危险环境中的可靠性。传统肌腱驱动系统需要大量执行器，增加了重量和复杂性。

Method: 提出时分复用驱动(TDMA)方法，采用垂直堆叠旋转选择结构，集成自旋转TDM电机、电磁离合器(亚0.1秒接合)、蜗轮减速器(增强负载能力和自锁)和双编码器系统。开发了驱动空间轨迹规划算法，实现容错控制并减少肌腱负载。

Result: MuxArm机械臂自重2.17kg，支持10kg驱动能力，末端执行器精度达其长度的1%，即使在部分伺服故障下也能保持。肌腱负载比传统方法减少50%。在自由空间、杂乱和受限环境中均表现出鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: TDMA为肌腱驱动机器人提供了一种实用的轻量化解决方案，在显著减少执行器数量的同时保持了高扭矩输出和内在容错能力，适用于航空航天等对重量和可靠性要求严格的应用场景。

Abstract: Robotic manipulators for aerospace applications require a delicate balance between lightweight construction and fault-tolerant operation to satisfy strict weight limitations and ensure reliability in remote, hazardous environments. This paper presents Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation (TDMA), a practical approach for tendon-driven robots that significantly reduces actuator count while preserving high torque output and intrinsic fault tolerance. The key hardware employs a vertically-stacked rotational selection structure that integrates self-rotating TDM motors for rapid configuration, electromagnetic clutches enabling sub-0.1 second engagement, a worm gear reducer for enhanced load capacity and self-locking capability, and a dual-encoder system for precise, long-term positioning. Leveraging TDMA, the proposed MuxArm achieves a self-weight of 2.17 kg, supports an actuator driving capacity of 10 kg, and maintains end-effector accuracy up to 1% of its length, even under partial servo failure. Additionally, an actuation space trajectory planning algorithm is developed, enabling fault-tolerant control and reducing tendon load by up to 50% compared to conventional methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MuxArm's robust performance in diverse settings, including free-space, cluttered, and confined environments.

</details>


### [357] [Chain Of Interaction Benchmark (COIN): When Reasoning meets Embodied Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16886)
*Xianhao Wang,Xiaojian Ma,Haozhe Hu,Rongpeng Su,Yutian Cheng,Zhou Ziheng,Hangxin Liu,Lei Liu,Bin Li,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: COIN是一个评估具身智能体交互推理能力的基准测试，包含50个日常交互任务、数据集和系统评估指标，揭示了当前方法在视觉理解与运动执行之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用具身智能体需要执行交互式、因果依赖的推理，在部分可观测环境中持续交互、获取信息并更新计划以解决长时程任务。现有基准测试未能系统评估这一核心能力，特别是在现实机器人操作中的交互推理需求。

Method: 1) 构建COIN-50：50个日常场景交互任务；创建COIN-Primitive（因果依赖任务所需的基本技能）和COIN-Composition（中等复杂度任务用于技能学习和泛化评估）。2) 开发低成本移动AR遥操作系统，收集COIN-Primitive数据集（每个基本任务50个演示，共1000个）。3) 开发系统评估指标（执行稳定性和泛化鲁棒性），评估CodeAsPolicy、VLA和语言条件H-VLA方法。

Result: 综合评估揭示了当前方法的严重局限性：模型在交互推理任务上表现不佳，主要原因是视觉理解与运动执行之间存在显著差距。提供了对这些局限性的细粒度分析。

Conclusion: COIN基准测试填补了现有评估体系的空白，系统评估了具身智能体的交互推理能力。研究结果表明当前方法在因果依赖的交互任务上存在根本性挑战，为未来研究提供了重要方向和评估框架。

Abstract: Generalist embodied agents must perform interactive, causally-dependent reasoning, continually interacting with the environment, acquiring information, and updating plans to solve long-horizon tasks before they could be adopted in real-life scenarios. For instance, retrieving an apple from a cabinet may require opening multiple doors and drawers before the apple becomes visible and reachable, demanding sequential interaction under partial observability. However, existing benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this essential capability. We introduce COIN, a benchmark designed to assess interactive reasoning in realistic robotic manipulation through three key contributions. First, we construct COIN-50: 50 interactive tasks in daily scenarios, and create COIN-Primitive required by causally-dependent tasks, and COIN-Composition with mid-term complexity for skill learning and generalization evaluation. Second, we develop a low-cost mobile AR teleoperation system and collect the COIN-Primitive Dataset with 50 demonstrations per primitive task (1,000 in total). Third, we develop systematic evaluation metrics about execution stability and generalization robustness to evaluate CodeAsPolicy, VLA, and language-conditioned H-VLA approaches. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals critical limitations in current methods: models struggle with interactive reasoning tasks due to significant gaps between visual understanding and motor execution. We provide fine-grained analysis of these limitations.

</details>


### [358] [Refinement of Accelerated Demonstrations via Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control for Fast Contact-Rich Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16850)
*Koki Yamane,Cristian C. Beltran-Hernandez,Steven Oh,Masashi Hamaya,Sho Sakaino*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出I2RLC方法，通过渐进加速和参考轨迹迭代更新，实现接触丰富操作任务的高保真快速演示生成，用于模仿学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触丰富的操作任务需要快速执行，但为模仿学习提供快速演示存在挑战：人类无法高速演示，简单加速演示会改变接触动力学并导致大跟踪误差。

Method: 提出增量迭代参考学习控制(I2RLC)，在迭代更新参考轨迹的同时渐进提高速度，结合IRLC框架和速度调度策略，生成高保真轨迹。

Result: IRLC和I2RLC均实现10倍加速演示且降低跟踪误差；I2RLC相比IRLC平均提高22.5%空间相似性；基于I2RLC训练的模仿学习策略在孔轴装配任务中达到100%成功率，且接触力更低。

Conclusion: 渐进速度调度与参考适应相结合，为快速、接触丰富的模仿学习提供了实用路径，能够生成高质量快速演示并训练出高性能策略。

Abstract: Fast execution of contact-rich manipulation is critical for practical deployment, yet providing fast demonstrations for imitation learning (IL) remains challenging: humans cannot demonstrate at high speed, and naively accelerating demonstrations alters contact dynamics and induces large tracking errors. We present a method to autonomously refine time-accelerated demonstrations by repurposing Iterative Reference Learning Control (IRLC) to iteratively update the reference trajectory from observed tracking errors. However, applying IRLC directly at high speed tends to produce larger early-iteration errors and less stable transients. To address this issue, we propose Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control (I2RLC), which gradually increases the speed while updating the reference, yielding high-fidelity trajectories. We validate on real-robot whiteboard erasing and peg-in-hole tasks using a teleoperation setup with a compliance-controlled follower and a 3D-printed haptic leader. Both IRLC and I2RLC achieve up to 10x faster demonstrations with reduced tracking error; moreover, I2RLC improves spatial similarity to the original trajectories by 22.5% on average over IRLC across three tasks and multiple speeds (3x-10x). We then use the refined trajectories to train IL policies; the resulting policies execute faster than the demonstrations and achieve 100% success rates in the peg-in-hole task at both seen and unseen positions, with I2RLC-trained policies exhibiting lower contact forces than those trained on IRLC-refined demonstrations. These results indicate that gradual speed scheduling coupled with reference adaptation provides a practical path to fast, contact-rich IL.

</details>


### [359] [LongBench: Evaluating Robotic Manipulation Policies on Real-World Long-Horizon Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16788)
*Xueyao Chen,Jingkai Jia,Tong Yang,Yibo Fu,Wei Li,Wenqiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LongBench是一个真实世界长时程操作基准测试，包含1000+真实场景，分为上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（模糊驱动）两种机制，用于评估执行鲁棒性、时间一致性和上下文推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作策略在长时间执行中性能会下降，但现有基准测试多为仿真环境或仅报告聚合成功率，难以区分真实世界中导致时间性困难的不同来源。需要建立一个能够解耦执行鲁棒性和上下文依赖推理的基准测试。

Method: 提出LongBench基准测试，包含1000多个真实世界操作场景，分为两个互补机制：上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（模糊驱动）。通过将任务组织为能力特定和模糊特定子集，实现机制感知评估，包括执行鲁棒性、时间一致性和上下文依赖推理。

Result: 评估六个最先进策略发现：长时程性能不由单一因素决定；完全可观测环境中的性能与执行鲁棒性更强相关；上下文难度因任务而异，基于记忆的方法不能一致改善性能。

Conclusion: LongBench可作为研究长时程操作的有用基准，帮助开发在执行和上下文挑战方面具有更强鲁棒性的策略。长时程性能需要同时考虑执行鲁棒性和上下文推理能力。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation policies often degrade over extended horizons, yet existing benchmarks provide limited insight into why such failures occur. Most prior benchmarks are either simulation-based or report aggregate success, making it difficult to disentangle the distinct sources of temporal difficulty in real-world execution. We introduce LongBench, a real-world benchmark for evaluating long-horizon manipulation. LongBench consists of over 1,000 real-world episodes, covering two complementary regimes: Context-Independent (fully observable) and Context-Dependent (ambiguity-driven). By organizing tasks into capability- and ambiguity-specific subsets, LongBench enables mechanism-aware evaluation of execution robustness, temporal consistency, and context-dependent reasoning. Evaluating six state-of-the-art policies reveals that long-horizon performance is not governed by a single factor. We observe that performance in fully observable settings is more strongly associated with execution robustness, while contextual difficulty varies across tasks and is not consistently improved by memory-based methods. We hope that LongBench serves as a useful benchmark for studying long-horizon manipulation and for developing policies with stronger robustness across both execution and contextual challenges.

</details>


### [360] [LiDAR-based Crowd Navigation with Visible Edge Group Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16741)
*Allan Wang,Aaron Steinfeld*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出可见边缘群体表示法，简化群体预测以提升拥挤环境中机器人导航的实时性和鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有群体表示方法在拥挤环境中存在局限性：要么仅适用于低密度场景，要么依赖易受遮挡影响的个体检测模块。需要一种更鲁棒、高效的群体表示方法用于实际部署。

Method: 提出可见边缘群体表示法，基于观察发现群体预测精度对导航性能影响有限。该方法简化群体表示，集成到导航框架中，并通过仿真和真实机器人部署验证。

Result: 仿真实验表明，集成简化群体表示的导航框架在密集人群中保持安全性和社交性，同时显著提升计算速度。真实机器人部署验证了群体表示在实际应用中的优势。

Conclusion: 可见边缘群体表示法为拥挤环境中机器人导航提供了一种实用、高效的解决方案，平衡了性能与计算效率，促进了群体表示在实际机器人系统中的部署。

Abstract: Robot navigation in crowded pedestrian environments is a well-known challenge and we explore the practical deployment of group-based representations in this setting. Pedestrian groups have been empirically shown to enable a mobile robot's navigation behavior to be safer and more social. However, existing approaches either explored groups only in limited scenarios with no high-density crowds or depended on external detection modules to track individuals, which are prone to noise and errors due to occlusions in crowds. We show that group prediction accuracy affects navigation performance only marginally in crowded environments. Based on this observation, we propose the visible edge-based group representation. We additionally demonstrate via simulation experiments that our navigation framework, integrated with the simplified group representation, performs comparatively in terms of safety and socialness in dense crowds, while achieving faster computation speed. Finally, we deploy our navigation framework on a real robot to explore the benefits of practically deploying group-based representations in the real world.

</details>


### [361] [Rewind-IL: Online Failure Detection and State Respawning for Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16683)
*Gehan Zheng,Sanjay Seenivasan,Matthew Johnson-Roberson,Weiming Zhi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Rewind-IL：一种无需训练的在线安全框架，用于生成式动作分块模仿策略，通过零样本故障检测和状态重置机制提高长时程操作任务的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习使机器人能够从演示中学习复杂的视觉运动操作技能，但部署失败仍然是主要障碍，特别是对于长时程动作分块策略。一旦执行偏离演示流形，这些策略通常会继续产生局部合理的动作而无法从故障中恢复。现有的运行时监控器要么需要故障数据，要么在良性特征漂移时过度触发，要么只停留在故障检测而不提供恢复机制。

Method: Rewind-IL结合了基于时间分块差异估计（TIDE）的零样本故障检测器（使用分割保形预测校准）和状态重置机制。离线阶段，视觉语言模型识别演示中的恢复检查点，使用冻结策略编码器构建紧凑的检查点特征数据库。在线阶段，监控重叠动作分块的自一致性，跟踪与检查点库的相似性，并在故障时将执行回滚到最新验证的安全状态，然后从干净策略状态重新启动推理。

Result: 在真实世界和模拟的长时程操作任务（包括向流匹配动作分块策略的迁移）上的实验表明，策略内部一致性结合语义基础的重置为提高模仿学习的可靠性提供了一条实用途径。

Conclusion: Rewind-IL通过零样本故障检测和语义验证的状态重置机制，为生成式动作分块模仿策略提供了一个无需训练的安全保障框架，显著提高了长时程操作任务的可靠性，特别是在执行偏离演示流形时的恢复能力。

Abstract: Imitation learning has enabled robots to acquire complex visuomotor manipulation skills from demonstrations, but deployment failures remain a major obstacle, especially for long-horizon action-chunked policies. Once execution drifts off the demonstration manifold, these policies often continue producing locally plausible actions without recovering from the failure. Existing runtime monitors either require failure data, over-trigger under benign feature drift, or stop at failure detection without providing a recovery mechanism. We present Rewind-IL, a training-free online safeguard framework for generative action-chunked imitation policies. Rewind-IL combines a zero-shot failure detector based on Temporal Inter-chunk Discrepancy Estimate (TIDE), calibrated with split conformal prediction, with a state-respawning mechanism that returns the robot to a semantically verified safe intermediate state. Offline, a vision-language model identifies recovery checkpoints in demonstrations, and the frozen policy encoder is used to construct a compact checkpoint feature database. Online, Rewind-IL monitors self-consistency in overlapping action chunks, tracks similarity to the checkpoint library, and, upon failure, rewinds execution to the latest verified safe state before restarting inference from a clean policy state. Experiments on real-world and simulated long-horizon manipulation tasks, including transfer to flow-matching action-chunked policies, demonstrate that policy-internal consistency coupled with semantically grounded respawning offers a practical route to improved reliability in imitation learning. Supplemental materials are available at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il

</details>


### [362] [ReconVLA: An Uncertainty-Guided and Failure-Aware Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robotic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16677)
*Lingling Chen,Zongyao Lyu,William J. Beksi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReconVLA：一种可靠的一致性预测模型，为视觉-语言-动作模型提供校准的不确定性估计和故障感知控制信号


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型缺乏对其动作预测的校准置信度度量，限制了在现实世界场景中的可靠性，因为无法预测不确定性和故障

Method: 将一致性预测直接应用于预训练VLA策略的动作标记输出，获得校准的不确定性估计；同时将一致性预测扩展到机器人状态空间，在故障发生前检测异常或不安全状态

Result: 在模拟和真实机器人实验中，一致性化的动作预测持续改善故障预测，减少灾难性错误，并提供校准的置信度度量，无需重新训练或修改底层VLA

Conclusion: ReconVLA通过一致性预测为VLA模型提供了可靠的置信度校准和故障检测机制，显著提高了机器人控制的可靠性和安全性

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as generalist robotic controllers capable of mapping visual observations and natural language instructions to continuous action sequences. However, VLAs provide no calibrated measure of confidence in their action predictions, thus limiting their reliability in real-world settings where uncertainty and failures must be anticipated. To address this problem we introduce ReconVLA, a reliable conformal model that produces uncertainty-guided and failure-aware control signals. Concretely, our approach applies conformal prediction directly to the action token outputs of pretrained VLA policies, yielding calibrated uncertainty estimates that correlate with execution quality and task success. Furthermore, we extend conformal prediction to the robot state space to detect outliers or unsafe states before failures occur, providing a simple yet effective failure detection mechanism that complements the action-level uncertainty. We evaluate ReconVLA in both simulation and real robot experiments across diverse manipulation tasks. Our results show that conformalized action predictions consistently improve failure anticipation, reduce catastrophic errors, and provide a calibrated measure of confidence without retraining or modifying the underlying VLA.

</details>


### [363] [Diffusion-Based Optimization for Accelerated Convergence of Redundant Dual-Arm Minimum Time Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16670)
*Jushan Chen,Jonathan Fried,Santiago Paternain*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散算法的框架，通过概率采样解决双冗余机械臂笛卡尔路径跟踪的非凸高层问题，相比之前梯度方法实现35倍加速和34%误差降低


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前基于梯度的方法存在计算开销大、无法直接施加L∞笛卡尔误差约束的问题，需要更高效的方法来解决双冗余机械臂路径跟踪的非凸优化问题

Method: 提出基于扩散算法的概率采样框架，处理非凸高层优化问题，利用模型基扩散算法变体，通过概率采样而非梯度下降来搜索解空间

Result: 相比先前工作，运行时间减少35倍，笛卡尔误差降低34%，显著提升了双冗余机械臂路径跟踪的效率和精度

Conclusion: 基于扩散的概率采样框架能有效解决双冗余机械臂路径跟踪的非凸优化问题，在计算效率和跟踪精度方面相比梯度方法有显著改进

Abstract: We present a framework leveraging a novel variant of the model-based diffusion algorithm to minimize the time required for a redundant dual-arm robot configuration to follow a desired relative Cartesian path. Our prior work proposed a bi-level optimization approach for the dual-arm problem, where we derived the analytical solution to the lower-level convex sub-problem and solved the high-level nonconvex problem using a primal-dual approach. However, the gradient-based nature leads to a large computation overhead, and it prohibits directly imposing an $L_{\infty}$ Cartesian error constraint along the joint trajectory due to the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based framework that relies on probabilistic sampling to tackle the aforementioned challenges in the nonconvex high-level problem, leading to a 35x reduction in the runtime and 34\% less Cartesian error compared to our prior work.

</details>


### [364] [Emergency Stopping for Liquid-manipulating Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16667)
*Samuli Hynninen,Ville Kyrki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于机器人操纵开放容器中液体的紧急停止系统，通过最优控制生成时间最优、无溢出的停止轨迹


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 液体对容器加速度和急动高度敏感，现有研究主要关注无溢出液体操纵，但对意外危险下的紧急停止关注不足，而紧急制动可能导致危险溢出

Method: 将紧急停止建模为最优控制问题，在模型预测控制框架中求解，生成时间最优、无溢出的停止轨迹；作为即插即用的安全层集成到现有无晃动运动规划方法之上

Result: 通过仿真和7自由度Franka Emika Panda机器人实验验证，该方法能够实现快速紧急停止而无溢出

Conclusion: 提出的紧急停止系统能够作为安全层有效应对意外危险，考虑非线性液体动力学，实现快速、无溢出的紧急制动

Abstract: Manipulating open liquid containers is challenging because liquids are highly sensitive to vessel accelerations and jerks. Although spill-free liquid manipulation has been widely studied, emergency stopping under unexpected hazards has received little attention, despite the fact that abrupt braking may cause hazardous spills. This letter presents an emergency stop system for robots manipulating liquids in open containers. We formulate emergency stopping as an optimal control problem and solve it in a model predictive control framework to generate time-optimal, spill-free stopping trajectories. The method operates as a plug-and-play safety layer on top of existing slosh-free motion planning methods, enabling immediate reaction to detected hazards while accounting for nonlinear liquid dynamics. We demonstrate, through simulation and on a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot, that the proposed approach achieves fast emergency stopping without spilling.

</details>


### [365] [Semantic Area Graph Reasoning for Multi-Robot Language-Guided Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16263)
*Ruiyang Wang,Hao-Lun Hsu,Jiwoo Kim,Miroslav Pajic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SAGR是一个分层框架，利用大型语言模型通过语义区域图协调多机器人探索和语义搜索，在保持几何探索竞争力的同时显著提升语义目标搜索效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多机器人协调策略（如前沿覆盖或信息增益）无法融入高级任务意图（如在特定房间类型中搜索相关对象），而需要语义推理的任务在未知环境中尤为挑战。

Method: SAGR分层框架：从语义占据地图增量构建语义区域图，编码房间实例、连通性、前沿可用性和机器人状态；LLM基于空间结构和任务上下文进行高级语义房间分配；确定性前沿规划和局部导航处理几何执行。

Result: 在Habitat-Matterport3D数据集的100个场景中，SAGR在保持与最先进探索方法竞争力的同时，持续提升语义目标搜索效率，在大型环境中提升高达18.8%。

Conclusion: 结构化语义抽象作为LLM推理与多机器人协调之间的有效接口，在复杂室内环境中具有重要价值，为需要语义推理的多机器人任务提供了新思路。

Abstract: Coordinating multi-robot systems (MRS) to search in unknown environments is particularly challenging for tasks that require semantic reasoning beyond geometric exploration. Classical coordination strategies rely on frontier coverage or information gain and cannot incorporate high-level task intent, such as searching for objects associated with specific room types. We propose \textit{Semantic Area Graph Reasoning} (SAGR), a hierarchical framework that enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to coordinate multi-robot exploration and semantic search through a structured semantic-topological abstraction of the environment. SAGR incrementally constructs a semantic area graph from a semantic occupancy map, encoding room instances, connectivity, frontier availability, and robot states into a compact task-relevant representation for LLM reasoning. The LLM performs high-level semantic room assignment based on spatial structure and task context, while deterministic frontier planning and local navigation handle geometric execution within assigned rooms. Experiments on the Habitat-Matterport3D dataset across 100 scenarios show that SAGR remains competitive with state-of-the-art exploration methods while consistently improving semantic target search efficiency, with up to 18.8\% in large environments. These results highlight the value of structured semantic abstractions as an effective interface between LLM-based reasoning and multi-robot coordination in complex indoor environments.

</details>


### [366] [DENALI: A Dataset Enabling Non-Line-of-Sight Spatial Reasoning with Low-Cost LiDARs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16201)
*Nikhil Behari,Diego Rivero,Luke Apostolides,Suman Ghosh,Paul Pu Liang,Ramesh Raskar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DENALI：首个大规模真实世界低成本LiDAR时空直方图数据集，用于数据驱动的非视距感知


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 消费级LiDAR内部记录包含直接和多跳光返回的完整时间分辨直方图，这些多跳返回编码了丰富的非视距线索，但硬件限制使得传统NLOS重建方法困难，需要探索数据驱动的推理方法

Method: 创建DENALI数据集，采集72,000个隐藏物体场景的时间分辨LiDAR直方图，涵盖不同物体形状、位置、光照条件和空间分辨率，用于数据驱动的NLOS感知研究

Result: 证明消费级LiDAR能够实现准确的数据驱动非视距感知，识别了限制性能的关键场景和建模因素，以及阻碍当前仿真到真实迁移的仿真保真度差距

Conclusion: DENALI数据集为低成本LiDAR的非视距感知研究提供了重要资源，揭示了数据驱动方法的潜力，并指出了未来研究方向，推动消费级LiDAR的可扩展非视距视觉发展

Abstract: Consumer LiDARs in mobile devices and robots typically output a single depth value per pixel. Yet internally, they record full time-resolved histograms containing direct and multi-bounce light returns; these multi-bounce returns encode rich non-line-of-sight (NLOS) cues that can enable perception of hidden objects in a scene. However, severe hardware limitations of consumer LiDARs make NLOS reconstruction with conventional methods difficult. In this work, we motivate a complementary direction: enabling NLOS perception with low-cost LiDARs through data-driven inference. We present DENALI, the first large-scale real-world dataset of space-time histograms from low-cost LiDARs capturing hidden objects. We capture time-resolved LiDAR histograms for 72,000 hidden-object scenes across diverse object shapes, positions, lighting conditions, and spatial resolutions. Using our dataset, we show that consumer LiDARs can enable accurate, data-driven NLOS perception. We further identify key scene and modeling factors that limit performance, as well as simulation-fidelity gaps that hinder current sim-to-real transfer, motivating future work toward scalable NLOS vision with consumer LiDARs.

</details>


### [367] [A Reconfigurable Pneumatic Joint Enabling Localized Selective Stiffening and Shape Locking in Vine-Inspired Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15907)
*Ayodele James Oyejide,Ustaz A. Yaqub,Samir Erturk,Eray A. Baran,Fabio Stroppa*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，通过离散、压力可调的刚度增强藤蔓机器人的轴向刚度和负载能力，实现自由空间中的形状保持和有效载荷运输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 藤蔓机器人通过尖端外翻实现大工作空间覆盖，但在自由空间中部署时存在轴向刚度低、负载能力差、转向时无法保持形状等根本性限制

Method: 设计可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，包含对称分布的气动腔室，在加压时局部增加弯曲刚度；将RPJ集成到具有肌腱驱动转向的软体生长机器人中，并开发用于空中外翻的紧凑型基站

Result: 系统表征和实验验证显示适中的外翻压力需求，局部刚化和转向性能与层压机制相当；机器人实现弯曲时改进的形状保持、负载下减少的重力偏转、级联收缩以及在自由空间中可靠运输高达202g的有效载荷

Conclusion: RPJ机制为结构自适应藤蔓机器人建立了实用途径，适用于物体分类和无约束环境中的自适应探索等操作导向任务

Abstract: Vine-inspired robots achieve large workspace coverage through tip eversion, enabling safe navigation in confined and cluttered environments. However, their deployment in free space is fundamentally limited by low axial stiffness, poor load-bearing capacity, and the inability to retain shape during and after steering. In this work, we propose a reconfigurable pneumatic joint (RPJ) architecture that introduces discrete, pressure-tunable stiffness along the robot body without compromising continuous growth. Each RPJ module comprises symmetrically distributed pneumatic chambers that locally increase bending stiffness when pressurized, enabling decoupling between global compliance and localized rigidity. We integrate the RPJs into a soft growing robot with tendon-driven steering and develop a compact base station for mid-air eversion. System characterization and experimental validation demonstrate moderate pressure requirements for eversion, as well as comparable localized stiffening and steering performance to layer-jamming mechanisms. Demonstrations further show that the proposed robot achieves improved shape retention during bending, reduced gravitational deflection under load, cascading retraction, and reliable payload transport up to 202 g in free space. The RPJ mechanism establishes a practical pathway toward structurally adaptive vine robots for manipulation-oriented tasks such as object sorting and adaptive exploration in unconstrained environments.

</details>


### [368] [Robust Fleet Sizing for Multi-UAV Inspection Missions under Synchronized Replacement Demand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15890)
*Vishal Ramesh,Antony Thomas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 针对多无人机巡检任务，提出了一种考虑同步电池耗尽情况的机队规模确定方法，相比传统基于统计独立假设的Erlang-B模型，能显著提升任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机机队规模确定方法存在两个问题：一是假设稳态运行条件，不适用于有限时间任务；二是将替换请求视为统计独立事件，这种基于单次请求阻塞保证的方法无法应对需求聚集情况。研究发现，高效路由分配会导致各无人机工作量相似，引发同步电池耗尽和替换需求爆发，即使平均容量足够也会耗尽备用无人机池。

Method: 推导出闭式充分机队规模规则：k = m(ceil(R) + 1)，其中m为活动无人机数量，R为恢复时间与活动时间之比。该规则添加了m个备用无人机的缓冲，以吸收最坏情况下恢复周期边界处的同步需求。通过蒙特卡洛模拟在五种场景下进行验证，并与传统Erlang-B模型进行对比。

Result: 在R=3.39的最苛刻场景中，传统Erlang-B模型（单次请求阻塞目标ε=0.01）的任务成功率降至69.9%，且95%的备用耗尽事件集中在需求最高的5分钟窗口内。相比之下，提出的规则在所有测试条件下（包括风速变异系数CV=0.30）均保持99.8%的成功率（Wilson 95%置信下限99.3%），在最苛刻场景下仅需额外增加4架无人机。

Conclusion: 针对多无人机巡检任务中的同步电池耗尽问题，提出的机队规模确定规则能有效保证任务级可靠性，即使在所有无人机同时耗尽的最坏情况下也能维持高成功率，相比传统方法具有显著优势。

Abstract: Multi-UAV inspection missions require spare drones to replace active drones during recharging cycles. Existing fleet-sizing approaches often assume steady-state operating conditions that do not apply to finite-horizon missions, or they treat replacement requests as statistically independent events. The latter provides per-request blocking guarantees that fail to translate to mission-level reliability when demands cluster. This paper identifies a structural failure mode where efficient routing assigns similar workloads to each UAV, leading to synchronized battery depletion and replacement bursts that exhaust the spare pool even when average capacity is sufficient.
  We derive a closed-form sufficient fleet-sizing rule, k = m(ceil(R) + 1), where m is the number of active UAVs and R is the recovery-to-active time ratio. This additive buffer of m spares absorbs worst-case synchronized demand at recovery-cycle boundaries and ensures mission-level reliability even when all UAVs deplete simultaneously. Monte Carlo validation across five scenarios (m in [2, 10], R in [0.87, 3.39], 1000 trials each) shows that Erlang-B sizing with a per-request blocking target epsilon = 0.01 drops to 69.9% mission success at R = 3.39, with 95% of spare exhaustion events concentrated in the top-decile 5-minute demand windows. In contrast, the proposed rule maintains 99.8% success (Wilson 95% lower bound 99.3%) across all tested conditions, including wind variability up to CV = 0.30, while requiring only four additional drones in the most demanding scenario.

</details>


### [369] [DTEA: A Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator Enabling Real-Time Switching Between Series and Parallel Compliance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15865)
*Vishal Ramesh,Aman Singh,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新型双拓扑弹性执行器(DTEA)，能够在运行期间实时在串联弹性执行器(SEA)和并联弹性执行器(PEA)拓扑之间动态切换，并验证了其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 串联和并联弹性执行器各有优势但相互排斥，现有执行器无法在运行期间实时切换拓扑。需要一种能够在SEA和PEA拓扑之间动态切换的执行器设计。

Method: 设计了双拓扑弹性执行器(DTEA)，开发了原理验证原型，通过实验评估切换机制的鲁棒性和时序特性，并测试了两种模式下的静态刚度和抗干扰性能。

Result: DTEA成功完成324次负载下的拓扑切换循环无损坏，切换时间小于33.33ms。PEA模式刚度是SEA模式的1.53倍(8.54 vs 5.57 Nm/rad)。SEA模式峰值偏转是PEA的2.26倍(5.2° vs 2.3°)，稳定时间是PEA的3.45倍(1380ms vs 400ms)。

Conclusion: DTEA成功实现了运行期间SEA和PEA拓扑的动态切换，两种模式表现出与传统执行器一致的特征，验证了该设计的可行性和功能性。

Abstract: Series and parallel elastic actuators offer complementary but mutually exclusive advantages, yet no existing actuator enables real-time transition between these topologies during operation. This paper presents a novel actuator design called the Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator (DTEA), which enables dynamic switching between SEA and PEA topologies during operation. A proof-of-concept prototype of the DTEA is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the topology-switching mechanism. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the robustness and timing of the switching mechanism under operational conditions. The actuator successfully performed 324 topology-switching cycles under load without damage, demonstrating the robustness of the mechanism. The measured switching time between SEA and PEA modes is under 33.33 ms. Additional experiments are conducted to characterize the static stiffness and disturbance rejection performance in both SEA and PEA modes. Static stiffness tests show that the PEA mode is 1.53x stiffer than the SEA mode, with KSEA = 5.57 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad and KPEA = 8.54 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad. Disturbance rejection experiments show that the mean peak deflection in SEA mode is 2.26x larger than in PEA mode (5.2 deg vs. 2.3 deg), while the mean settling time is 3.45x longer (1380 ms vs. 400 ms). The observed behaviors are consistent with the known characteristics of conventional SEA and PEA actuators, validating the functionality of both modes in the DTEA actuator.

</details>


### [370] [Environment-Adaptive Solid-State LiDAR-Inertial Odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15864)
*Zhi Zhang,Chalermchon Satirapod,Bingtao Ma,Changjun Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种环境自适应的固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM方法，通过局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护来提升极端环境下的定位精度和地图一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM在速度和鲁棒性方面具有优势，但在极端环境中面临严重几何退化和不可靠观测的挑战，导致优化病态和地图不一致，需要解决这些问题以实现精确建图。

Method: 提出环境自适应固态激光雷达-惯性里程计，集成局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护。具体包括：1) 引入局部法向量约束提升状态估计稳定性，抑制退化场景中的定位漂移；2) 设计退化引导的地图更新策略提高地图精度。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在极端和感知退化环境中实现了优越的建图精度和鲁棒性，与基线方法相比平均RMSE降低高达12.8%。

Conclusion: 通过局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护，提出的环境自适应固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM方法有效解决了极端环境中的几何退化和观测不可靠问题，显著提升了定位精度和地图一致性。

Abstract: Solid-state LiDAR-inertial SLAM has attracted significant attention due to its advantages in speed and robustness. However, achieving accurate mapping in extreme environments remains challenging due to severe geometric degeneracy and unreliable observations, which often lead to ill-conditioned optimization and map inconsistencies. To address these challenges, we propose an environment-adaptive solid-state LiDAR-inertial odometry that integrates local normal-vector constraints with degeneracy-aware map maintenance to enhance localization accuracy. Specifically, we introduce local normal-vector constraints to improve the stability of state estimation, effectively suppressing localization drift in degenerate scenarios. Furthermore, we design a degeneration-guided map update strategy to improve map precision. Benefiting from the refined map representation, localization accuracy is further enhanced in subsequent estimation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior mapping accuracy and robustness in extreme and perceptually degraded environments, with an average RMSE reduction of up to 12.8% compared to the baseline method.

</details>


### [371] [Limits of Lamarckian Evolution Under Pressure of Morphological Novelty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15854)
*Jed R Muff,Karine Miras,A. E. Eiben*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 拉马克遗传在机器人形态-控制器协同进化中表现优异，但当进化压力转向形态多样性时，其性能大幅下降，揭示了基于遗传的利用与多样性驱动的探索之间的根本权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究拉马克遗传在机器人形态-控制器协同进化中的表现，特别是在进化压力从单纯任务性能转向同时奖励形态新颖性的多目标选择时，拉马克遗传的优势是否会受到挑战。拉马克遗传的优势依赖于亲代与子代之间的形态相似性，而形态多样性的进化压力可能会破坏这种相似性。

Method: 使用模块化机器人系统，比较达尔文进化与拉马克进化在不同选择压力下的表现。实验设置包括：1）纯任务性能优化；2）多目标压力（同时奖励任务性能和形态新颖性）。通过分析亲代-子代相似性变化来理解性能差异的原因。

Result: 1. 在纯任务性能优化中，拉马克进化显著优于达尔文进化；2. 引入形态多样性选择压力后，两种系统的性能都下降，但拉马克系统的下降幅度更大；3. 促进多样性会降低亲代-子代相似性，从而削弱继承父母学习控制器的益处。

Conclusion: 拉马克遗传在机器人形态-控制器协同进化中存在局限性：当进化压力转向形态多样性时，亲代-子代相似性降低，导致继承学习控制器的优势减弱。这揭示了基于遗传的利用与多样性驱动的探索之间的根本权衡，为进化机器人学中遗传策略的选择提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Lamarckian inheritance has been shown to be a powerful accelerator in systems where the joint evolution of robot morphologies and controllers is enhanced with individual learning. Its defining advantage lies in the offspring inheriting controllers learned by their parents. The efficacy of this option, however, relies on morphological similarity between parent and offspring. In this study, we examine how Lamarckian inheritance performs when the search process is driven toward high morphological variance, potentially straining the requirement for parent-offspring similarity.
