Motivation: 现有基于特征的雷达处理方法在噪声、结构误差以及高动态场景（车辆自身运动+多个移动物体）下鲁棒性不足，且频域处理的优势——提供场景中所有运动结构信息——被长期忽视。

Method: 提出频域雷达数据处理方法Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D)，利用频域相关方法进行配准，直接在频域处理雷达数据而非提取特征。

Result: 在Boreas数据集上进行雷达-only里程计实验，验证了频域方法在噪声、结构误差和高动态场景下的鲁棒性优势。

Conclusion: 频域雷达数据处理相比特征方法具有更高的鲁棒性，且能提供场景中所有运动结构的信息，在自动驾驶（尤其是赛车超车场景）中具有应用价值。

Abstract: We promote in this paper the processing of radar data in the frequency domain to achieve higher robustness against noise and structural errors, especially in comparison to feature-based methods. This holds also for high dynamics in the scene, i.e., ego-motion of the vehicle with the sensor plus the presence of an unknown number of other moving objects. In addition to the high robustness, the processing in the frequency domain has the so far neglected advantage that the underlying correlation based methods used for, e.g., registration, provide information about all moving structures in the scene. A typical automotive application case is overtaking maneuvers, which in the context of autonomous racing are used here as a motivating example. Initial experiments and results with Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D) are presented that use the Boreas dataset to demonstrate radar-only-odometry, i.e., radar-odometry without sensor-fusion, to support our arguments.

</details>


### [410] [Goal2Skill: Long-Horizon Manipulation with Adaptive Planning and Reflection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13942)
*Zhen Liu,Xinyu Ning,Zhe Hu,Xinxin Xie,Weize Li,Zhipeng Tang,Chongyu Wang,Zejun Yang,Hanlin Wang,Yitong Liu,Zhongzhu Pu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种双系统框架（VLM高层规划器 + VLA底层执行器），用于长时域具身操作任务，在RMBench上平均成功率32.4%，远超最强基线9.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA策略依赖有限观测窗口和端到端动作预测，在长时域、部分可观测、存在遮挡和多阶段依赖的任务中表现脆弱，缺乏持久记忆、自适应任务分解和显式故障恢复能力。

Method: 提出双系统框架：(1) 高层规划器——基于VLM的智能体模块，维护结构化任务记忆，进行目标分解、结果验证和错误驱动修正；(2) 低层执行器——基于VLA的视觉运动控制器，通过扩散模型生成动作，并基于保几何滤波观测进行条件控制。两者形成规划-执行闭环。

Result: 在RMBench任务上，所提框架平均成功率32.4%，最强基线仅9.8%；消融实验验证了结构化记忆和闭环恢复的重要性。

Conclusion: 将高层语义推理与低层运动执行显式分离，通过闭环规划-执行机制实现记忆感知推理、自适应重规划和鲁棒在线恢复，有效解决长时域操作挑战。

Abstract: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) systems have demonstrated strong capabilities in embodied manipulation. However, most existing VLA policies rely on limited observation windows and end-to-end action prediction, which makes them brittle in long-horizon, memory-dependent tasks with partial observability, occlusions, and multi-stage dependencies. Such tasks require not only precise visuomotor control, but also persistent memory, adaptive task decomposition, and explicit recovery from execution failures. To address these limitations, we propose a dual-system framework for long-horizon embodied manipulation.
  Our framework explicitly separates high-level semantic reasoning from low-level motor execution. A high-level planner, implemented as a VLM-based agentic module, maintains structured task memory and performs goal decomposition, outcome verification, and error-driven correction. A low-level executor, instantiated as a VLA-based visuomotor controller, carries out each sub-task through diffusion-based action generation conditioned on geometry-preserving filtered observations. Together, the two systems form a closed loop between planning and execution, enabling memory-aware reasoning, adaptive replanning, and robust online recovery. Experiments on representative RMBench tasks show that the proposed framework substantially outperforms representative baselines, achieving a 32.4% average success rate compared with 9.8% for the strongest baseline. Ablation studies further confirm the importance of structured memory and closed-loop recovery for long-horizon manipulation.

</details>


### [411] [Beyond Conservative Automated Driving in Multi-Agent Scenarios via Coupled Model Predictive Control and Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13891)
*Saeed Rahmani,Gözde Körpe,Zhenlin,Xu,Bruno Brito,Simeon Craig Calvert,Bart van Arem*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MPC-RL融合框架用于无信号灯交叉口自动驾驶，在安全性和效率上均优于纯MPC和端到端RL，碰撞率降低21%，成功率高6.5%，并具备良好的跨场景零样本迁移能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无信号灯交叉口的多车交互复杂，MPC依赖手工规则导致行为过于保守，而深度RL虽能学习自适应行为但难以保证安全性和泛化能力，因此需要将两者融合以兼顾安全与效率。

Method: 提出MPC-RL集成框架，将模型预测控制的约束优化能力与深度强化学习的自适应学习能力相结合，用于多智能体交叉口场景的自动驾驶导航。

Result: 在三种交通密度下，MPC-RL均优于纯MPC和端到端RL；碰撞率降低21%，成功率提升6.5%；零样本迁移至高速公路合流场景时，基于MPC的方法优于端到端PPO；训练中损失收敛更快。

Conclusion: MPC-RL集成方法能有效提升多智能体交叉口场景中安全与效率的平衡，且MPC组件为跨驾驶环境的泛化提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: Automated driving at unsignalized intersections is challenging due to complex multi-vehicle interactions and the need to balance safety and efficiency. Model Predictive Control (MPC) offers structured constraint handling through optimization but relies on hand-crafted rules that often produce overly conservative behavior. Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) learns adaptive behaviors from experience but often struggles with safety assurance and generalization to unseen environments. In this study, we present an integrated MPC-RL framework to improve navigation performance in multi-agent scenarios. Experiments show that MPC-RL outperforms standalone MPC and end-to-end RL across three traffic-density levels. Collectively, MPC-RL reduces the collision rate by 21% and improves the success rate by 6.5% compared to pure MPC. We further evaluate zero-shot transfer to a highway merging scenario without retraining. Both MPC-based methods transfer substantially better than end-to-end PPO, which highlights the role of the MPC backbone in cross-scenario robustness. The framework also shows faster loss stabilization than end-to-end RL during training, which indicates a reduced learning burden. These results suggest that the integrated approach can improve the balance between safety performance and efficiency in multi-agent intersection scenarios, while the MPC component provides a strong foundation for generalization across driving environments. The implementation code is available open-source.

</details>


### [412] [Mosaic: An Extensible Framework for Composing Rule-Based and Learned Motion Planners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13853)
*Nick Le Large,Marlon Steiner,Lingguang Wang,Willi Poh,Jan-Hendrik Pauls,Ömer Şahin Taş,Christoph Stiller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Mosaic是一个可扩展的决策框架，通过仲裁图（arbitration graphs）将基于规则的规划器与学习型规划器整合在一起，实现结构化决策。它通过解耦轨迹验证、评分与轨迹生成，使决策过程透明可追溯。在nuPlan和interPlan基准测试中，Mosaic达到了新的最优性能，同时将责任碰撞减少30%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 规则型规划器可解释但难以应对复杂交通场景，学习型规划器适应性强但缺乏透明性且存在安全违规问题。现有方法无法兼顾两者的优势，亟需一种既能保证可解释性又能充分利用学习型规划器适应性的统一框架。

Method: 提出Mosaic框架，核心是仲裁图机制：1）将轨迹验证与评分从各规划器的轨迹生成过程中解耦，确保决策透明可追溯；2）高层轨迹验证引入规划器间的冗余，仅在所有规划器均无法生成有效轨迹时才触发紧急制动；3）通过统一评分与最优轨迹选择，将具有互补优缺点的规则型和学习型规划器结合起来。

Result: 在nuPlan Val14闭环基准上，Mosaic达到95.48 CLS-NR和93.98 CLS-R，刷新最优性能；相比单一规划器减少30%责任碰撞。在interPlan高交互难度场景基准上，Mosaic得分54.30 CLS-R，比最优单一规划器提升23.3%，且无需重新训练或额外数据。

Conclusion: Mosaic通过仲裁图框架成功融合规则型与学习型规划器，兼顾了安全、可解释性与适应性，为自动驾驶中的结构化决策提供了有效范式。

Abstract: Safe and explainable motion planning remains a central challenge in autonomous driving. While rule-based planners offer predictable and explainable behavior, they often fail to grasp the complexity and uncertainty of real-world traffic. Conversely, learned planners exhibit strong adaptability but suffer from reduced transparency and occasional safety violations. We introduce Mosaic, an extensible framework for structured decision-making that integrates both paradigms through arbitration graphs. By decoupling trajectory verification and scoring from the generation of trajectories by individual planners, every decision becomes transparent and traceable. Trajectory verification at a higher level introduces redundancy between the planners, limiting emergency braking to the rare case where all planners fail to produce a valid trajectory. Through unified scoring and optimal trajectory selection, rule-based and learned planners with complementary strengths and weaknesses can be combined to yield the best of both worlds. In experimental evaluation on nuPlan, Mosaic achieves 95.48 CLS-NR and 93.98 CLS-R on the Val14 closed-loop benchmark, setting a new state of the art, while reducing at-fault collisions by 30% compared to either planner in isolation. On the interPlan benchmark, focused on highly interactive and difficult scenarios, Mosaic scores 54.30 CLS-R, outperforming its best constituent planner by 23.3% - all without retraining or requiring additional data. The code is available at github.com/KIT-MRT/mosaic.

</details>


### [413] [EmbodiedClaw: Conversational Workflow Execution for Embodied AI Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13800)
*Xueyang Zhou,Yihan Sun,Xijie Gong,Guiyao Tie,Pan Zhou,Lichao Sun,Yongchao Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EmbodiedClaw是一个通过对话将具身AI开发工作流（环境构建、轨迹合成、模型评估等）自动化的智能体系统，实验表明它能减少人工工程开销并提升可执行性、一致性和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身AI研究正从单任务单环境策略学习向多任务、多场景、多模型设置发展，这显著增加了评估环境构建、轨迹收集、模型训练和评估等环节的工程开销和开发时间。

Method: 提出了一种新范式，用户通过对话表达目标和约束，系统自动规划并执行开发工作流。具体实例化为EmbodiedClaw对话智能体，将环境创建与修订、基准转换、轨迹合成、模型评估和资产扩展等高频率高成本的具身研究活动转化为可执行的技能。

Result: 在端到端工作流任务、特定能力评估、人类研究者研究和消融实验上，EmbodiedClaw减少了人工工程工作量，同时提高了可执行性、一致性和可复现性。

Conclusion: 具身AI开发正从手动工具链向可对话执行的工作流转变。

Abstract: Embodied AI research is increasingly moving beyond single-task, single-environment policy learning toward multi-task, multi-scene, and multi-model settings. This shift substantially increases the engineering overhead and development time required for stages such as evaluation environment construction, trajectory collection, model training, and evaluation. To address this challenge, we propose a new paradigm for embodied AI development in which users express goals and constraints through conversation, and the system automatically plans and executes the development workflow. We instantiate this paradigm with EmbodiedClaw, a conversational agent that turns high-frequency, high-cost embodied research activities, including environment creation and revision, benchmark transformation, trajectory synthesis, model evaluation, and asset expansion, into executable skills. Experiments on end-to-end workflow tasks, capability-specific evaluations, human researcher studies, and ablations show that EmbodiedClaw reduces manual engineering effort while improving executability, consistency, and reproducibility. These results suggest a shift from manual toolchains to conversationally executable workflows for embodied AI development.

</details>


### [414] [Failure Identification in Imitation Learning Via Statistical and Semantic Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13788)
*Quentin Rolland,Fabrice Mayran de Chamisso,Jean-Baptiste Mouret*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FIDeL是一种策略无关的机器人故障检测模块，结合最优传输匹配、共形预测和视觉语言模型，在演示学习中对异常状态进行检测并区分良性异常与真实故障，在BotFails数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习策略在真实部署中面对硬件故障、零件缺陷、意外人类行为等罕见事件时表现脆弱，而现有视觉异常检测方法无法区分故障性异常与良性偏差，因此需要一种能够准确识别真实故障的检测模块。

Method: FIDeL利用最优传输匹配对齐新观测与正常示范的紧凑表示，生成异常分数和热力图；通过共形预测扩展推导时空阈值；结合视觉语言模型进行语义过滤，区分良性异常与真实故障。

Result: 在BotFails数据集上，FIDeL在异常检测AUROC上提升5.30%，在故障检测准确率上提升17.38%，一致优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: FIDeL通过结合最优传输、共形预测和VLM语义过滤，有效实现了机器人演示学习中的故障检测与区分，显著提升了真实部署中的可靠性。

Abstract: Imitation learning (IL) policies in robotics deliver strong performance in controlled settings but remain brittle in real-world deployments: rare events such as hardware faults, defective parts, unexpected human actions, or any state that lies outside the training distribution can lead to failed executions. Vision-based Anomaly Detection (AD) methods emerged as an appropriate solution to detect these anomalous failure states but do not distinguish failures from benign deviations. We introduce FIDeL (Failure Identification in Demonstration Learning), a policy-independent failure detection module. Leveraging recent AD methods, FIDeL builds a compact representation of nominal demonstrations and aligns incoming observations via optimal transport matching to produce anomaly scores and heatmaps. Spatio-temporal thresholds are derived with an extension of conformal prediction, and a Vision-Language Model (VLM) performs semantic filtering to discriminate benign anomalies from genuine failures. We also introduce BotFails, a multimodal dataset of real-world tasks for failure detection in robotics. FIDeL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, yielding +5.30% percent AUROC in anomaly detection and +17.38% percent failure-detection accuracy on BotFails compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [415] [Empirical Prediction of Pedestrian Comfort in Mobile Robot Pedestrian Encounters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13677)
*Alireza Jafari,Hong-Son Nguyen,Yen-Chen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究通过实验探究移动机器人与行人交互运动学与主观舒适度的关系，基于最小距离、最小预测碰撞时间和复合指标设计了三种舒适度评估器，其中复合评估器预测性能最优（优势比3.67），为将行人感受融入机器人路径规划提供了量化工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注行人的客观安全性（如避撞算法），但缺乏对行人主观安全感/舒适度的考量，而量化舒适度是机器人理解与响应人类情感的主要挑战。

Method: 开展一对一实验（移动机器人与志愿者），通过统计分析行人报告舒适度与运动学变量的相关性，设计了基于最小距离、最小预测碰撞时间及复合指标的三种舒适度评估器。

Result: 运动学变量与舒适度呈中等但显著的相关性；复合评估器预测率和分类性能最优，优势比为3.67，即识别为舒适时实际舒适的概率约为不舒适的4倍。

Conclusion: 本研究提供了量化行人舒适度的工具，可用于将行人感受融入移动机器人的路径规划，实现更具社会合规性的机器人行为。

Abstract: Mobile robots joining public spaces like sidewalks must care for pedestrian comfort. Many studies consider pedestrians' objective safety, for example, by developing collision avoidance algorithms, but not enough studies take the pedestrian's subjective safety or comfort into consideration. Quantifying comfort is a major challenge that hinders mobile robots from understanding and responding to human emotions. We empirically look into the relationship between the mobile robot-pedestrian interaction kinematics and subjective comfort. We perform one-on-one experimental trials, each involving a mobile robot and a volunteer. Statistical analysis of pedestrians' reported comfort versus the kinematic variables shows moderate but significant correlations for most variables. Based on these empirical findings, we design three comfort estimators/predictors derived from the minimum distance, the minimum projected time-to-collision, and a composite estimator. The composite estimator employs all studied kinematic variables and reaches the highest prediction rate and classifying performance among the predictors. The composite predictor has an odds ratio of 3.67. In simple terms, when it identifies a pedestrian as comfortable, it is almost 4 times more likely that the pedestrian is comfortable rather than uncomfortable. The study provides a comfort quantifier for incorporating pedestrian feelings into path planners for more socially compliant robots.

</details>


### [416] [Vision-and-Language Navigation for UAVs: Progress, Challenges, and a Research Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13654)
*Hanxuan Chen,Jie Zheng,Siqi Yang,Tianle Zeng,Siwei Feng,Songsheng Cheng,Ruilong Ren,Hanzhong Guo,Shuai Yuan,Xiangyue Wang,Kangli Wang,Ji Pei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了无人机视觉语言导航（UAV-VLN）领域，从任务定义、方法分类（从模块化/深度学习到基于大模型的智能体系统）、生态资源（模拟器、数据集、评估指标）到核心挑战（仿真到现实迁移、动态环境感知、语言歧义推理、资源受限部署），并提出了多智能体协同和空地协作等未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机视觉语言导航是具身智能的关键挑战，现有研究分散且缺乏系统性梳理，亟需一份结构化综述来厘清技术演进脉络、整合现有资源并明确核心瓶颈，以指导该领域的标准化研究与实际部署。

Method: 本文构建了方法论分类体系，从早期模块化方法、深度学习方法，到当代基于大基础模型（VLM、VLA模型）的智能体系统，以及生成式世界模型与VLA架构的融合；同时系统调研了模拟器、数据集和评估指标等生态资源。

Result: 识别出UAV-VLN领域的四项核心挑战：仿真到现实的迁移鸿沟、动态户外环境下的鲁棒感知、语言歧义推理、大模型在资源受限硬件上的高效部署；并总结了当前基准与局限。

Conclusion: 提出前瞻性研究路线图，指出多智能体集群协同和空地协作机器人是未来关键前沿方向，为后续研究提供系统性指引。

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV-VLN) represents a pivotal challenge in embodied artificial intelligence, focused on enabling UAVs to interpret high-level human commands and execute long-horizon tasks in complex 3D environments. This paper provides a comprehensive and structured survey of the field, from its formal task definition to the current state of the art. We establish a methodological taxonomy that charts the technological evolution from early modular and deep learning approaches to contemporary agentic systems driven by large foundation models, including Vision-Language Models (VLMs), Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and the emerging integration of generative world models with VLA architectures for physically-grounded reasoning. The survey systematically reviews the ecosystem of essential resources simulators, datasets, and evaluation metrics that facilitates standardized research. Furthermore, we conduct a critical analysis of the primary challenges impeding real-world deployment: the simulation-to-reality gap, robust perception in dynamic outdoor settings, reasoning with linguistic ambiguity, and the efficient deployment of large models on resource-constrained hardware. By synthesizing current benchmarks and limitations, this survey concludes by proposing a forward-looking research roadmap to guide future inquiry into key frontiers such as multi-agent swarm coordination and air-ground collaborative robotics.

</details>


### [417] [A Mechanistic Analysis of Sim-and-Real Co-Training in Generative Robot Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13645)
*Yu Lei,Minghuan Liu,Abhiram Maddukuri,Zhenyu Jiang,Yuke Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析和实验研究，揭示了仿真与真实数据协同训练生成式机器人策略的两个内在机制：结构化表征对齐（主要作用）和重要性重加权效应（次要作用），并基于此提出了一种统一解释框架和改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管协同训练在机器人策略学习中取得广泛成功，但其有效性的内在机制尚未被充分理解，缺乏理论层面的系统分析。

Method: 通过理论分析识别两种核心效应（结构化表征对齐与重要性重加权），并在玩具模型和多种机器人操作任务（sim-and-sim、sim-and-real）上进行受控实验验证。

Result: 结构化表征对齐在跨域表征对齐与域可区分性之间取得平衡，是影响下游性能的主要因素；重要性重加权效应源于域依赖的动作权重调制，起次要作用。所提方法一致优于先前方法。

Conclusion: 该分析为现有协同训练技术提供了统一解释，并启发了一种简单且持续改进的实用方法，有助于推动该方向的研究。

Abstract: Co-training, which combines limited in-domain real-world data with abundant surrogate data such as simulation or cross-embodiment robot data, is widely used for training generative robot policies. Despite its empirical success, the mechanisms that determine when and why co-training is effective remain poorly understood. We investigate the mechanism of sim-and-real co-training through theoretical analysis and empirical study, and identify two intrinsic effects governing performance. The first, \textbf{``structured representation alignment"}, reflects a balance between cross-domain representation alignment and domain discernibility, and plays a primary role in downstream performance. The second, the \textbf{``importance reweighting effect"}, arises from domain-dependent modulation of action weighting and operates at a secondary level. We validate these effects with controlled experiments on a toy model and extensive sim-and-sim and sim-and-real robot manipulation experiments. Our analysis offers a unified interpretation of recent co-training techniques and motivates a simple method that consistently improves upon prior approaches. More broadly, our aim is to examine the inner workings of co-training and to facilitate research in this direction.

</details>


### [418] [Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13533)
*Jianzong Wang,Botao Zhao,Yayun He,Junqing Peng,Xulong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出EEAgent框架，利用大视觉语言模型和长短期反思优化机制，使机器人通过提示学习实现自我进化，在VIMA-Bench六个任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人方法训练需求大、跨任务泛化难且缺乏可解释性，提示学习虽无需大量训练但难以从任务成功/失败中提取有效经验。

Method: 提出EEAgent框架，结合大视觉语言模型进行环境解释和策略规划；设计长短期反思优化(LSTRO)机制，基于过往经验和新学教训动态优化提示，实现持续自我进化。

Result: 在VIMA-Bench六个任务上达到新SOTA，在复杂场景中显著优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过反思优化机制有效提升了机器人跨任务泛化能力和任务成功率，为通用机器人自我进化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences. However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

</details>


### [419] [Stability Principle Underlying Passive Dynamic Walking of Rimless Wheel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13530)
*Fumihiko Asano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了无辐条轮（rimless wheel）在被动动态行走中的稳定性原理，通过运动方程线性化和能量守恒定律分析，深入解释了其固有稳定机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已知无辐条轮的被动步态具有渐近稳定性，但其内在稳定性原理仍有待进一步探索。

Method: 基于运动方程的线性化重新考虑支撑相稳定性，并研究稳定性与能量守恒定律之间的关系。

Result: 通过数学分析，阐明了无辐条轮被动步态固有稳定性与能量守恒之间的内在联系。

Conclusion: 提供了对无辐条轮固有稳定性原理的更深入理解，揭示了其稳定性机制与能量守恒定律的关联。

Abstract: Rimless wheels are known as the simplest model for passive dynamic walking. It is known that the passive gait generated only by gravity effect always becomes asymptotically stable and 1-period because a rimless wheel automatically achieves the two necessary conditions for guaranteeing the asymptotic stability; one is the constraint on impact posture and the other is the constraint on restored mechanical energy. The asymptotic stability is then easily shown by the recurrence formula of kinetic energy. There is room, however, for further research into the inherent stability principle. In this paper, we reconsider the stability of the stance phase based on the linearization of the equation of motion, and investigate the relation between the stability and energy conservation law. Through the mathematical analysis, we provide a greater understanding of the inherent stability principle.

</details>


### [420] [RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13492)
*Pou-Chun Kung,Yuan Tian,Zhengqin Li,Yue Liu,Eric Whitmire,Wolf Kienzle,Hrvoje Benko*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出首个基于高斯溅射（GS）的雷达光束法平差（BA）框架，利用全距离-方位-多普勒数据联合优化雷达传感器位姿与场景几何，将多帧BA的优势引入雷达SLAM。集成至雷达-惯性里程计前端后，在室内场景中平均平移误差降低90%，旋转误差降低80%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有雷达SLAM主要依赖帧间里程计导致显著漂移，虽可通过回环检测修正但依赖重访与地点识别；而视觉SLAM中广泛使用的光束法平差（BA）在雷达领域尚未得到有效探索。

Method: 利用高斯溅射（GS）作为密集可微分场景表征，构建首个雷达BA框架，联合优化雷达传感器位姿与场景几何，使用全范围-方位-多普勒（range-azimuth-Doppler）数据进行优化。

Result: 在多个室内场景中，集成该BA框架的雷达-惯性里程计相比基线方法，平均绝对平移误差降低90%，平均绝对旋转误差降低80%。

Conclusion: 首次将多帧BA成功引入雷达SLAM，显著降低位姿漂移并提升鲁棒性，证明了高斯溅射在雷达场景表示与优化中的有效性。

Abstract: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

</details>


### [421] [RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13476)
*Jiahao Ma,Qiang Zhang,Peiran Liu,Zeran Su,Pihai Sun,Gang Han,Wen Zhao,Wei Cui,Zhang Zhang,Zhiyuan Xu,Renjing Xu,Jian Tang,Miaomiao Liu,Yijie Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RobotPan，一种结合六摄像头与LiDAR的360°环绕视觉系统，通过前馈框架从稀疏视图中预测度量尺度、紧凑的3D高斯体，实现实时渲染、重建与流式传输，并发布多传感器数据集，实验表明其在高斯数量大幅减少的情况下达到竞争性质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人视觉界面多局限于前向窄视角，或需要手动切换多摄像头，且存在运动抖动导致晕动症的问题，缺乏支持全身感知的环绕视觉系统。

Method: 结合6个摄像头与LiDAR实现360°覆盖；提出RobotPan前馈框架，将多视图特征提升到统一球面坐标表示，利用分层球面体素先验解码出度量尺度且紧凑的3D高斯体（近处高分辨率、远处低分辨率）；采用在线融合更新动态内容并选择性更新静态区域外观。

Result: 在360°新视角合成和度量3D重建任务上，RobotPan以显著更少的高斯数量达到与现有前馈重建和新视角合成方法竞争的质量，支持实时嵌入式部署。

Conclusion: 提出的环绕视觉系统及RobotPan框架有效解决了机器人感知中的视场限制与晕动症问题，实现了高质量、实时的360°感知与重建，为遥操作、数据采集和紧急接管等场景提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

</details>


### [422] [Robust Energy-Aware Routing for Air-Ground Cooperative Multi-UAV Delivery in Wind-Uncertain Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13441)
*Tianshun Li,Hongliang Lu,Yanggang Sheng,Zhongzhen Wang,Haoang Li,Xinhu Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Battery-Efficient Routing (BER)框架，一种面向动态风环境下无人机配送的在线风险敏感规划方法，通过时变能量图建模和实时能量预算管理，显著提升任务成功率并降低风致故障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机配送路径规划大多采用静态或确定性能耗模型，无法应对实际物流中随时间变化的风场对无人机返航可行性的影响，导致在动态风环境下可靠性不足。

Method: 将问题建模为时变能量图上的路由问题，边成本随风致气动效应动态演化；BER在线评估返航可行性，平衡瞬时能耗与不确定性感知风险；嵌入分层空地协同配送架构，结合任务分配、路径规划和分布式轨迹执行。

Result: 在Unreal Engine生成的合成ER图和准真实风况日志上的仿真表明，相比静态和贪心基线方法，BER显著提高了任务成功率并减少了风致故障。

Conclusion: 实时能量预算管理与环境感知对于动态风环境下无人机配送规划至关重要，BER框架有效提升了系统鲁棒性和安全性。

Abstract: Ensuring energy feasibility under wind uncertainty is critical for the safety and reliability of UAV delivery missions. In realistic truck-drone logistics systems, UAVs must deliver parcels and safely return under time-varying wind conditions that are only partially observable during flight. However, most existing routing approaches assume static or deterministic energy models, making them unreliable in dynamic wind environments. We propose Battery-Efficient Routing (BER), an online risk-sensitive planning framework for wind-sensitive truck-assisted UAV delivery. The problem is formulated as routing on a time dependent energy graph whose edge costs evolve according to wind-induced aerodynamic effects. BER continuously evaluates return feasibility while balancing instantaneous energy expenditure and uncertainty-aware risk. The approach is embedded in a hierarchical aerial-ground delivery architecture that combines task allocation, routing, and decentralized trajectory execution. Extensive simulations on synthetic ER graphs generated in Unreal Engine environments and quasi-real wind logs demonstrate that BER significantly improves mission success rates and reduces wind-induced failures compared with static and greedy baselines. These results highlight the importance of integrating real-time energy budgeting and environmental awareness for UAV delivery planning under dynamic wind conditions.

</details>


### [423] [Learning-Based Sparsification of Dynamic Graphs in Robotic Exploration Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16509)
*Adithya V. Sastry,Bibek Poudel,Weizi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Transformer和PPO的框架，用于在机器人探索过程中剪枝动态图结构（如RRT），可将图大小减少96%，虽探索速率略低于基线，但标准差最低、一致性最强，是首个将RL用于机器人探索图稀疏化的研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人探索算法中使用的图结构（如RRT）会快速增长，积累冗余信息，影响性能，因此需要一种方法在探索过程中对图进行剪枝以限制其增长。

Method: 基于Transformer的框架，使用PPO（Proximal Policy Optimization）训练策略，在机器人使用RRT进行前沿探索的过程中对图进行剪枝。

Result: 在仿真环境中，该策略可将图大小减少96%；探索速率低于基线，但标准差最低，即在多样化环境中表现最一致。

Conclusion: 初步证据表明该框架能在稀疏延迟奖励信号下学习将剪枝决策与探索结果关联，首次证明了RL在机器人探索动态图稀疏化中的可行性。

Abstract: Many robotic exploration algorithms rely on graph structures for frontier-based exploration and dynamic path planning. However, these graphs grow rapidly, accumulating redundant information and impacting performance. We present a transformer-based framework trained with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to prune these graphs during exploration, limiting their growth and reducing the accumulation of excess information. The framework was evaluated on simulations of a robotic agent using Rapidly Exploring Random Trees (RRT) to carry out frontier-based exploration, where the learned policy reduces graph size by up to 96%. We find preliminary evidence that our framework learns to associate pruning decisions with exploration outcomes despite sparse, delayed reward signals. We also observe that while intelligent pruning achieves a lower rate of exploration compared to baselines, it yields the lowest standard deviation, producing the most consistent exploration across varied environments. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first suggesting the viability of RL in sparsification of dynamic graphs used in robotic exploration algorithms.

</details>


### [424] [Singularity Avoidance in Inverse Kinematics: A Unified Treatment of Classical and Learning-based Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13405)
*Vishnu Rudrasamudram,Hariharasudan Malaichamee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了串联机械臂逆运动学中的奇异位形处理方法，涵盖从经典雅可比正则化、黎曼可操作度跟踪、约束优化到现代数据驱动范式的统一框架。提出系统分类法，按几何结构保持与鲁棒性保证（形式化vs.经验性）对方法分类。通过12种IK求解器在Franka Panda机械臂上的基准测试发现：纯学习方法在良态目标上完全失效（MLP：0%成功率，约10mm平均误差），而混合热启动架构（IKFlow: 59%→100%, CycleIK: 0%→98.6%, GGIK: 0%→100%）通过经典精炼挽救学习求解器，DLS可从高达207mm的初始误差收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有综述未能桥接经典奇异鲁棒IK与快速发展的基于学习方法，缺乏统一视角和系统性评估基准。

Method: 提出统一分类法（按几何结构保持与鲁棒性保证），设计基准测试协议，在Franka Panda上对12种IK求解器进行四维评估（误差退化、速度放大、分布外鲁棒性、计算成本）。

Result: 纯学习方法在良态目标上完全失败（MLP：0%成功率，~10mm平均误差）；混合热启动架构（IKFlow: 59%→100%, CycleIK: 0%→98.6%, GGIK: 0%→100%）通过经典精炼显著提升；DLS可从高达207mm初始误差收敛。

Conclusion: 混合架构是当前解决奇异位形IK问题的有效范式，纯学习方法尚不可靠；更深入的奇异域评估被确定为近期工作方向。

Abstract: Singular configurations cause loss of task-space mobility, unbounded joint velocities, and solver divergence in inverse kinematics (IK) for serial manipulators. No existing survey bridges classical singularity-robust IK with rapidly growing learning-based approaches. We provide a unified treatment spanning Jacobian regularization, Riemannian manipulability tracking, constrained optimization, and modern data-driven paradigms. A systematic taxonomy classifies methods by retained geometric structure and robustness guarantees (formal vs. empirical). We address a critical evaluation gap by proposing a benchmarking protocol and presenting experimental results: 12 IK solvers are evaluated on the Franka Panda under position-only IK across four complementary panels measuring error degradation by condition number, velocity amplification, out-of-distribution robustness, and computational cost. Results show that pure learning methods fail even on well-conditioned targets (MLP: 0% success, approx. 10 mm mean error), while hybrid warm-start architectures - IKFlow (59% to 100%), CycleIK(0% to 98.6%), GGIK (0% to 100%) - rescue learned solvers via classical refinement, with DLS converging from initial errors up to 207 mm. Deeper singularity-regime evaluation is identified as immediate future work.

</details>


### [425] [Boundary Sampling to Learn Predictive Safety Filters via Pontryagin's Maximum Principle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13325)
*James Dallas,Thomas Lew,John Talbot,Jonathan DeCastro,Somil Bansal,John Subosits*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出利用庞特里亚金最大值原理（PMP）表征恰好避免安全违例的边界轨迹，以此指导数据采样，提升学习型安全滤波器在高维自主系统中的应用效率。仿真与共享控制赛车实验表明，该方法加快了收敛速度、降低了失效率，并改善了安全集重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习型安全滤波器在高维自主系统中表现依赖数据质量，但采集接近约束违例的状态（即最具信息量的数据）在复杂高维系统中效率低下，现有方法难以高效采样这些安全关键状态。

Method: 利用庞特里亚金最大值原理（PMP）刻画恰好避免安全违例的边界轨迹，以此引导数据采集，聚焦于安全关键状态进行学习，优化学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性分析，并将学习得到的控制障碍值函数直接用于安全滤波。

Result: 仿真与共享控制赛车实验表明，PMP引导采样提升了学习效率：收敛更快、失效率降低、安全集重建效果改善，且实时推理时间约3ms。

Conclusion: PMP引导的数据采样策略能有效提升学习型安全滤波器的数据效率和安全性，在复杂高维自主系统中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Safety filters provide a practical approach for enforcing safety constraints in autonomous systems. While learning-based tools scale to high-dimensional systems, their performance depends on informative data that includes states likely to lead to constraint violation, which can be difficult to efficiently sample in complex, high-dimensional systems. In this work, we characterize trajectories that barely avoid safety violations using the Pontryagin Maximum Principle. These boundary trajectories are used to guide data collection for learned Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability, concentrating learning efforts near safety-critical states to improve efficiency. The learned Control Barrier Value Function is then used directly for safety filtering. Simulations and experimental validation on a shared-control automotive racing application demonstrate PMP sampling improves learning efficiency, yielding faster convergence, reduced failure rates, and improved safe set reconstruction, with wall times around 3ms.

</details>


### [426] [Vectorizing Projection in Manifold-Constrained Motion Planning for Real-Time Whole-Body Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13323)
*Shrutheesh R Iyer,I-Chia Chang,Andrew Z. Liu,Yan Gu,Zachary Kingston*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于CPU SIMD并行加速的流形约束运动规划器，相比现有方法实现100-1000倍加速，首次实现了实时约束运动规划，并在真实人形机器人上验证了实时全身准静态规划生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流形约束运动规划方法在复杂系统（如人形机器人）上耗时数十秒，难以在动态场景中实现实时应用，亟需加速以满足实际需求。

Method: 受硬件加速运动规划启发，将投影式约束满足问题重新构建为可并行化结构，利用CPU SIMD并行计算实现约束满足路径的高效求解。

Result: 相比最先进方法实现100-1000倍加速，在真实人形机器人上实现了实时全身准静态规划生成。

Conclusion: SIMD并行加速可有效解决流形约束运动规划的实时性问题，为复杂机器人系统在动态环境中的实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Many robot planning tasks require satisfaction of one or more constraints throughout the entire trajectory. For geometric constraints, manifold-constrained motion planning algorithms are capable of planning collision-free path between start and goal configurations on the constraint submanifolds specified by task. Current state-of-the-art methods can take tens of seconds to solve these tasks for complex systems such as humanoid robots, making real-world use impractical, especially in dynamic settings. Inspired by recent advances in hardware accelerated motion planning, we present a CPU SIMD-accelerated manifold-constrained motion planner that revisits projection-based constraint satisfaction through the lens of parallelization. By transforming relevant components into parallelizable structures, we use SIMD parallelism to plan constraint satisfying solutions. Our approach achieves up to 100-1000x speed-ups over the state-of-the-art, making real-time constrained motion planning feasible for the first time. We demonstrate our planner on a real humanoid robot and show real-time whole-body quasi-static plan generation. Our work is available at https://commalab.org/papers/mcvamp/.

</details>


### [427] [Utilizing Inpainting for Keypoint Detection for Vision-Based Control of Robotic Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13309)
*Sreejani Chatterjee,Venkatesh Mullur,Abhinav Gandhi,Berk Calli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于纯自然视觉特征的机器人配置空间伺服框架，通过数据驱动的关键点检测实现无标记视觉控制。该方法利用修补技术生成自动标注的训练图像，并在运行时通过第二个修补模型和UKF滤波器实现遮挡下的鲁棒关键点跟踪与控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种无需外部标记、不依赖精确相机标定和机器人模型的纯视觉伺服方法，适用于运行时无法或不宜放置标记物的场景。

Method: 1) 数据采集阶段：在机器人本体附着ArUco标记，用修补技术去除标记并重建遮挡区域，生成自动标注的无标记图像；2) 训练关键点检测算法；3) 运行时引入第二个修补模型实时重建被遮挡区域；4) 集成无迹卡尔曼滤波(UKF)平滑关键点估计，实现鲁棒控制。

Result: 在全可见和部分遮挡条件下，该无模型、纯视觉控制策略均成功实现了机器人配置空间控制。

Conclusion: 通过数据驱动的修补和滤波方法，可以消除对精确标定和机器人模型的依赖，利用自然特征实现鲁棒的视觉伺服控制。

Abstract: In this paper we present a novel visual servoing framework to control a robotic manipulator in the configuration space by using purely natural visual features. Our goal is to develop methods that can robustly detect and track natural features or keypoints on robotic manipulators that would be used for vision-based control, especially for scenarios where placing external markers on the robot is not feasible or preferred at runtime. For the model training process of our data driven approach, we create a data collection pipeline where we attach ArUco markers along the robot's body, label their centers as keypoints, and then utilize an inpainting method to remove the markers and reconstruct the occluded regions. By doing so, we generate natural (markerless) robot images that are automatically labeled with the marker locations. These images are used to train a keypoint detection algorithm, which is used to control the robot configuration using natural features of the robot. Unlike the prior methods that rely on accurate camera calibration and robot models for labeling training images, our approach eliminates these dependencies through inpainting. To achieve robust keypoint detection even in the presence of occlusion, we introduce a second inpainting model, this time to utilize during runtime, that reconstructs occluded regions of the robot in real time, enabling continuous keypoint detection. To further enhance the consistency and robustness of keypoint predictions, we integrate an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) that refines the keypoint estimates over time, adding to stable and reliable control performance. We obtained successful control results with this model-free and purely vision-based control strategy, utilizing natural robot features in the runtime, both under full visibility and partial occlusion.

</details>


### [428] [GeoVision-Enabled Digital Twin for Hybrid Autonomous-Teleoperated Medical Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13248)
*Parham Kebria,Soheil Sabri,Laura J Brattain*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生和GeoVision能力的混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统架构，通过实时同步的虚拟表示增强远程临床和操作人员在灾害环境中的态势感知与决策能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在灾害影响和基础设施受限环境中，远程医疗响应系统被广泛部署，但传统地面控制界面在提供态势感知和决策支持方面存在局限，需要更直观、更智能的交互方式。

Method: 构建数字孪生架构，集成GeoVision能力（感知与自适应导航），实现系统状态、环境动态、患者状况和任务目标的实时同步，为远程用户提供持续更新的虚拟平台表示。

Result: 数字孪生界面相比传统地面控制界面，为远程临床和操作用户提供了更直观、更丰富的环境感知和决策支持能力。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合自主-遥操作数字孪生架构能够有效提升应急医疗响应系统的远程操作效率和临床决策质量。

Abstract: Remote medical response systems are increasingly being deployed to support emergency care in disaster-affected and infrastructure-limited environments. Enabled by GeoVision capabilities, this paper presents a Digital Twin architecture for hybrid autonomous-teleoperated medical response systems. The proposed framework integrates perception and adaptive navigation with a Digital Twin, synchronized in real-time, that mirrors system states, environmental dynamics, patient conditions, and mission objectives. Unlike traditional ground control interfaces, the Digital Twin provides remote clinical and operational users with an intuitive, continuously updated virtual representation of the platform and its operational context, enabling enhanced situational awareness and informed decision-making.

</details>


### [429] [Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Functions for Decentralized Multi-Robot Safe Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13245)
*Joonkyung Kim,Yanze Zhang,Wenhao Luo,Yiwei Lyu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CA-HCBF框架，通过规范变换和反步法统一异构机器人动力学，利用支撑函数的定向能力度量实现责任按能力分配，并引入可行性感知裁剪机制，在异构多机器人系统中实现去中心化安全导航，在30台异构机器人仿真和实物实验中验证了优于基线方法的安全性和任务效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有去中心化安全方法通常假设机器人同构，导致异构机器人（动力学结构不同）对共享安全约束的非一致理解，使得某些机器人的避碰义务在物理上不可实现，从而引发安全违规或死锁。

Method: 1) 通过规范变换和反步法将全向和非完整机器人统一为加速度级控制的标准二阶控制仿射形式，避免异构动力学间的相对度不匹配；2) 提出基于支撑函数的定向能力度量，量化机器人跟随运动意图的能力；3) 推导成对责任分配机制，按运动能力比例分配安全负担；4) 引入可行性感知裁剪机制，将分配限制在物理可实现范围内。

Result: 在最多30台异构机器人的仿真和多机器人实物演示中，CA-HCBF相比基线方法在安全性和任务效率上均有提升，验证了跨不同运动学约束机器人的实际适用性。

Conclusion: CA-HCBF实现了异构机器人团队中一致的安全强制和能力感知协调，有效解决了异构性导致的安全约束不可实现问题，具有良好的可扩展性和实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Safe navigation for multi-robot systems requires enforcing safety without sacrificing task efficiency under decentralized decision-making. Existing decentralized methods often assume robot homogeneity, making shared safety requirements non-uniformly interpreted across heterogeneous agents with structurally different dynamics, which could lead to avoidance obligations not physically realizable for some robots and thus cause safety violations or deadlock. In this paper, we propose Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Function (CA-HCBF), a decentralized framework for consistent safety enforcement and capability-aware coordination in heterogeneous robot teams. We derive a canonical second-order control-affine representation that unifies holonomic and nonholonomic robots under acceleration-level control via canonical transformation and backstepping, preserving forward invariance of the safe set while avoiding relative-degree mismatch across heterogeneous dynamics. We further introduce a support-function-based directional capability metric that quantifies each robot's ability to follow its motion intent, deriving a pairwise responsibility allocation that distributes the safety burden proportionally to each robot's motion capability. A feasibility-aware clipping mechanism further constrains the allocation to each agent's physically achievable range, mitigating infeasible constraint assignments common in dense decentralized CBF settings. Simulations with up to 30 heterogeneous robots and a physical multi-robot demonstration show improved safety and task efficiency over baselines, validating real-world applicability across robots with distinct kinematic constraints.

</details>


### [430] [Weakly-supervised Learning for Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Sparse Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13204)
*Ruiqi Ni,Yuchen Liu,Ahmed H. Qureshi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出分层神经时间场（H-NTFields），一种结合稀疏路标弱监督与物理信息正则化的运动规划框架，在复杂多房间环境中显著优于纯物理信息方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于物理信息的运动规划方法（如NTFields）在复杂多房间环境中难以扩展，单纯增加样本无法解决局部极小值或保证全局一致性。

Method: 提出H-NTFields，采用弱监督框架，利用稀疏路标提供全局拓扑锚点（通过旅行时间上下界），同时结合物理信息PDE正则化损失确保局部几何保真度和障碍物感知传播。

Result: 在18个Gibson环境和真实机器人平台上，H-NTFields相比纯物理信息方法显著提升了鲁棒性，并通过连续值表示实现了快速摊销推理。

Conclusion: 弱监督与物理信息正则化的结合能有效克服纯物理信息方法在复杂环境中的全局一致性问题，为运动规划提供兼具鲁棒性和效率的解决方案。

Abstract: The motion planning problem requires finding a collision-free path between start and goal configurations in high-dimensional, cluttered spaces. Recent learning-based methods offer promising solutions, with self-supervised physics-informed approaches such as Neural Time Fields (NTFields) solving the Eikonal equation to learn value functions without expert demonstrations. However, existing physics-informed methods struggle to scale in complex, multi-room environments, where simply increasing the number of samples cannot resolve local minima or guarantee global consistency. We propose Hierarchical Neural Time Fields (H-NTFields), a weakly-supervised framework that combines weak supervision from sparse roadmaps with physics-informed PDE regularization. The roadmap provides global topological anchors through upper and lower bounds on travel times, while PDE losses enforce local geometric fidelity and obstacle-aware propagation. Experiments on 18 Gibson environments and real robotic platforms show that H-NTFields substantially improves robustness over prior physics-informed methods, while enabling fast amortized inference through a continuous value representation.

</details>


### [431] [Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13015)
*Yaru Niu,Zhenlong Fang,Binghong Chen,Shuai Zhou,Revanth Senthilkumaran,Hao Zhang,Bingqing Chen,Chen Qiu,H. Eric Tseng,Jonathan Francis,Ding Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD)，结合全身控制、VR远程操作数据采集和触觉预测，在五项接触密集任务中平均成功率相对提升90.9%，实现真实世界高灵巧性人形机器人操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人需要全身稳定性、灵巧手和接触感知能力，但现有方法在频繁接触变化下的真实世界操作仍面临挑战。

Method: 首先开发基于强化学习的全身控制器，结合VR遥操作与人体到人形运动映射构建数据采集系统；然后提出HTD，一种多模态编码器-解码器Transformer，将触觉作为核心模态，通过行为克隆和触觉梦（预测未来手部关节力和触觉潜在表示）进行端到端训练。

Result: 在插入书籍、整理毛巾、铲猫砂、倒茶等五项任务中，HTD平均成功率相对提升90.9%；消融实验表明潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测效果更好，成功率相对提升30%。

Conclusion: 结合鲁棒的全身执行、可扩展的人形数据采集和以触觉为中心的预测学习，能够实现真实世界中高灵巧性的人形机器人操作。

Abstract: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

</details>


### [432] [XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13001)
*James Wang,Primo Pu,Zephyr Fung,Alex Wang,Sam Wang,Bender Deng,Kevin Wang,Zivid Liu,Chris Pan,Panda Yang,Andy Zhai,Lucy Liang,Shalfun Li,Johnny Sun,Jacky Xu,Will Tian,Kai Yan,Kohler Ye,Scott Li,Qian Wang,Roy Gan,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出XRZero-G0系统，通过硬件-软件协同设计（VR界面、双专用夹爪、闭环流程），实现了大规模机器人无标注演示数据的高效采集，发现机器人自由数据与真机数据以10:1混合即可达到纯真机数据集性能，采集成本降低20倍，并构建了2000小时数据集实现零样本跨实体迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量、与动作对齐的演示数据获取是灵巧机器人操作基础模型扩展的根本瓶颈；现有机器人自由演示系统受限于硬件工效学差、开环工作流以及缺乏系统性的数据混合策略。

Method: 硬件-软件协同设计：符合人体工学的VR界面、顶视摄像头、双专用夹爪；闭环数据采集-检查-训练-评估流程，实现非本体感知数据的质量控制（85%数据有效率）；系统研究机器人自由数据的经验性缩放规律与最优混合比。

Result: 数据有效率85%；10:1的机器人自由数据与真机数据混合比即可达到纯真机数据集的性能；采集成本降低20倍；构建了2000小时机器人自由数据集，实现零样本跨实体迁移。

Conclusion: XRZero-G0系统通过高效数据采集与最优混合策略，证明了大规模机器人自由数据与少量真机数据结合是一种高度可扩展的通用真实世界操作方法论。

Abstract: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

</details>


### [433] [RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12942)
*Dongen Li,Yi Liu,Junqi Liu,Zewen Sun,Zefan Huang,Shuo Sun,Jiahui Liu,Chengran Yuan,Hongliang Guo,Francis E. H. Tay,Marcelo H. Ang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种紧耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，在大规模真实场景中实现实时姿态估计与逼真建图。系统并行执行状态估计、3D高斯原语初始化与全局高斯优化，利用级联策略（前馈预测+体素PCA几何先验）加速收敛，并通过高斯GICP回环检测与位姿图优化增强全局一致性。在公开及自采数据集上达到实时效率、定位精度与渲染质量的最优平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3DGS的实时SLAM方法难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、连续3D高斯重建和长期全局一致性，特别是在大规模真实环境中。

Method: 1) 紧耦合LiDAR-惯性-视觉框架并行执行状态估计与3D高斯原语初始化、全局高斯优化；2) 级联策略结合前馈预测与体素PCA几何先验提升初始化质量与收敛速度；3) 基于高斯GICP的回环检测与位姿图优化保证全局一致性；4) 收集硬件同步的LiDAR-相机-IMU大规模环状室外序列用于评估。

Result: 在公开数据集和自采数据集上，该方法在实时效率、定位精度和渲染质量方面均达到当前最优水平。

Conclusion: 所提出的紧耦合多传感器3DGS-SLAM框架有效解决了大规模真实场景中实时SLAM的核心挑战，在效率、精度和渲染质量上取得最佳平衡。

Abstract: Achieving real-time Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) based on 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods still struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, continuous 3D Gaussian reconstruction, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with geometric priors derived from voxel-based principal component analysis. To enhance global consistency, we perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. We also collect challenging large-scale looped outdoor sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories for realistic evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a state of the art among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse real-world scenes.

</details>


### [434] [DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12933)
*Yuhan Jin,Nayari Marie Lessa,Mariela De Lucas Alvarez,Melvin Laux,Lucas Amparo Barbosa,Frank Kirchner,Rebecca Adam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DINO-Explorer提出一种基于连续语义惊喜信号的新颖感知框架，利用冻结的DINOv3基础模型潜空间和轻量级动作条件循环预测器，通过动作拷贝启发式模块抑制自运动带来的视觉变化，实现高效的水下事件在线筛选，在降低48.2%遥测带宽的同时保持了62.2%的峰值F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主水下航行器（AUV）大多作为被动数据记录器，捕获大量视频离线分析，容易错过具有高科学价值的瞬态事件。需要从被动感知转向主动感知，需要一个因果、在线的信号来突出显著现象，同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化。

Method: 提出DINO-Explorer框架：1）在冻结的DINOv3基础模型潜空间中操作；2）使用轻量级、动作条件的循环预测器预测短时语义演化；3）通过动作拷贝启发式模块，利用全局池化光流来抑制自我诱导的视觉变化，而不抑制真正的环境新颖性。

Result: 在固定工作点，系统保留78.8%的人工评审共识事件，触发确认率为56.8%；自我运动条件化相对于未补偿的基线抑制了45.5%的误报；在Pareto消融实验中，在选定工作点减少48.2%遥测带宽，同时保持62.2%的峰值F1分数。

Conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了一种鲁棒、带宽高效的注意力机制，能有效将数据传输集中在人工验证的新颖事件上，实现了从被动数据记录到主动感知的转变。

Abstract: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

</details>


### [435] [E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12916)
*Fangyu Sun,Fanxing Li,Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Renbiao Jin,Shuyu Wu,Wenxian Yu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出E2E-Fly，一个集成敏捷四旋翼平台与全栈训练、验证和部署流程的框架，首次系统地将可微物理学习与训练、验证和真实世界部署统一起来，支持零样本从仿真到现实的迁移，并在六种端到端控制任务中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有四旋翼从仿真到现实的策略训练与迁移面临视觉渲染低效、物理建模不准确、传感器差异未建模以及缺乏统一可微物理学习集成平台的挑战，且缺乏系统性的零样本迁移流水线，阻碍了可复现性和真实部署。

Method: 提出了E2E-Fly框架，包含：1) 高性能仿真器，支持可微物理学习和强化学习；2) 针对常见四旋翼任务的结构化奖励设计；3) 两阶段验证策略（sim-to-sim迁移和硬件在环测试）；4) 全面的sim-to-real对齐方法（系统辨识、域随机化、延迟补偿、噪声建模）；5) 专用底层控制接口，支持两种物理四旋翼平台。

Result: 在六种端到端控制任务上训练策略并成功部署到真实世界，验证了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: E2E-Fly是首个系统性地将可微物理学习与训练、验证和真实世界部署统一起来的四旋翼框架，为四旋翼的零样本sim-to-real迁移提供了完整的解决方案。

Abstract: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

</details>


### [436] [Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12909)
*Yifei Yan,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Tree Learning框架，一种用于人形机器人的多技能持续学习框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制实现参数复用，防止灾难性遗忘，并采用多模态前馈适应机制和任务级奖励塑造策略，在Unity仿真中实现了100%的技能保留率和更高的奖励。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式演进时，高效扩展新技能同时避免灾难性遗忘成为具身智能的关键挑战。现有方法依赖复杂的混合专家模型拓扑调整或训练超大模型，难以实现轻量化部署。

Method: 1) 根-分支层次参数继承机制：通过参数复用为分支技能提供运动先验，从根本上防止灾难性遗忘；2) 多模态前馈适应机制：结合相位调制与插值，支持周期性和非周期性运动；3) 任务级奖励塑造策略：加速技能收敛。

Result: 在Unity仿真中，与多任务同时训练相比，Tree Learning在多种代表性 locomotion 技能上获得更高奖励，保持100%技能保留率，支持无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制。在Super Mario交互场景和中国古典园林自主导航两个任务中验证了性能与泛化能力。

Conclusion: Tree Learning框架有效解决了人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现了轻量化的多技能扩展与无缝切换，具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult. To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

</details>


### [437] [FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12879)
*Heng Tao,Yiming Zhong,Zemin Yang,Yuexin Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FastGrasp是一个基于学习的移动机器人快速抓取框架，通过两阶段强化学习策略，结合条件变分自编码器生成抓取候选、全身协调控制以及触觉反馈，实现了高速运动下的稳定抓取和跨物体泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动机器人快速抓取方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及跨物体跨场景泛化方面存在根本性挑战，受限于固定基座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力。

Method: 提出两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段利用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）以物体点云为条件生成多样的抓取候选；第二阶段通过最优抓取选择引导移动基座、机械臂和手部进行协调运动。触觉传感用于实时抓取调整以应对冲击效应和物体变化。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界场景中均实现了优越的抓取性能，通过有效的仿真到现实迁移，在不同物体几何形状下实现了稳健的操控。

Conclusion: FastGrasp通过结合抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，有效解决了移动机器人高速抓取中的冲击稳定性和泛化问题，验证了从仿真到现实迁移的可行性。

Abstract: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities. We propose \textbf{FastGrasp}, a learning-based framework that integrates grasp guidance, whole-body control, and tactile feedback for mobile fast grasping. Our two-stage reinforcement learning strategy first generates diverse grasp candidates via conditional variational autoencoder conditioned on object point clouds, then executes coordinated movements of mobile base, arm, and hand guided by optimal grasp selection. Tactile sensing enables real-time grasp adjustments to handle impact effects and object variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior grasping performance in both simulation and real-world scenarios, achieving robust manipulation across diverse object geometries through effective sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [438] [OVAL: Open-Vocabulary Augmented Memory Model for Lifelong Object Goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12872)
*Jiahua Pei,Yi Liu,Guoping Pan,Yuanhao Jiang,Houde Liu,Xueqian Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出OVAL框架，一种基于终身开放词汇记忆的目标导航方法，通过结构化记忆描述子和基于概率的多值前沿探索策略，解决了长期持续导航中记忆表示局限的问题，在实验中展现了高效性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在孤立单目标导航中表现良好，但在长期持续导航中，终身记忆表示的适用性受限，无法有效支持在长时间跨度内对连续目标进行高效导航。

Method: 提出OVAL终身开放词汇记忆框架，包含：1) 记忆描述子实现记忆模型的结构化管理；2) 基于概率的多值前沿探索策略，提升终身探索效率。

Result: 大量实验表明该系统的效率和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: OVAL框架能够高效、精准地执行语义开放任务中的长期导航，解决了现有方法在长期持续导航中的局限性。

Abstract: Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) refers to an agent navigating to an object in an unseen environment, which is an ability often required in the accomplishment of complex tasks. While existing methods demonstrate proficiency in isolated single object navigation, their limitations emerge in the restricted applicability of lifelong memory representations, which ultimately hinders effective navigation toward continual targets over extended periods. To address this problem, we propose OVAL, a novel lifelong open-vocabulary memory framework, which enables efficient and precise execution of long-term navigation in semantically open tasks. Within this framework, we introduce memory descriptors to facilitate structured management of the memory model. Additionally, we propose a novel probability-based exploration strategy, utilizing a multi-value frontier scoring to enhance lifelong exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of the proposed system.

</details>


### [439] [Evolving the Complete Muscle: Efficient Morphology-Control Co-design for Musculoskeletal Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12855)
*Lidong Sun,Wentao Zhao,Ye Wang,Huaping Liu,Fuchun Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SDE的高效共优化框架，通过PCA和双侧对称先验将肌肉形态参数投影到低维流形，实现了骨骼肌肉机器人的形态与控制协同设计，在多种地形任务中优于固定形态和标准进化基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有肌肉骨骼机器人研究通常使用固定的肌肉生理参数（如强度、速度、刚度），这种静态设置无法适应复杂任务的多样化动态需求，限制了机器人的性能上限。

Method: 提出了完整的肌肉骨骼形态进化空间，同时进化肌肉强度、速度和刚度三个属性。为克服探索空间的指数级膨胀，设计了Spectral Design Evolution (SDE)框架，通过结合双侧对称先验和主成分分析(PCA)，将复杂肌肉参数投影到低维谱流形上，实现高效形态探索。

Result: 在MyoSuite框架的四个任务（行走、爬楼梯、丘陵、崎岖地形）上，该方法相比固定形态和标准进化基线展现出更优的学习效率和 locomotion 稳定性。

Conclusion: 形态与控制的协同设计对于提升肌肉骨骼机器人的运动性能至关重要，SDE框架通过低维流形投影有效解决了高维形态空间中的探索效率问题。

Abstract: Musculoskeletal robots offer intrinsic compliance and flexibility, providing a promising paradigm for versatile locomotion. However, existing research typically relies on models with fixed muscle physiological parameters. This static physical setting fails to accommodate the diverse dynamic demands of complex tasks, inherently limiting the robot's performance upper bound. In this work, we focus on the morphology and control co-design of musculoskeletal systems. Unlike previous studies that optimize single physiological attributes such as stiffness, we introduce a Complete Musculoskeletal Morphological Evolution Space that simultaneously evolves muscle strength, velocity, and stiffness. To overcome the exponential expansion of the exploration space caused by this comprehensive evolution, we propose Spectral Design Evolution (SDE), a high-efficiency co-optimization framework. By integrating a bilateral symmetry prior with Principal Component Analysis (PCA), SDE projects complex muscle parameters onto a low-dimensional spectral manifold, enabling efficient morphological exploration. Evaluated on the MyoSuite framework across four tasks (Walk, Stair, Hilly, and Rough terrains), our method demonstrates superior learning efficiency and locomotion stability compared to fixed-morphology and standard evolutionary baselines.

</details>


### [440] [GGD-SLAM: Monocular 3DGS SLAM Powered by Generalizable Motion Model for Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12837)
*Yi Liu,Haoxuan Xu,Hongbo Duan,Keyu Fan,Zhengyang Zhang,Peiyu Zhuang,Pengting Luo,Houde Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GGD-SLAM提出了一种在动态环境中无需预定义语义标注或深度输入即可实现鲁棒定位与稠密建图的框架，通过FIFO队列、时序注意力、动态特征增强器及遮挡填充等机制，在真实动态数据集上达到相机位姿估计与稠密重建的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3DGS的视觉SLAM算法在静态环境下表现优异，但在动态场景中因违背静态假设而导致性能严重下降，亟需一种无需预定义语义或深度输入的通用解决方案。

Method: 1）采用FIFO队列管理输入帧，通过时序注意力机制进行动态语义特征提取；2）设计动态特征增强器分离静态与动态成分；3）通过静态信息采样填充遮挡区域；4）提出面向动态环境的干扰自适应SSIM损失函数，降低动态干扰对静态成分的影响。

Result: 在真实世界动态数据集上的实验表明，GGD-SLAM在相机位姿估计和稠密重建任务中均达到了最先进水平。

Conclusion: GGD-SLAM通过通用可泛化的运动模型有效解决了动态环境下的视觉SLAM挑战，在不依赖语义先验或深度输入的前提下实现了鲁棒的定位与高保真稠密建图。

Abstract: Visual SLAM algorithms achieve significant improvements through the exploration of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations, particularly in generating high-fidelity dense maps. However, they depend on a static environment assumption and experience significant performance degradation in dynamic environments. This paper presents GGD-SLAM, a framework that employs a generalizable motion model to address the challenges of localization and dense mapping in dynamic environments - without predefined semantic annotations or depth input. Specifically, the proposed system employs a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) queue to manage incoming frames, facilitating dynamic semantic feature extraction through a sequential attention mechanism. This is integrated with a dynamic feature enhancer to separate static and dynamic components. Additionally, to minimize dynamic distractors' impact on the static components, we devise a method to fill occluded areas via static information sampling and design a distractor-adaptive Structure Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) loss tailored for dynamic environments, significantly enhancing the system's resilience. Experiments conducted on real-world dynamic datasets demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art performance in camera pose estimation and dense reconstruction in dynamic scenes.

</details>


### [441] [VULCAN: Vision-Language-Model Enhanced Multi-Agent Cooperative Navigation for Indoor Fire-Disaster Response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12831)
*Shengding Liu,Qiben Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VULCAN，一个基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型的多智能体协同导航框架，专门针对室内火灾灾害响应。通过在Habitat-Matterport3D基准中模拟物理真实的火灾场景（包括烟雾扩散、热危害和传感器退化），评估了现有方法在火灾环境下的失败模式，并验证了VULCAN在鲁棒感知和危险感知规划方面的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内火灾灾害对自主搜救构成严峻挑战，现有基于视觉的多智能体导航系统主要针对良性室内环境设计，在火灾驱动的动态条件下性能显著下降，亟需适用于火灾场景的鲁棒导航框架。

Method: 提出了VULCAN框架，基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型（VLMs）实现多智能体协同导航；扩展Habitat-Matterport3D基准，引入物理真实的火灾场景模拟，涵盖烟雾扩散、热危害和传感器退化等因素。

Result: 揭示了现有代表性多智能体协同导航基线在火灾场景下的关键失败模式，验证了鲁棒感知和危险感知规划对于可靠多智能体搜救的必要性。

Conclusion: 现有方法在火灾动态环境下存在严重性能退化，VULCAN通过多模态感知和VLM实现了更鲁棒的火灾场景导航能力，为自主搜救提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Indoor fire disasters pose severe challenges to autonomous search and rescue due to dense smoke, high temperatures, and dynamically evolving indoor environments. In such time-critical scenarios, multi-agent cooperative navigation is particularly useful, as it enables faster and broader exploration than single-agent approaches. However, existing multi-agent navigation systems are primarily vision-based and designed for benign indoor settings, leading to significant performance degradation under fire-driven dynamic conditions. In this paper, we present VULCAN, a multi-agent cooperative navigation framework based on multi-modal perception and vision-language models (VLMs), tailored for indoor fire disaster response. We extend the Habitat-Matterport3D benchmark by simulating physically realistic fire scenarios, including smoke diffusion, thermal hazards, and sensor degradation. We evaluate representative multi-agent cooperative navigation baselines under both normal and fire-driven environments. Our results reveal critical failure modes of existing methods in fire scenarios and underscore the necessity of robust perception and hazard-aware planning for reliable multi-agent search and rescue.

</details>


### [442] [Multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor datasets for place categorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13142)
*Hojung Jung,Yuki Oto,Oscar M. Mozos,Yumi Iwashita,Ryo Kurazume*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了两个多模态全景3D户外（MPO）数据集，用于六类语义地点分类（森林、海岸、住宅区、城市区域、室内/室外停车场）。第一个数据集包含650个静态全景扫描（密集900万点，含彩色和反射率点云），第二个包含34,200个实时全景扫描（稀疏7万点，仅反射率点云）。数据集在日本福冈采集并公开。最佳分类准确率分别达到96.42%（密集）和89.67%（稀疏）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有户外3D语义地点分类数据集缺乏多模态、多密度级别的全景数据，且缺乏从静态高精度到动态实时扫描的对比研究。

Method: 构建了两个MPO数据集：1) FARO激光扫描仪获取的密集彩色+反射率点云（650个静态扫描）；2) Velodyne激光扫描仪获取的稀疏反射率点云（34,200个行车实时扫描）。数据集涵盖六类地点，并在两种数据集上对比多种语义分类方法。

Result: 密集数据集最佳分类准确率96.42%，稀疏数据集最佳准确率89.67%。

Conclusion: 所提出的MPO数据集可有效支持户外场景语义地点分类研究，且高密度彩色点云相比稀疏反射率点云在分类精度上有显著优势。

Abstract: We present two multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor (MPO) datasets for semantic place categorization with six categories: forest, coast, residential area, urban area and indoor/outdoor parking lot. The first dataset consists of 650 static panoramic scans of dense (9,000,000 points) 3D color and reflectance point clouds obtained using a FARO laser scanner with synchronized color images. The second dataset consists of 34,200 real-time panoramic scans of sparse (70,000 points) 3D reflectance point clouds obtained using a Velodyne laser scanner while driving a car. The datasets were obtained in the city of Fukuoka, Japan and are publicly available in [1], [2]. In addition, we compare several approaches for semantic place categorization with best results of 96.42% (dense) and 89.67% (sparse).

</details>


### [443] [Actuation space reduction to facilitate insightful shape matching in a novel reconfigurable tendon driven continuum manipulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12792)
*Sabyasachi Dash,John Golden,Girish Krishnan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过主动旋转间隔盘来重配置肌腱路径的连续体机器人驱动框架，利用曲率-扭率中间空间简化形状匹配，实现无模型控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决肌腱驱动连续体机器人在重配置肌腱路径时，驱动空间自由度增加导致从期望骨干曲线到驱动输入的映射复杂化的问题，旨在提供一种简化、无模型的控制替代方案。

Method: 将骨干形状投影到曲率-扭转（C-T）中间空间，识别对全局形状最关键的圆盘；采用顺序形状匹配策略：先旋转近端和中间圆盘近似全局形状，再调整远端圆盘微调末端执行器位置。

Result: 在C-T空间中发现了影响全局形状的关键圆盘模式，使得顺序形状匹配策略有效；该框架提供了无模型替代方案，规避了重配置TDCM建模的复杂性。

Conclusion: 通过主动旋转间隔盘重配置肌腱路径并利用C-T空间进行顺序形状匹配，可有效简化连续体机器人的驱动控制，无需复杂建模。

Abstract: In tendon driven continuum manipulators (TDCMs), reconfiguring the tendon routing enables tailored spatial deformation of the backbone. This work presents a design in which tendons can be rerouted either prior to or after actuation by actively rotating the individual spacer disks. Each disk rotation thus adds a degree of freedom to the actuation space, complicating the mapping from a desired backbone curve to the corresponding actuator inputs. However, when the backbone shape is projected into an intermediate space defined by curvature and torsion (C-T), patterns emerge that highlight which disks are most influential in achieving a global shape. This insight enables a simplified, sequential shape-matching strategy: first, the proximal and intermediate disks are rotated to approximate the global shape; then, the distal disks are adjusted to fine-tune the end-effector position with minimal impact on the overall shape. The proposed actuation framework offers a model-free alternative to conventional control approaches, bypassing the complexities of modeling reconfigurable TDCMs.

</details>


### [444] [Reliability-Guided Depth Fusion for Glare-Resilient Navigation Costmaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12753)
*Shang-En Tsai,Wei-Cheng Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于显式深度可靠性建模的防眩光代价地图构建方法，通过轻量级深度可靠性图（DRM）估计器预测像素级测量可信度，并利用可靠性引导融合（RGF）机制调节占据更新，有效减少反射地板和玻璃表面导致的虚假障碍物插入，提升自由空间保留效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反射地板和玻璃表面产生的眩光会破坏RGB-D深度测量，产生空洞和尖刺，这些错误在占据网格代价地图中积累为持续存在的虚假障碍物，影响导航安全性。

Method: 提出深度可靠性图（DRM）估计器预测镜面干扰下的逐像素测量可信度，并设计可靠性引导融合（RGF）机制，利用该信号调节占据更新，阻止被污染的测量数据累加到代价地图中。

Result: 在配备Intel RealSense D435和Jetson Orin Nano的真实移动机器人平台上实验表明，该方法在真实反射地板和玻璃表面条件下显著减少虚假障碍物插入，改善自由空间保留，且计算开销适度。

Conclusion: 将眩光视为测量可靠性问题，提供了一种实用且轻量的解决方案，可在安全关键的室内环境中提高代价地图正确性和导航鲁棒性。

Abstract: Specular glare on reflective floors and glass surfaces frequently corrupts RGB-D depth measurements, producing holes and spikes that accumulate as persistent phantom obstacles in occupancy-grid costmaps. This paper proposes a glare-resilient costmap construction method based on explicit depth-reliability modeling. A lightweight Depth Reliability Map (DRM) estimator predicts per-pixel measurement trustworthiness under specular interference, and a Reliability-Guided Fusion (RGF) mechanism uses this signal to modulate occupancy updates before corrupted measurements are accumulated into the map. Experiments on a real mobile robotic platform equipped with an Intel RealSense D435 and a Jetson Orin Nano show that the proposed method substantially reduces false obstacle insertion and improves free-space preservation under real reflective-floor and glass-surface conditions, while introducing only modest computational overhead. These results indicate that treating glare as a measurement-reliability problem provides a practical and lightweight solution for improving costmap correctness and navigation robustness in safety-critical indoor environments.

</details>


### [445] [FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12656)
*Baoyun Wang,Zhuoren Li,Ming Liu,Xinrui Zhang,Bo Leng,Lu Xiong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FeaXDrive提出了一种以轨迹为中心的可行性感知扩散规划方法，通过自适应曲率约束训练、可行驶区域引导采样和可行性感知GRPO后训练，显著提升了端到端自动驾驶规划中生成轨迹的物理可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端扩散规划方法生成的轨迹存在局部几何不规则、运动学约束违反、偏离可行驶区域等问题，表明以噪声为中心的形式化与轨迹空间的可行性特征不匹配。

Method: 提出以干净轨迹为统一对象的轨迹中心化扩散规划框架，包含三个核心模块：(1)自适应曲率约束训练，提升几何与运动学可行性；(2)逆向扩散采样中的可行驶区域引导；(3)可行性感知GRPO后训练，在优化规划性能的同时平衡轨迹空间可行性。

Result: 在NAVSIM基准上实现了强闭环规划性能，同时显著改善了轨迹空间可行性。

Conclusion: 显式建模轨迹空间可行性对端到端扩散规划至关重要，为更可靠、物理可实现的自动驾驶规划器提供了重要进展。

Abstract: End-to-end diffusion planning has shown strong potential for autonomous driving, but the physical feasibility of generated trajectories remains insufficiently addressed. In particular, generated trajectories may exhibit local geometric irregularities, violate trajectory-level kinematic constraints, or deviate from the drivable area, indicating that the commonly used noise-centric formulation in diffusion planning is not yet well aligned with the trajectory space where feasibility is more naturally characterized. To address this issue, we propose FeaXDrive, a feasibility-aware trajectory-centric diffusion planning method for end-to-end autonomous driving. The core idea is to treat the clean trajectory as the unified object for feasibility-aware modeling throughout the diffusion process. Built on this trajectory-centric formulation, FeaXDrive integrates adaptive curvature-constrained training to improve intrinsic geometric and kinematic feasibility, drivable-area guidance within reverse diffusion sampling to enhance consistency with the drivable area, and feasibility-aware GRPO post-training to further improve planning performance while balancing trajectory-space feasibility. Experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that FeaXDrive achieves strong closed-loop planning performance while substantially improving trajectory-space feasibility. These findings highlight the importance of explicitly modeling trajectory-space feasibility in end-to-end diffusion planning and provide a step toward more reliable and physically grounded autonomous driving planners.

</details>


### [446] [Contextual Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Reef Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12645)
*Melvin Laux,Yi-Ling Liu,Rina Alo,Sören Töpper,Mariela De Lucas Alvarez,Frank Kirchner,Rebecca Adam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出使用上下文多任务强化学习框架，训练单一上下文依赖策略，在HoloOcean模拟礁石环境中实现自主水下航行器的鲁棒、泛化控制，有效解决传统单任务强化学习过拟合问题，并在样本效率、零样本泛化和水流鲁棒性方面取得良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主水下航行器在海洋生态系统监测中面临水下动力学高度不确定和非平稳的挑战，传统单任务强化学习容易过拟合训练环境，限制了学得策略的长期可用性和迁移能力。

Method: 采用上下文多任务强化学习范式，训练一个上下文依赖策略，使其能够同时解决多个相关的礁石监测任务（如检测牡蛎、珊瑚等），并在HoloOcean模拟环境中进行验证。

Result: 在模拟实验中，上下文多任务策略在样本效率、对未见任务的零样本泛化能力以及对变化水流的鲁棒性方面均表现出色。

Conclusion: 上下文多任务强化学习能够有效提升训练效率和策略的可复用性，为自主礁石监测提供更可持续的控制方案。

Abstract: Although autonomous underwater vehicles promise the capability of marine ecosystem monitoring, their deployment is fundamentally limited by the difficulty of controlling vehicles under highly uncertain and non-stationary underwater dynamics. To address these challenges, we employ a data-driven reinforcement learning approach to compensate for unknown dynamics and task variations.Traditional single-task reinforcement learning has a tendency to overfit the training environment, thus, limit the long-term usefulness of the learnt policy. Hence, we propose to use a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm instead, allowing us to learn controllers that can be reused for various tasks, e.g., detecting oysters in one reef and detecting corals in another. We evaluate whether contextual multi-task reinforcement learning can efficiently learn robust and generalisable control policies for autonomous underwater reef monitoring. We train a single context-dependent policy that is able to solve multiple related monitoring tasks in a simulated reef environment in HoloOcean. In our experiments, we empirically evaluate the contextual policies regarding sample-efficiency, zero-shot generalisation to unseen tasks, and robustness to varying water currents. By utilising multi-task reinforcement learning, we aim to improve the training effectiveness, as well as the reusability of learnt policies to take a step towards more sustainable procedures in autonomous reef monitoring.

</details>


### [447] [Habitat-GS: A High-Fidelity Navigation Simulator with Dynamic Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12626)
