*Ziyuan Xia,Jingyi Xu,Chong Cui,Yuanhong Yu,Jiazhao Zhang,Qingsong Yan,Tao Ni,Junbo Chen,Xiaowei Zhou,Hujun Bao,Ruizhen Hu,Sida Peng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Habitat-GS是一个基于Habitat-Sim扩展的具身AI模拟器，集成了3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景渲染和可驱动的高斯化身，在保持与Habitat生态系统完全兼容的同时，实现了照片级真实感渲染和动态人类建模。实验表明，基于3DGS场景训练的智能体具有更强的跨域泛化能力，高斯化身能有效支持人类感知导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真器依赖基于网格的光栅化，视觉真实感有限；对动态人体化身的支持局限在网格表示上，阻碍了智能体向人类密集的真实场景泛化。

Method: 1) 在Habitat-Sim中集成3DGS渲染器，实现实时照片级渲染；2) 支持从多种来源导入可扩展的3DGS资产；3) 提出高斯化身模块，每个化身同时作为照片级视觉实体和有效的导航障碍物。

Result: 1) 3DGS场景训练的智能体在跨域泛化上更强，混合域训练效果最佳；2) 高斯化身实现了有效的人类感知导航；3) 系统在不同场景复杂度和化身数量下具有良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: Habitat-GS通过3DGS和高斯化身的集成，显著提升了具身AI模拟的视觉真实感和动态人类建模能力，为智能体在真实人类场景中的泛化提供了有效平台。

Abstract: Training embodied AI agents depends critically on the visual fidelity of simulation environments and the ability to model dynamic humans. Current simulators rely on mesh-based rasterization with limited visual realism, and their support for dynamic human avatars, where available, is constrained to mesh representations, hindering agent generalization to human-populated real-world scenarios. We present Habitat-GS, a navigation-centric embodied AI simulator extended from Habitat-Sim that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting scene rendering and drivable gaussian avatars while maintaining full compatibility with the Habitat ecosystem. Our system implements a 3DGS renderer for real-time photorealistic rendering and supports scalable 3DGS asset import from diverse sources. For dynamic human modeling, we introduce a gaussian avatar module that enables each avatar to simultaneously serve as a photorealistic visual entity and an effective navigation obstacle, allowing agents to learn human-aware behaviors in realistic settings. Experiments on point-goal navigation demonstrate that agents trained on 3DGS scenes achieve stronger cross-domain generalization, with mixed-domain training being the most effective strategy. Evaluations on avatar-aware navigation further confirm that gaussian avatars enable effective human-aware navigation. Finally, performance benchmarks validate the system's scalability across varying scene complexity and avatar counts.

</details>


### [448] [Machine Learning-Based Real-Time Detection of Compensatory Trunk Movements Using Trunk-Wrist Inertial Measurement Units](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12591)
*Jannis Gabler,Clément Lhoste,Max Quast,Laura Mayrhuber,Andrea Ronco,Olivier Lambercy,Paulius Viskaitis,Dane Donegan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究使用双惯性测量单元（IMU）结合机器学习（XGBoost）实现对脑卒中后代偿性躯干运动的实时、客观检测，在健康受试者模拟损伤条件下取得良好性能（宏F1=0.80，MCC=0.73），但在神经疾病患者数据上性能有所下降，表明稀疏可穿戴传感在临床推广中仍面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑卒中后常见代偿性躯干运动（CTMs），会导致不良运动模式并限制受影响结构的针对性训练。现有的客观、连续CTM检测方法通常需要复杂的测量设置，且难以实时应用。因此，需要一种简便、可靠、可实时部署的CTM检测方案。

Method: 采集10名健康受试者在模拟损伤（肘部限制、阻力带诱导屈曲协同模式）条件下的日常活动数据，以光学运动捕捉（OMC）和手动标注视频为参考。通过系统性位置缩减分析识别腕部和躯干为最小感知位置，采用双IMU配置结合XGBoost分类器，使用留一受试者交叉验证评估性能，并进行可解释性分析及初步的神经疾病患者数据评估。

Result: 双IMU模型在健康受试者数据上达到宏F1=0.80±0.07、MCC=0.73±0.08、ROC-AUC>0.93，性能与OMC模型相当，预测速度满足实时应用要求。可解释性分析显示躯干动力学和腕-躯干交互特征是主要贡献因素。在神经疾病患者数据上，模型保持良好的判别能力（ROC-AUC~0.78），但阈值依赖性能出现下降和变异。

Conclusion: 稀疏可穿戴传感（双IMU）是实现CTM可扩展、实时监测的可行途径，但在临床泛化方面仍需进一步克服挑战。

Abstract: Compensatory trunk movements (CTMs) are commonly observed after stroke and can lead to maladaptive movement patterns, limiting targeted training of affected structures. Objective, continuous detection of CTMs during therapy and activities of daily living remains challenging due to the typically complex measurements setups required, as well as limited applicability for real-time use. This study investigates whether a two-inertial measurement unit configuration enables reliable, real-time CTM detection using machine learning. Data were collected from ten able-bodied participants performing activities of daily living under simulated impairment conditions (elbow brace restricting flexion-extension, resistance band inducing flexor-synergy-like patterns), with synchronized optical motion capture (OMC) and manually annotated video recordings serving as reference. A systematic location-reduction analysis using OMC identified wrist and trunk kinematics as a minimal yet sufficient set of anatomical sensing locations. Using an extreme gradient boosting classifier (XGBoost) evaluated with leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, our two-IMU model achieved strong discriminative performance (macro-F1 = 0.80 +/- 0.07, MCC = 0.73 +/- 0.08; ROC-AUC > 0.93), with performance comparable to an OMC-based model and prediction timing suitable for real-time applications. Explainability analysis revealed dominant contributions from trunk dynamics and wrist-trunk interaction features. In preliminary evaluation using recordings from four participants with neurological conditions, the model retained good discriminative capability (ROC-AUC ~ 0.78), but showed reduced and variable threshold-dependent performance, highlighting challenges in clinical generalization. These results support sparse wearable sensing as a viable pathway toward scalable, real-time monitoring of CTMs during therapy and daily living.

</details>


### [449] [Scalable Trajectory Generation for Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12565)
*Yida Niu,Xinhai Chang,Xin Liu,Ziyuan Jiao,Yixin Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AutoMoMa是一个GPU加速框架，通过统一AKR建模和并行轨迹优化，实现高速生成大规模、高保真的协调移动操作轨迹数据（每小时5000个episode/GPU，超过50万条轨迹），解决了移动操作数据稀缺这一核心瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动操作机器人需要协调基座与手臂的全身运动，但其状态空间随场景和物体多样性组合增长，现有数据采集方法（遥操作、规划）要么劳动密集型，要么计算上不可扩展，缺乏能够跨多种机器人和环境生成大规模、物理有效协调轨迹数据的可扩展流水线。

Method: 提出了AutoMoMa框架，包含两个关键组件：(1) AKR（Arm-Kinematics-Root）建模，将基座、手臂和物体运动学统一为单一运动链；(2) GPU加速的并行轨迹优化，实现高效的数据生成。

Result: AutoMoMa达到每GPU小时5000个episode的数据生成速度（比CPU基线快80倍以上），生成了超过50万条物理有效的轨迹，覆盖330个场景、多种可动关节物体和多个机器人形态。下游模仿学习实验表明，即使是单一可动关节物体任务也需要数万条示范才能达到约80%的成功率。

Conclusion: AutoMoMa证明了数据稀缺——而非算法限制——是移动操作机器人研究的瓶颈，通过弥合高性能规划与可靠模仿学习控制之间的鸿沟，提供了此前缺失的大规模协调移动操作研究基础设施。

Abstract: Robots deployed in unstructured environments must coordinate whole-body motion -- simultaneously moving a mobile base and arm -- to interact with the physical world. This coupled mobility and dexterity yields a state space that grows combinatorially with scene and object diversity, demanding datasets far larger than those sufficient for fixed-base manipulation. Yet existing acquisition methods, including teleoperation and planning, are either labor-intensive or computationally prohibitive at scale. The core bottleneck is the lack of a scalable pipeline for generating large-scale, physically valid, coordinated trajectory data across diverse embodiments and environments. Here we introduce AutoMoMa, a GPU-accelerated framework that unifies AKR modeling, which consolidates base, arm, and object kinematics into a single chain, with parallelized trajectory optimization. AutoMoMa achieves 5,000 episodes per GPU-hour (over $80\times$ faster than CPU-based baselines), producing a dataset of over 500k physically valid trajectories spanning 330 scenes, diverse articulated objects, and multiple robot embodiments. Prior datasets were forced to compromise on scale, diversity, or kinematic fidelity; AutoMoMa addresses all three simultaneously. Training downstream IL policies further reveals that even a single articulated-object task requires tens of thousands of demonstrations for SOTA methods to reach $\approx 80\%$ success, confirming that data scarcity -- not algorithmic limitations -- has been the binding constraint. AutoMoMa thus bridges high-performance planning and reliable IL-based control, providing the infrastructure previously missing for coordinated mobile manipulation research. By making large-scale, kinematically valid training data practical, AutoMoMa showcases generalizable whole-body robot policies capable of operating in the diverse, unstructured settings of the real world.

</details>


### [450] [Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation using Offline Reinforcement Learning on Sub-optimal Controllers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12509)
*Snehal Jauhri,Vignesh Prasad,Georgia Chalvatzaki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出WHOLE-MoMa，一种两阶段流水线：先通过随机化轻量级全身控制器（WBC）生成多样化演示数据，再采用离线强化学习（结合Q-chunking的隐式Q学习）提升行为性能。在TIAGo++移动操作臂的仿真和真实环境中，该方法在铰接物体操作任务上显著优于WBC、行为克隆和多种离线RL基线，无需遥操作数据或真实世界训练即可实现零样本迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动操作铰接物体（如开门、抽屉）需要基座与臂的全身协调。经典全身控制器（WBC）需大量手工调优且脆弱，基于学习的方法泛化性强但依赖昂贵的全身遥操作数据或繁重的奖励工程。作者观察到次优WBC可提供结构先验，用于约束数据收集区域，其行为仍可通过离线RL改进。

Method: 两阶段流水线：1) 阶段一：随机化轻量级WBC的参数（如阻抗增益、目标姿态、基座移动权重）生成多样化演示轨迹；2) 阶段二：扩展离线隐式Q学习（IQL），提出Q-chunking技术，对动作块（action chunk）级进行评论家评估和优势加权策略提取，以适配表达性强的动作块扩散策略。

Result: 在TIAGo++仿真中三个难度递增的任务上，WHOLE-MoMa显著优于WBC、BC及多种离线RL基线。真实机器人零样本微调下，双臂抽屉操作成功率80%，同时开柜门并放置物体成功率68%。

Conclusion: 利用次优WBC作为结构先验，结合离线RL和动作块扩散策略，可高效解决移动操作铰接物体的全身协调问题，且完全无需遥操作或真实世界训练数据。

Abstract: Mobile Manipulation (MoMa) of articulated objects, such as opening doors, drawers, and cupboards, demands simultaneous, whole-body coordination between a robot's base and arms. Classical whole-body controllers (WBCs) can solve such problems via hierarchical optimization, but require extensive hand-tuned optimization and remain brittle. Learning-based methods, on the other hand, show strong generalization capabilities but typically rely on expensive whole-body teleoperation data or heavy reward engineering. We observe that even a sub-optimal WBC is a powerful structural prior: it can be used to collect data in a constrained, task-relevant region of the state-action space, and its behavior can still be improved upon using offline reinforcement learning. Building on this, we propose WHOLE-MoMa, a two-stage pipeline that first generates diverse demonstrations by randomizing a lightweight WBC, and then applies offline RL to identify and stitch together improved behaviors via a reward signal. To support the expressive action-chunked diffusion policies needed for complex coordination tasks, we extend offline implicit Q-learning with Q-chunking for chunk-level critic evaluation and advantage-weighted policy extraction. On three tasks of increasing difficulty using a TIAGo++ mobile manipulator in simulation, WHOLE-MoMa significantly outperforms WBC, behavior cloning, and several offline RL baselines. Policies transfer directly to the real robot without finetuning, achieving 80% success in bimanual drawer manipulation and 68% in simultaneous cupboard opening and object placement, all without any teleoperated or real-world training data.

</details>


### [451] [DeCoNav: Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12486)
*Sunyao Zhou,Yunzi Wu,Tianhang Wang,Xinhai Li,Guang Chen,Lizheng Liu,Chenjia Bai,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DeCoNav是一个面向长程协作视觉-语言导航的去中心化框架，通过事件触发的对话机制实现动态任务分配与重规划，在CoNavBench基础上构建的DeCoNavBench包含1,213个任务，双向成功率达69.2%，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长程协作VLN基准缺乏严格同步的双机器人执行机制，且依赖静态协调策略，无法适应跨智能体新证据的出现，亟需一种能够实时自适应协调的去中心化框架。

Method: DeCoNav采用去中心化架构，机器人通过对话交换紧凑语义状态，无需中央控制器；当出现新证据、不确定性或冲突等事件时触发对话，动态重新分配子目标并重规划，同时在共享世界时间线上同步执行。

Result: 在包含1,213个任务、176个HM3D场景的DeCoNavBench上，DeCoNav的双向成功率（BSR）相比基线提升69.2%。

Conclusion: 事件触发的对话机制与动态重规划相结合能够有效提升多机器人长程协作导航的性能，验证了去中心化自适应协调的可行性。

Abstract: Long-horizon collaborative vision-language navigation (VLN) is critical for multi-robot systems to accomplish complex tasks beyond the capability of a single agent. CoNavBench takes a first step by introducing the first collaborative long-horizon VLN benchmark with relay-style multi-robot tasks, a collaboration taxonomy, along with graph-grounded generation and evaluation to model handoffs and rendezvous in shared environments. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations often do not enforce strictly synchronized dual-robot rollout on a shared world timeline, and they typically rely on static coordination policies that cannot adapt when new cross-agent evidence emerges. We present Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation (DeCoNav), a decentralized framework that couples event-triggered dialogue with dynamic task allocation and replanning for real-time, adaptive coordination. In DeCoNav, robots exchange compact semantic states via dialogue without a central controller. When informative events such as new evidence, uncertainty, or conflicts arise, dialogue is triggered to dynamically reassign subgoals and replan under synchronized execution. Implemented in DeCoNavBench with 1,213 tasks across 176 HM3D scenes, DeCoNav improves the both-success rate (BSR) by 69.2%, demonstrating the effectiveness of dialogue-driven, dynamically reallocated planning for multi-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [452] [Social Learning Strategies for Evolved Virtual Soft Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12482)
*K. Ege de Bruin,Kyrre Glette,Kai Olav Ellefsen,Giorgia Nadizar,Eric Medvet*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种社会学习方法，让机器人在联合优化身体和大脑时，通过向同伴学习（尤其是形态相似的机器人）来加速自身控制参数的优化。实验表明，社会学习方法在同等计算预算下显著优于从零开始学习，且多教师策略能带来更稳定鲁棒的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人的形态（身体）与控制策略（大脑）是耦合的，传统嵌套优化中每个机器人独立学习控制参数，但一个机器人学到的参数可能对其他机器人有价值，因此作者希望利用社会学习来加速这一过程。

Method: 提出社会学习框架，让机器人从同伴（教师）处继承优化参数，系统研究教师选择策略（选择哪些机器人、学习多少个教师）对性能的影响。在虚拟软体机器人上，针对四个任务和环境进行实验，特别关注从形态相似机器人处继承经验的效果。

Result: 社会学习在同等计算预算下显著优于从零开始学习；融合多个教师的知识能带来更一致和稳健的性能提升；最优教师选择策略仍是一个开放问题。

Conclusion: 社会学习可以有效加速机器人身体-大脑联合优化，多教师策略有利于提升鲁棒性，但教师选择的最优策略仍需进一步研究。

Abstract: Optimizing the body and brain of a robot is a coupled challenge: the morphology determines what control strategies are effective, while the control parameters influence how well the morphology performs. This joint optimization can be done through nested loops of evolutionary and learning processes, where the control parameters of each robot are learned independently. However, the control parameters learned by one robot may contain valuable information for others. Thus, we introduce a social learning approach in which robots can exploit optimized parameters from their peers to accelerate their own brain optimization. Within this framework, we systematically investigate how the selection of teachers, deciding which and how many robots to learn from, affects performance, experimenting with virtual soft robots in four tasks and environments. In particular, we study the effect of inheriting experience from morphologically similar robots due to the tightly coupled body and brain in robot optimization. Our results confirm the effectiveness of building on others' experience, as social learning clearly outperforms learning from scratch under equivalent computational budgets. In addition, while the optimal teacher selection strategy remains open, our findings suggest that incorporating knowledge from multiple teachers can yield more consistent and robust improvements.

</details>


### [453] [From Kinematics to Dynamics: Learning to Refine Hybrid Plans for Physically Feasible Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12474)
*Lidor Erez,Shahaf S. Shperberg,Ayal Taitler*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 针对混合离散-连续机器人任务中规划器生成的一阶轨迹与真实物理约束之间的不匹配问题，提出通过连续空间强化学习对一阶计划进行精炼，引入二阶动力学约束，弥合规划与真实执行之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合时序规划器通常使用线性（一阶）动力学建模，无法保证生成的计划尊重机器人的真实物理约束（如速度、加速度限制等）。即使高层动作序列固定，生成动力学可行的轨迹仍是一个双层优化问题。

Method: 定义了一个显式包含解析二阶动力学约束的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），利用该MDP通过连续空间强化学习来精炼混合规划器生成的一阶计划。

Result: 该方法能够可靠地恢复物理可行性，有效弥合规划器初始一阶轨迹与真实执行所需动力学之间的差距。

Conclusion: 强化学习可以作为一种有效的后处理手段，将一阶规划结果转化为满足二阶动力学约束的可执行轨迹，解决混合规划中的物理可行性问题。

Abstract: In many robotic tasks, agents must traverse a sequence of spatial regions to complete a mission. Such problems are inherently mixed discrete-continuous: a high-level action sequence and a physically feasible continuous trajectory. The resulting trajectory and action sequence must also satisfy problem constraints such as deadlines, time windows, and velocity or acceleration limits. While hybrid temporal planners attempt to address this challenge, they typically model motion using linear (first-order) dynamics, which cannot guarantee that the resulting plan respects the robot's true physical constraints. Consequently, even when the high-level action sequence is fixed, producing a dynamically feasible trajectory becomes a bi-level optimization problem. We address this problem via reinforcement learning in continuous space. We define a Markov Decision Process that explicitly incorporates analytical second-order constraints and use it to refine first-order plans generated by a hybrid planner. Our results show that this approach can reliably recover physical feasibility and effectively bridge the gap between a planner's initial first-order trajectory and the dynamics required for real execution.

</details>


### [454] [Designing for Error Recovery in Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12473)
*Christopher D. Wallbridge,Erwin Jose Lopez Pulgarin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文批判了当前机器人AI系统追求超越人类基线的单一决策模式，提出应构建具备错误检测与恢复能力的持续交互系统，并以核手套箱机器人为用例探讨了初步设计方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人AI系统多聚焦于单次单程决策以超越人类基线，但现实世界是连续交互的，人类能从错误中恢复和学习，因此需要构建能够检测并从自身错误中恢复的AI系统。

Method: 通过分析现有AI系统的局限，以核手套箱机器人为具体用例，探讨错误检测与恢复系统的挑战，并提出简单的初始设计思路。

Result: 指出了构建错误自检测与自恢复系统的挑战，并提出了初步的设计方向。

Conclusion: 机器人AI系统需要从追求单次超人类性能转向构建具备错误恢复能力的持续交互系统，核手套箱场景可作为典型用例推动这一转变。

Abstract: This position paper looks briefly at the way we attempt to program robotic AI systems. Many AI systems are based on the idea of trying to improve the performance of one individual system to beyond so-called human baselines. However, these systems often look at one shot and one-way decisions, whereas the real world is more continuous and interactive. Humans, however, are often able to recover from and learn from errors - enabling a much higher rate of success. We look at the challenges of building a system that can detect/recover from its own errors, using the example of robotic nuclear gloveboxes as a use case to help illustrate examples. We then go on to talk about simple starting designs.

</details>


### [455] [HazardArena: Evaluating Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12447)
*Zixing Chen,Yifeng Gao,Li Wang,Yunhan Zhao,Yi Liu,Jiayu Li,Xiang Zheng,Zuxuan Wu,Cong Wang,Xingjun Ma,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出HazardArena基准，用于评估视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型在语义安全层面的脆弱性，并提出了无需训练的安全选项层(Safety Option Layer)来缓解该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型评估主要关注动作执行成功率，忽视了动作策略与视觉-语言语义之间的耦合关系，导致在语义风险场景中正确执行动作可能引发不安全后果，揭示了系统性的安全脆弱性。

Method: 构建了安全/不安全孪生场景对，场景中对象、布局和动作需求相同，仅语义上下文不同决定动作是否安全；提出了无需训练的Safety Option Layer，通过语义属性或视觉语言判断器约束动作执行。

Result: 仅在安全场景上训练的VLA模型在面对对应不安全场景时往往无法安全行为；Safety Option Layer能显著减少不安全行为，且对任务性能影响极小。

Conclusion: HazardArena揭示了VLA模型在语义安全评估与保障方面的迫切需求，强调了在真实部署场景中重新思考语义安全评估和执行方式的必要性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit rich world knowledge from vision-language backbones and acquire executable skills via action demonstrations. However, existing evaluations largely focus on action execution success, leaving action policies loosely coupled with visual-linguistic semantics. This decoupling exposes a systematic vulnerability whereby correct action execution may induce unsafe outcomes under semantic risk. To expose this vulnerability, we introduce HazardArena, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic safety in VLAs under controlled yet risk-bearing contexts. HazardArena is constructed from safe/unsafe twin scenarios that share matched objects, layouts, and action requirements, differing only in the semantic context that determines whether an action is unsafe. We find that VLA models trained exclusively on safe scenarios often fail to behave safely when evaluated in their corresponding unsafe counterparts. HazardArena includes over 2,000 assets and 40 risk-sensitive tasks spanning 7 real-world risk categories grounded in established robotic safety standards. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose a training-free Safety Option Layer that constrains action execution using semantic attributes or a vision-language judge, substantially reducing unsafe behaviors with minimal impact on task performance. We hope that HazardArena highlights the need to rethink how semantic safety is evaluated and enforced in VLAs as they scale toward real-world deployment.

</details>


### [456] [D-BDM: A Direct and Efficient Boundary-Based Occupancy Grid Mapping Framework for LiDARs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12436)
*Benxu Tang,Yixi Cai,Fanze Kong,Longji Yin,Fu Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出D-BDM框架，通过截断射线投射策略和直接边界更新机制，在边界占用表示基础上大幅降低更新时间和内存消耗，适用于自主机器人3D建图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D占用网格建图存在两个根本局限：显式存储所有体素导致内存爆炸，以及穷举射线投射造成高更新延迟。尽管边界表示缓解了内存问题，但仍依赖全射线投射更新，效率瓶颈未解。

Method: 提出截断射线投射策略，将体素遍历限制在边界外部，大幅减少更新体素数；同时提出直接边界更新机制，消除辅助局部3D占用网格的需求，简化更新流程并降低内存。

Result: 在公开数据集上的广泛评估表明，该方法相比基线方法和先前的边界方法，实现了更低的更新时间和更少的内存消耗。

Conclusion: D-BDM在保持边界表示内存优势的同时，通过两项创新设计彻底解决了更新效率问题，为实时自主机器人3D建图提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient and scalable 3D occupancy mapping is essential for autonomous robot applications in unknown environments. However, traditional occupancy grid representations suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, explicitly storing all voxels in three-dimensional space leads to prohibitive memory consumption. Second, exhaustive ray casting incurs high update latency. A recent representation alleviate memory demands by maintaining only the voxels on the two-dimensional boundary, yet they still rely on full ray casting updates. This work advances the boundary-based framework with a highly efficient update scheme. We introduce a truncated ray casting strategy that restricts voxel traversal to the exterior of the boundary, which dramatically reduces the number of updated voxels. In addition, we propose a direct boundary update mechanism that removes the need for an auxiliary local 3D occupancy grid, further reducing memory usage and simplifying the map update pipeline. We name our framework as D-BDM. Extensive evaluations on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves significantly lower update time and reduced memory consumption compared with the baseline methods, as well as the prior boundary-based approach.

</details>


### [457] [Defining and Evaluation Method for External Human-Machine Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12293)
*Jose Gonzalez-Belmonte,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套包含223个问题的通用评估方法，用于客观评价和比较自动驾驶汽车的外部人机界面（eHMI）方案。该方法从标准化难度、成本效益、可访问性、易理解性、沟通多面性、定位和可读性7个维度进行评估，并通过测试四种现有方案及动力学基线方案验证了其有效性。结果表明，理想的人机通信方式是刻意设计的车辆动力学与分布式文本显示的结合，同时也揭示了eHMI可读性和学习速度方面的知识空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶车辆致死事故的增加，需要一种通用的车辆与道路其他参与者之间的通信方法。尽管已有大量eHMI提案，但尚未确定理想方案，因此需要一种客观的评估方法来比较不同提案。

Method: 提出了一个包含223个问题的通用评估问卷，分为7个类别（标准化难度、成本效益、可访问性、易理解性、沟通多面性、定位、可读性）。将该方法应用于四种现有eHMI提案及一个仅使用动力学运动的基线方案进行测试。

Result: 测试结果表明，理想的人机通信方式是刻意设计的车辆动力学与分布式文本显示的结合；同时揭示了eHMI可读性以及不同观察者学习其含义的速度方面存在知识空白。

Conclusion: 提出未来工作应聚焦于eHMI可读性和不同观察者学习速度的不确定性，并对所提方法进行进一步测试。

Abstract: As the number of fatalities involving Autonomous Vehicles increase, the need for a universal method of communicating between vehicles and other agents on the road has also increased. Over the past decade, numerous proposals of external Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) have been brought forward with the purpose of bridging this communication gap, with none yet to be determined as the ideal one. This work proposes a universal evaluation method conformed of 223 questions to objectively evaluate and compare different proposals and arrive at a conclusion. The questionnaire is divided into 7 categories that evaluate different aspects of any given proposal that uses eHMIs: ease of standardization, cost effectiveness, accessibility, ease of understanding, multifacetedness in communication, positioning, and readability. In order to test the method it was used on four existing proposals, plus a baseline using only kinematic motions, in order to both exemplify the application of the evaluation method and offer a baseline score for future comparison. The result of this testing suggests that the ideal method of machine-human communication is a combination of intentionally-designed vehicle kinematics and distributed well-placed text-based displays, but it also reveals knowledge gaps in the readability of eHMIs and the speed at which different observers may learn their meaning. This paper proposes future work related to these uncertainties, along with future testing with the proposed method.

</details>


### [458] [Asymptotically Stable Gait Generation and Instantaneous Walkability Determination for Planar Almost Linear Biped with Knees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12274)
*Fumihiko Asano,Ning Lei,Taiki Sedoguchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对一类具有特殊机械特性的平面双足机器人（所有连杆绕髋关节平衡，无重力自然摆动），将其线性化建模方法扩展至带膝关节的6-DOF平面双足机器人。通过方程降阶（6-DOF→3-DOF）并对重力项做泰勒线性近似，实现了瞬时未来状态计算与可步行性判定。数值仿真验证了方法的有效性，并分析了膝关节弯曲角度和展开点对线性近似精度的影响以及下小台阶时的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对平衡型双足机器人的线性化建模方法仅适用于无膝关节的简化模型，无法直接应用于更接近人类解剖结构的带膝关节双足机器人。本文旨在将该线性化方法扩展至膝关节模型，以实现快速状态预测和实时可步行性判定。

Method: 1) 推导平面6-DOF双足机器人的运动方程、约束条件和非弹性碰撞模型；2) 设计控制系统并通过数值方法生成水平面上稳定双足步态；3) 将运动方程降阶为3-DOF模型；4) 以大腿框架角为展开点，对重力项进行线性近似（泰勒展开），导出线性化模型；5) 对模型施加控制输入、进行状态空间实现并离散化，通过迭代计算实现瞬时可步行性判定。

Result: 数值仿真表明：线性化模型能在可忽略的时间内完成未来状态计算和可步行性判定；膝关节弯曲角度和展开点的选择显著影响线性近似精度；下小台阶时该线性化方法存在一定局限性。

Conclusion: 本文成功将针对平衡型双足机器人的线性化建模方法扩展到带膝关节的平面双足机器人，实现了瞬时计算能力。但该方法在下台阶场景下的精度和适用性仍需进一步改进。

Abstract: A class of planar bipedal robots with unique mechanical properties has been proposed, where all links are balanced around the hip joint, preventing natural swinging motion due to gravity. A common property of their equations of motion is that the inertia matrix is a constant matrix, there are no nonlinear velocity terms, and the gravity term contains simple nonlinear terms. By performing a Taylor expansion of the gravity term and making a linear approximation, it is easy to derive a linearized model, and calculations for future states or walkability determination can be performed instantaneously without the need for numerical integration. This paper extends the method to a planar biped robot model with knees. First, we derive the equations of motion, constraint conditions, and inelastic collisions for a planar 6-DOF biped robot, design its control system, and numerically generate a stable bipedal gait on a horizontal plane. Next, we reduce the equations of motion to a 3-DOF model, and derive a linearized model by approximating the gravity term as linear around the expansion point for the thigh frame angle. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate that calculations for future states and walkability determination can be completed in negligible time. By applying control inputs to the obtained model, performing state-space realization, and then discretizing it, instantaneous walkability determination through iterative calculation becomes possible. Through detailed gait analysis, we discuss how the knee joint flexion angle and the expansion point affect the accuracy of the linear approximation, and the issues that arise when descending a small step.

</details>


### [459] [Robotic Nanoparticle Synthesis via Solution-based Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12169)
*Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Michael Gallagher,Nilanjan Chakraborty,Stanislaus S. Wong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于螺旋几何的操作规划框架，用于溶液合成实验的机器人自动化。通过编程演示范式，从单次演示中提取恒定螺旋序列来编码运动约束，实现长时域、多步骤的合成协议（如金和磁铁矿纳米颗粒制备）的自主执行，使化学家等非机器人专家能够轻松调整和重编程系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 溶液合成实验（如纳米颗粒制备）是长时域、多步骤的任务，涉及取放、倒液、旋钮操作和视觉检测等技能。其中倒液、转移容器和旋钮操作等技能对末端执行器运动施加了几何和运动学约束，现有方法难以通用化且缺乏编程灵活性。

Method: 采用编程演示（Programming by Demonstration）范式，从单次演示中提取恒定螺旋序列（constant screws），该表示紧凑且坐标不变，能编码运动约束并泛化到不同的抓取位置和参数化重用。将这些螺旋参数化的技能基元按合成协议组合，机器人自动生成完整实验的运动规划。

Result: 该方法使机器人能够自主执行完整的纳米颗粒合成实验，并通过多次重复运行验证其可靠性。螺旋表示实现了跨抓取位置变化的鲁棒泛化，且单次演示即可支持技能的参数化重用。

Conclusion: 螺旋运动规划与编程演示相结合，为长时域实验室自动化提供了严谨且通用的基础，使基础运动学能够对可扩展溶液合成协议的机器人应用产生转化性影响。

Abstract: We present a screw geometry-based manipulation planning framework for the robotic automation of solution-based synthesis, exemplified through the preparation of gold and magnetite nanoparticles. The synthesis protocols are inherently long-horizon, multi-step tasks, requiring skills such as pick-and-place, pouring, turning a knob, and periodic visual inspection to detect reaction completion. A central challenge is that some skills, notably pouring, transferring containers with solutions, and turning a knob, impose geometric and kinematic constraints on the end-effector motion. To address this, we use a programming by demonstration paradigm where the constraints can be extracted from a single demonstration. This combination of screw-based motion representation and demonstration-driven specification enables domain experts, such as chemists, to readily adapt and reprogram the system for new experimental protocols and laboratory setups without requiring expertise in robotics or motion planning. We extract sequences of constant screws from demonstrations, which compactly encode the motion constraints while remaining coordinate-invariant. This representation enables robust generalization across variations in grasp placement and allows parameterized reuse of a skill learned from a single example. By composing these screw-parameterized primitives according to the synthesis protocol, the robot autonomously generates motion plans that execute the complete experiment over repeated runs. Our results highlight that screw-theoretic planning, combined with programming by demonstration, provides a rigorous and generalizable foundation for long-horizon laboratory automation, thereby enabling fundamental kinematics to have a translational impact on the use of robots in developing scalable solution-based synthesis protocols.

</details>


### [460] [Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization for Sampling-Based Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12149)
*O. Goktug Poyrazoglu,Yukang Cao,Rahul Moorthy,Volkan Isler*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出UGE-TO/UGE-MPC，通过不确定性椭球将轨迹表示为概率分布，并利用Hellinger距离增强轨迹多样性，在轨迹优化中实现更快的收敛速度和更高的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统采样-based轨迹优化对初始化高度敏感，在复杂环境中易陷入局部最优，且仅探索动作空间而忽略系统动力学的影响。

Method: 将轨迹表示为不确定性椭球诱导的概率分布，通过Hellinger距离强制分布间分离，同时考虑系统动力学和动作选择的影响，增强轨迹多样性；并集成到采样-based模型预测控制中形成UGE-MPC。

Result: 在无障碍环境中收敛速度加快72.1%，在杂乱环境中收敛速度加快66%且成功率提高6.7%。

Conclusion: UGE-MPC在轨迹优化中具有更高的探索能力和更快的收敛速度，尤其在需要大幅偏离标称轨迹以避免失败的场景中表现优越。

Abstract: Trajectory optimization depends heavily on initialization. In particular, sampling-based approaches are highly sensitive to initial solutions, and limited exploration frequently leads them to converge to local minima in complex environments. We present Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization (UGE-TO), a trajectory optimization algorithm that generates well-separated samples to achieve a better coverage of the configuration space. UGE-TO represents trajectories as probability distributions induced by uncertainty ellipsoids. Unlike sampling-based approaches that explore only in the action space, this representation captures the effects of both system dynamics and action selection. By incorporating the impact of dynamics, in addition to the action space, into our distributions, our method enhances trajectory diversity by enforcing distributional separation via the Hellinger distance between them. It enables a systematic exploration of the configuration space and improves robustness against local minima. Further, we present UGE-MPC, which integrates UGE-TO into sampling-based model predictive controller methods. Experiments demonstrate that UGE-MPC achieves higher exploration and faster convergence in trajectory optimization compared to baselines under the same sampling budget, achieving 72.1% faster convergence in obstacle-free environments and 66% faster convergence with a 6.7% higher success rate in the cluttered environment compared to the best-performing baseline. Additionally, we validate the approach through a range of simulation scenarios and real-world experiments. Our results indicate that UGE-MPC has higher success rates and faster convergence, especially in environments that demand significant deviations from nominal trajectories to avoid failures. The project and code are available at https://ogpoyrazoglu.github.io/cuniform_sampling/.

</details>


### [461] [Dynamic Modeling and Robust Gait Optimization of a Compliant Worm Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12031)
*Xinyu Zhou,Yu Mei,Faith Thomson,Christian Luedtke,Xinda Qi,Xiaobo Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对仿生蠕虫机器人在波纹管中的运动问题，提出了一种结合混合动力学建模、松弛感知驱动模型、能量模型以及鲁棒性裕度优化的多目标步态优化框架，实验验证了其在速度-功率权衡下的有效性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿蠕虫机器人在受限环境中具有良好运动能力，但由于其可变形锚定结构与环境的复杂相互作用，预测建模和步态优化存在困难，亟需一种可部署的优化方法。

Method: 建立混合动力学模型（连续动力学+离散锚定切换）、松弛感知驱动模型（映射指令到实际体长变化）、基于物理的能量模型；引入运动学鲁棒性裕度，构建基于裕度的鲁棒步态优化框架，实现多目标优化（最大化平均速度、最小化平均功率）。

Result: 该框架能够捕捉机器人在测试条件下的主要运动与能量消耗行为，实现速度-功率权衡下的鲁棒步态优化。

Conclusion: 所提出的建模与优化框架能够有效指导柔性蠕虫机器人在波纹管环境中的运动控制，在保证鲁棒性的前提下实现速度与功率的良好折衷。

Abstract: Worm-inspired robots provide an effective locomotion strategy for constrained environments by combining cyclic body deformation with alternating anchoring. For compliant robots, however, the interaction between deformable anchoring structures and the environment makes predictive modeling and deployable gait optimization challenging. This paper presents an experimentally grounded modeling and optimization framework for a compliant worm robot capable of traversing corrugated pipes. First, a hybrid dynamic locomotion model is derived, in which the robot motion is represented by continuous dynamics within a corrugation groove and discrete switching of anchoring positions between adjacent grooves. A slack-aware actuation model is further introduced to map the commanded gait input to the realized body-length change, and an energy model is developed based on physics and calibrated with empirical power measurement. Based on these models, a multi-objective gait optimization problem is formulated to maximize average speed while minimizing average power. To reduce the fragility of nominal boundary-seeking solutions, a kinematic robustness margin is introduced into the anchoring-transition conditions, leading to a margin-based robust gait optimization framework. Experimental results show that the proposed framework captures the dominant locomotion and energy-consumption behavior of the robot over the tested conditions, and enables robust gait optimization for achieving speed-power trade-off.

</details>


### [462] [3DRO: Lidar-level SE(3) Direct Radar Odometry Using a 2D Imaging Radar and a Gyroscope](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12027)
*Cedric Le Gentil,Daniil Lisus,Timothy D. Barfoot*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出3DRO方法，将传统SE(2)直接雷达里程计扩展为SE(3)状态估计，通过融合2D雷达速度估计与3D陀螺仪测量，在643km数据集上实现了激光雷达级别的里程计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 2D成像雷达虽然能提供360度环境信息，但其数据通常被假设局限于与旋转轴正交的平面，导致大多数方法仅进行SE(2)状态估计，缺乏对三维运动（SE(3)）的支持。

Method: 在保留DRO框架中2D速度估计的基础上，将3D陀螺仪测量值在SO(3)上进行积分，从而实现SE(3)的自我运动估计。

Result: 使用Boreas-RT数据集的643公里数据进行验证，该方法达到了与激光雷达相当的里程计精度。

Conclusion: 这种简单的方法有效弥补了2D成像雷达在三维状态估计上的不足，证明了融合2D雷达和3D惯性测量能够实现高精度三维里程计。

Abstract: Recently, the robotics community has regained interest in radar-based perception and state estimation. A 2D imaging radar provides dense 360deg information about the environment. Despite the radar antenna's cone of emission and reception, the collected data is generally assumed to be limited to the plane orthogonal to the radar's spinning axis. Accordingly, most methods based on 2D imaging radars only perform SE(2) state estimation. This paper presents 3DRO, an extension of the SE(2) Direct Radar Odometry (DRO) framework to perform state estimation in SE(3). While still assuming planarity of the data through DRO's 2D velocity estimates, it integrates 3D gyroscope measurements over SO(3) to estimate SE(3) ego motion. While simple, this approach provides lidar-level odometry accuracy as demonstrated using 643km of data from the Boreas-RT dataset.

</details>


### [463] [A Foot Resistive Force Model for Legged Locomotion on Muddy Terrains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12006)
*Xunjie Chen,Liuyin Wang,Xinyan Huang,Jerry Shan,Yantao Shen,Jingang Yi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于足式机器人-泥地交互的阻力模型，该模型统一描述了泥浆的粘弹性、触变性和回吸等流变特性，并基于此设计了一种可变形机器人脚，显著提升了机器人在泥地上的机动性和能效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足式机器人在泥泞等可变形、高屈服性地形上的移动和导航面临重大挑战，现有模型难以同时准确描述泥地复杂的流变行为并提供物理可解释性。

Method: 提出了一种针对足式机器人脚-泥地交互的阻力模型，统一且有效地描述了粘弹性、触变性及回吸效应；基于该模型设计了一种可变形机器人脚。

Result: 实验验证了阻力模型的准确性；可变形脚不仅提升了机器人在泥地上的机动性，还提高了行走的能效。

Conclusion: 该阻力模型可进一步用于开发泥地环境下足式机器人的数据驱动仿真与运动控制。

Abstract: Legged robots face significant challenges in moving and navigating on deformable and highly yielding terrain such as mud. We present a resistive force model for legged foot-mud interactions. The model captures rheological behaviors such as visco-elasticity, thixotropy of the mud suspension and retractive suction. One attractive property of this new model lies in its effective, uniform formulation to provide underlying physical interpretation and accurate resistive force predictions. We further take advantage of the resistive force model to design a new morphing robotic foot for effective and efficient legged locomotion. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the force model, and the results demonstrate that the morphing foot enhances not only the locomotion mobility but also energy-efficiency of walking in mud. The new resistive force model can be further used to develop data-driven simulation and locomotion control of legged robots on muddy terrains.

</details>


### [464] [ReefMapGS: Enabling Large-Scale Underwater Reconstruction by Closing the Loop Between Multimodal SLAM and Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11992)
*Daniel Yang,Jungseok Hong,John J. Leonard,Yogesh Girdhar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ReefMapGS，一种基于3D高斯泼溅的增量式重建框架，无需COLMAP，利用SLAM估计的相机位姿（含不确定性）从高置信区域开始逐步扩展，通过局部跟踪与全局位姿图优化交替进行，实现水下礁石场景的高质量3D重建与AUV轨迹的精确全局位姿估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅依赖精确的相机位姿，而传统获取方式（如运动恢复结构）计算成本高，不适用于现场机器人应用。水下机器人虽有多种传感器数据可用于SLAM估计位姿，但如何将含不确定性的SLAM位姿与3DGS结合实现增量式重建仍需解决。

Method: 提出ReefMapGS框架：(1) 从高置信度区域构建初始模型；(2) 通过局部跟踪新图像观测与底层3DGS场景优化交替进行，实现增量式场景扩展；(3) 将优化后的位姿反馈到位姿图中进行全局轨迹优化。

Result: 在两个复杂几何结构的水下礁石场景上实现了无需COLMAP的3D重建，并在长达700米的AUV调查轨迹上获得了更精确的全局位姿估计。

Conclusion: ReefMapGS证明了将SLAM位姿估计（含不确定性）与3DGS相结合的可行性，实现了在计算资源受限的机器人平台上进行大规模水下场景的增量式高保真3D重建。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting is a powerful visual representation, providing high-quality and efficient 3D scene reconstruction, but it is crucially dependent on accurate camera poses typically obtained from computationally intensive processes like structure-from-motion that are unsuitable for field robot applications. However, in these domains, multimodal sensor data from acoustic, inertial, pressure, and visual sensors are available and suitable for pose-graph optimization-based SLAM methods that can estimate the vehicle's trajectory and thus our needed camera poses while providing uncertainty. We propose a 3DGS-based incremental reconstruction framework, ReefMapGS, that builds an initial model from a high certainty region and progressively expands to incorporate the whole scene. We reconstruct the scene incrementally by interleaving local tracking of new image observations with optimization of the underlying 3DGS scene. These refined poses are integrated back into the pose-graph to globally optimize the whole trajectory. We show COLMAP-free 3D reconstruction of two underwater reef sites with complex geometry as well as more accurate global pose estimation of our AUV over survey trajectories spanning up to 700 m.

</details>


### [465] [Complementarity by Construction: A Lie-Group Approach to Solving Quadratic Programs with Linear Complementarity Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11991)
*Arun L. Bishop,Micah I. Reich,Zachary Manchester*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用互补约束的李群结构进行流形优化的LCQP求解器Marble，通过引入数值稳定的回缩映射参数化约束，在机器人操作与运动规划中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人领域中的许多问题（如操作和运动中的接触建立与断开）需要同时处理连续动力学和离散事件，这些问题可建模为线性互补二次规划（LCQP），但LCQP非凸且缺乏能够计算良好局部解的高效求解器用于规划管线。

Method: 观察到互补约束在无穷小松弛下形成李群结构，利用该结构进行流形优化；引入数值稳定的回缩映射（retraction map），通过参数化约束使其在构造上即满足约束条件。

Result: 在基准测试套件上具有竞争力，在多个现有方法无法收敛的机器人问题上成功求解。

Conclusion: Marble求解器避免了互补约束的经典数值问题，提供C++实现及Julia/Python绑定，在机器人规划任务中表现出色。

Abstract: Many problems in robotics require reasoning over a mix of continuous dynamics and discrete events, such as making and breaking contact in manipulation and locomotion. These problems are locally well modeled by linear complementarity quadratic programs (LCQPs), an extension to QPs that introduce complementarity constraints. While very expressive, LCQPs are non-convex, and few solvers exist for computing good local solutions for use in planning pipelines. In this work, we observe that complementarity constraints form a Lie group under infinitesimal relaxation, and leverage this structure to perform on-manifold optimization. We introduce a retraction map that is numerically well behaved, and use it to parameterize the constraints so that they are satisfied by construction. The resulting solver avoids many of the classical issues with complementarity constraints. We provide an open-source solver, Marble, that is implemented in C++ with Julia and Python bindings. We demonstrate that Marble is competitive on a suite of benchmark problems, and solves a number of robotics problems where existing approaches fail to converge.

</details>


### [466] [Bipedal-Walking-Dynamics Model on Granular Terrains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11981)
*Xunjie Chen,Xinyan Huang,Peter Shan,Jingang Yi,Tao Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的动力学建模方法，通过集成动态足-地形交互模型来计算地面反作用力，并引入三个额外自由度来估计足部下陷和滑移，从而捕获和预测双足机器人在颗粒介质（如沙地）上的行走运动。实验验证了该模型在步态轮廓、介质侵入预测和地面反作用力估计方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双足机器人在沙地等松软颗粒介质上行走时，足部会显著下陷和打滑，导致行走运动的不确定性和不稳定性，现有模型难以准确捕获这些影响。

Method: 提出一种新型动力学建模方法，将动态足-地形交互模型集成到双足行走模型中用于计算地面反作用力；引入三个额外自由度来估计足部下陷和滑移；在沙地上使用双足步行机器人进行实验验证。

Result: 所提模型能够准确预测机器人步态轮廓、介质侵入以及地面反作用力，并能分析双足动力学、运输成本和足-地形滚动与侵入效应。

Conclusion: 该动力学模型可作为双足机器人在颗粒地形上高效行走的运动控制和优化的有效工具。

Abstract: Bipeds have demonstrated high agility and mobility in unstructured environments such as sand. The yielding of such granular media brings significant sinkage and slip of the bipedal feet, leading to uncertainty and instability of walking locomotion. We present a new dynamics-modeling approach to capture and predict bipedal-walking locomotion on granular media. A dynamic foot-terrain interaction model is integrated to compute the ground reaction force (GRF). The proposed granular dynamic model has three additional degree-of-freedom (DoF) to estimate foot sinkage and slip that are critical to capturing robot-walking kinematics and kinetics such as cost of transport (CoT). Using the new model, we analyze bipedal kinetics, CoT, and foot-terrain rolling and intrusion affects. Experiments are conducted using a biped robotic walker on sand to validate the proposed dynamic model with robot-gait profiles, media-intrusion prediction, and GRF estimations. This new dynamics model can further serve as an enabling tool for locomotion control and optimization of bipedal robots to efficiently walk on granular terrains.

</details>


### [467] [M2HRI: An LLM-Driven Multimodal Multi-Agent Framework for Personalized Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11975)
*Shaid Hasan,Breenice Lee,Sujan Sarker,Tariq Iqbal*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出M2HRI框架，为每个机器人赋予独立人格和长期记忆，并结合差异化协调机制。用户实验（n=105）表明，LLM驱动的人格特质可被区分并提升交互质量，长期记忆增强个性化，集中式协调减少重叠并提升整体交互质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多机器人系统将机器人视为功能相同的个体，忽视了机器人个体身份对用户感知的影响，以及个体差异存在时协调机制如何塑造多机器人行为。

Method: 提出了M2HRI多模态多智能体框架，基于大语言模型为每个机器人配备独立人格和长期记忆，并设计基于个体差异的协调机制。通过105人的受控用户实验进行评估。

Result: LLM驱动的人格特质显著可区分且提升交互质量；长期记忆提升个性化和偏好感知；集中式协调显著减少行为重叠并提升整体交互质量。

Conclusion: 智能体个性化和结构化协调对于实现连贯且 socially appropriate 的多智能体人机交互至关重要。

Abstract: Multi-robot systems hold significant promise for social environments such as homes and hospitals, yet existing multi-robot works treat robots as functionally identical, overlooking how robots individual identity shape user perception and how coordination shapes multi-robot behavior when such individuality is present. To address this, we introduce M2HRI, a multimodal multi-agent framework built on large language models that equips each robot with distinct personality and long-term memory, alongside a coordination mechanism conditioned on these differences. In a controlled user study (n = 105) in a multi-agent human-robot interaction (HRI) scenario, we find that LLM-driven personality traits are significantly distinguishable and enhance interaction quality, long-term memory improves personalization and preference awareness, and centralized coordination significantly reduces overlap while improving overall interaction quality. Together, these results demonstrate that both agent individuality and structured coordination are essential for coherent and socially appropriate multi-agent HRI. Project website and code are available at https://project-m2hri.github.io/.

</details>


### [468] [Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11793)
*Lyuxing He,Eric Cai,Shobhit Aggarwal,Jianjun Wang,David Held*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAX-DPD是一种层次化、解耦的点扩散框架，通过前馈密集高斯混合模型（GMM）建模全局场景级放置，并通过解耦点云扩散模块分别扩散物体几何和放置帧，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和对物体几何变化的泛化上达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的端到端策略在表达性和灵活性方面表现出色，但在泛化到新颖物体几何形状和实现高精度方面存在困难；而物体中心的方法将任务分解为预测目标物体的放置姿态，但精度和泛化能力仍有提升空间。

Method: 提出TAX-DPD框架：(1) 前馈密集高斯混合模型（GMM），生成空间密集的全局放置先验；(2) 解耦点云扩散模块，分别对物体几何和放置帧进行扩散，实现精确的局部几何推理。

Result: 在放置精度、多模态覆盖、对物体几何和场景配置变化的泛化上达到SOTA；在刚性物体放置中，点云扩散精度显著优于SE(3)-扩散方法；在模拟和真实世界的高精度工业插入任务以及模拟的布料悬挂任务中均得到验证。

Conclusion: TAX-DPD通过层次化解耦点扩散框架，有效兼顾了放置精度与泛化能力，并展示了向非刚性物体（如布料）任务扩展的潜力。

Abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

</details>


### [469] [Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11768)
*Apoorv Vaish,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对软体机器人的形态与控制的协同设计问题，分析了协同设计空间的结构特征，发现高质量区域呈低维流形分布且形态与控制紧密耦合，据此提出一种自适应推断归纳偏好的高效协同设计算法，相比基准算法提高了36%的性能和超过两个数量级的样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人形态与控制的协同设计能确保形态与控制间的协同交互（这在生物体中普遍存在），但协同设计是一个高维搜索问题，需要系统化的方法来识别适用于其结构的归纳偏好，以使得搜索可解。

Method: 首先分析了软体运动与操作任务的协同设计空间，识别出三个一致的模式：1) 在协同设计空间的区域内，质量沿低维流形变化；2) 高质量区域的变化分布在更多维度上；3) 同时形态与控制紧密耦合。基于这些发现，设计了一种高效协同设计算法，该算法在搜索过程中动态推断任务特定的结构并自适应调整。

Result: 相比基准算法，本文算法提升了36%的性能提升，同时实现了超过两个数量级的样本效率提升。

Conclusion: 证明了利用归纳偏好进行高效协同设计的有效性，为软体机器人协同设计提供了一种系统化的方法。

Abstract: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

</details>


### [470] [StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11757)
*Jinhui Ye,Ning Gao,Senqiao Yang,Jinliang Zheng,Zixuan Wang,Yuxin Chen,Pengguang Chen,Yilun Chen,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出StarVLA-α，一个旨在消解VLA模型设计复杂性的简洁强基线。通过最小化架构与流程复杂度，在统一多基准训练下，仅依靠强VLM骨干+最小设计即可达到甚至超越现有复杂方法（如π_0.5），在真实世界RoboChallenge上领先20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA（视觉-语言-动作）模型领域高度碎片化，不同工作在架构、训练数据、本体配置及特定基准工程上差异巨大，缺乏系统性可控研究。作者旨在通过构建一个简洁强基线，在受控条件下系统研究VLA设计选择，以减少实验混杂因素。

Method: StarVLA-α刻意最小化架构和管线复杂度，在统一的多基准（LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, RoboCasa）训练框架下，重新评估了动作建模策略、机器人特定预训练、接口工程等关键设计轴。核心思路是采用强VLM骨干并结合最简设计，不依赖额外架构复杂度或工程技巧。

Result: 在统一多基准训练中，该简洁基线始终保持高度竞争力。在真实世界RoboChallenge基准上，单一通用模型相比π_0.5提升20%的性能。

Conclusion: 一个强大的VLM骨干加上最小化的设计已经足以实现强劲性能，无需额外的架构复杂性或工程技巧。StarVLA-α有望成为VLA领域未来研究的坚实起点。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [471] [Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11751)
*Quanyi Li,Lan Feng,Haonan Zhang,Wuyang Li,Letian Wang,Alexandre Alahi,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出GWM（基础世界模型），将MPC的视觉预测与语言指令对齐到统一的嵌入空间，从而无需预知目标图像即可通过文本指令进行任务规划。在WISER基准上，GWM-MPC在288个未见任务上达到87%成功率，远超传统VLA方法（22%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视觉运动MPC依赖预训练视觉编码器（如DINO、JEPA）在潜在空间中计算预测图像与目标图像的距离来评分动作，但存在两个关键问题：（1）目标图像需在任务执行前获得，在新环境中难以实现；（2）用图像传达目标交互性差，不如自然语言灵活。

Method: 在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中学习一个基础世界模型（GWM）。具体地，将每个动作提案的未来预测结果映射到与任务指令对齐的嵌入空间，通过计算预测结果嵌入与任务指令嵌入的相似度来评分动作。这使得视觉运动MPC转化为视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型。

Result: 在提出的WISER基准上，GWM-MPC在包含288个任务的测试集（包含未见视觉信号和指代表达）上达到87%成功率。相比之下，传统VLA方法过拟合训练集（90%成功率）但在测试集上仅22%成功率。

Conclusion: 将世界模型预测与语言指令对齐到统一的语义空间，能够实现超越传统VLM-based VLA方法的语义泛化能力，有效解决视觉运动MPC中目标图像获取困难和交互性差的问题。

Abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

</details>


### [472] [Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11680)
*Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Kangyi Lu,Jian-Qing Zheng,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Du-FreqNet，一种双控制、频率感知的扩散模型，用于合成具有物理一致性的显微图像，解决了光学微机器人在3D感知中因数据稀缺导致的光学特性（特别是深度依赖的衍射和散焦效应）难以复现的问题。实验表明，该模型在有限数据训练下，SSIM提升20.7%，并能泛化到未见姿态，显著提升下游3D姿态和深度估计任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学微机器人的自主操作依赖精确的3D感知，但获取大规模、高质量的显微数据集因制造工艺复杂和标注劳动密集而极为困难。现有基于GAN的数据增强方法难以重现深度相关的衍射和散焦等关键光学特性。

Method: 提出Du-FreqNet，一种双控制、频率感知的扩散模型：1）两个独立的ControlNet分支分别编码微机器人3D点云和深度特定的网格层；2）引入自适应频域损失，根据到焦平面的距离动态重新加权高频和低频成分；3）利用可微的FFT监督捕捉物理上有意义的频率分布。

Result: 在有限数据集（每姿态80张图像）上训练，实现了可控的深度依赖图像合成，SSIM比基线提升20.7%；模型能有效泛化到未见姿态，并显著增强下游3D姿态和深度估计任务。

Conclusion: Du-FreqNet通过频率感知的扩散模型，有效解决了显微图像合成中的物理一致性问题，为光学微机器人的闭环控制提供了可靠的3D感知数据支撑。

Abstract: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Du-FreqNet generalizes effectively to unseen poses and significantly enhances downstream tasks, including 3D pose and depth estimation, thereby facilitating robust closed-loop control in microrobotic systems.

</details>


### [473] [AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11674)
*Mingyang Li,Haofan Xu,Haowen Sun,Xinzhe Chen,Sihua Ren,Liqi Huang,Xinyang Sui,Chenyang Miao,Qiongjie Cui,Zeyang Liu,Xingyu Chen,Xuguang Lan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AffordSim，首个将开放词汇3D affordance预测集成到机器人操作数据生成管线中的仿真框架。通过VoxAfford模型预测物体点云上的功能区域，引导抓取姿态朝向任务相关区域，在50个任务上评估4种模仿学习方法，发现抓取任务已较好解决（53-93%），但需要affordance感知的任务（如窄口容器倒水1-43%、挂杯子0-47%）仍极具挑战性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于仿真的操作数据生成平台未将物体affordance信息融入轨迹生成，导致需要精确与特定功能区域交互的任务（如抓握杯柄、从杯沿倒水、挂杯子）无法自动生成语义正确的轨迹。

Method: 提出VoxAfford开放词汇3D affordance检测模型（增强MLLM输出token的多尺度几何特征），预测物体点云上的affordance图，引导抓取位姿估计到任务相关功能区域；基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建，支持多种机械臂、VLM驱动任务生成、基于DA3的3D高斯重建实现域随机化。

Result: 在50个任务、7个类别上评估BC、Diffusion Policy、ACT、Pi 0.5四种方法：抓取任务成功率53-93%；窄口容器倒水仅1-43%；挂杯子仅0-47%。零样本sim-to-real在真实Franka FR3上验证了数据迁移性。

Conclusion: 当前模仿学习方法在需要精细affordance感知的任务上表现远不如基础抓取任务，凸显了affordance感知数据生成的必要性，AffordSim为此类数据生成提供了自动化可扩展的方案。

Abstract: Simulation-based data generation has become a dominant paradigm for training robotic manipulation policies, yet existing platforms do not incorporate object affordance information into trajectory generation. As a result, tasks requiring precise interaction with specific functional regions--grasping a mug by its handle, pouring from a cup's rim, or hanging a mug on a hook--cannot be automatically generated with semantically correct trajectories. We introduce AffordSim, the first simulation framework that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into the manipulation data generation pipeline. AffordSim uses our VoxAfford model, an open-vocabulary 3D affordance detector that enhances MLLM output tokens with multi-scale geometric features, to predict affordance maps on object point clouds, guiding grasp pose estimation toward task-relevant functional regions. Built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim with cross-embodiment support (Franka FR3, Panda, UR5e, Kinova), VLM-powered task generation, and novel domain randomization using DA3-based 3D Gaussian reconstruction from real photographs, AffordSim enables automated, scalable generation of affordance-aware manipulation data. We establish a benchmark of 50 tasks across 7 categories (grasping, placing, stacking, pushing/pulling, pouring, mug hanging, long-horizon composite) and evaluate 4 imitation learning baselines (BC, Diffusion Policy, ACT, Pi 0.5). Our results reveal that while grasping is largely solved (53-93% success), affordance-demanding tasks such as pouring into narrow containers (1-43%) and mug hanging (0-47%) remain significantly more challenging for current imitation learning methods, highlighting the need for affordance-aware data generation. Zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on a real Franka FR3 validate the transferability of the generated data.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [474] [Seeing Further and Wider: Joint Spatio-Temporal Enlargement for Micro-Video Popularity Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20311)
*Dali Wang,Yunyao Zhang,Junqing Yu,Yi-Ping Phoebe Chen,Chen Xu,Zikai Song*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出统一框架实现时空扩展：时间上通过稀疏采样和密集感知融合实现长序列理解，空间上构建拓扑感知记忆库实现无限历史关联


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微视频流行度预测方法在时间维度依赖稀疏短程采样限制内容感知，在空间维度依赖扁平检索记忆库容量有限效率低下，阻碍可扩展知识利用

Method: 提出联合时空扩展统一框架：时间扩展通过帧评分模块从稀疏采样和密集感知两条互补路径提取高光线索并自适应融合；空间扩展构建拓扑感知记忆库，基于拓扑关系分层聚类历史相关内容，通过更新对应聚类编码器特征实现无限历史关联

Result: 在三个广泛使用的MVPP基准测试中，方法在主流指标上持续优于11个强基线，在预测准确性和排序一致性方面均实现稳健提升

Conclusion: 提出的统一框架通过时空扩展解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了对极长视频序列的精确感知和可扩展记忆库的无限制扩展，显著提升了微视频流行度预测性能

Abstract: Micro-video popularity prediction (MVPP) aims to forecast the future popularity of videos on online media, which is essential for applications such as content recommendation and traffic allocation. In real-world scenarios, it is critical for MVPP approaches to understand both the temporal dynamics of a given video (temporal) and its historical relevance to other videos (spatial). However, existing approaches sufer from limitations in both dimensions: temporally, they rely on sparse short-range sampling that restricts content perception; spatially, they depend on flat retrieval memory with limited capacity and low efficiency, hindering scalable knowledge utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose a unified framework that achieves joint spatio-temporal enlargement, enabling precise perception of extremely long video sequences while supporting a scalable memory bank that can infinitely expand to incorporate all relevant historical videos. Technically, we employ a Temporal Enlargement driven by a frame scoring module that extracts highlight cues from video frames through two complementary pathways: sparse sampling and dense perception. Their outputs are adaptively fused to enable robust long-sequence content understanding. For Spatial Enlargement, we construct a Topology-Aware Memory Bank that hierarchically clusters historically relevant content based on topological relationships. Instead of directly expanding memory capacity, we update the encoder features of the corresponding clusters when incorporating new videos, enabling unbounded historical association without unbounded storage growth. Extensive experiments on three widely used MVPP benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms 11 strong baselines across mainstream metrics, achieving robust improvements in both prediction accuracy and ranking consistency.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [475] [ChipCraftBrain: Validation-First RTL Generation via Multi-Agent Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19856)
*Cagri Eryilmaz*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: ChipCraftBrain：结合符号-神经推理与自适应多智能体编排的RTL生成框架，在VerilogEval-Human上达到97.2%通过率，在工业基准CVDP上达到94.7%通过率，显著优于单次生成方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成RTL代码的方法存在三个主要问题：单次生成功能正确率仅60-65%；多智能体方法如MAGE虽在VerilogEval上达到95.9%但未在更难的工业基准上测试；缺乏综合意识且API成本高。需要开发更强大、高效且能处理复杂工业设计的RTL生成系统。

Method: 提出ChipCraftBrain框架，包含四个创新：1) 通过PPO策略在168维状态空间上自适应编排六个专业智能体；2) 混合符号-神经架构，算法化解决K-map和真值表问题，专业智能体处理波形时序和通用RTL；3) 基于321模式库和971个开源参考实现的知识增强生成，采用焦点感知检索；4) 层次化规范分解为依赖有序子模块并进行接口同步。

Result: 在VerilogEval-Human上达到97.2%平均pass@1（范围96.15-98.72%，最佳154/156），与ChipAgents相当，优于MAGE。在CVDP的302问题非智能体子集上达到94.7%平均pass@1（286/302），相比单次基线每类提升36-60个百分点；在NVIDIA ACE-RTL共享的四类中三类领先，且每次尝试次数减少约30倍。RISC-V SoC案例研究成功生成8/8通过lint检查的模块（689行代码）并在FPGA上验证，而单体生成完全失败。

Conclusion: ChipCraftBrain通过结合符号-神经推理与自适应多智能体编排，显著提升了RTL生成的准确性和可扩展性，在标准基准和工业基准上都取得了优异表现，能够处理复杂的层次化设计，为自动化硬件设计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for generating Register-Transfer Level (RTL) code from natural language specifications, but single-shot generation achieves only 60-65% functional correctness on standard benchmarks. Multi-agent approaches such as MAGE reach 95.9% on VerilogEval yet remain untested on harder industrial benchmarks such as NVIDIA's CVDP, lack synthesis awareness, and incur high API costs.
  We present ChipCraftBrain, a framework combining symbolic-neural reasoning with adaptive multi-agent orchestration for automated RTL generation. Four innovations drive the system: (1) adaptive orchestration over six specialized agents via a PPO policy over a 168-dim state (an alternative world-model MPC planner is also evaluated); (2) a hybrid symbolic-neural architecture that solves K-map and truth-table problems algorithmically while specialized agents handle waveform timing and general RTL; (3) knowledge-augmented generation from a 321-pattern base plus 971 open-source reference implementations with focus-aware retrieval; and (4) hierarchical specification decomposition into dependency-ordered sub-modules with interface synchronization.
  On VerilogEval-Human, ChipCraftBrain achieves 97.2% mean pass@1 (range 96.15-98.72% across 7 runs, best 154/156), on par with ChipAgents (97.4%, self-reported) and ahead of MAGE (95.9%). On a 302-problem non-agentic subset of CVDP spanning five task categories, we reach 94.7% mean pass@1 (286/302, averaged over 3 runs), a 36-60 percentage-point lift per category over the published single-shot baseline; we additionally lead three of four categories shared with NVIDIA's ACE-RTL despite using roughly 30x fewer per-problem attempts. A RISC-V SoC case study demonstrates hierarchical decomposition generating 8/8 lint-passing modules (689 LOC) validated on FPGA, where monolithic generation fails entirely.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [476] [Optimal Exploration of New Products under Assortment Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18800)
*Jackie Baek,Atanas Dinev,Thodoris Lykouris*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文研究平台在容量约束下对新产品的在线学习与分类决策优化问题。通过社会学习机制（用户购买后评价揭示质量），平台需在探索（上架新产品以获取评价）与利用（推荐成熟高收益产品）间权衡。主要发现：(1) 最优策略是将新产品与头部成熟产品搭配而非单独上架；(2) 同时探索的新产品数量存在阈值结构，随产品潜力递增但与购买概率无关；(3) UCB过度探索而Thompson采样探索不足，两种经典算法均不适用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平台在推出新产品时面临质量未知的挑战，需要通过社会学习（用户评价）来获取质量信息。然而，学习需要将新产品纳入分类（探索），这会牺牲短期收益，因为新产品的需求低于成熟产品。因此，如何设计最优分类策略来平衡探索与利用，以最小化累积遗憾，是本文的核心动机。

Method: 采用在线学习与多臂老虎机框架，对容量约束下的分类决策问题进行建模。通过理论分析刻画最优探索策略的结构性质，包括：新产品与成熟产品的搭配方式、多新产品同时探索的最优数量阈值，并对比UCB和Thompson Sampling两种经典算法在该场景下的表现。

Result: (1) 将新产品与头部成熟产品搭配上架总是最优的，尽管这降低了新产品的购买概率；(2) 同时探索的新产品最优数量存在简单阈值结构，该阈值随新产品"潜力"递增，但与个体购买概率无关；(3) UCB过度探索，Thompson采样探索不足，两者均无法达到最优。

Conclusion: 研究为平台如何通过分类决策来学习新产品提供了结构性洞见，揭示了经典探索算法在该场景下的局限性，并给出了可操作的最优分类策略设计原则。

Abstract: We study online learning for new products on a platform that makes capacity-constrained assortment decisions on which products to offer. For a newly listed product, its quality is initially unknown, and quality information propagates through social learning: when a customer purchases a new product and leaves a review, its quality is revealed to both the platform and future customers. Since reviews require purchases, the platform must feature new products in the assortment ("explore") to generate reviews to learn about new products. Such exploration is costly because customer demand for new products is lower than for incumbent products. We characterize the optimal assortments for exploration to minimize regret, addressing two questions. (1) Should the platform offer a new product alone or alongside incumbent products? The former maximizes the purchase probability of the new product but yields lower short-term revenue. Despite the lower purchase probability, we show it is always optimal to pair the new product with the top incumbent products. (2) With multiple new products, should the platform explore them simultaneously or one at a time? We show that the optimal number of new products to explore simultaneously has a simple threshold structure: it increases with the "potential" of the new products and, surprisingly, does not depend on their individual purchase probabilities. We also show that two canonical bandit algorithms, UCB and Thompson Sampling, both fail in this setting for opposite reasons: UCB over-explores while Thompson Sampling under-explores. Our results provide structural insights on how platforms should learn about new products through assortment decisions.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [477] [Coverage, Not Averages: Semantic Stratification for Trustworthy Retrieval Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20763)
*Andrew Klearman,Radu Revutchi,Rohin Garg,Rishav Chakravarti,Samuel Marc Denton,Yuan Xue*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出语义分层评估框架，将检索评估形式化为统计估计问题，通过基于实体的文档聚类和系统化查询生成，提供形式化的语义覆盖保证和可解释的检索失败模式分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前检索增强生成（RAG）系统中，检索质量是准确性和鲁棒性的主要瓶颈。现有评估方法依赖启发式构建的查询集，存在隐藏的内在偏差，无法提供可靠的评估结果。

Method: 1. 将检索评估形式化为统计估计问题；2. 引入语义分层方法，将文档组织到基于实体的可解释全局空间中形成聚类；3. 系统地为缺失的语义层生成查询；4. 提供形式化的语义覆盖保证。

Result: 实验验证显示：1. 暴露了系统性的覆盖差距；2. 识别了解释检索性能差异的结构性信号；3. 分层评估比聚合指标提供更稳定、透明的评估结果；4. 支持更可信的决策制定。

Conclusion: 语义分层评估框架通过将评估建立在语料库结构基础上，提供了形式化的覆盖保证和可解释的失败模式分析，解决了传统启发式评估方法的内在偏差问题，为检索系统评估提供了更可靠、透明的方法。

Abstract: Retrieval quality is the primary bottleneck for accuracy and robustness in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Current evaluation relies on heuristically constructed query sets, which introduce a hidden intrinsic bias. We formalize retrieval evaluation as a statistical estimation problem, showing that metric reliability is fundamentally limited by the evaluation-set construction. We further introduce \emph{semantic stratification}, which grounds evaluation in corpus structure by organizing documents into an interpretable global space of entity-based clusters and systematically generating queries for missing strata. This yields (1) formal semantic coverage guarantees across retrieval regimes and (2) interpretable visibility into retrieval failure modes.
  Experiments across multiple benchmarks and retrieval methods validate our framework. The results expose systematic coverage gaps, identify structural signals that explain variance in retrieval performance, and show that stratified evaluation yields more stable and transparent assessments while supporting more trustworthy decision-making than aggregate metrics.

</details>


### [478] [From Top-1 to Top-K: A Reproducibility Study and Benchmarking of Counterfactual Explanations for Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19663)
*Quang-Huy Nguyen,Thanh-Hai Nguyen,Khac-Manh Thai,Duc-Hoang Pham,Huy-Son Nguyen,Cam-Van Thi Nguyen,Masoud Mansoury,Duc-Trong Le,Hoang-Quynh Le*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该论文系统性地复现、重新实现并重新评估了11种最先进的推荐系统反事实解释方法，提出了统一的基准测试框架，并在三个真实世界数据集和六个推荐模型上进行了广泛实验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统反事实解释方法在异构协议下进行评估，使用不同的数据集、推荐器、指标甚至解释格式，这阻碍了可重复性和公平比较。需要系统性的基准测试来评估这些方法的实际性能。

Method: 提出了统一的基准测试框架，从三个维度评估解释器：解释格式（隐式vs显式）、评估级别（项目级vs列表级）和扰动范围（用户交互向量vs用户-项目交互图）。评估协议包括有效性、稀疏性和计算复杂度指标，并将现有项目级评估扩展到top-K列表级解释。

Result: 实验发现：1）有效性和稀疏性之间的权衡强烈依赖于具体方法和评估设置，特别是在显式格式下；2）解释器性能在项目级和列表级评估中基本保持一致；3）几种基于图的解释器在大型推荐图上表现出显著的可扩展性限制。

Conclusion: 研究结果修正并挑战了先前关于推荐系统中反事实解释生成方法的鲁棒性和实用性的结论，为未来研究提供了更可靠的基准。

Abstract: Counterfactual explanations (CEs) provide an intuitive way to understand recommender systems by identifying minimal modifications to user-item interactions that alter recommendation outcomes. Existing CE methods for recommender systems, however, have been evaluated under heterogeneous protocols, using different datasets, recommenders, metrics, and even explanation formats, which hampers reproducibility and fair comparison. Our paper systematically reproduces, re-implement, and re-evaluate eleven state-of-the-art CE methods for recommender systems, covering both native explainers (e.g., LIME-RS, SHAP, PRINCE, ACCENT, LXR, GREASE) and specific graph-based explainers originally proposed for GNNs. Here, a unified benchmarking framework is proposed to assess explainers along three dimensions: explanation format (implicit vs. explicit), evaluation level (item-level vs. list-level), and perturbation scope (user interaction vectors vs. user-item interaction graphs). Our evaluation protocol includes effectiveness, sparsity, and computational complexity metrics, and extends existing item-level assessments to top-K list-level explanations. Through extensive experiments on three real-world datasets and six representative recommender models, we analyze how well previously reported strengths of CE methods generalize across diverse setups. We observe that the trade-off between effectiveness and sparsity depends strongly on the specific method and evaluation setting, particularly under the explicit format; in addition, explainer performance remains largely consistent across item level and list level evaluations, and several graph-based explainers exhibit notable scalability limitations on large recommender graphs. Our results refine and challenge earlier conclusions about the robustness and practicality of CE generation methods in recommender systems: https://github.com/L2R-UET/CFExpRec.

</details>


### [479] [CAST: Modeling Semantic-Level Transitions for Complementary-Aware Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19414)
*Qian Zhang,Lech Szymanski,Haibo Zhang,Jeremiah D. Deng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CAST框架通过语义级转移建模和LLM验证的互补先验注入，有效识别序列推荐中的真实互补关系，超越基于稀疏共现统计的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列推荐模型依赖稀疏共购统计，常将虚假相关性（如流行度偏差）误认为真实互补关系。基于语义的方法虽使用离散语义码，但聚合过程模糊了识别互补性所需的具体语义细节。

Method: 提出互补感知语义转移（CAST）框架：1）语义级转移模块直接在离散语义码空间建模动态转移，捕捉聚合表示中丢失的细粒度语义依赖；2）互补先验注入模块将LLM验证的互补先验整合到注意力机制中，优先考虑互补模式而非共现统计。

Result: 在多个电商数据集上，CAST持续超越最先进方法，Recall提升达17.6%，NDCG提升达16.0%，训练加速65倍，验证了其在超越统计方法挖掘潜在项目互补性方面的有效性和效率。

Conclusion: CAST通过语义级转移建模和LLM验证的互补先验注入，成功解决了序列推荐中识别真实互补关系的挑战，提供了一种超越传统共现统计的有效框架。

Abstract: Sequential Recommendation (SR) aims to predict the next interaction of a user based on their behavior sequence, where complementary relations often provide essential signals for predicting the next item. However, mainstream models relying on sparse co-purchase statistics often mistake spurious correlations (e.g., due to popularity bias) for true complementary relations. Identifying true complementary relations requires capturing the fine-grained item semantics (e.g., specifications) that simple cooccurrence statistics would be unable to model. While recent semantics-based methods utilize discrete semantic codes to represent items, they typically aggregate semantic codes into coarse item representations. This aggregation process blurs specific semantic details required to identify complementarity. To address these critical limitations and effectively leverage semantics for capturing reliable complementary relations, we propose a Complementary-Aware Semantic Transition (CAST) framework that introduces a new modeling paradigm built upon semantic-level transitions. Specifically, a semantic-level transition module is designed to model dynamic transitions directly in the discrete semantic code space, effectively capturing fine-grained semantic dependencies often lost in aggregated item representations. Then, a complementary prior injection module is designed to incorporate LLM-verified complementary priors into the attention mechanism, thereby prioritizing complementary patterns over co-occurrence statistics. Experiments on multiple e-commerce datasets demonstrate that CAST consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches, achieving up to 17.6% Recall and 16.0% NDCG gains with 65x training acceleration. This validates its effectiveness and efficiency in uncovering latent item complementarity beyond statistics. The code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [480] [Think Before Writing: Feature-Level Multi-Objective Optimization for Generative Citation Visibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19113)
*Zikang Liu,Peilan Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出FeatGEO，一种特征级多目标优化框架，通过抽象网页的结构、内容和语言特征来优化生成式引擎中的引用可见性，而非传统的词级文本改写。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式答案引擎通过选择性引用而非排序检索来决定内容可见性，现有GEO方法依赖词级文本改写，可解释性差且难以平衡引用可见性与内容质量。

Method: 将网页抽象为可解释的结构、内容和语言特征，在特征空间优化，再用语言模型将特征配置实现为自然语言，实现高层优化与表层生成的解耦。

Result: 在GEO-Bench上三个生成引擎的实验表明，FeatGEO一致提升引用可见性，同时维持或提升内容质量，显著优于词级基线方法。

Conclusion: 引用行为受文档级内容属性影响大于孤立词级编辑，且学到的特征配置可跨不同规模的语言模型泛化。

Abstract: Generative answer engines expose content through selective citation rather than ranked retrieval, fundamentally altering how visibility is determined. This shift calls for new optimization methods beyond traditional search engine optimization. Existing generative engine optimization (GEO) approaches primarily rely on token-level text rewriting, offering limited interpretability and weak control over the trade-off between citation visibility and content quality. We propose FeatGEO, a feature-level, multi-objective optimization framework that abstracts webpages into interpretable structural, content, and linguistic properties. Instead of directly editing text, FeatGEO optimizes over this feature space and uses a language model to realize feature configurations into natural language, decoupling high-level optimization from surface-level generation. Experiments on GEO-Bench across three generative engines demonstrate that FeatGEO consistently improves citation visibility while maintaining or improving content quality, substantially outperforming token-level baselines. Further analyses show that citation behavior is more strongly influenced by document-level content properties than by isolated lexical edits, and that the learned feature configurations generalize across language models of different scales.

</details>


<div id='hep-ex'></div>

Leonard DeHolton,A. Leszczyńska,C. Li,J. Liao,C. Lin,Q. R. Liu,Y. T. Liu,M. Liubarska,C. Love,L. Lu,F. Lucarelli,W. Luszczak,Y. Lyu,M. Macdonald,E. Magnus,Y. Makino,E. Manao,S. Mancina,A. Mand,I. C. Rhode,L. Ricca,B. Riedel,A. Rifaie,E. J. Roberts,S. Rodan,M. Rongen,A. Rosted,C. Rott,T. Ruhe,L. Ruohan,D. Ryckbosch,J. Saffer,D. Salazar-Gallegos,P. Sampathkumar,A. Sandrock,G. Sanger-Johnson,M. Santander,S. Sarkar,M. Scarnera,M. Schaufel,H. Schieler,S. Schindler,L. Schlickmann,B. Schlüter,F. Schlüter,N. Schmeisser,T. Schmidt,A. Scholz,F. G. Schröder,S. Schwirn,S. Sclafani,D. Seckel,L. Seen,M. Seikh,S. Seunarine,P. A. Sevle Myhr,R. Shah,S. Shah,S. Shefali,N. Shimizu,B. Skrzypek,R. Snihur,J. Soedingrekso,D. Soldin,P. Soldin,G. Sommani,C. Spannfellner,G. M. Spiczak,C. Spiering,J. Stachurska,M. Stamatikos,T. Stanev,T. Stezelberger,T. Stürwald,T. Stuttard,G. W. Sullivan,I. Taboada,S. Ter-Antonyan,A. Terliuk,A. Thakuri,M. Thiesmeyer,W. G. Thompson,J. Thwaites,S. Tilav,K. Tollefson,J. A. Torres,S. Toscano,D. Tosi,K. Upshaw,A. Vaidyanathan,N. Valtonen-Mattila,J. Valverde,J. Vandenbroucke,T. Van Eeden,N. van Eijndhoven,L. Van Rootselaar,J. van Santen,J. Vara,F. Varsi,M. Venugopal,M. Vereecken,S. Vergara Carrasco,S. Verpoest,D. Veske,A. Vijai,J. Villarreal,C. Walck,A. Wang,E. H. S. Warrick,C. Weaver,P. Weigel,A. Weindl,J. Weldert,A. Y. Wen,C. Wendt,J. Werthebach,M. Weyrauch,N. Whitehorn,C. H. Wiebusch,D. R. Williams,L. Witthaus,G. Wrede,X. W. Xu,J. P. Yanez,Y. Yao,E. Yildizci,S. Yoshida,R. Young,F. Yu,S. Yu,T. Yuan,S. Yun-Cárcamo,A. Zander Jurowitzki,A. Zegarelli,S. Zhang,Z. Zhang,P. Zhelnin,P. Zilberman*

Main category: hep-ex

TL;DR: 使用Transformer编码器和球面归一化流进行IceCube中微子方向重建，在轨迹和簇射事件上均实现了新的最佳角分辨率，计算速度显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IceCube作为立方公里级中微子探测器，精确的方向重建对于关联天文源至关重要。传统基于B样条的似然重建方法计算耗时，需要开发更快速且精确的机器学习方法。

Method: 提出基于Transformer编码器的神经后验估计方法，将中微子方向映射到球面归一化流分布。采用C²光滑有理二次样条、尺度变换和旋转定义新颖的球面归一化流分布，其参数由Transformer编码器整体预测。改进了Transformer架构，包括双残差流、非线性QKV投影和具有独立交叉注意力处理的类别标记。

Result: 在100 GeV到100 PeV能量范围内，簇射和轨迹事件的角分辨率均有显著提升。在100 TeV沉积能量下，通过轨迹的角分辨率提升1.3倍，簇射提升1.7倍，起始轨迹提升2.5倍。全天空扫描从数小时缩短到数秒，计算时间恒定，不受后验范围影响。

Conclusion: 该方法首次在100 GeV以上能量范围内，机器学习方法超越了基于似然的μ子重建性能，为IceCube中微子天文学提供了快速且精确的方向重建工具。

Abstract: IceCube is a cubic-kilometer-scale neutrino detector located at the geographic South Pole. A precise directional reconstruction of IceCube neutrinos is vital for associations with astronomical objects. In this context, we discuss neural posterior estimation of the neutrino direction via a transformer encoder that maps to a normalizing flow on the 2-sphere.
