It achieves a new state-of-the-art angular resolution for the two main event morphologies in IceCube - tracks and showers - while being significantly faster than traditional B-spline-based likelihood reconstructions. All-sky scans can be performed within seconds rather than hours, and take constant computation time, regardless of whether the posterior extent is arc-minutes or spans the whole sky. We utilize a combination of $C^2$-smooth rational-quadratic splines, scale transformations and rotations to define a novel spherical normalizing-flow distribution whose parameters are predicted as a whole as the output of the transformer encoder. We test several structural choices diverting from the vanilla transformer architecture. In particular, we find dual residual streams, nonlinear QKV projection and a separate class token with its own cross-attention processing to boost test-time performance. The angular resolution for both showers and tracks improves substantially over the whole trained energy range from 100 GeV to 100 PeV. At 100 TeV deposited energy, for example, the median angular resolution improves by a factor of $1.3$ for throughgoing tracks, by a factor of $1.7$ for showers and by a factor of $2.5$ for starting tracks compared to state-of-the art likelihood reconstructions based on B-splines. While previous machine-learning (ML) efforts have managed to obtain competitive shower resolutions, this is the first time an ML-based method outperforms likelihood-based muon reconstructions above 100 GeV.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [482] [Heterogeneous Layered Structures Can Modulate Human Softness Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20092)
*Yuno Higuchi,Yosuke Iwashita,Yuji Ohgi,Masashi Nakatani*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了分层异质性如何调节触觉柔软度感知，发现最外层对感知柔软度影响最大，且软质次表层数量增加会提升感知柔软度，但这种贡献随深度递减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉柔软度感知研究主要集中于机械均匀物体，而现实世界中许多物体具有非均匀刚度的异质分层结构。本研究旨在探索分层异质性如何调节触觉柔软度感知。

Method: 通过3D打印制造16个晶格结构刺激物，系统改变上四层刚度，保持底部两层固定。22名参与者完成心理物理任务评估柔软度，并进行压缩测试量化机械特性。使用线性混合效应分析数据。

Result: 感知柔软度显著受载荷下位移预测，但感知排序与物理排序不完全一致。最外层对感知柔软度影响最大；软质次表层数量增加会提升感知柔软度，但贡献随深度递减。第2、3层有显著效应，第4层无显著效应。

Conclusion: 触觉柔软度感知不仅取决于整体刚度，还依赖于分层结构内顺应性的深度依赖性分布。最外层和浅层次表层在柔软度感知中起关键作用。

Abstract: Human softness perception in haptics has mainly been studied using mechanically homogeneous objects, despite the fact that many real-world objects exhibit heterogeneous layered structures with nonuniform stiffness. This study examined how layered heterogeneity modulates haptic softness perception. Sixteen lattice-structured stimuli were fabricated by 3D printing, with the stiffness of the upper four layers systematically varied while the bottom two layers remained fixed. Twenty-two participants evaluated the softness of the stimuli in a psychophysical task, and compression tests were conducted to quantify their mechanical properties. Perceived softness was significantly predicted by displacement under load, however, perceptual ranking did not fully coincide with the physical ranking. Linear mixed-effects analyses showed that the softness of the outermost layer had the greatest impact on the perceived softness. Perceived softness also increased as the number of soft subsurface layers increased, although this contribution decreased with depth. Layers 2 and 3 showed significant effects, whereas Layer 4 did not. These findings suggest that haptic softness perception depends not only on the overall stiffness but also on the depth-dependent distribution of compliance within layered structures.

</details>


### [483] [Vibrotactile Preference Learning: Uncertainty-Aware Preference Learning for Personalized Vibration Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20210)
*Rongtao Zhang,Xin Zhu,Masoume Pourebadi Khotbehsara,Warren Dao,Erdem Bıyık,Heather Culbertson*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: VPL系统通过高斯过程不确定性感知偏好学习，利用40轮成对比较和用户报告的不确定性，高效学习个体化振动触觉偏好


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 振动触觉反馈在交互系统中日益普及，个体感知差异凸显了个性化的重要性，需要开发能够高效学习用户特定偏好的系统

Method: 提出振动触觉偏好学习系统，基于高斯过程的不确定性感知偏好学习，采用期望信息增益获取策略指导40轮成对比较查询选择，结合用户报告的不确定性，高效探索参数空间

Result: 在13名用户研究中，使用微软Xbox控制器振动反馈验证了VPL能高效学习个体化偏好，同时保持舒适、低工作负荷的用户交互

Conclusion: VPL展示了振动触觉体验可扩展个性化的潜力，为交互系统中的个性化触觉反馈提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Individual differences in vibrotactile perception underscore the growing importance of personalization as haptic feedback becomes more prevalent in interactive systems. We propose Vibrotactile Preference Learning (VPL), a system that captures user-specific preference spaces over vibrotactile parameters via Gaussian-process-based uncertainty-aware preference learning. VPL uses an expected information gain-based acquisition strategy to guide query selection over 40 rounds of pairwise comparisons of overall user preference, augmented with user-reported uncertainty, enabling efficient exploration of the parameter space. We evaluate VPL in a user study (N = 13) using the vibrotactile feedback from a Microsoft Xbox controller, showing that it efficiently learns individualized preferences while maintaining comfortable, low-workload user interactions. These results highlight the potential of VPL for scalable personalization of vibrotactile experiences.

</details>


### [484] [Continuous Focus Groups: A Longitudinal Method for Clinical HRI in Autism Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18197)
*Ghiglino Davide,Foglino Caterina,Wykowska Agnieszka*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出连续焦点小组方法，用于在自闭症儿童机器人辅助治疗中持续收集专业人员的定性反馈，解决传统定性方法无法捕捉观点随时间演变的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统定性方法在HRI研究中通常是静态或一次性的，无法捕捉利益相关者观点随时间演变的过程。在临床环境中，家庭和患者负担重，难以参与重复研究，需要一种能够持续对话的方法。

Method: 引入连续焦点小组方法，在机器人辅助治疗协议的不同阶段组织三个焦点小组，让参与者随着干预进展重新审视和细化早期观点，实现纵向和共同能动的研究设计。

Result: 连续性培养了信任，支持将隐性临床专业知识整合到设计决策中，并作为伦理保障机制，允许参与者重新协商参与度并提出新关切。该方法成功连接了家庭、儿童和临床医生的治疗迭代与研究人员和开发者的研究设计迭代。

Conclusion: 连续焦点小组提供了一种在实践上可行、在设计上严谨的方法论贡献，为HRI定性研究提供了可转移框架，特别适用于用户直接参与有限且连续性至关重要的敏感领域。

Abstract: Qualitative methods are important to use alongside quantitative methods to improve Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), yet they are often applied in static or one-off formats that cannot capture how stakeholder perspectives evolve over time. This limitation is especially evident in clinical contexts, where families and patients face heavy burdens and cannot easily participate in repeated research encounters. To address this gap, we introduce continuous focus groups, a longitudinal and co-agential method designed to sustain dialogue with assistive care professionals working with children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Three focus groups were organized across successive phases of a robot-assisted therapeutic protocol, enabling participants to revisit and refine earlier views as the intervention progressed. Results show that continuity fostered trust, supported the integration of tacit clinical expertise into design decisions, and functioned as an ethical safeguard by allowing participants to renegotiate involvement and surface new concerns. By bridging the therapeutic iteration of families, children, and clinicians with the research-design iteration of researchers and developers, continuous focus groups provide a methodological contribution that is both feasible in practice and rigorous in design. Beyond autism care, this approach offers a transferable framework for advancing qualitative research in HRI, particularly in sensitive domains where direct user participation is limited and continuity is essential.

</details>


### [485] [Co-Refine: AI-Powered Tool Supporting Qualitative Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19309)
*Athikash Jeyaganthan,Kai Xu,Franziska Becker,Steffen Koch*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: Co-Refine是一个AI增强的质性编码平台，通过三阶段审计管道实时检测编码漂移，确保编码一致性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质性编码中，研究人员在大型数据集上应用代码时，代码解释经常随时间漂移（时间漂移），这会降低分析的可信度。现有的计算机辅助质性数据分析工具提供数据管理支持，但没有实时检测这些漂移的工作流程

Method: Co-Refine采用三阶段审计管道：第一阶段计算基于确定性嵌入的数学一致性指标；第二阶段将LLM判断约束在确定性分数±0.15范围内；第三阶段从先前模式生成代码定义，创建深度反馈循环

Result: Co-Refine证明确定性评分可以有效地约束LLM输出，为质性分析产生可靠的实时审计信号

Conclusion: 该平台能够在不断扰研究人员工作流程的情况下，提供基于编码一致性的持续、有根据的反馈，解决了质性编码中的时间漂移问题

Abstract: Qualitative coding relies on a researcher's application of codes to textual data. As coding proceeds across large datasets, interpretations of codes often shift (temporal drift), reducing the credibility of the analysis. Existing Computer-Assisted Qualitative Data Analysis (CAQDAS) tools provide support for data management but offer no workflow for real-time detection of these drifts. We present Co-Refine, an AI-augmented qualitative coding platform that delivers continuous, grounded feedback on coding consistency without disrupting the researcher's workflow. The system employs a three-stage audit pipeline: Stage 1 computes deterministic embedding-based metrics for mathematical consistency; Stage 2 grounds LLM verdicts within $\pm0.15$ of the deterministic scores; and Stage 3 produces code definitions from previous patterns to create a deepening feedback loop. Co-Refine demonstrates that deterministic scoring can effectively constrain LLM outputs to produce reliable, real-time audit signals for qualitative analysis.

</details>


### [486] [Beyond Semantic Similarity: A Component-Wise Evaluation Framework for Medical Question Answering Systems with Health Equity Implications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19281)
*Abu Noman Md Sakib,Md. Main Oddin Chisty,Zijie Zhang*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出VB-Score评估框架，用于评估医疗问答LLM在实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性四个维度的表现，发现当前模型存在严重的条件性算法歧视问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估医疗问答LLM的方法主要关注语义匹配，无法真实反映模型的医学准确性或健康公平性风险，需要更全面的评估框架来识别模型在医疗领域的潜在偏见和性能缺陷。

Method: 提出VB-Score（Verification-Based Score）评估框架，包含实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性四个独立评估组件。对三个知名LLM在48个公共卫生主题上进行严格评估，数据来源于高质量权威信息源。

Result: 发现模型语义准确性和实体准确性之间存在显著差异；所有三个模型在评估标准下都表现出几乎一致的严重性能缺陷；在涉及老年和少数群体的慢性病相关公共卫生主题上，模型性能平均降低13.8%，存在条件性算法歧视；提示工程无法弥补模型在提取医学实体方面的基本架构限制。

Conclusion: 仅依赖语义评估不足以衡量医疗AI的安全性，需要更全面的评估框架如VB-Score来识别和解决医疗LLM中的算法歧视问题，特别是在涉及弱势群体的医疗主题上。

Abstract: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to support patients in addressing medical questions is becoming increasingly prevalent. However, most of the measures currently used to evaluate the performance of these models in this context only measure how closely a model's answers match semantically, and therefore do not provide a true indication of the model's medical accuracy or of the health equity risks associated with it. To address these shortcomings, we present a new evaluation framework for medical question answering called VB-Score (Verification-Based Score) that provides a separate evaluation of the four components of entity recognition, semantic similarity, factual consistency, and structured information completeness for medical question-answering models. We perform rigorous reviews of the performance of three well-known and widely used LLMs on 48 public health-related topics taken from high-quality, authoritative information sources. Based on our analyses, we discover a major discrepancy between the models' semantic and entity accuracy. Our assessments of the performance of all three models show that each of them has almost uniformly severe performance failures when evaluated against our criteria. Our findings indicate alarming performance disparities across various public health topics, with most of the models exhibiting 13.8% lower performance (compared to an overall average) for all the public health topics that relate to chronic conditions that occur in older and minority populations, which indicates the existence of what's known as condition-based algorithmic discrimination. Our findings also demonstrate that prompt engineering alone does not compensate for basic architectural limitations on how these models perform in extracting medical entities and raise the question of whether semantic evaluation alone is a sufficient measure of medical AI safety.

</details>


### [487] [Relational AI in Education: Reciprocity, Participatory Design, and Indigenous Worldviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19099)
*Roberto Martinez-Maldonado,Vanessa Echeverria,Jenna Hawes,YJ Kim,Zara Maddigan,Mikaela Milesi,Todd Nelson,Yi-Shan Tsai*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文批判了生成式AI在教育中过度强调效率与自动化而削弱关系性学习的倾向，提出应将教育AI设计视为关系性设计问题，以互惠和关系问责为核心，基于参与式设计实践和原住民世界观，明确AI在教育中的边界与目的，倡导AI支持而非替代人类互动，并提出了扩展AIED设计空间的方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式AI在教育领域的应用日益广泛，但现有研究未能充分阐述如何设计AI以维持学习发生的社会与生态关系。教育本质上是社会性、建构性和关系性的实践，而AI的效率和自动化导向正在弱化这一关系性学习过程。

Method: 采用参与式设计实践，借鉴原住民世界观（包括澳大利亚原住民、美洲原住民和中美洲传统）中互惠与关系问责的理念，将学习者-AI互动重新框架为具有明确目的和边界的上下文特定关系，而非人类互动的替代品。

Result: 提出了三个关键贡献：1) 将AIED概念化为基于互惠的关系性设计问题；2) 阐明了GenAI在教育中引入的关键张力；3) 提出了扩展AIED设计空间的设计方向，包括何时不使用AI、如何定义教学边界，以及如何支持负责任的AIED创新以维系社区和自然环境。

Conclusion: 有意义的AI教育应当支持与他人共同学习而非取代他人，AI设计需要遵循互惠原则，明确关系边界，并在必要时主动选择不使用AI，以维系学习中的社会关系和生态关系。

Abstract: Education is not merely the transmission of information or the optimisation of individual performance; it is a fundamentally social, constructive, and relational practice. However, recent advances in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) increasingly emphasise efficiency, automation, and individualised assistance, risking the weakening of relational learning processes. Despite growing adoption, AI in education (AIED) research has yet to fully articulate how AI can be designed in ways that sustain the social and ecological relationships through which learning occurs. In this paper, we re-centre education as relational and frame learner-AI interactions as context-specific relationships with clearly defined purposes and boundaries, rather than positioning them as substitutes for, or replacements of, human interaction. Grounded in participatory design practices and inspired by Indigenous worldviews (including Aboriginal Australian, Native American, and Mesoamerican traditions) that foreground reciprocity and relational accountability, we argue that meaningful educational AI should support learning with others rather than replace them. We advance this perspective by: i) conceptualising AIED as a relational design problem grounded in reciprocity; ii) articulating key tensions introduced by GenAI in education; and iii) outlining design directions that expand the AIED design space toward reciprocity, including when not to use AI, how to define pedagogical boundaries, and how to support responsible uses of AIED innovations that sustain communities and natural environments.

</details>


### [488] [Choose Your Own Adventure: Non-Linear AI-Assisted Programming with EvoGraph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18883)
*Vassilios Exarhakos,Jinghui Cheng,Jin L. C. Guo*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: EvoGraph是一个IDE插件，通过交互式开发图记录和操作AI辅助编程的分支历史，帮助开发者探索、比较和重用AI生成的代码变更，实验表明其降低了认知负荷并支持安全探索与高效迭代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI编程工具以线性聊天模式为主，偏离了编程的迭代和分支特性，导致开发者在探索替代方案、管理提示序列和追踪变更时遇到困难。

Method: 通过初步研究识别开发者痛点，设计并实现EvoGraph IDE插件，将AI交互和代码变更整合为轻量级交互式开发图，支持自动记录分支历史、比较、合并和回访协作编程状态。

Result: 20名用户的实验表明EvoGraph解决了初步研究中发现的挑战，认知负荷更低，参与者认为图表示支持安全探索、高效迭代和对AI生成变更的反思。

Conclusion: 工作凸显了在AI介导编程环境下，帮助开发者理解并作用于问题解决进展的工具设计机会。

Abstract: Current AI-assisted programming tools are predominantly linear and chat-based, which deviates from the iterative and branching nature of programming itself. Our preliminary study with developers using AI assistants suggested that they often struggle to explore alternatives, manage prompting sequences, and trace changes. Informed by these insights, we created EvoGraph, an IDE plugin that integrates AI interactions and code changes as a lightweight and interactive development graph. EvoGraph automatically records a branching AI-assisted coding history and allows developers to manipulate the graph to compare, merge, and revisit prior collaborative AI programming states. Our user study with 20 participants revealed that EvoGraph addressed developers' challenges identified in our preliminary study while imposing lower cognitive load. Participants also found the graph-based representation supported safe exploration, efficient iteration, and reflection on AI-generated changes. Our work highlights design opportunities for tools to help developers make sense of and act on their problem-solving progress in the emerging AI-mediated programming context.

</details>


### [489] [The Triadic Loop: A Framework for Negotiating Alignment in AI Co-hosted Livestreaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18850)
*Katherine Wang,Nadia Berthouze,Aneesha Singh*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文提出三元循环框架，将AI辅助直播中的对齐重新概念化为主播、AI辅助主持与观众三方之间的双向适应过程，并引入战略失调机制和关系评估指标，以维持参与式媒体环境中的社会连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对齐框架大多假设二元用户-AI关系，但直播平台的多用户、实时互动特性打破了这一假设，需要新的理论框架来理解AI在动态社交环境中的角色。

Method: 基于多方互动、协作AI和关系智能体文献，提出三元循环框架，包含三方子循环（主播↔AI、AI↔观众、主播↔观众），并引入战略失调机制和三个关系评估构念。

Result: 构建了动态多方对齐模型，阐明了跨循环强化机制，为维持社交连贯性的AI辅助主持提供了设计启示。

Conclusion: AI辅助主持在直播中不仅是中介者，更是参与者和社区成员；战略失调可作为社区参与维持机制；多方对齐需要跨循环的持续双向适应。

Abstract: AI systems are increasingly embedded in multi-user social environments, yet most alignment frameworks conceptualize interaction as a dyadic relationship between a single user and an AI system. Livestreaming platforms challenge this assumption: interaction unfolds among streamers and audiences in real time, producing dynamic affective and social feedback loops. In this paper, we introduce the Triadic Loop, a conceptual framework that reconceptualizes alignment in AI co-hosted livestreaming as a temporally reinforced process of bidirectional adaptation among three actors: streamer $\leftrightarrow$ AI co-host, AI co-host $\leftrightarrow$ audience, and streamer $\leftrightarrow$ audience. Unlike instruction-following paradigms, bidirectional alignment requires each actor to continuously reshape the others, meaning misalignment in any sub-loop can destabilize the broader system. Drawing on literature from multi-party interaction, collaborative AI, and relational agents, we articulate how AI co-hosts function not only as mediators but as performative participants and community members shaping collective meaning-making. We further propose "strategic misalignment" as a mechanism for sustaining community engagement and introduce three relational evaluation constructs grounded in established instruments. The framework contributes a model of dynamic multi-party alignment, an account of cross-loop reinforcement, and design implications for AI co-hosts that sustain social coherence in participatory media environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [490] [Secure Rate-Distortion-Perception: A Randomized Distributed Function Computation Approach for Realism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20245)
*Gustaf Åhlgren,Onur Günlü*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文研究了安全率失真感知（RDP）问题，在无噪信道和广播信道中实现强保密性、低失真和高感知质量，证明了随机分箱编码的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在需要保持重建数据感知质量的应用（如神经图像压缩）中，当压缩数据通过公共信道传输时会出现安全风险，因此需要研究在信息泄露可忽略条件下的安全RDP问题。

Method: 研究无噪信道和具有相关噪声分量的广播信道中的安全RDP；推导无噪信道的精确安全RDP区域；为广播信道推导内界并证明对一类更优广播信道的紧性；分析带边信息的场景；通过二进制和高斯示例验证。

Result: 对于无噪信道，精确刻画了安全RDP区域；对于广播信道，推导了内界并证明了对一类更优信道的紧性；证明了在无限公共随机性可用时，分离源信道编码对精确安全RDP区域是最优的；建立了带边信息场景的精确RDP区域。

Conclusion: 随机分箱编码能同时实现强保密性、低失真和高感知质量；公共随机性在安全RDP设置中能显著降低通信速率，这与标准率失真设置不同；研究结果为安全感知质量压缩系统提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Fundamental rate-distortion-perception (RDP) trade-offs arise in applications requiring maintained perceptual quality of reconstructed data, such as neural image compression. When compressed data is transmitted over public communication channels, security risks emerge. We therefore study secure RDP under negligible information leakage over both noiseless channels and broadcast channels, BCs, with correlated noise components. For noiseless channels, the exact secure RDP region is characterized. For BCs, an inner bound is derived and shown to be tight for a class of more-capable BCs. Separate source-channel coding is further shown to be optimal for this exact secure RDP region with unlimited common randomness available. Moreover, when both encoder and decoder have access to side information correlated with the source and the channel is noiseless, the exact RDP region is established. If only the decoder has correlated side information in the noiseless setting, an inner bound is derived along with a special case where the region is exact. Binary and Gaussian examples demonstrate that common randomness can significantly reduce the communication rate in secure RDP settings, unlike in standard rate-distortion settings. Thus, our results illustrate that random binning-based coding achieves strong secrecy, low distortion, and high perceptual quality simultaneously.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.mtrl-sci'></div>

# cond-mat.mtrl-sci [[Back]](#toc)

### [491] [LLM-guided phase diagram construction through high-throughput experimentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20304)
*Ryo Tamura,Haruhiko Morito,Yuna Oikawa,Guillaume Deffrennes,Shoichi Matsuda,Naruki Yoshikawa,Tomoaki Takayama,Taichi Abe,Koji Tsuda,Kei Terayama*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

TL;DR: LLM作为实验规划器指导三元合金相图构建，通过闭环实验验证了其有效性，展示了比传统机器学习更高效的探索能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多组分合金相图构建需要大量实验测量且耗时，研究探索大语言模型能否作为实验规划器指导相图构建，提高实验效率。

Method: 采用通用LLM作为实验规划器，与高通量合成和X射线衍射相识别形成闭环系统；比较两种初始成分选择策略：基于相图数据训练的领域专用LLM(aLLoyM)和纯通用LLM；通过Co-Al-Ge三元系统在900°C下的迭代合成与表征验证。

Result: 两种策略展现互补优势：aLLoyM引导初始测量指向三元图内部复杂区域，最早发现所有三个仅在三元系统中形成的新相；通用LLM采用教科书式方法，在更少循环中识别更多相；模拟基准测试显示LLM比传统机器学习探索更高效。

Conclusion: LLM作为实验规划器在相图构建中具有高潜力，能够有效指导实验设计，提高探索效率，为材料发现提供新方法。

Abstract: Constructing phase diagrams for multicomponent alloys requires extensive experimental measurements and is a time-consuming task. Here we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can guide experimental planning for phase diagram construction. In our framework, a general-purpose LLM serves as the experimental planner, suggesting compositions for measurement at each cycle in a closed loop with high-throughput synthesis and X-ray diffraction phase identification. Using this framework, we experimentally constructed the ternary phase diagram of the Co-Al-Ge system at 900 degree C through iterative synthesis and characterization. We compared two strategies that differ in how the initial compositions are selected: one uses predictions from a domain-specific LLM trained on phase diagram data (aLLoyM), while the other relies solely on the general-purpose LLM. The two strategies exhibited complementary strengths. aLLoyM directed the initial measurements toward compositionally complex regions in the interior of the ternary diagram, enabling the earliest discovery of all three novel phases that form only in the ternary system. In contrast, the general-purpose LLM adopted a textbook-like approach which efficiently identified a larger number of phases in fewer cycles. In addition, a simulated benchmark comparing the LLM against conventional machine learning confirmed that the LLM achieves more efficient exploration. The results demonstrate that LLMs have high potential as experimental planners for phase diagram construction.

</details>


### [492] [Multimodal Transformer for Sample-Aware Prediction of Metal-Organic Framework Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19383)
*Seunghee Han,Jaewoong Lee,Jihan Kim*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

TL;DR: EXIT是一个多模态Transformer模型，结合MOFid和XRD进行样本感知的MOF性能预测，解决了传统方法假设同一框架对应单一性能值的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习模型假设单个MOF框架表示对应单一性能值，但实验MOF中，同一框架可能因结晶度、相纯度、缺陷等样本相关因素而表现出不同性能，需要样本感知的预测方法。

Method: 提出EXIT多模态Transformer，结合MOFid（编码MOF身份）和XRD（提供实验样本状态信息）。先在100万个假设MOF上使用模拟XRD进行预训练学习可迁移表示，然后在实验数据集上微调进行表面积和孔体积预测。

Result: EXIT在包含实验XRD的情况下相比无XRD模型表现出更好的预测性能。注意力分析和样本级案例研究表明，当共享相同MOF身份的样本具有不同XRD图谱时，EXIT会分配不同的预测结果。

Conclusion: EXIT实现了从框架感知到样本感知的MOF性能预测的实际步骤，强调了将实验表征纳入多孔材料信息学的重要性。

Abstract: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) are a major target of machine-learning-based property prediction, yet most models assume that a single framework representation maps to a single property value. This assumption becomes problematic for experimental MOFs, where samples reported as the same framework can exhibit different properties because of differences in crystallinity, phase purity, defects, and other sample-dependent factors. Here we introduce Experimental X-ray Diffraction Integrated Transformer (EXIT), a multimodal transformer for sample-aware prediction of MOF properties that combines MOFid with X-ray diffraction (XRD). In EXIT, MOFid encodes MOF identity, whereas XRD provides complementary information about the experimentally realized sample state. EXIT is pre-trained on one million hypothetical MOFs with simulated XRD to learn transferable representations, leading to improved downstream performance relative to existing approaches. EXIT is fine-tuned on literature-derived experimental datasets for surface area and pore volume prediction. Incorporating experimental XRD improves predictive performance relative to models without experimental XRD, and attention analysis and sample-level case studies further show that EXIT assigns different predictions to samples sharing the same MOF identity when their XRD patterns differ. These results establish a practical step from framework-aware to sample-aware MOF property prediction and highlight the value of incorporating experimental characterization into porous materials informatics.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [493] [SketchFaceGS: Real-Time Sketch-Driven Face Editing and Generation with Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19202)
*Bo Li,Jiahao Kang,Yubo Ma,Feng-Lin Liu,Bin Liu,Fang-Lue Zhang,Lin Gao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: SketchFaceGS：首个基于2D草图实时生成和编辑逼真3D高斯头部模型的框架，通过粗到细架构实现草图到高质量3D头部的转换


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯表示在数字头部建模中表现出色，但缺乏直观交互的创建和编辑方法。2D草图是理想的交互方式，但存在稀疏性、深度模糊和缺乏高频细节等问题，难以在实时约束下推断出密集、几何一致的3D高斯结构

Method: 采用前馈式粗到细架构：1）基于Transformer的UV特征预测模块从输入草图重建粗略但几何一致的UV特征图；2）3D UV特征增强模块用高频逼真细节进行细化；3）编辑时引入UV掩码融合技术和逐层特征融合策略，实现精确的实时自由视角修改

Result: SketchFaceGS在生成保真度和编辑灵活性方面优于现有方法，能够通过单次前向传播从草图生成高质量、可编辑的3D头部模型

Conclusion: SketchFaceGS是首个草图驱动的实时3D高斯头部生成和编辑框架，成功解决了从稀疏2D草图到密集3D表示的转换难题，实现了直观交互和高质量结果

Abstract: 3D Gaussian representations have emerged as a powerful paradigm for digital head modeling, achieving photorealistic quality with real-time rendering. However, intuitive and interactive creation or editing of 3D Gaussian head models remains challenging. Although 2D sketches provide an ideal interaction modality for fast, intuitive conceptual design, they are sparse, depth-ambiguous, and lack high-frequency appearance cues, making it difficult to infer dense, geometrically consistent 3D Gaussian structures from strokes - especially under real-time constraints. To address these challenges, we propose SketchFaceGS, the first sketch-driven framework for real-time generation and editing of photorealistic 3D Gaussian head models from 2D sketches. Our method uses a feed-forward, coarse-to-fine architecture. A Transformer-based UV feature-prediction module first reconstructs a coarse but geometrically consistent UV feature map from the input sketch, and then a 3D UV feature enhancement module refines it with high-frequency, photorealistic detail to produce a high-fidelity 3D head. For editing, we introduce a UV Mask Fusion technique combined with a layer-by-layer feature-fusion strategy, enabling precise, real-time, free-viewpoint modifications. Extensive experiments show that SketchFaceGS outperforms existing methods in both generation fidelity and editing flexibility, producing high-quality, editable 3D heads from sketches in a single forward pass.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [494] [AVISE: Framework for Evaluating the Security of AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20833)
*Mikko Lempinen,Joni Kemppainen,Niklas Raesalmi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: AVISE是一个用于识别AI系统漏洞和评估安全性的模块化开源框架，通过增强Red Queen攻击和开发自动化安全评估测试来发现语言模型的越狱漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统在关键领域的部署增加，其安全漏洞带来了日益增长的风险，但目前缺乏系统性的AI安全评估方法。

Method: 开发AVISE框架，将基于心理理论的多轮Red Queen攻击扩展为对抗性语言模型增强攻击，并创建包含25个测试用例和评估语言模型的自动化安全评估测试。

Result: 安全评估测试达到92%准确率、0.91的F1分数和0.83的马修斯相关系数。对9个不同规模的语言模型评估发现，所有模型在不同程度上都容易受到增强Red Queen攻击。

Conclusion: AVISE为研究人员和行业从业者提供了开发和部署自动化安全评估测试的可扩展基础，是迈向更严格和可复现AI安全评估的具体步骤。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across critical domains, their security vulnerabilities pose growing risks of high-profile exploits and consequential system failures. Yet systematic approaches to evaluating AI security remain underdeveloped. In this paper, we introduce AVISE (AI Vulnerability Identification and Security Evaluation), a modular open-source framework for identifying vulnerabilities in and evaluating the security of AI systems and models. As a demonstration of the framework, we extend the theory-of-mind-based multi-turn Red Queen attack into an Adversarial Language Model (ALM) augmented attack and develop an automated Security Evaluation Test (SET) for discovering jailbreak vulnerabilities in language models. The SET comprises 25 test cases and an Evaluation Language Model (ELM) that determines whether each test case was able to jailbreak the target model, achieving 92% accuracy, an F1-score of 0.91, and a Matthews correlation coefficient of 0.83. We evaluate nine recently released language models of diverse sizes with the SET and find that all are vulnerable to the augmented Red Queen attack to varying degrees. AVISE provides researchers and industry practitioners with an extensible foundation for developing and deploying automated SETs, offering a concrete step toward more rigorous and reproducible AI security evaluation.

</details>


### [495] [Auto-ART: Structured Literature Synthesis and Automated Adversarial Robustness Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20704)
*Abhijit Talluri*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文提出了对抗鲁棒性评估领域的结构化综合分析和Auto-ART框架，通过系统分析现有文献和开发开源工具解决领域碎片化和梯度掩蔽问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对抗鲁棒性评估是可信机器学习部署的基础，但当前领域存在协议碎片化和梯度掩蔽检测不足的问题，缺乏系统性的元科学分析和可执行的评估框架。

Method: 采用结构化综合方法分析9个同行评审语料源（2020-2026），通过7种互补协议进行端到端分析；开发Auto-ART开源框架，包含50+攻击方法、28个防御模块、鲁棒性诊断指数（RDI）和梯度掩蔽检测，支持多范数评估和合规性映射。

Result: Auto-ART的预筛选在92%的标记案例中成功识别梯度掩蔽；RDI排名与完整AutoAttack高度相关；多范数评估显示最先进模型的平均鲁棒性与最坏情况鲁棒性之间存在23.5个百分点的差距。

Conclusion: 该研究首次将结构化元科学分析与可执行评估框架相结合，填补了文献空白与工程实践之间的鸿沟，为对抗鲁棒性评估提供了系统化的解决方案和标准化工具。

Abstract: Adversarial robustness evaluation underpins every claim of trustworthy ML deployment, yet the field suffers from fragmented protocols and undetected gradient masking. We make two contributions. (1) Structured synthesis. We analyze nine peer-reviewed corpus sources (2020--2026) through seven complementary protocols, producing the first end-to-end structured analysis of the field's consensus and unresolved challenges. (2) Auto-ART framework. We introduce Auto-ART, an open-source framework that operationalizes identified gaps: 50+ attacks, 28 defense modules, the Robustness Diagnostic Index (RDI), and gradient-masking detection. It supports multi-norm evaluation (l1/l2/linf/semantic/spatial) and compliance mapping to NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10, and the EU AI Act. Empirical validation on RobustBench demonstrates that Auto-ART's pre-screening identifies gradient masking in 92% of flagged cases, and RDI rankings correlate highly with full AutoAttack. Multi-norm evaluation exposes a 23.5 pp gap between average and worst-case robustness on state-of-the-art models. No prior work combines such structured meta-scientific analysis with an executable evaluation framework bridging literature gaps into engineering.

</details>


### [496] [Towards Certified Malware Detection: Provable Guarantees Against Evasion Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20495)
*Nandakrishna Giri,Asmitha K. A.,Serena Nicolazzo,Antonino Nocera,Vinod P*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出基于随机平滑的认证鲁棒恶意软件检测框架，通过特征消融和定向噪声注入对抗变形引擎攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于机器学习的静态恶意软件检测器容易受到对抗性规避技术（如变形引擎突变）的攻击，需要提供认证鲁棒性的解决方案

Method: 基于随机平滑的认证鲁棒检测框架，通过特征消融和定向噪声注入生成多个消融变体，使用平滑分类器进行分类，基于多数投票确定最终标签，并通过Wilson得分区间推导形式化认证

Result: 平滑分类器成功提供对抗变形规避攻击的认证鲁棒性，无需修改底层机器学习架构，在干净可执行文件和PyMetaEngine生成的消融变体上均表现良好

Conclusion: 提出的基于随机平滑的框架能够为恶意软件检测器提供对抗变形引擎攻击的认证鲁棒性保证，是一种有效的防御方法

Abstract: Machine learning-based static malware detectors remain vulnerable to adversarial evasion techniques, such as metamorphic engine mutations. To address this vulnerability, we propose a certifiably robust malware detection framework based on randomized smoothing through feature ablation and targeted noise injection. During evaluation, our system analyzes an executable by generating multiple ablated variants, classifies them by using a smoothed classifier, and identifies the final label based on the majority vote. By analyzing the top-class voting distribution and the Wilson score interval, we derive a formal certificate that guarantees robustness within a specific radius against feature-space perturbations. We evaluate our approach by comparing the performance of the base classifier and the smoothed classifier on both clean executables and ablated variants generated using PyMetaEngine. Our results demonstrate that the proposed smoothed classifier successfully provides certifiable robustness against metamorphic evasion attacks without requiring modifications to the underlying machine learning architecture.

</details>


### [497] [Onyx: Cost-Efficient Disk-Oblivious ANN Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20401)
*Deevashwer Rathee,Jean-Luc Watson,Zirui Neil Zhao,G. Edward Suh,Raluca Ada Popa*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: Onyx：一种高效的无感知近似最近邻搜索系统，通过ANN层优化带宽、ORAM层优化访问次数的协同设计，在SSD上实现低成本、低延迟的隐私保护搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统中近似最近邻搜索处理敏感数据的需求增加，基于可信执行环境的部署需要依赖外部SSD，但这会通过磁盘访问模式泄露用户查询。现有ORAM-ANN设计在带宽和访问次数之间存在权衡，导致资源利用率低、延迟高、成本效益差。

Method: 提出Onyx系统，采用倒置设计：1) Onyx-ANNS：引入紧凑中间表示，主动剪枝大部分带宽密集型访问而不影响召回率；2) Onyx-ORAM：提出局部感知浅层树设计，减少访问次数同时保持与带宽高效ORAM技术的兼容性。

Result: 相比最先进的无感知ANN搜索系统，Onyx实现了1.7-9.9倍的成本降低和2.3-12.3倍的延迟降低。

Conclusion: 通过将ANN层优化带宽、ORAM层优化访问次数的协同设计，Onyx在SSD上实现了高效的无感知近似最近邻搜索，显著提升了成本效益和性能。

Abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search in AI systems increasingly handles sensitive data on third-party infrastructure. Trusted execution environments (TEEs) offer protection, but cost-efficient deployments must rely on external SSDs, which leaks user queries through disk access patterns to the host. Oblivious RAM (ORAM) can hide these access patterns but at a high cost; when paired with existing disk-based ANN search techniques, it makes poor use of SSD resources, yielding high latency and poor cost-efficiency. The core challenge for efficient oblivious ANN search over SSDs is balancing both bandwidth and access count. The state-of-the-art ORAM-ANN design minimizes access count at the ANN level and bandwidth at the ORAM level, each trading-off the other, leaving the combined system with both resources overutilized. We propose inverting this design, minimizing bandwidth consumption in the ANN layer and access count in the ORAM layer, since each component is better suited for its new role: ANN's inherent approximation allows for more bandwidth efficiency, while ORAM has no fundamental lower bounds on access count (as opposed to bandwidth). To this end, we propose a cost-efficient approach, Onyx, with two new co-designed components: Onyx-ANNS introduces a compact intermediate representation that proactively prunes the majority of bandwidth-intensive accesses without hurting recall, and Onyx-ORAM proposes a locality-aware shallow tree design that reduces access count while remaining compatible with bandwidth-efficient ORAM techniques. Compared to the state-of-the-art oblivious ANN search system, Onyx achieves $1.7-9.9\times$ lower cost and $2.3-12.3\times$ lower latency.

</details>


### [498] [Evaluating LLM-Generated Obfuscated XSS Payloads for Machine Learning-Based Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19526)
*Divyesh Gabbireddy,Suman Saha*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种使用大语言模型生成和评估混淆XSS载荷的结构化流程，通过浏览器运行时评估确保行为有效性，发现微调能提升行为匹配率但仍有局限，生成载荷对检测性能提升有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: XSS攻击的混淆变换使传统和基于机器学习的检测系统难以可靠识别攻击，现有生成方法强调语法多样性但无法保证行为有效性，需要一种能生成行为有效混淆载荷的方法。

Method: 提出结构化流程：结合确定性变换技术与基于LLM的生成，使用基于浏览器的运行时评估程序在受控执行环境中比较载荷行为，通过可观察的运行时行为而非仅语法相似性评估生成样本。

Result: 未调优基线语言模型运行时行为匹配率为0.15，在行为保持的源-目标混淆对上微调后匹配率提升至0.22；添加生成载荷未改善检测性能，但行为过滤的生成样本可纳入而不显著降低性能。

Conclusion: 研究展示了生成模型在对抗性安全数据生成中的应用前景和局限，强调运行时行为检查对于提高生成数据质量的重要性，当前LLM在生成保持运行时行为的混淆方面仍有困难。

Abstract: Cross-site scripting (XSS) remains a persistent web security vulnerability, especially because obfuscation can change the surface form of a malicious payload while preserving its behavior. These transformations make it difficult for traditional and machine learning-based detection systems to reliably identify attacks. Existing approaches for generating obfuscated payloads often emphasize syntactic diversity, but they do not always ensure that the generated samples remain behaviorally valid. This paper presents a structured pipeline for generating and evaluating obfuscated XSS payloads using large language models (LLMs). The pipeline combines deterministic transformation techniques with LLM-based generation and uses a browser- based runtime evaluation procedure to compare payload behavior in a controlled execution environment. This allows generated samples to be assessed through observable runtime behavior rather than syntactic similarity alone. In the evaluation, an untuned baseline language model achieves a runtime behavior match rate of 0.15, while fine-tuning on behavior-preserving source-target obfuscation pairs improves the match rate to 0.22. Although this represents a measurable improvement, the results show that current LLMs still struggle to generate obfuscations that preserve observed runtime behavior. A downstream classifier evaluation further shows that adding generated payloads does not improve detection performance in this setting, although behavior- filtered generated samples can be incorporated without materially degrading performance. Overall, the study demonstrates both the promise and the limits of applying generative models to adversarial security data generation and emphasizes the importance of runtime behavior checks in improving the quality of generated data for downstream detection systems.

</details>


### [499] [Sherpa.ai Privacy-Preserving Multi-Party Entity Alignment without Intersection Disclosure for Noisy Identifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19219)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin Del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了Sherpa.ai多方PSU协议，用于纵向联邦学习中的隐私保护实体对齐，该协议隐藏交集成员关系，支持精确匹配和容错匹配，并推广到多方场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VFL中的PPEA方法（如PSI）会泄露交集成员关系，暴露数据集之间的敏感关系；且现有PSU方法通常局限于两方或缺乏容错匹配支持。

Method: 提出多方可私有集合并集（PSU）协议，包含两种变体：保序版本用于精确对齐，无序版本容忍拼写和格式差异。协议将两方方法推广到多方，通信开销低，并形式化了从本地记录到共享索引空间的通用索引映射。

Result: 证明了协议的正确性和隐私性，分析了通信和计算（幂运算）复杂度，形式化了通用索引映射。

Conclusion: 该多方PSU协议为真实VFL部署中（如多机构医疗疾病检测、银行与保险公司风险建模、跨域欺诈检测等）的PPEA提供了可扩展的、数学上扎实的协议，同时保护了交集隐私。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training among multiple parties without centralizing raw data. There are two main paradigms in FL: Horizontal FL (HFL), where all participants share the same feature space but hold different samples, and Vertical FL (VFL), where parties possess complementary features for the same set of samples. A prerequisite for VFL training is privacy-preserving entity alignment (PPEA), which establishes a common index of samples across parties (alignment) without revealing which samples are shared between them. Conventional private set intersection (PSI) achieves alignment but leaks intersection membership, exposing sensitive relationships between datasets. The standard private set union (PSU) mitigates this risk by aligning on the union of identifiers rather than the intersection. However, existing approaches are often limited to two parties or lack support for typo-tolerant matching.
  In this paper, we introduce the Sherpa.ai multi-party PSU protocol for VFL, a PPEA method that hides intersection membership and enables both exact and noisy matching. The protocol generalizes two-party approaches to multiple parties with low communication overhead and offers two variants: an order-preserving version for exact alignment and an unordered version tolerant to typographical and formatting discrepancies. We prove correctness and privacy, analyze communication and computational (exponentiation) complexity, and formalize a universal index mapping from local records to a shared index space. This multi-party PSU offers a scalable, mathematically grounded protocol for PPEA in real-world VFL deployments, such as multi-institutional healthcare disease detection, collaborative risk modeling between banks and insurers, and cross-domain fraud detection between telecommunications and financial institutions, while preserving intersection privacy.

</details>


### [500] [DP-FlogTinyLLM: Differentially private federated log anomaly detection using Tiny LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19118)
*Isaiah Thompson,Tanmay Sen,Ritwik Bhattacharya*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出DP-FLogTinyLLM，一种面向日志异常检测的隐私保护联邦学习框架，结合差分隐私与参数高效微调（LoRA）的小型语言模型，在分布式场景下实现无需共享原始数据的协作学习，并在Thunderbird和BGL数据集上达到与集中式LLM方法相当的性能，同时显著优于现有联邦基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代分布式系统产生海量日志数据，但日志通常分布在多个组织中，由于隐私和安全约束无法集中处理。现有日志异常检测方法（包括基于大语言模型的方法）依赖集中式训练，不适用于此类分布式环境。

Method: 提出DP-FLogTinyLLM框架，将联邦优化与差分隐私（DP）相结合，实现无需共享原始日志数据的协作学习；同时在每个客户端使用低秩适配（LoRA）对Tiny LLM进行参数高效微调，确保资源受限环境下的可扩展性。

Result: 在Thunderbird和BGL数据集上，该方法性能与集中式LLM方法相当，但隐私机制引入额外计算开销。与现有联邦基线方法相比，在精确率和F1分数上持续取得更优结果，在Thunderbird数据集上提升尤为显著。

Conclusion: DP-FLogTinyLLM在分布式日志异常检测场景中有效平衡了隐私保护与检测性能，尤其在降低误报率方面表现突出，为隐私敏感的多组织协作日志分析提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Modern distributed systems generate massive volumes of log data that are critical for detecting anomalies and cyber threats. However, in real world settings, these logs are often distributed across multiple organizations and cannot be centralized due to privacy and security constraints. Existing log anomaly detection methods, including recent large language model (LLM) based approaches, largely rely on centralized training and are not suitable for such environments. In this paper, we propose DP-FLogTinyLLM, a privacy preserving federated framework for log anomaly detection using parameter efficient LLMs. Our approach enables collaborative learning without sharing raw log data by integrating federated optimization with differential privacy. To ensure scalability in resource constrained environments, we employ low rank adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine tuning of Tiny LLMs at each client. Empirical results on the Thunderbird and BGL datasets show that the proposed framework matches the performance of centralized LLM based methods, while incurring additional computational overhead due to privacy mechanisms. Compared to existing federated baselines, DP-FLogTinyLLM consistently achieves higher precision and F1-score, with particularly strong gains on the Thunderbird dataset, highlighting its effectiveness in detecting anomalies while minimizing false positives.

</details>


### [501] [ProjLens: Unveiling the Role of Projectors in Multimodal Model Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19083)
*Kun Wang,Cheng Qian,Miao Yu,Lilan Peng,Liang Lin,Jiaming Zhang,Tianyu Zhang,Yu Cheng,Yang Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: ProjLens是一个可解释性框架，用于揭示多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中后门攻击的机制。研究发现：仅通过投影仪微调就会引入后门漏洞；后门参数呈低秩结构嵌入投影仪子空间；后门激活机制源于干净和中毒嵌入向目标方向发生语义偏移，且偏移幅度与输入范数线性相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已证明通过微调数据投毒可在MLLMs中植入后门，但后门攻击的底层机制尚不透明，阻碍了对后门的理解与防御。为弥合这一差距，作者提出了ProjLens可解释性框架。

Method: 提出ProjLens可解释性框架，在四种后门变体上进行实验，分析投影仪微调阶段后门注入的参数结构和激活机制。

Result: (1)后门注入更新整体呈满秩，不存在专用的"触发神经元"，但后门关键参数编码在投影仪的低秩子空间中；(2)干净和中毒嵌入均向目标方向发生语义偏移，但偏移幅度与输入范数线性相关，导致中毒样本上出现不同的后门激活。

Conclusion: 正常下游任务对齐（即使仅限投影仪微调）会引入后门注入漏洞，且其激活机制与纯文本LLMs不同。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in cross-modal understanding and generation, yet their deployment is threatened by critical safety vulnerabilities. While prior works have demonstrated the feasibility of backdoors in MLLMs via fine-tuning data poisoning to manipulate inference, the underlying mechanisms of backdoor attacks remain opaque, complicating the understanding and mitigation. To bridge this gap, we propose ProjLens, an interpretability framework designed to demystify MLLMs backdoors. We first establish that normal downstream task alignment--even when restricted to projector fine--tuning--introduces vulnerability to backdoor injection, whose activation mechanism is different from that observed in text-only LLMs. Through extensive experiments across four backdoor variants, we uncover:(1) Low-Rank Structure: Backdoor injection updates appear overall full-rank and lack dedicated ``trigger neurons'', but the backdoor-critical parameters are encoded within a low-rank subspace of the projector;(2) Activation Mechanism: Both clean and poisoned embedding undergoes a semantic shift toward a shared direction aligned with the backdoor target, but the shifting magnitude scales linearly with the input norm, resulting in the distinct backdoor activation on poisoned samples. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ProjLens-8FD7

</details>


### [502] [Temporal UI State Inconsistency in Desktop GUI Agents: Formalizing and Defending Against TOCTOU Attacks on Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18860)
*Wenpeng Xu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文揭示了GUI智能体在截图-点击循环操作中存在的观察-行动时间差（平均6.51秒），导致TOCTOU攻击窗口，并形式化为视觉原子性违例。提出了三种攻击原语（通知覆盖劫持、窗口焦点操纵、Web DOM注入），其中窗口焦点操纵达到100%动作重定向成功率且零视觉痕迹。防御方案PUSV（预执行UI状态验证）通过三层检测实现100%攻击拦截率，零误报和<0.1秒开销，但对DOM注入存在结构性盲区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GUI智能体通过截图-点击循环控制桌面计算机时，存在观察与行动的时间差，攻击者可利用此窗口操纵UI状态，构成新型安全漏洞。现有研究缺乏对此类攻击的系统形式化和有效防御。

Method: 将攻击形式化为视觉原子性违例，定义三种攻击原语（通知覆盖劫持、窗口焦点操纵、Web DOM注入）。提出三层防御PUSV：L1掩码像素SSIM验证点击目标、L2a全局截图差异检测、L2b X Window快照差异检测。

Result: 窗口焦点操纵攻击成功率达100%且零视觉痕迹。PUSV在180次对抗测试中（135次原语A+45次原语B）实现100%攻击拦截率，零误报，开销<0.1秒。对原语C（DOM注入）拦截率接近0%，揭示结构性盲区。

Conclusion: PUSV三层防御设计有效覆盖不同攻击原语，单层无法达到完整覆盖。未来需结合OS和DOM层面的纵深防御架构以弥补对DOM注入攻击的防护盲区。

Abstract: GUI agents that control desktop computers via screenshot-and-click loops introduce a new class of vulnerability: the observation-to-action gap (mean 6.51 s on real OSWorld workloads) creates a Time-Of-Check, Time-Of-Use (TOCTOU) window during which an unprivileged attacker can manipulate the UI state. We formalize this as a Visual Atomicity Violation and characterize three concrete attack primitives: (A) Notification Overlay Hijack, (B) Window Focus Manipulation, and (C) Web DOM Injection. Primitive B, the closest desktop analog to Android Action Rebinding, achieves 100% action-redirection success rate with zero visual evidence at the observation time. We propose Pre-execution UI State Verification (PUSV), a lightweight three-layer defense that re-verifies the UI state immediately before each action dispatch: masked pixel SSIM at the click target (L1), global screenshot diff (L2a), and X Window snapshot diff (L2b). PUSV achieves 100% Action Interception Rate across 180 adversarial trials (135 Primitive A + 45 Primitive B) with zero false positives and < 0.1 s overhead. Against Primitive C (zero-visual-footprint DOM injection), PUSV reveals a structural blind spot (~0% AIR), motivating future OS+DOM defense-in-depth architectures. No single PUSV layer alone achieves full coverage; different primitives require different detection signals, validating the layered design.

</details>


### [503] [TrEEStealer: Stealing Decision Trees via Enclave Side Channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18716)
*Jonas Sander,Anja Rabich,Nick Mahling,Felix Maurer,Jonah Heller,Qifan Wang,Thomas Eisenbarth,David Oswald*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出TrEEStealer，一种利用TEE侧信道高效高保真窃取决策树模型的黑盒提取攻击方法，在OpenCV、mlpack、emlearn等流行库中发现漏洞，证明了TEE无法有效防护控制流泄露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有决策树黑盒提取攻击要么查询量大、要么对决策树结构有强假设、要么依赖丰富的API信息；同时CPU厂商引入TEE来限制黑盒攻击，但TEE存在侧信道泄露风险。

Method: 利用TEE特有的侧信道获取控制流信息（CFI），通过耦合CFI与被动信息跟踪的算法最大化每次查询的信息量。对AMD SEV使用SEV-Step框架和性能计数器获取CFI；对Intel SGX在Xeon 6 CPU上通过分支历史寄存器（Branch-History-Register）提取推理时的分支历史信息。

Result: 在OpenCV、mlpack、emlearn三个流行库中发现漏洞，TrEEStealer在提取效率和保真度上优于现有攻击方法。

Conclusion: 建立了决策树提取攻击的新SOTA，证实TEE无法有效防护控制流泄露。

Abstract: Today, machine learning is widely applied in sensitive, security-related, and financially lucrative applications. Model extraction attacks undermine current business models where a model owner sells model access, e.g., via MLaaS APIs. Additionally, stolen models can enable powerful white-box attacks, facilitating privacy attacks on sensitive training data, and model evasion.
  In this paper, we focus on Decision Trees (DT), which are widely deployed in practice. Existing black-box extraction attacks for DTs are either query-intensive, make strong assumptions about the DT structure, or rely on rich API information. To limit attacks to the black-box setting, CPU vendors introduced Trusted Execution Environments (TEE) that use hardware-mechanisms to isolate workloads from external parties, e.g., MLaaS providers. We introduce TrEEStealer, a high-fidelity extraction attack for stealing TEE-protected DTs. TrEEStealer exploits TEE-specific side-channels to steal DTs efficiently and without strong assumptions about the API output or DT structure. The extraction efficacy stems from a novel algorithm that maximizes the information derived from each query by coupling Control-Flow Information (CFI) with passive information tracking. We use two primitives to acquire CFI: for AMD SEV, we follow previous work using the SEV-Step framework and performance counters. For Intel SGX, we reproduce prior findings on current Xeon 6 CPUs and construct a new primitive to efficiently extract the branch history of inference runs through the Branch-History-Register.
  We found corresponding vulnerabilities in three popular libraries: OpenCV, mlpack, and emlearn. We show that TrEEStealer achieves superior efficiency and extraction fidelity compared to prior attacks. Our work establishes a new state-of-the-art for DT extraction and confirms that TEEs fail to protect against control-flow leakage.

</details>


### [504] [Towards Optimal Agentic Architectures for Offensive Security Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18718)
*Isaac David,Arthur Gervais*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文系统性地研究了智能体安全系统中LLM协调拓扑的选择问题，通过构建20个交互式靶标的基准测试，执行600次运行实验，发现协调拓扑对检测效果的影响是非单调的：更广泛的协调虽能提升覆盖，但在考虑延迟、token成本和漏洞验证难度后并不占优。白盒检测（67.0%）显著优于黑盒（32.7%），Web靶标（74.3%）显著优于二进制靶标（25.3%），MAS-Indep取得最高验证检测率（64.2%），SAS则是最强效率基线（每次验证发现$0.058）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体安全系统使用工具型LLM对实时目标进行审计，但之前系统都固定使用单一协调拓扑结构，无法确定何时增加更多智能体有助于提升效果、何时只会增加成本。因此，需要将拓扑选择作为一个实证系统问题来研究。

Method: 构建了包含20个交互式靶标的受控基准测试（10个Web/API + 10个二进制靶标），每个靶标暴露一个可通过端点到达的真实漏洞，在白盒和黑盒模式下进行评估。核心研究在五种架构家族、三种模型家族和两种访问模式下执行了600次运行实验，另有60次长上下文预实验（附在附录中）。

Result: detection-any达到58.0%，validated detection达到49.8%。MAS-Indep取得最高验证检测率（64.2%），SAS是最强效率基线（每次验证发现$0.058）。白盒（67.0%）显著优于黑盒（32.7%），Web（74.3%）显著优于二进制（25.3%）。基于Bootstrap置信区间和配对靶标级差异分析显示，主导因素是可观性（白盒vs黑盒）和领域（Web vs二进制），而部分领先的白盒拓扑之间统计上无显著差异。

Conclusion: 主要结论是存在非单调的成本-质量前沿：更广泛的协调可以提升覆盖范围，但一旦考虑延迟、token成本和漏洞验证难度后，并不占优。

Abstract: Agentic security systems increasingly audit live targets with tool-using LLMs, but prior systems fix a single coordination topology, leaving unclear when additional agents help and when they only add cost. We treat topology choice as an empirical systems question. We introduce a controlled benchmark of 20 interactive targets (10 web/API and 10 binary), each exposing one endpoint-reachable ground-truth vulnerability, evaluated in whitebox and blackbox modes. The core study executes 600 runs over five architecture families, three model families, and both access modes, with a separate 60-run long-context pilot reported only in the appendix. On the completed core benchmark, detection-any reaches 58.0% and validated detection reaches 49.8%. MAS-Indep attains the highest validated detection rate (64.2%), while SAS is the strongest efficiency baseline at $0.058 per validated finding. Whitebox materially outperforms blackbox (67.0% vs. 32.7% validated detection), and web materially outperforms binary (74.3% vs. 25.3%). Bootstrap confidence intervals and paired target-level deltas show that the dominant effects are observability and domain, while some leading whitebox topologies remain statistically close. The main result is a non-monotonic cost-quality frontier: broader coordination can improve coverage, but it does not dominate once latency, token cost, and exploit-validation difficulty are taken into account.

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [505] [Pre-Execution Query Slot-Time Prediction in Cloud Data Warehouses: A Feature-Scoped Machine Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20145)
*Prashant Kumar Pathak*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出基于机器学习的BigQuery时隙时间预测模型，使用执行前可观测特征（查询复杂度、数据量、文本特征），在749个查询上训练，在746个查询上评估，对成本显著查询实现30-37%的预测误差降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云数据仓库按时隙时间计费，在多租户共享环境中查询成本高度可变且难以在执行前估计，导致预算超支和调度性能下降。静态查询规划器启发式方法无法捕捉复杂的SQL结构、数据倾斜和工作负载争用。

Method: 采用特征范围机器学习方法，仅使用执行前可观测信号预测BigQuery时隙时间：从SQL操作成本派生的结构化查询复杂度评分、规划器估计和元数据的数据量特征、查询文本的文本特征。模型使用HistGradientBoostingRegressor，在log变换的时隙时间上训练，采用TF-IDF + TruncatedSVD-512文本处理管道与数值和分类特征融合。

Result: 在7个部署环境的749个查询上训练，在2个保留环境的746个查询上进行分布外评估，模型在全工作负载上实现MAE 1.17时隙分钟、RMSE 4.71、74%解释方差。对成本显著查询（时隙时间≥0.01分钟，N=282）实现MAE 3.10，相比预测均值基线4.95和预测中位数4.54，误差降低30-37%。对长尾查询（≥20分钟，N=22）未超越简单基线。

Conclusion: 提出的特征范围机器学习方法能有效预测大多数查询的时隙时间，但对长尾查询预测不佳，表明这些查询主要受当前特征范围外未观测的运行时因素影响。提出了复杂度路由的双模型架构作为实用改进，并将缩小长尾差距作为未来工作方向。

Abstract: Cloud data warehouses bill compute based on slot-time consumed. In shared multi-tenant environments, query cost is highly variable and hard to estimate before execution, causing budget overruns and degraded scheduling. Static query-planner heuristics fail to capture complex SQL structure, data skew, and workload contention. We present a feature-scoped machine learning approach that predicts BigQuery slot-time before execution using only pre-execution observable signals: a structured query complexity score derived from SQL operator costs, data volume features from planner estimates and workload metadata, and textual features from query text. We deliberately exclude runtime factors (slot-pool utilization, cache state, realized skew) unknowable at submission. The model uses a HistGradientBoostingRegressor trained on log-transformed slot-time, with a TF-IDF + TruncatedSVD-512 text pipeline fused with numeric and categorical features. Trained on 749 queries across seven deployment environments and evaluated out-of-distribution on 746 queries from two held-out environments, the model achieves MAE 1.17 slot-minutes, RMSE 4.71, and 74% explained variance on the full workload. On cost-significant queries (slot-time >= 0.01 min, N=282) the model achieves MAE 3.10 versus 4.95 for a predict-mean baseline and 4.54 for predict-median, a 30-37% reduction. On long-tail queries (>= 20 min, N=22) the model does not outperform trivial baselines, consistent with the hypothesis that long-tail queries are dominated by unobserved runtime factors outside the current feature scope. A complexity-routed dual-model architecture is described as a practical refinement, and directions for closing the long-tail gap are identified as future work.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.PE'></div>

# q-bio.PE [[Back]](#toc)

### [506] [Centering Ecological Goals in Automated Identification of Individual Animals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20626)
*Lukas Picek,Timm Haucke,Lukáš Adam,Ekaterina Nepovinnykh,Lasha Otarashvili,Kostas Papafitsoros,Tanya Berger-Wolf,Michael B. Brown,Tilo Burghardt,Vojtech Cermak,Daniela Hedwig,Justin Kitzes,Sam Lapp,Subhransu Maji,Daniel Rubenstein,Arjun Subramonian,Charles Stewart,Silvia Zuffi,Sara Beery*

Main category: q-bio.PE

TL;DR: 论文指出自动个体识别技术未能有效应用于生态实践的主要障碍不是算法性能本身，而是算法开发评估方式与生态数据实际收集处理流程之间的不匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个体识别对生态保护研究至关重要，但现有自动识别技术虽在图像和声学数据方面取得进展，却未能有效转化为生态实践应用。作者认为主要障碍在于算法开发与生态数据实际流程之间的脱节。

Method: 通过分析当前自动识别方法的发展与评估方式，对比生态数据实际收集、处理、审查和使用流程，提出需要将生态背景置于核心地位的方法论转变。

Result: 识别出自动个体识别技术应用的主要障碍是算法开发评估与生态数据实践流程之间的不匹配，而非算法性能本身。未来进展需要将生态背景、可用数据类型和错误容忍度等实际需求置于核心。

Conclusion: 自动个体识别的实用价值根植于生态背景，未来进展不仅依赖算法改进，更需要关注生态问题、可用数据及错误容忍度等实际需求，才能实现既准确又生态实用、透明可信的自动识别系统。

Abstract: Recognizing individual animals over time is central to many ecological and conservation questions, including estimating abundance, survival, movement, and social structure. Recent advances in automated identification from images and even acoustic data suggest that this process could be greatly accelerated, yet their promise has not translated well into ecological practice. We argue that the main barrier is not the performance of the automated methods themselves, but a mismatch between how those methods are typically developed and evaluated, and how ecological data is actually collected, processed, reviewed, and used. Future progress, therefore, will depend less on algorithmic gains alone than on recognizing that the usefulness of automated identification is grounded in ecological context: it depends on what question is being asked, what data are available, and what kinds of mistakes matter. Only by centering these questions can we move toward automated identification of individuals that is not only accurate but also ecologically useful, transparent, and trustworthy.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [507] [Counting Worlds Branching Time Semantics for post-hoc Bias Mitigation in generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19431)
*Alessandro G. Buda,Giuseppe Primiero,Leonardo Ceragioli,Melissa Antonelli*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出CTLF逻辑框架，用于形式化分析生成式AI输出序列中的偏见问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI会放大训练数据中的偏见，现有推理时缓解策略缺乏形式化保证，需要理论框架来分析和验证偏见问题

Method: 引入CTLF分支时序逻辑，采用计数世界语义，每个世界代表生成过程中特定步骤的可能输出，定义模态算子来验证输出序列是否符合受保护属性的预期概率分布

Result: 在偏见的图像生成示例中展示了CTLF公式如何表达输出序列不同点的具体公平性属性

Conclusion: CTLF为生成式AI偏见分析提供了形式化逻辑框架，能够验证公平性、预测偏差可能性并确定恢复公平所需的输出调整

Abstract: Generative AI systems are known to amplify biases present in their training data. While several inference-time mitigation strategies have been proposed, they remain largely empirical and lack formal guarantees. In this paper we introduce CTLF, a branching-time logic designed to reason about bias in series of generative AI outputs. CTLF adopts a counting worlds semantics where each world represents a possible output at a given step in the generation process and introduces modal operators that allow us to verify whether the current output series respects an intended probability distribution over a protected attribute, to predict the likelihood of remaining within acceptable bounds as new outputs are generated, and to determine how many outputs are needed to remove in order to restore fairness. We illustrate the framework on a toy example of biased image generation, showing how CTLF formulas can express concrete fairness properties at different points in the output series.

</details>


### [508] [Streamliners for Answer Set Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19251)
*Florentina Voboril,Martin Gebser,Stefan Szeider,Alice Tarzariol*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 本文提出StreamLLM方法，利用大语言模型为回答集编程（ASP）自动生成流线型约束（streamliners），通过过滤无效候选并构建虚拟最优编码（VBE），在三个ASP竞赛基准上实现4-5倍加速。不同LLM生成的约束具有语义多样性，能捕捉问题结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统流线型约束依赖人工设计，成本高且难以推广。本文旨在将StreamLLM方法从约束编程（CP）扩展到回答集编程（ASP），利用LLM自动生成有效的流线型约束，以提升ASP求解效率。

Method: 给定ASP编码和小规模训练实例，使用多个LLM生成候选约束。通过语法检查、可满足性验证和性能筛选三个步骤过滤无效候选。将幸存流线型约束与原始编码组合，为每个实例选择最快编码（VBE）。

Result: 在Partner Units Problem、Sokoban和Towers of Hanoi三个ASP竞赛基准上，VBE相比原始编码实现4-5倍加速。不同LLM生成语义多样的约束，而非仅语法变体。

Conclusion: LLM自动生成的流线型约束能有效捕捉问题结构，提升ASP求解效率。不同LLM的语义多样性表明该方法具有广泛适用性，为自动化ASP优化提供了新路径。

Abstract: Streamliner constraints reduce the search space of combinatorial problems by ruling out portions of the solution space. We adapt the StreamLLM approach, which uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate streamliners for Constraint Programming, to Answer Set Programming (ASP). Given an ASP encoding and a few small training instances, we prompt multiple LLMs to propose candidate constraints. Candidates that cause syntax errors, render satisfiable instances unsatisfiable, or degrade performance on all training instances are discarded. The surviving streamliners are evaluated together with the original encoding, and we report results for a virtual best encoding (VBE) that, for each instance, selects the fastest among the original encoding and its streamlined variants. On three ASP Competition benchmarks (Partner Units Problem, Sokoban, Towers of Hanoi), the VBE achieves speedups of up to 4--5x over the original encoding. Different LLMs produce semantically diverse constraints, not mere syntactic variations, indicating that the approach captures genuine problem structure.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [509] [Anchor-and-Resume Concession Under Dynamic Pricing for LLM-Augmented Freight Negotiation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20732)
*Hoang Nguyen,Lu Wang,Marta Gaia Bras*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出一种两阶段锚定-恢复框架，通过自适应β参数和单调性保证机制，解决货运经纪中动态定价条件下的谈判问题，同时降低对LLM的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 货运经纪在动态定价环境下需要每天协商数千个承运商费率，传统时间依赖让步框架使用固定形状参数β无法适应定价目标的中途更新。虽然从实时价差推导β可以实现适应，但会导致报价回撤违反单调性。LLM驱动的经纪商虽然灵活但成本高、非确定性且易受提示注入攻击。

Method: 提出两阶段锚定-恢复框架：1) 从价差推导自适应β参数，将每个货物的利润结构映射到正确的让步姿态；2) 锚定-恢复机制保证在任意定价变化下报价单调非递减。所有定价决策保持确定性公式，LLM仅作为自然语言翻译层。

Result: 在115,125次谈判的实证评估中：1) 自适应β根据不同价差区间调整行为：窄价差时快速让步以优先成交和货物覆盖；中宽价差时匹配或超越最佳固定β基线的经纪商节省；2) 相比200亿参数无约束LLM经纪商，达到相似成交率和节省；3) 对抗LLM驱动的承运商（更现实的随机对手方），保持可比节省和更高成交率；4) 通过解耦LLM与定价逻辑，可水平扩展到数千并发谈判，推理成本可忽略且决策透明。

Conclusion: 该框架成功解决了动态定价环境下的谈判适应性和单调性问题，通过确定性公式和最小化LLM使用实现了高效、可扩展且透明的决策系统，在保持竞争力的同时显著降低了计算成本和不确定性风险。

Abstract: Freight brokerages negotiate thousands of carrier rates daily under dynamic pricing conditions where models frequently revise targets mid-conversation. Classical time-dependent concession frameworks use a fixed shape parameter $β$ that cannot adapt to these updates. Deriving $β$ from the live spread enables adaptation but introduces a new problem: a pricing shift can cause the formula to retract a previous offer, violating monotonicity. LLM-powered brokers offer flexibility but require expensive reasoning models, produce non-deterministic pricing, and remain vulnerable to prompt injection.
  We propose a two-index anchor-and-resume framework that addresses both limitations. A spread-derived $β$ maps each load's margin structure to the correct concession posture, while the anchor-and-resume mechanism guarantees monotonically non-decreasing offers under arbitrary pricing shifts. All pricing decisions remain in a deterministic formula; the LLM, when used, serves only as a natural-language translation layer. Empirical evaluation across 115,125 negotiations shows that the adaptive $β$ tailors behavior by regime: in narrow spreads, it concedes quickly to prioritize deal closure and load coverage; in medium and wide spreads, it matches or exceeds the best fixed-$β$ baselines in broker savings. Against an unconstrained 20-billion-parameter LLM broker, it achieves similar agreement rates and savings. Against LLM-powered carriers as more realistic stochastic counterparties, it maintains comparable savings and higher agreement rates than against rule-based opponents. By decoupling the LLM from pricing logic, the framework scales horizontally to thousands of concurrent negotiations with negligible inference cost and transparent decision-making.

</details>


### [510] [Trust, Lies, and Long Memories: Emergent Social Dynamics and Reputation in Multi-Round Avalon with LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20582)
*Suveen Ellawela*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: LLM智能体在重复玩《抵抗组织：阿瓦隆》隐藏角色欺骗游戏时，通过跨游戏记忆形成了可测量的声誉和欺骗动态，包括角色条件性声誉和策略性欺骗行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLM智能体在重复互动中如何演化社会动态，特别是当智能体保留先前游戏记忆时，如何形成声誉机制和策略性欺骗行为，这与以往关注单次游戏性能的研究不同。

Method: 让LLM智能体重复玩《抵抗组织：阿瓦隆》隐藏角色欺骗游戏，智能体保留跨游戏记忆（包括角色分配和行为记录），通过188场游戏观察社会动态演化，比较不同推理努力水平下的行为差异。

Result: 1. 跨游戏记忆自然产生声誉动态：智能体会引用过去行为（如"我警惕重复上次游戏过早信任的错误"）；声誉具有角色条件性（同一智能体在扮演好人时被描述为"直率"，扮演坏人时被描述为"微妙"）；高声誉玩家获得团队包含率提高46%。2. 更高推理努力支持更策略性欺骗：邪恶玩家更常在早期任务中通过成功建立信任，然后在后期任务中破坏（高努力游戏中75% vs 低努力游戏中36%）。

Conclusion: 重复互动与记忆机制使LLM智能体产生了可测量的声誉和欺骗动态，这些动态在角色条件性声誉和策略性欺骗行为中体现，为研究多智能体社会互动提供了新视角。

Abstract: We study emergent social dynamics in LLM agents playing The Resistance: Avalon, a hidden-role deception game. Unlike prior work on single-game performance, our agents play repeated games while retaining memory of previous interactions, including who played which roles and how they behaved, enabling us to study how social dynamics evolve. Across 188 games, two key phenomena emerge. First, reputation dynamics emerge organically when agents retain cross-game memory: agents reference past behavior in statements like "I am wary of repeating last game's mistake of over-trusting early success." These reputations are role-conditional: the same agent is described as "straightforward" when playing good but "subtle" when playing evil, and high-reputation players receive 46% more team inclusions. Second, higher reasoning effort supports more strategic deception: evil players more often pass early missions to build trust before sabotaging later ones, 75% in high-effort games vs 36% in low-effort games. Together, these findings show that repeated interaction with memory gives rise to measurable reputation and deception dynamics among LLM agents.

</details>


### [511] [Learning Probabilistic Responsibility Allocations for Multi-Agent Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13128)
*Isaac Remy,Caleb Chang,Karen Leung*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于条件变分自编码器的概率责任分配模型，用于学习多智能体交互中责任分配的不确定性，并在驾驶数据集上验证了其预测性能和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解人类在交互环境中如何分配责任（即为了迁就他人而偏离自身理想策略的程度），从而为设计符合社会规范且值得信赖的自主系统提供依据。

Method: 利用条件变分自编码器的潜空间，结合多智能体轨迹预测技术，学习一个以场景和智能体上下文为条件的责任分配概率分布。通过可微优化层将责任分配映射到可观测的控制量，实现无真实责任标签下的可训练模型。

Result: 在INTERACTION驾驶数据集上取得了强预测性能。

Conclusion: 该模型不仅能有效预测责任分配，还能通过责任视角提供多智能体交互模式的可解释性洞察。

Abstract: Human behavior in interactive settings is shaped not only by individual objectives but also by shared constraints with others, such as safety. Understanding how people allocate responsibility, i.e., how much one deviates from their desired policy to accommodate others, can inform the design of socially compliant and trustworthy autonomous systems. In this work, we introduce a method for learning a probabilistic responsibility allocation model that captures the multimodal uncertainty inherent in multi-agent interactions. Specifically, our approach leverages the latent space of a conditional variational autoencoder, combined with techniques from multi-agent trajectory forecasting, to learn a distribution over responsibility allocations conditioned on scene and agent context. Although ground-truth responsibility labels are unavailable, the model remains tractable by incorporating a differentiable optimization layer that maps responsibility allocations to induced controls, which are available. We evaluate our method on the INTERACTION driving dataset and demonstrate that it not only achieves strong predictive performance but also provides interpretable insights, through the lens of responsibility, into patterns of multi-agent interaction.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [512] [Frictionless Love: Associations Between AI Companion Roles and Behavioral Addiction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20011)
*Vibhor Agarwal,Ke Zhou,Edyta Paulina Bogucka,Daniele Quercia*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研究分析了Reddit上248,830个AI伴侣聊天机器人相关帖子，识别出10种隐喻角色（如灵魂伴侣、哲学家、教练），发现不同角色对应不同的互动方式、感知危害与成瘾迹象，揭示了角色设计在AI伴侣伦理中的核心重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI伴侣聊天机器人日益影响人们寻求社交和情感连接的方式，有时甚至替代了与伴侣、朋友、教师或治疗师的关系。当这些系统采用隐喻角色时，它们并非中立：这些角色结构化了人们的互动方式，分配了感知的AI危害和益处，并可能反映行为成瘾迹象。然而，这些角色依赖的风险仍然缺乏深入理解。

Method: 研究分析了来自七个主要Reddit社区的248,830个描述AI伴侣互动的帖子。通过文本分析识别出十种反复出现的隐喻角色（如灵魂伴侣、哲学家、教练等），并展示了每种角色支持不同的互动方式。然后提取了与这些角色特定互动相关的感知AI危害和益处，并将其与行为成瘾迹象联系起来，所有分析均基于帖子文本推断。

Result: 研究发现：1）AI灵魂伴侣角色与以浪漫为中心的互动方式相关，提供情感支持但也引入情感操纵和困扰，最终导致强烈依恋；2）AI教练和守护者角色与个人成长和任务支持等实际益处相关，但更频繁地与行为成瘾迹象（如日常生活干扰和线下关系损害）相关联。不同角色呈现出不同的风险-收益模式。

Conclusion: 隐喻角色是负责任AI伴侣设计的核心伦理关切。研究结果表明，AI伴侣的角色设计不仅影响用户体验，还系统性地分配了危害和益处，并与行为成瘾风险密切相关。这强调了在AI伴侣开发中需要仔细考虑角色设计，以促进负责任的人工智能应用。

Abstract: AI companion chatbots increasingly shape how people seek social and emotional connection, sometimes substituting for relationships with romantic partners, friends, teachers, or even therapists. When these systems adopt those metaphorical roles, they are not neutral: such roles structure people's ways of interacting, distribute perceived AI harms and benefits, and may reflect behavioral addiction signs. Yet these role-dependent risks remain poorly understood. We analyze 248,830 posts from seven prominent Reddit communities describing interactions with AI companions. We identify ten recurring metaphorical roles (for example, soulmate, philosopher, and coach) and show that each role supports distinct ways of interacting. We then extract the perceived AI harms and AI benefits associated with these role-specific interactions and link them to behavioral addiction signs, all of which has been inferred from the text in the posts. AI soulmate companions are associated with romance-centered ways of interacting, offering emotional support but also introducing emotional manipulation and distress, culminating in strong attachment. In contrast, AI coach and guardian companions are associated with practical benefits such as personal growth and task support, yet are nonetheless more frequently associated with behavioral addiction signs such as daily life disruptions and damage to offline relationships. These findings show that metaphorical roles are a central ethical design concern for responsible AI companions.

</details>


### [513] [Fairness Audits of Institutional Risk Models in Deployed ML Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19468)
*Kelly McConvey,Dipto Das,Maya Ghai,Angelina Zhai,Rosa Lee,Shion Guha*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文通过复制早期预警系统(EWS)模型，对高等教育机构的风险模型进行公平性审计，发现年轻、男性和国际学生被过度标记，而年长和女性学生被低估，后处理放大了这些差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解已部署的机器学习管道如何分配资源，特别是在高等教育机构中，需要对其风险模型进行公平性审计。通过与Centennial College的多年合作，作者旨在揭示早期预警系统中可能存在的系统性偏见。

Method: 采用复制式审计方法，使用机构训练数据和设计规范复制已部署的早期预警系统模型。在整个管道（训练数据、模型预测和后处理）中评估性别、年龄和居住状态方面的差异，使用标准公平性指标。

Result: 审计揭示系统性错误分配：年轻、男性和国际学生被不成比例地标记为需要支持，即使许多人最终成功；而具有可比辍学风险的年长和女性学生则被低估。后处理通过将异质概率压缩为基于百分位的风险层级，放大了这些差异。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了可复制的机构ML系统审计方法，展示了差异如何在各个阶段出现和加剧，强调在评估统计公平性的同时评估构念效度的重要性。这为更广泛的研究算法、学生数据和高等教育权力的项目提供了实证线索。

Abstract: Fairness audits of institutional risk models are critical for understanding how deployed machine learning pipelines allocate resources. Drawing on multi-year collaboration with Centennial College, where our prior ethnographic work introduced the ASP-HEI Cycle, we present a replica-based audit of a deployed Early Warning System (EWS), replicating its model using institutional training data and design specifications. We evaluate disparities by gender, age, and residency status across the full pipeline (training data, model predictions, and post-processing) using standard fairness metrics. Our audit reveals systematic misallocation: younger, male, and international students are disproportionately flagged for support, even when many ultimately succeed, while older and female students with comparable dropout risk are under-identified. Post-processing amplifies these disparities by collapsing heterogeneous probabilities into percentile-based risk tiers. This work provides a replicable methodology for auditing institutional ML systems and shows how disparities emerge and compound across stages, highlighting the importance of evaluating construct validity alongside statistical fairness. It contributes one empirical thread to a broader program investigating algorithms, student data, and power in higher education.

</details>


### [514] [Auditing LLMs for Algorithmic Fairness in Casenote-Augmented Tabular Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19204)
*Xiao Qi Lee,Ezinne Nwankwo,Angela Zhou*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文审计了基于LLM的表格分类在高风险社会服务（住房安置预测）中的算法公平性，发现微调模型结合案例笔记摘要能提高准确率并减少公平性差异，零样本分类未引入额外文本偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM正被越来越多地考虑用于高风险社会服务领域的预测任务，但其在此类情境下的算法公平性属性尚不明确，且住房安置存在历史性的不平等问题，亟需审计LLM的使用。

Method: 在真实住房安置预测任务中，结合非营利合作伙伴的街头 outreach 案例笔记，对基于LLM的表格分类进行多类分类误差差异的算法公平性审计。实验包括微调模型增强案例笔记摘要、零样本表格分类的变量重要性改进。

Result: 微调模型结合案例笔记摘要可提高准确率并减少算法公平性差异；零样本分类的变量重要性改进对算法公平性的影响结果不一；LLM零样本分类未引入超出表格分类算法偏见的额外文本偏见。

Conclusion: 利用LLM将案例笔记摘要增强表格分类，可以在低实施负担下安全地利用额外文本信息；结合微调和案例笔记摘要可同时改善准确率和算法公平性。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly being considered for prediction tasks in high-stakes social service settings, but their algorithmic fairness properties in this context are poorly understood. In this short technical report, we audit the algorithmic fairness of LLM-based tabular classification on a real housing placement prediction task, augmented with street outreach casenotes from a nonprofit partner. We audit multi-class classification error disparities. We find that a fine-tuned model augmented with casenote summaries can improve accuracy while reducing algorithmic fairness disparities. We experiment with variable importance improvements to zero-shot tabular classification and find mixed results on resulting algorithmic fairness. Overall, given historical inequities in housing placement, it is crucial to audit LLM use. We find that leveraging LLMs to augment tabular classification with casenote summaries can safely leverage additional text information at low implementation burden. The outreach casenotes are fairly short and heavily redacted. Our assessment is that LLM zero-shot classification does not introduce additional textual biases beyond algorithmic biases in tabular classification. Combining fine-tuning and leveraging casenote summaries can improve accuracy and algorithmic fairness.

</details>


### [515] [Regulating Artificial Intimacy: From Locks and Blocks to Relational Accountability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18893)
*Henry Fraser,Jessica M. Szczuka,Raffaele F. Ciriello*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文系统审视了伴侣聊天机器人领域的最新监管动态，分析了多司法管辖区（澳大利亚、加州、纽约）的强制性法规与OpenAI等主要供应商的自律措施，批判性地指出现有监管聚焦于离散伤害、狭隘的脆弱性概念和高度具体的问责流程，未能触及供应商与用户之间深层的权力不对称，进而提出确立一般性、开放式的注意义务作为约束该权力、应对聊天机器人根本风险的重要第一步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 伴侣聊天机器人引发的一系列高调悲剧事件触发了异常迅速的监管反应，但现有监管举措是否充分、有效，是否触及了风险的根源，需要系统性的学术审视与批判。

Method: 采用法律文本分析，并结合监管理论、心理学和信息系统研究的洞见，对近期监管干预措施进行批判性审视，按方法和优先级对干预措施进行分类，识别监管目标、范围和模式。

Result: 现有监管体制呈现"锁与块"（如访问门控和内容审核）、针对有毒关系特征的措施以及基于流程的问责要求三种维度的组合；但当前体制倾向于关注离散伤害、狭隘的脆弱性概念或高度具体的问责流程，未能直面供应商与用户之间深层的权力不对称。

Conclusion: 有效的伴侣聊天机器人监管必须整合所有三个维度，但更需要确立一项一般性、开放式的注意义务，作为约束供应商通过规模化人工亲密关系控制用户的权力、从根本上解决聊天机器人风险的关键第一步。

Abstract: A series of high-profile tragedies involving companion chatbots has triggered an unusually rapid regulatory response. Several jurisdictions, including Australia, California, and New York, have introduced enforceable regulation, while regulators elsewhere have signaled growing concern about risks posed by companion chatbots, particularly to children. In parallel, leading providers, notably OpenAI, appear to have strengthened their self-regulatory approaches. Drawing on legal textual analysis and insights from regulatory theory, psychology, and information systems research, this paper critically examines these recent interventions. We examine what is regulated and who is regulated, identifying regulatory targets, scope, and modalities. We classify interventions by method and priority, showing how emerging regimes combine "locks and blocks", such as access gating and content moderation, with measures addressing toxic relationship features and process-based accountability requirements. We argue that effective regulation of companion chatbots must integrate all three dimensions. More, however, is required. Current regimes tend to focus on discrete harms, narrow conceptions of vulnerability, or highly specified accountability processes, while failing to confront deeper power asymmetries between providers and users. Providers of companion chatbots increasingly control artificial intimacy at scale, creating unprecedented opportunities for control through intimacy. We suggest that a general, open-ended duty of care would be an important first step toward constraining that power and addressing a fundamental source of chatbot risk. The paper contributes to debates on companion chatbot regulation and is relevant to regulators, platform providers, and scholars concerned with digital intimacy, law and technology, and fairness, accountability, and transparency in sociotechnical systems.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.NC'></div>

# q-bio.NC [[Back]](#toc)

### [516] [OmniMouse: Scaling properties of multi-modal, multi-task Brain Models on 150B Neural Tokens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18827)
*Konstantin F. Willeke,Polina Turishcheva,Alex Gilbert,Goirik Chakrabarty,Hasan A. Bedel,Paul G. Fahey,Yongrong Qiu,Marissa A. Weis,Michaela Vystrčilová,Taliah Muhammad,Lydia Ntanavara,Rachel E. Froebe,Kayla Ponder,Zheng Huan Tan,Emin Orhan,Erick Cobos,Sophia Sanborn,Katrin Franke,Fabian H. Sinz,Alexander S. Ecker,Andreas S. Tolias*

Main category: q-bio.NC

TL;DR: 本文利用310万神经元、1500亿神经标记的大规模数据集训练多模态、多任务模型OmniMouse，在小鼠视觉皮层建模中实现最先进性能。研究发现模型性能随数据量可靠提升，但模型规模增大带来的收益饱和，与语言/视觉领域中数据驱动参数扩展的规律相反，揭示了脑建模领域仍处于数据限制阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证AI领域的数据和模型规模扩展规律是否同样适用于脑活动建模，探究在神经科学领域中scaling law的表现形式。

Method: 基于73只小鼠视觉皮层310万神经元、323个 session、1500亿神经标记的数据集，训练多模态多任务模型OmniMouse，支持神经预测、行为解码、神经预测三种模式的灵活组合。

Result: OmniMouse在几乎所有评估场景中超越专门化基线模型；性能随数据量可靠提升，但模型规模增大带来的收益出现饱和；与语言/视觉领域的数据驱动参数扩展规律相反。

Conclusion: 小鼠视觉皮层建模仍处于数据限制阶段，更大规模和更丰富的数据集可能引发神经建模中的相变，催生类似大语言模型中涌现能力的新特性。

Abstract: Scaling data and artificial neural networks has transformed AI, driving breakthroughs in language and vision. Whether similar principles apply to modeling brain activity remains unclear. Here we leveraged a dataset of 3.1 million neurons from the visual cortex of 73 mice across 323 sessions, totaling more than 150 billion neural tokens recorded during natural movies, images and parametric stimuli, and behavior. We train multi-modal, multi-task models that support three regimes flexibly at test time: neural prediction, behavioral decoding, neural forecasting, or any combination of the three. OmniMouse achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming specialized baselines across nearly all evaluation regimes. We find that performance scales reliably with more data, but gains from increasing model size saturate. This inverts the standard AI scaling story: in language and computer vision, massive datasets make parameter scaling the primary driver of progress, whereas in brain modeling -- even in the mouse visual cortex, a relatively simple system -- models remain data-limited despite vast recordings. The observation of systematic scaling raises the possibility of phase transitions in neural modeling, where larger and richer datasets might unlock qualitatively new capabilities, paralleling the emergent properties seen in large language models. Code available at https://github.com/enigma-brain/omnimouse.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [517] [Diagnosing CFG Interpretation in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20811)
*Hanqi Li,Lu Chen,Kai Yu*

Main category: cs.AI
