These results highlight ETI as a lightweight and robust mechanism for improving coordination in diverse multi-agent settings, and provide the first systematic evidence that LLM agents can (i) reliably infer others' traits from interaction histories and (ii) leverage structured awareness of others' traits for coordination.

</details>


### [555] [Resolving space-sharing conflicts in road user interactions through uncertainty reduction: An active inference-based computational model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19838)
*Julian F. Schumann,Johan Engström,Ran Wei,Shu-Yuan Liu,Jens Kober,Arkady Zgonnikov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文扩展了基于主动推理的驾驶员行为模型，模拟双智能体交互，包含三种不确定性降低机制：隐式沟通（行为耦合）、规范期望（交通规则）和显式沟通。在简化交叉口场景中，规范和显式沟通线索可提高冲突解决成功率，但当对方违反规范或传递误导信息时，反而可能导致碰撞。主动推理为道路使用者交互建模提供了新框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 道路使用者如何解决空间共享冲突对交通安全和自动驾驶部署至关重要，现有模型仅捕捉交互的特定方面（如显式沟通），缺乏理论严谨的计算框架。

Method: 扩展已有基于主动推理的驾驶员行为模型，模拟两个智能体的交互行为，整合三种不确定性降低机制：直接行为耦合的隐式沟通、基于规范期望（如停车标志、优先规则）的依赖、以及显式沟通。

Result: 在简化交叉口场景中，规范和显式沟通线索能提高冲突解决成功率；但当对方违反规范期望或传递误导信息时，依赖这些线索可能导致碰撞。

Conclusion: 主动推理为道路使用者交互建模提供了新框架，该框架不仅适用于交通领域，也可推广至其他领域。

Abstract: Understanding how road users resolve space-sharing conflicts is important both for traffic safety and the safe deployment of autonomous vehicles. While existing models have captured specific aspects of such interactions (e.g., explicit communication), a theoretically-grounded computational framework has been lacking. In this paper, we extend a previously developed active inference-based driver behavior model to simulate interactive behavior of two agents. Our model captures three complementary mechanisms for uncertainty reduction in interaction: (i) implicit communication via direct behavioral coupling, (ii) reliance on normative expectations (stop signs, priority rules, etc.), and (iii) explicit communication. In a simplified intersection scenario, we show that normative and explicit communication cues can increase the likelihood of a successful conflict resolution. However, this relies on agents acting as expected. In situations where another agent (intentionally or unintentionally) violates normative expectations or communicates misleading information, reliance on these cues may induce collisions. These findings illustrate how active inference can provide a novel framework for modeling road user interactions which is also applicable in other fields.

</details>


### [556] [UAF: A Unified Audio Front-end LLM for Full-Duplex Speech Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19221)
*Yadong Li,Guoxin Wu,Haiping Hou,Biye Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出首个统一音频前端大语言模型（UAF），将语音活动检测、话轮切换检测、说话人识别、语音识别和问答等多种前端任务统一为自回归序列预测问题，采用流式固定时长音频块输入和参考音频提示，在多项前端任务上取得领先性能，并显著提升实际交互场景中的响应延迟和打断准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统级联式语音处理流水线存在累积延迟、信息丢失和错误传播等严重问题，而现有端到端音频大语言模型（如GPT-4o）本质上是半双工的，且依赖一系列独立的任务特定前端组件（如VAD、话轮切换检测）。作者观察到优化语音前端与推进后端统一模型对于实现无缝、响应式的交互同样关键，因此需要弥合这一差距。

Method: 将多种音频前端任务（VAD、TD、SR、ASR、QA）统一建模为单一的自回归序列预测问题。模型以流式固定时长音频块（如600ms）作为输入，在开始时使用参考音频提示锚定目标说话人，然后回归生成离散token，这些token编码了语义内容和系统级状态控制（如打断信号）。

Result: 在多项音频前端任务上取得了领先性能，并在真实交互场景中显著提升了响应延迟和打断准确率。

Conclusion: 提出的UAF模型是首个面向全双工语音系统的统一音频前端大语言模型，有效弥合了前端处理与后端统一模型之间的差距，为实现无缝、低延迟的类人语音交互提供了新范式。

Abstract: Full-duplex speech interaction, as the most natural and intuitive mode of human communication, is driving artificial intelligence toward more human-like conversational systems. Traditional cascaded speech processing pipelines suffer from critical limitations, including accumulated latency, information loss, and error propagation across modules. To address these issues, recent efforts focus on the end-to-end audio large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4o, which primarily unify speech understanding and generation task. However, most of these models are inherently half-duplex, and rely on a suite of separate, task-specific front-end components, such as voice activity detection (VAD) and turn-taking detection (TD). In our development of speech assistant, we observed that optimizing the speech front-end is equally crucial as advancing the back-end unified model for achieving seamless, responsive interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose the first unified audio front-end LLM (UAF) tailored for full-duplex speech systems. Our model reformulates diverse audio front-end tasks into a single auto-regressive sequence prediction problem, including VAD, TD, speaker recognition (SR), automatic speech recognition (ASR) and question answer (QA). It takes streaming fixed-duration audio chunk (e.g., 600 ms) as input, leverages a reference audio prompt to anchor the target speaker at the beginning, and regressively generates discrete tokens encoding both semantic content and system-level state controls (e.g., interruption signals). Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves leading performance across multiple audio front-end tasks and significantly enhances response latency and interruption accuracy in real-world interaction scenarios.

</details>


### [557] [Reasoning-Aware AIGC Detection via Alignment and Reinforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19172)
*Zhao Wang,Max Xiong,Jianxun Lian,Zhicheng Dou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AIGC-text-bank多领域数据集和REVEAL检测框架，通过两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）生成可解释推理链，实现AIGC文本检测的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM的快速发展使得AI生成内容检测需求日益迫切，但现有方法在模型演进下面临挑战，且缺乏可解释性。

Method: 构建AIGC-text-bank多领域数据集；提出REVEAL框架，采用两阶段训练策略：先进行监督微调建立推理能力，再通过强化学习提升准确性、逻辑一致性并减少幻觉。

Result: REVEAL在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，实现了鲁棒且透明的AIGC检测。

Conclusion: REVEAL通过生成可解释推理链提升了AIGC检测的可信度和透明度，项目已开源。

Abstract: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) have elevated the need for reliable AI-generated content (AIGC) detection, which remains challenging as models evolve. We introduce AIGC-text-bank, a comprehensive multi-domain dataset with diverse LLM sources and authorship scenarios, and propose REVEAL, a detection framework that generates interpretable reasoning chains before classification. Our approach uses a two-stage training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to establish reasoning capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning to improve accuracy, improve logical consistency, and reduce hallucinations. Extensive experiments show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a robust and transparent solution for AIGC detection. The project is open-source at https://aka.ms/reveal

</details>


### [558] [Has Automated Essay Scoring Reached Sufficient Accuracy? Deriving Achievable QWK Ceilings from Classical Test Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19131)
*Masaki Uto*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对自动作文评分（AES）中常用的评价指标QWK，基于经典测试理论中的信度概念，推导出两个数据集特定的QWK上限：理论上限（理想模型在标签噪声下可达到的最大QWK）和类人上限（具有人类评分误差水平的AES模型可达到的QWK），并指出人-人QWK会低估真实上限。模拟实验验证了所提上限的有效性，真实基准实验阐明了现代AES模型的当前表现和剩余提升空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于基准数据集中的标签由人工评分员标注且必然存在评分误差，导致AES模型的QWK得分理论上能达到什么水平、实践中达到什么水平才足以部署，这两个问题尚不明确。因此需要推导合理的QWK上限来指导模型评估与部署决策。

Method: 基于经典测试理论中的信度概念，从标准双评分工基准数据中估计两个QWK上限：理论上限（完美预测潜在真分数的理想模型在噪声标签下的最大QWK）和类人上限（具有人类水平评分误差的AES模型可达到的QWK）。通过模拟实验验证，并在真实基准上对比现代AES模型的性能。

Result: 模拟实验验证了所提上限的有效性；真实基准实验表明，所提出的两个上限能够清晰揭示现代AES模型的当前性能水平及其与理论上限之间的剩余提升空间，并证明人-人QWK会低估真实上限。

Conclusion: 本文提出的两个QWK上限为AES模型的评估和部署提供了更合理的参考标准，有助于更准确地判断模型的真实表现和优化空间。

Abstract: Automated essay scoring (AES) is commonly evaluated on public benchmarks using quadratic weighted kappa (QWK). However, because benchmark labels are assigned by human raters and inevitably contain scoring errors, it remains unclear both what QWK is theoretically attainable and what level is practically sufficient for deployment. We therefore derive two dataset-specific QWK ceilings based on the reliability concept in classical test theory, which can be estimated from standard two-rater benchmarks without additional annotation. The first is the theoretical ceiling: the maximum QWK that an ideal AES model that perfectly predicts latent true scores can achieve under label noise. The second is the human-like ceiling: the QWK attainable by an AES model with human-level scoring error, providing a practical target when AES is intended to replace a single human rater. We further show that human--human QWK, often used as a ceiling reference, can underestimate the true ceiling. Simulation experiments validate the proposed ceilings, and experiments on real benchmarks illustrate how they clarify the current performance and remaining headroom of modern AES models.

</details>


### [559] [Towards Scalable Lifelong Knowledge Editing with Selective Knowledge Suppression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19089)
*Dahyun Jung,Jaewook Lee,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LightEdit是一种轻量级终身知识编辑框架，通过检索相关信息并采用解码策略抑制模型原始知识概率，在ZSRE、Counterfact和RIPE基准上超越现有方法，实现了高效、可扩展且低成本的持续知识更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有终身知识编辑方法面临两个主要问题：参数编辑方法因灾难性遗忘导致连续编辑时稳定性不足；检索式方法虽能缓解该问题，但训练成本高、跨数据集适用性有限。因此，需要一种低成本、高可扩展性的终身知识编辑方法。

Method: LightEdit框架包含两个核心步骤：1) 从检索信息中选择相关知识以有效修改查询；2) 引入解码策略，抑制模型原有的知识概率分布，从而基于选定信息实现高效编辑。

Result: 在ZSRE、Counterfact和RIPE三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，LightEdit在终身知识编辑任务中优于现有方法。此外，由于最小化了训练成本，LightEdit实现了高性价比的可扩展性。

Conclusion: LightEdit通过检索增强和解码抑制策略，以低训练成本解决了终身知识编辑中的灾难性遗忘和跨数据集泛化问题，为大规模语言模型的持续知识更新提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) require frequent knowledge updates to reflect changing facts and mitigate hallucinations. To meet this demand, lifelong knowledge editing has emerged as a continual approach to modify specific pieces of knowledge without retraining the entire model. Existing parameter editing methods struggle with stability during sequential edits due to catastrophic forgetting. While retrieval-based approaches are proposed to alleviate this issue, their applicability remains limited across various datasets because of high training costs. To address these limitations and enhance scalability in lifelong settings, we propose LightEdit. Our framework first selects relevant knowledge from retrieved information to modify the query effectively. It then incorporates a decoding strategy to suppress the model's original knowledge probabilities, thereby enabling efficient edits based on the selected information. Extensive experiments on ZSRE, Counterfact, and RIPE benchmarks demonstrate that LightEdit outperforms existing lifelong knowledge editing methods. Furthermore, by minimizing training costs, LightEdit achieves cost-effective scalability, enabling easy adaptation to various datasets.

</details>


### [560] [OLLM: Options-based Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19087)
*Shashank Sharma,Janina Hoffmann,Vinay Namboodiri*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Options LLM（OLLM），通过将标准LLM的单个下一个token预测替换为一组由离散潜变量索引的learned options，显式建模多个合理的下一个token选项。在1.7B骨干模型上仅训练1.56%参数，在OmniMath数学推理任务上，最优潜变量选择下准确率达~70%，远超LoRA基线（51%）。在低维option空间中训练策略进行奖励优化，显著减少对齐问题（如语言切换），且对齐源于模型结构而非额外损失函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准LLM依赖温度或采样启发式来生成多样性，缺乏对多个合理下一个token的显式建模，导致可控性差、对齐问题多。本文旨在通过optionized next-token modeling增强LLM的可控性、鲁棒性和效率，并探索潜空间策略学习作为RL的新方向。

Method: OLLM作为轻量级"插件"，在输出头前插入编码器和解码器两个层。编码器将隐藏状态映射到离散潜变量空间，每个潜变量对应一个learned option（多个合理的下一个token）。解码器根据选中的option生成输出。仅需训练少量参数（1.56%），可适配几乎任何预训练LLM。在潜空间中训练紧凑策略，通过选择latent来控制生成过程。

Result: 在1.7B骨干模型上，OLLM在OmniMath数学推理任务中，最优潜变量选择下达到~70%准确率，而SOTA LoRA基线仅51%。潜空间策略学习在奖励优化中样本效率更高，且显著减少了语言切换和退化推理等对齐问题。

Conclusion: Optionized next-token modeling能有效增强LLM的可控性、鲁棒性和效率，尤其适用于数学推理。对齐效果源于模型结构本身而非额外损失函数，潜空间策略学习是LLM强化学习的一个有前景的方向。

Abstract: We introduce Options LLM (OLLM), a simple, general method that replaces the single next-token prediction of standard LLMs with a \textit{set of learned options} for the next token, indexed by a discrete latent variable. Instead of relying on temperature or sampling heuristics to induce diversity, OLLM models variation explicitly: a small latent space parametrizes multiple plausible next-token options which can be selected or searched by a downstream policy. Architecturally, OLLM is a lightweight "plug-in" that inserts two layers: an encoder and a decoder, before the output head, allowing almost any pretrained LLM to be converted with minimal additional parameters. We apply OLLM to a 1.7B-parameter backbone (only $1.56\%$ of parameters trainable) trained on OpenMathReasoning and evaluated on OmniMath. The SOTA LoRA-adapted baselines peak at $51\%$ final answer correctness, while OLLM's option set allows up to $\sim 70\%$ under optimal latent selection. We then train a compact policy in the latent space that emits latents to control generation. Operating in a low-dimensional option space makes reward optimization far more sample-efficient and substantially reduces common misalignments (e.g., language switching or degenerate reasoning), as the policy is constrained to options learned during SFT. Crucially, this alignment arises from model structure rather than additional KL or handcrafted alignment losses. Our results demonstrate that optionized next-token modeling enhances controllability, robustness, and efficiency in math reasoning, and highlight latent-space policy learning as a promising direction for reinforcement learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [561] [Reinforcement Learning Improves LLM Accuracy and Reasoning in Disease Classification from Radiology Reports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19060)
*Yishu Wei,Yi Lin,Adam Flanders,George Shih,Yifan Peng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出两阶段方法：先对轻量级LLM进行疾病标签的监督微调（SFT），再通过群组相对策略优化（GRPO）优化预测的准确性和格式，在不使用推理监督的情况下提升放射学报告疾病分类的准确性和推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 放射学报告的准确疾病分类对许多应用至关重要，但监督微调虽然能提升分类准确性，却会损害模型的推理能力。

Method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段对轻量级LLM进行疾病标签的监督微调（SFT）；第二阶段采用群组相对策略优化（GRPO），通过优化准确性和格式来精炼预测，无需推理监督。

Result: 在三个放射科医生标注的数据集上，SFT优于基线方法，GRPO进一步提升了分类性能，并增强了推理的召回率和全面性。

Conclusion: 所提出的两阶段方法（SFT+GRPO）能有效平衡疾病分类准确性与推理能力，在无需推理监督的情况下同时提升分类性能和推理质量。

Abstract: Accurate disease classification from radiology reports is essential for many applications. While supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of lightweight LLMs improves accuracy, it can degrade reasoning. We propose a two-stage approach: SFT on disease labels followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to refine predictions by optimizing accuracy and format without reasoning supervision. Across three radiologist-annotated datasets, SFT outperformed baselines and GRPO further improved classification and enhanced reasoning recall and comprehensiveness.

</details>


### [562] [Personalized Benchmarking: Evaluating LLMs by Individual Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18943)
*Cristina Garbacea,Heran Wang,Chenhao Tan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文证明当前LLM基准测试通过聚合所有用户偏好计算排名，忽略了个体差异。通过对115名Chatbot Arena用户的ELO和Bradley-Terry分析，发现个体排名与聚合排名相关性极低（Bradley-Terry平均ρ=0.04，57%用户呈零或负相关；ELO ρ=0.43），且用户查询主题和写作风格的异质性显著影响模型偏好。研究呼吁开发个性化LLM基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM基准测试采用聚合平均的方式评估模型与人类偏好的对齐程度，忽略了不同用户在不同场景下的个性化偏好差异，导致模型排名无法反映个体用户的真实需求。

Method: 基于115名活跃Chatbot Arena用户数据，使用ELO评分和Bradley-Terry系数计算个性化模型排名；通过主题建模和风格分析挖掘用户查询特征与排名差异的关系；利用主题和风格特征组合预测用户特定模型排名。

Result: 个体排名与聚合排名严重偏离：Bradley-Terry相关系数平均仅0.04，57%用户呈近零或负相关；ELO评分中等相关（ρ=0.43）。用户主题兴趣和沟通风格呈现显著异质性，是影响模型偏好的关键因素。

Conclusion: 聚合基准测试无法捕捉大多数用户的个体偏好，亟需发展能根据个体用户偏好对LLM模型进行排名的个性化基准测试方法。

Abstract: With the rise in capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and their deployment in real-world tasks, evaluating LLM alignment with human preferences has become an important challenge. Current benchmarks average preferences across all users to compute aggregate ratings, overlooking individual user preferences when establishing model rankings. Since users have varying preferences in different contexts, we call for personalized LLM benchmarks that rank models according to individual needs. We compute personalized model rankings using ELO ratings and Bradley-Terry coefficients for 115 active Chatbot Arena users and analyze how user query characteristics (topics and writing style) relate to LLM ranking variations. We demonstrate that individual rankings of LLM models diverge dramatically from aggregate LLM rankings, with Bradley-Terry correlations averaging only $ρ= 0.04$ (57\% of users show near-zero or negative correlation) and ELO ratings showing moderate correlation ($ρ= 0.43$). Through topic modeling and style analysis, we find users exhibit substantial heterogeneity in topical interests and communication styles, influencing their model preferences. We further show that a compact combination of topic and style features provides a useful feature space for predicting user-specific model rankings. Our results provide strong quantitative evidence that aggregate benchmarks fail to capture individual preferences for most users, and highlight the importance of developing personalized benchmarks that rank LLM models according to individual user preferences.

</details>


### [563] [Learning Lifted Action Models from Unsupervised Visual Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19043)
*Kai Xi,Stephen Gould,Sylvie Thiébaux*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型的深度学习框架，通过联合学习状态预测、动作预测和动作模型，并引入混合整数线性规划（MILP）防止预测崩溃和自强化错误，实验证明该方法能帮助模型逃离局部最优并收敛到全局一致解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际AI规划应用中，高效构建描述动作前置条件和效果的动作模型至关重要。现有工作多从高层状态/动作序列学习此类模型，而本文解决更具挑战性的设置：从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型，且不观察动作。

Method: 提出深度学习框架联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型；引入混合整数线性规划（MILP），对部分轨迹的预测状态、动作和动作模型进行逻辑一致性求解，生成伪标签用于指导后续训练。

Result: 在多个领域上的实验表明，集成MILP校正能帮助模型逃离局部最优，收敛到全局一致的解。

Conclusion: MILP约束机制有效解决了预测崩溃和自强化错误问题，提升了从视觉序列中学习动作模型的全局一致性。

Abstract: Efficient construction of models capturing the preconditions and effects of actions is essential for applying AI planning in real-world domains. Extensive prior work has explored learning such models from high-level descriptions of state and/or action sequences. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging setting: learning lifted action models from sequences of state images, without action observation. We propose a deep learning framework that jointly learns state prediction, action prediction, and a lifted action model. We also introduce a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) to prevent prediction collapse and self-reinforcing errors among predictions. The MILP takes the predicted states, actions, and action model over a subset of traces and solves for logically consistent states, actions, and action model that are as close as possible to the original predictions. Pseudo-labels extracted from the MILP solution are then used to guide further training. Experiments across multiple domains show that integrating MILP-based correction helps the model escape local optima and converge toward globally consistent solutions.

</details>


### [564] [Plausible Reasoning and First-Order Plausible Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19036)
*David Billington*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了可废止推理的17条原则（14条必要+3条期望），定义了一种满足所有必要原则和除两条外所有期望原则的一阶逻辑——可废止逻辑（PL），并包含8种推理算法。这是目前已知唯一能做到这一点的逻辑系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可废止陈述（通常为真但偶尔为假的陈述）在日常推理中广泛存在，但缺乏一种不使用概率或数值、仅基于逻辑形式的严格推理框架。现有逻辑系统无法同时满足可废止推理的各项合理原则。

Method: 首先提出17条可废止推理的原则（14条必要、3条期望），然后定义一阶可废止逻辑（PL），通过8种推理算法处理不同可废止推理情境下的合理结论。文章是对同名专著（PRPL）的浓缩，每节对应书中一章。

Result: PL满足所有14条必要原则和3条期望原则中的大部分（仅2条未满足），并能正确处理所有重要的可废止推理实例。据作者所知，这是唯一做到这一点的逻辑系统。

Conclusion: 可废止逻辑（PL）为不使用数值的概率推理提供了一种严谨的逻辑框架，尽管仍有少量期望原则未能满足，但它在可废止推理领域具有独特的优势。

Abstract: Defeasible statements are statements that are likely, or probable, or usually true, but may occasionally be false. Plausible reasoning makes conclusions from statements that are either facts or defeasible statements without using numbers. So there are no probabilities or suchlike involved. Seventeen principles of logics that do plausible reasoning are suggested and several important plausible reasoning examples are considered. There are 14 necessary principles and 3 desirable principles, one of which is not formally stated. A first-order logic, called Plausible Logic (PL), is defined that satisfies all but two of the desirable principles and reasons correctly with all the examples. As far as we are aware, this is the only such logic. PL has 8 reasoning algorithms because, from a given plausible reasoning situation, there are different sensible conclusions. This article is a condensation of my book `Plausible Reasoning and Plausible Logic' (PRPL), which is to be submitted. Each section of this article corresponds to a chapter in PRPL, and vice versa. The proofs of all the results are in PRPL, so they are omitted in this article.

</details>


### [565] [SAVOIR: Learning Social Savoir-Faire via Shapley-based Reward Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18982)
*Xiachong Feng,Yi Jiang,Xiaocheng Feng,Deyi Yin,Libo Qin,Yangfan Ye,Lei Huang,Weitao Ma,Yuxuan Gu,Chonghan Qin,Bing Qin,Lingpeng Kong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SAVOIR框架，基于合作博弈论中的Shapley值对社交对话中的话语进行公平信用分配，结合预期效用理论实现从回顾性归因到前瞻性评估的转变，在SOTOPIA基准上达到SOTA性能，7B模型媲美GPT-4o等专有模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接用语言模型分配回合级奖励，产生的是缺乏理论基础的回顾性归因；需要一种理论上可解释的信用分配方法来解决社交智能中多轮对话结果的信用分配问题。

Method: 基于合作博弈论，将预期效用（前瞻性评估话语的战略潜力）与Shapley值（具有效率、对称性和边际性公理保证的公平信用分配）相结合，构建SAVOIR框架。

Result: 在SOTOPIA基准测试中，所有评估设置均达到新SOTA；7B模型性能匹配或超越GPT-4o和Claude-3.5-Sonnet等专有模型；大型推理模型表现不佳，表明社交智能需要与分析推理不同的能力。

Conclusion: SAVOIR为语言智能体的社交学习提供了理论上有保证的信用分配方法，且证明了社交智能与推理能力是正交的独立维度。

Abstract: Social intelligence, the ability to navigate complex interpersonal interactions, presents a fundamental challenge for language agents. Training such agents via reinforcement learning requires solving the credit assignment problem: determining how individual utterances contribute to multi-turn dialogue outcomes. Existing approaches directly employ language models to distribute episode-level rewards, yielding attributions that are retrospective and lack theoretical grounding. We propose SAVOIR (ShApley Value fOr SocIal RL), a novel principled framework grounded in cooperative game theory. Our approach combines two complementary principles: expected utility shifts evaluation from retrospective attribution to prospective valuation, capturing an utterance's strategic potential for enabling favorable future trajectories; Shapley values ensure fair credit distribution with axiomatic guarantees of efficiency, symmetry, and marginality. Experiments on the SOTOPIA benchmark demonstrate that SAVOIR achieves new state-of-the-art performance across all evaluation settings, with our 7B model matching or exceeding proprietary models including GPT-4o and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. Notably, even large reasoning models consistently underperform, suggesting social intelligence requires qualitatively different capabilities than analytical reasoning.

</details>


### [566] [DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18964)
*Ahmed G. A. H Ahmed,C. Okan Sakar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了DW-Bench基准，通过在数据仓库模式图上集成外键和数据沿袭边来评估LLM的图拓扑推理能力，包含1,046个自动生成的可验证问题。实验表明工具增强方法显著优于静态方法，但在复杂组合子类型上表现停滞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准缺乏对数据仓库场景中图拓扑推理（特别是同时包含外键和数据沿袭边的情况）的系统评估，因此需要构建专门基准来填补这一空白。

Method: 构建DW-Bench基准，包含5个数据仓库模式、1,046个自动生成且可验证的问题；对比工具增强方法与静态方法在图拓扑推理任务上的表现。

Result: 工具增强方法整体上显著优于静态方法，但在处理复杂组合子类型问题时性能提升有限，出现性能瓶颈。

Conclusion: DW-Bench有效揭示了LLM在图拓扑推理上的能力差异，工具增强方法虽有效但仍有改进空间，特别是针对复杂组合推理场景。

Abstract: This paper introduces DW-Bench, a new benchmark that evaluates large language models (LLMs) on graph-topology reasoning over data warehouse schemas, explicitly integrating both foreign-key (FK) and data-lineage edges. The benchmark comprises 1,046 automatically generated, verifiably correct questions across five schemas. Experiments show that tool-augmented methods substantially outperform static approaches but plateau on hard compositional subtypes.

</details>


### [567] [Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Simulation of Mixed Automated and Human Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12857)
*Saeed Rahmani,Shiva Rasouli,Daphne Cornelisse,Eugene Vinitsky,Bart van Arem,Simeon C. Calvert*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了AI方法在混合自主交通仿真中用于建模自动驾驶车辆与人类驾驶行为的应用，提出了涵盖个体行为建模到全场景仿真的统一分类体系，分析了现有仿真平台的不足并指出了弥合差距的研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真工具侧重于图形真实感，依赖简单的基于规则的模型，无法准确表征驾驶行为的复杂性与交互；尽管AI展现出解决这些局限的巨大潜力，但缺乏对AI方法在混合自主交通仿真中应用的全面综述，现有综述要么只关注仿真工具而忽视AI方法，要么只关注自我决策而忽视周边交通建模，且缺乏统一的分类体系。

Method: 本文提出了一种分类体系，将AI方法组织为三个系列：智能体级行为模型、环境级仿真方法、以及认知与物理信息方法；并从时间线梳理AI方法发展，评审评估协议与指标、仿真工具和数据集，涵盖交通工程与计算机科学两个视角。

Result: 构建了统一的AI方法分类体系，识别出现有仿真平台在混合自主研究需求上的不足，提供了评估协议、指标、仿真工具和数据集的系统评审，并指出了弥合交通工程与计算机科学社区之间差距的方向。

Conclusion: 本文通过跨学科的综合综述，为混合自主交通仿真中的AI方法研究提供了结构化指导，有助于推动更真实、更复杂的交通仿真能力发展。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are now operating on public roads, which makes their testing and validation more critical than ever. Simulation offers a safe and controlled environment for evaluating AV performance in varied conditions. However, existing simulation tools mainly focus on graphical realism and rely on simple rule-based models and therefore fail to accurately represent the complexity of driving behaviors and interactions. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown strong potential to address these limitations; however, despite the rapid progress across AI methodologies, a comprehensive survey of their application to mixed autonomy traffic simulation remains lacking. Existing surveys either focus on simulation tools without examining the AI methods behind them, or cover ego-centric decision-making without addressing the broader challenge of modeling surrounding traffic. Moreover, they do not offer a unified taxonomy of AI methods covering individual behavior modeling to full scene simulation. To address these gaps, this survey provides a structured review and synthesis of AI methods for modeling AV and human driving behavior in mixed autonomy traffic simulation. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes methods into three families: agent-level behavior models, environment-level simulation methods, and cognitive and physics-informed methods. The survey analyzes how existing simulation platforms fall short of the needs of mixed autonomy research and outlines directions to narrow this gap. It also provides a chronological overview of AI methods and reviews evaluation protocols and metrics, simulation tools, and datasets. By covering both traffic engineering and computer science perspectives, we aim to bridge the gap between these two communities.

</details>


### [568] [Error-free Training for MedMNIST Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18916)
*Bo Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出人工特殊智能（ASI）概念，使分类问题的机器学习模型实现零错误训练，避免重复犯错。在18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集上应用该方法，除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余均达到完美训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型在分类任务中无法避免重复犯错，作者希望提出一种新范式，使模型训练达到零错误，从而消除重复性错误。

Method: 提出人工特殊智能（ASI）概念，设计一种无错误训练方法，应用于18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集。

Result: 在18个MedMNIST数据集中，除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余均实现完美（零错误）训练。

Conclusion: 人工特殊智能（ASI）方法能够使大多数生物医学分类任务实现零错误训练，但双标签问题仍是一个挑战。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new concept called Artificial Special Intelligence by which Machine Learning models for the classification problem can be trained error-free, thus acquiring the capability of not making repeated mistakes. The method is applied to 18 MedMNIST biomedical datasets. Except for three datasets, which suffer from the double-labeling problem, all are trained to perfection.

</details>


### [569] [AI scientists produce results without reasoning scientifically](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18805)
*Martiño Ríos-García,Nawaf Alampara,Chandan Gupta,Indrajeet Mandal,Sajid Mannan,Ali Asghar Aghajani,N. M. Anoop Krishnan,Kevin Maik Jablonka*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 基于LLM的科学智能体在超过25,000次运行中，基础模型解释了41.4%的方差，而脚手架仅占1.5%。68%的轨迹忽略证据，仅26%存在反驳驱动的信念修正。智能体执行科学工作流但不具备科学推理的认知结构，且无法通过脚手架工程修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解基于LLM的科学智能体是否遵循使科学探究具有自我纠错能力的认知规范，即评估其推理的认知结构而非仅关注任务绩效。

Method: 跨8个领域进行超过25,000次智能体运行，通过双重视角分析：(i) 系统性能分析，分解基础模型与智能体脚手架的贡献；(ii) 智能体推理认知结构的行为分析。

Result: 基础模型是性能和行为的首要决定因素（解释41.4%方差，脚手架仅1.5%）。68%的轨迹忽略证据，26%存在反驳驱动信念修正，汇聚性多测试证据罕见。该模式在计算工作流和假设驱动探究中一致出现，即使提供近乎完整的成功推理轨迹作为上下文仍持续存在。

Conclusion: 当前基于LLM的智能体执行科学工作流但不具备科学推理的认知模式。基于结果的评估无法检测这些失败，脚手架工程无法修复。除非推理本身成为训练目标，否则此类智能体产生的科学知识无法通过生成过程得到证明。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based systems are increasingly deployed to conduct scientific research autonomously, yet whether their reasoning adheres to the epistemic norms that make scientific inquiry self-correcting is poorly understood. Here, we evaluate LLM-based scientific agents across eight domains, spanning workflow execution to hypothesis-driven inquiry, through more than 25,000 agent runs and two complementary lenses: (i) a systematic performance analysis that decomposes the contributions of the base model and the agent scaffold, and (ii) a behavioral analysis of the epistemological structure of agent reasoning. We observe that the base model is the primary determinant of both performance and behavior, accounting for 41.4% of explained variance versus 1.5% for the scaffold. Across all configurations, evidence is ignored in 68% of traces, refutation-driven belief revision occurs in 26%, and convergent multi-test evidence is rare. The same reasoning pattern appears whether the agent executes a computational workflow or conducts hypothesis-driven inquiry. They persist even when agents receive near-complete successful reasoning trajectories as context, and the resulting unreliability compounds across repeated trials in epistemically demanding domains. Thus, current LLM-based agents execute scientific workflows but do not exhibit the epistemic patterns that characterize scientific reasoning. Outcome-based evaluation cannot detect these failures, and scaffold engineering alone cannot repair them. Until reasoning itself becomes a training target, the scientific knowledge produced by such agents cannot be justified by the process that generated it.

</details>


### [570] [Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18882)
*George Koomullil*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于Lean 4的形式化验证框架，将AI与交互式定理证明结合用于专利分析。DAG覆盖核心算法经过完全机器验证，支持自由实施、权利要求构建敏感性、跨权利要求一致性和等同原则等分析。这是首个将依赖类型理论的交互式定理证明应用于知识产权分析的工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有专利分析方法要么依赖人工专家分析（慢、不可扩展），要么依赖ML/NLP方法（概率性、不透明、非组合式）。本文旨在通过形式化验证提供可证明正确的数学保证，解决现有方法的可扩展性和可靠性问题。

Method: 专利权利要求编码为DAG，匹配强度编码为已验证完全格中的元素，置信度分数通过经过正确性证明的单调函数沿依赖关系传播。核心算法1b在固定有界匹配分数后经过完全机器验证。高层定理以非正式证明草图形式存在，通过"不可信生成器+内核检查+无公理审计"架构实现安全性保证。

Result: 实现了五个IP用例（专利到产品映射、自由实施、权利要求构建敏感性、跨权利要求一致性、等同原则）的六种算法。结构引理、覆盖核心生成器和闭环路径恒等式W_cov在Lean 4中经过机器验证。在合成内存模块权利要求上进行了加权覆盖和构建敏感性分析案例研究。

Conclusion: 本文框架的保证是有条件的：保证ML分数下游计算在数学上的正确性，但不保证ML分数本身的准确性。与已裁决案件的验证留作未来工作。这是将交互式定理证明应用于知识产权分析的首次尝试，为可验证的专利分析开辟了新方向。

Abstract: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.

</details>


### [571] [ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18789)
*Jiacheng Liang,Yao Ma,Tharindu Kumarage,Satyapriya Krishna,Rahul Gupta,Kai-Wei Chang,Aram Galstyan,Charith Peris*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ARES框架系统性地发现并修复RLHF中核心LLM与奖励模型（RM）同时失效的双重漏洞，通过“安全导师”动态构造对抗性提示，分阶段修复RM和核心模型，显著提升安全鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有红队攻击主要针对策略层面的弱点，但忽视了核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的系统性弱点，而奖励模型作为RLHF的单点故障，其不完善性会导致安全对齐失效。

Method: ARES使用“安全导师”动态组合结构化组件类型（主题、角色、策略、目标）生成语义连贯的对抗性提示，同时构造恶意和安全响应对，实现双目标攻击；然后分两阶段修复：先微调RM提升有害内容检测能力，再利用改进后的RM优化核心LLM。

Result: 在多个对抗性安全基准测试中，ARES显著增强了安全鲁棒性，同时保持了模型能力。

Conclusion: ARES建立了一种新的RLHF安全对齐范式，通过系统性发现和修复核心LLM与RM的双重漏洞，实现了更全面的安全对齐。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem.
  We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.

</details>


### [572] [How Adversarial Environments Mislead Agentic AI?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18874)
*Zhonghao Zhan,Huichi Zhou,Zhenhao Li,Peiyuan Jing,Krinos Li,Hamed Haddadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文揭示了工具集成型智能体面临的信任鸿沟：现有评估仅测试智能体在良性环境中的工具使用能力，却从未考虑工具输出被篡改的场景。作者形式化了对抗性环境注入（AEI）威胁模型，并通过POTEMKIN框架对五种前沿智能体进行了11000+次鲁棒性测试，发现智能体面临幻觉（广度攻击导致认知漂移）和迷宫（深度攻击导致策略崩溃）两种正交攻击面，且两种鲁棒性之间存在显著权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体评估仅关注良性环境下的工具使用能力，忽视了工具输出被 adversaries 篡改的真实风险，存在严重的信任鸿沟（Trust Gap）。

Method: 形式化定义了对抗性环境注入（AEI）威胁模型，设计了两种攻击面：幻觉（广度攻击，污染检索结果诱导错误信念）和迷宫（深度攻击，利用结构陷阱导致无限循环）。通过POTEMKIN框架（兼容MCP协议）对五种前沿智能体进行11000+次鲁棒性测试。

Result: 发现显著鲁棒性差距：对一种攻击的抵抗往往增加对另一种攻击的脆弱性，证明认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性是两种独立的能力维度。

Conclusion: 智能体的评估需要从"能力测试"转向"怀疑测试"，认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性是需要分别关注的两个独立维度。

Abstract: Tool-integrated agents are deployed on the premise that external tools ground their outputs in reality. Yet this very reliance creates a critical attack surface. Current evaluations benchmark capability in benign settings, asking "can the agent use tools correctly" but never "what if the tools lie". We identify this Trust Gap: agents are evaluated for performance, not for skepticism. We formalize this vulnerability as Adversarial Environmental Injection (AEI), a threat model where adversaries compromise tool outputs to deceive agents. AEI constitutes environmental deception: constructing a "fake world" of poisoned search results and fabricated reference networks around unsuspecting agents. We operationalize this via POTEMKIN, a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-compatible harness for plug-and-play robustness testing. We identify two orthogonal attack surfaces: The Illusion (breadth attacks) poison retrieval to induce epistemic drift toward false beliefs, while The Maze (depth attacks) exploit structural traps to cause policy collapse into infinite loops. Across 11,000+ runs on five frontier agents, we find a stark robustness gap: resistance to one attack often increases vulnerability to the other, demonstrating that epistemic and navigational robustness are distinct capabilities.

</details>


### [573] [From Natural Language to Executable Narsese: A Neuro-Symbolic Benchmark and Pipeline for Reasoning with NARS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18873)
*Mina Gabriel,Pei Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个神经符号框架，将自然语言推理问题翻译为FOL和Narsese可执行形式，构建了NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准，开发了从FOL到Narsese的确定性编译流水线，并提出语言结构化感知（LSP）方法训练LLM生成推理相关的符号结构，最后通过Phi-2 LoRA适配器验证了该基准的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在需要显式符号结构、多步推理和可解释不确定性时表现不可靠，现有方法缺乏将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行形式并验证其行为一致性的系统方案。

Method: 构建NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准（自然语言推理问题+FOL+Narsese+三标签答案）；开发FOL到Narsese的确定性编译流水线，通过ONA运行时执行验证；提出LSP框架训练LLM生成推理相关符号结构；训练Phi-2 LoRA适配器进行三标签推理分类。

Result: 编译流水线生成的Narsese程序经ONA执行验证，符号目标在行为上与预期答案一致；Phi-2 LoRA适配器在NARS-Reasoning-v0.1上的三标签分类任务表明该基准支持监督适配。

Conclusion: 可执行符号生成与基于执行的验证是构建更可靠神经符号推理系统的实用途径。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are highly capable at language generation, but they remain unreliable when reasoning requires explicit symbolic structure, multi-step inference, and interpretable uncertainty. This paper presents a neuro-symbolic framework for translating natural-language reasoning problems into executable formal representations using first-order logic (FOL) and Narsese, the language of the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS). To support this direction, we introduce NARS-Reasoning-v0.1, a benchmark of natural-language reasoning problems paired with FOL forms, executable Narsese programs, and three gold labels: True, False, and Uncertain. We develop a deterministic compilation pipeline from FOL to executable Narsese and validate retained examples through runtime execution in OpenNARS for Applications (ONA), ensuring that the symbolic targets are not only syntactically well formed but also behaviorally aligned with the intended answer. We further present Language-Structured Perception (LSP), a formulation in which an LLM is trained to produce reasoning-relevant symbolic structure rather than only a final verbal response. As an initial proof of concept, we also train and release a Phi-2 LoRA adapter on NARS-Reasoning-v0.1 for three-label reasoning classification, showing that the benchmark can support supervised adaptation in addition to executable evaluation. Overall, the paper positions executable symbolic generation and execution-based validation as a practical path toward more reliable neuro-symbolic reasoning systems.

</details>


### [574] [MathNet: a Global Multimodal Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning and Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18584)
*Shaden Alshammari,Kevin Wen,Abrar Zainal,Mark Hamilton,Navid Safaei,Sultan Albarakati,William T. Freeman,Antonio Torralba*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MathNet是一个大规模、多模态、多语言的奥赛级数学问题数据集及评测基准，包含30,676道专家编写的题目，覆盖47个国家、17种语言，支持问题求解、数学感知检索和检索增强问题求解三类任务，实验表明最先进模型仍面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学推理基准在规模、语言覆盖度和任务多样性方面存在局限，缺乏高质量的多语言奥赛级数学数据集及针对数学检索的评测基准。

Method: 构建了涵盖47个国家、17种语言、跨越二十年的30,676道专家编写奥赛数学题及解答的数据集，并构造了由专家标注的数学等价问题和结构相似问题对组成的检索基准。

Result: Gemini-3.1-Pro和GPT-5在问题求解任务上分别仅达78.4%和69.3%的准确率；嵌入模型在检索等价问题上表现不佳；检索增强生成性能对检索质量高度敏感，DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale通过检索增强获得高达12%的提升。

Conclusion: MathNet是迄今最大的高质量奥赛数据集，也是首个数学问题检索评测基准，已公开发布。

Abstract: Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. We introduce MathNet, a high-quality, large-scale, multimodal, and multilingual dataset of Olympiad-level math problems together with a benchmark for evaluating mathematical reasoning in generative models and mathematical retrieval in embedding-based systems. MathNet spans 47 countries, 17 languages, and two decades of competitions, comprising 30,676 expert-authored problems with solutions across diverse domains. In addition to the core dataset, we construct a retrieval benchmark consisting of mathematically equivalent and structurally similar problem pairs curated by human experts.
  MathNet supports three tasks: (i) Problem Solving, (ii) Math-Aware Retrieval, and (iii) Retrieval-Augmented Problem Solving. Experimental results show that even state-of-the-art reasoning models (78.4% for Gemini-3.1-Pro and 69.3% for GPT-5) remain challenged, while embedding models struggle to retrieve equivalent problems. We further show that retrieval-augmented generation performance is highly sensitive to retrieval quality; for example, DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale achieves gains of up to 12%, obtaining the highest scores on the benchmark. MathNet provides the largest high-quality Olympiad dataset together with the first benchmark for evaluating mathematical problem retrieval, and we publicly release both the dataset and benchmark at https://mathnet.mit.edu.

</details>


### [575] [Beyond One Output: Visualizing and Comparing Distributions of Language Model Generations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18724)
*Emily Reif,Claire Yang,Jared Hwang,Deniz Nazar,Noah Smith,Jeff Heer*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对用户仅通过单次输出评估语言模型而忽略其分布特性的问题，本文提出GROVE——一种将多次LM生成结果可视化为文本路径图的交互式工具，并通过三项用户研究验证了其在分布理解任务中的有效性，支持图摘要与直接输出检查相结合的混合工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户通常通过单次输出与语言模型交互，但每次输出只是广阔分布中的一个样本，这种交互方式隐藏了模态、罕见边缘情况以及对微小提示变化的敏感性等分布结构，导致用户在开放式任务的提示迭代中过度从个例泛化。

Method: 首先开展了一项有13名LM研究人员的形成性研究，考察随机性在实践中何时重要、他们如何推理语言分布以及现有工作流的不足之处；基于此设计GROVE——一种交互式可视化工具，将多次LM生成表示为文本图中重叠的路径，揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类，同时保留对原始输出的访问；最后通过三项众包用户研究（分别有47、44和40名参与者）针对互补的分布任务进行评估。

Result: 图摘要能够改善多样性评估等结构性判断，而直接输出检查在细节导向的问题上仍然更强；混合工作流（结合图摘要与直接输出检查）效果最佳。

Conclusion: GROVE作为一种交互式可视化工具，能有效帮助用户理解语言模型的多重生成分布，混合工作流模式（图摘要+直接输出检查）是处理分布性任务的最佳方案。

Abstract: Users typically interact with and evaluate language models via single outputs, but each output is just one sample from a broad distribution of possible completions. This interaction hides distributional structure such as modes, uncommon edge cases, and sensitivity to small prompt changes, leading users to over-generalize from anecdotes when iterating on prompts for open-ended tasks. Informed by a formative study with researchers who use LMs (n=13) examining when stochasticity matters in practice, how they reason about distributions over language, and where current workflows break down, we introduce GROVE. GROVE is an interactive visualization that represents multiple LM generations as overlapping paths through a text graph, revealing shared structure, branching points, and clusters while preserving access to raw outputs. We evaluate across three crowdsourced user studies (N=47, 44, and 40 participants) targeting complementary distributional tasks. Our results support a hybrid workflow: graph summaries improve structural judgments such as assessing diversity, while direct output inspection remains stronger for detail-oriented questions.

</details>


### [576] [Agentic Driving Coach: Robustness and Determinism of Agentic AI-Powered Human-in-the-Loop Cyber-Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11705)
*Deeksha Prahlad,Daniel Fan,Hokeun Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于反应器模型（reactor MoC）的方法，利用开源框架Lingua Franca（LF）为基于大模型的人机协同信息物理系统（HITL CPS）引入确定性，并以智能驾驶教练为案例验证了该方法及面临的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大模型驱动的AI智能体越来越多地用于人机协同信息物理系统，但由于人类用户、AI智能体及物理环境的不可预测行为，系统存在不可控的非确定性，亟需解决这一挑战。

Method: 提出基于反应器模型（reactor model of computation）的方法，利用开源框架Lingua Franca（LF）来实现确定性的智能体AI驱动的HITL CPS。

Result: 通过智能驾驶教练这一具体案例对LF方法进行了评估，识别出了在实际应用中重新引入确定性所面临的挑战。

Conclusion: LF方法能够为基于大模型的人机协同信息物理系统提供确定性保障，但仍存在实际挑战，文中给出了解决路径。

Abstract: Foundation models, including large language models (LLMs), are increasingly used for human-in-the-loop (HITL) cyber-physical systems (CPS) because foundation model-based AI agents can potentially interact with both the physical environments and human users. However, the unpredictable behavior of human users and AI agents, in addition to the dynamically changing physical environments, leads to uncontrollable nondeterminism. To address this urgent challenge of enabling agentic AI-powered HITL CPS, we propose a reactor-model-of-computation (MoC)-based approach, realized by the open-source Lingua Franca (LF) framework. We also carry out a concrete case study using the agentic driving coach as an application of HITL CPS. By evaluating the LF-based agentic HITL CPS, we identify practical challenges in reintroducing determinism into such agentic HITL CPS and present pathways to address them.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.BM'></div>

# q-bio.BM [[Back]](#toc)

### [577] [ConforNets: Latents-Based Conformational Control in OpenFold3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18559)
*Minji Lee,Colin Kalicki,Minkyu Jeon,Aymen Qabel,Alisia Fadini,Mohammed AlQuraishi*

Main category: q-bio.BM

TL;DR: 本文提出ConforNets，通过对AlphaFold3架构中Pair表示进行通道级仿射变换，实现高效且可跨蛋白质重用的构象控制方法，在无监督和多状态基准上达到SOTA，并首次实现监督式构象转移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AlphaFold系列模型能预测大多数有序蛋白质的单一优势构象，但难以捕捉生物学相关的替代状态。现有通过扰动AF模型或其输入来获取构象变异的方法效率低且无法一致恢复主要构象模式，因此需要更高效、更可控的构象生成方法。

Method: 作者系统研究了AF3架构中潜在表示的扰动位置和操作方式，提出了ConforNets——对Pair表示进行通道级仿射变换。该方法在全局范围内调节AF3表示，使同一组参数可跨蛋白质重用。

Result: 在无监督生成替代状态任务上，ConforNets在所有现有多状态基准上达到SOTA成功率。在监督式构象转移任务中，仅用一个源蛋白质训练的ConforNets即可在整蛋白质家族中诱导保守的构象变化。

Conclusion: 这些结果引入了一种基于AF3模型的构象控制机制，既提高了构象生成的效率，又实现了跨蛋白质的泛化能力。

Abstract: Models from the AlphaFold (AF) family reliably predict one dominant conformation for most well-ordered proteins but struggle to capture biologically relevant alternate states. Several efforts have focused on eliciting greater conformational variability through ad hoc inference-time perturbations of AF models or their inputs. Despite their progress, these approaches remain inefficient and fail to consistently recover major conformational modes. Here, we investigate both the optimal location and manner-of-operation for perturbing latent representations in the AF3 architecture. We distill our findings in ConforNets: channel-wise affine transforms of the pre-Pairformer pair latents. Unlike previous methods, ConforNets globally modulate AF3 representations, making them reusable across proteins. On unsupervised generation of alternate states, ConforNets achieve state-of-the-art success rates on all existing multi-state benchmarks. On the novel supervised task of conformational transfer, ConforNets trained on one source protein can induce a conserved conformational change across a protein family. Collectively, these results introduce a mechanism for conformational control in AF3-based models.

</details>


<div id='math.AP'></div>

# math.AP [[Back]](#toc)

### [578] [Duality for the Adversarial Total Variation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18540)
*Leon Bungert,Lucas Schmitt*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文通过将对抗训练二元分类器重新表述为涉及非局部全变差的正则化风险最小化，利用对偶技术建立了该全变差的次微分刻画，并推导了非局部梯度与散度的对偶表示及分部积分公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将对抗训练二元分类器重新表述为正则化风险最小化后，需要从数学上严格刻画其中涉及的非局部全变差的次微分性质，以理解对抗训练的优化理论基础。

Method: 利用对偶技术，推导非局部全变差的对偶表示及相关分部积分公式；在度量空间上的无穷远处连续函数空间和欧几里得域上的本质有界函数空间中建立对偶陈述，并在附加条件下刻画次微分。

Result: 建立了非局部全变差的次微分刻画，得到了非局部梯度与散度的对偶表示和分部积分公式，并在两类函数空间中给出了对偶陈述。

Conclusion: 本文为对抗训练的优化理论基础提供了严格的对偶分析框架，揭示了对抗训练与全变差正则化之间的深层联系。

Abstract: Adversarial training of binary classifiers can be reformulated as regularized risk minimization involving a nonlocal total variation. Building on this perspective, we establish a characterization of the subdifferential of this total variation using duality techniques. To achieve this, we derive a dual representation of the nonlocal total variation and a related integration of parts formula, involving a nonlocal gradient and divergence. We provide such duality statements both in the space of continuous functions vanishing at infinity on proper metric spaces and for the space of essentially bounded functions on Euclidean domains. Furthermore, under some additional conditions we provide characterizations of the subdifferential in these settings.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [579] [Personalized electric vehicle energy consumption estimation framework that integrates driver behavior with map data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20764)
*Sreechakra Vasudeva Raju Rachavelpula,Sangwhan Cha*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一个个性化BEV能耗估计框架，整合地图上下文特征、驾驶员特定速度预测和基于物理的能耗建模，准确预测电池SOC变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BEV能耗估计方法缺乏对驾驶员个体行为和地图上下文特征的考虑，导致预测精度不足。需要开发能够捕捉个体驾驶行为模式并整合道路环境信息的个性化能耗估计框架。

Method: 系统整合路线选择、详细道路特征处理、基于规则的参考速度生成器、PID控制器车辆动力学模拟器，以及训练用于再现个体驾驶行为的双向LSTM模型。预测的个体特定速度剖面与准稳态反向能耗模型结合，计算牵引功率、再生制动和SOC演化。

Result: 在城市、高速公路和山区路线的评估中，该方法成功捕捉了关键驾驶员行为模式（如交叉口减速、限速跟踪、坡度相关响应），并生成了准确的功率和SOC轨迹。结果表明结合学习到的驾驶员行为、地图上下文和物理能耗建模能产生准确的个性化SOC消耗剖面。

Conclusion: 提出的个性化BEV能耗估计框架通过整合地图上下文特征、驾驶员特定速度预测和物理能耗建模，能够准确预测电池SOC变化，为个性化BEV能耗管理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a personalized Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) energy consumption estimation framework that integrates map-based contextual features with driver-specific velocity prediction and physics-based energy consumption modeling. The system combines route selection, detailed road feature processing, a rule-based reference velocity generator, a PID controller-based vehicle dynamics simulator, and a Bidirectional LSTM model trained to reproduce individual driving behavior. The predicted individual-specific velocity profiles are coupled with a quasi-steady backward energy consumption model to compute tractive power, regenerative braking, and State-of-Charge (SOC) evolution. Evaluation across urban, freeway, and hilly routes demonstrates that the proposed approach captures key driver behavioral patterns such as deceleration at intersections, speed-limit tracking, and road grade-dependent responses, while producing accurate power and SOC trajectories. The results highlight the effectiveness of combining learned driver behavior with map-based context and physics-based energy consumption modeling to produce accurate, personalized BEV SOC depletion profiles.

</details>


### [580] [Scheduling Analysis of UAV Flight Control Workloads using Raspberry Pi 5 Using PREEMPT_RT Linux](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19275)
*Luiz Giacomossi,Håkan Forsberg,Ivan Tomasic,Baran Çürüklü,Tommaso Cucinotta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: PREEMPT RT Linux在Raspberry Pi 5上显著降低控制循环延迟，但现代SoC的剩余抖动主要由硬件内存争用引起


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代无人机架构试图在通用操作系统上统一高级自主性和低级飞行控制，但复杂多核SoC由于共享资源争用引入了显著的时序不确定性，需要评估实时内核在控制循环中的性能

Method: 在Raspberry Pi 5上对PREEMPT RT Linux内核进行架构分析，特别隔离内核激活路径（延迟执行的SoftIRQ与实时直接激活）对250 Hz控制循环的影响

Result: 在重负载下，标准内核不适用，最坏情况延迟超过9毫秒；PREEMPT RT将最坏情况延迟降低了近88%至225微秒以下，通过强制直接唤醒路径减轻操作系统噪声

Conclusion: 虽然PREEMPT RT解决了调度方差问题，但现代SoC上的剩余抖动主要由硬件内存争用驱动，表明硬件级优化对进一步减少时序不确定性至关重要

Abstract: Modern UAV architectures increasingly aim to unify high-level autonomy and low-level flight control on a single General-Purpose Operating System (GPOS). However, complex multi-core System-on-Chips (SoCs) introduce significant timing indeterminism due to shared resource contention. This paper performs an architectural analysis of the PREEMPT RT Linux kernel on a Raspberry Pi 5, specifically isolating the impact of kernel activation paths (deferred execution SoftIRQs versus real-time direct activation) on a 250 Hz control loop. Results show that under heavy stress, the standard kernel is unsuitable, exhibiting worst-case latencies exceeding 9 ms. In contrast, PREEMPT RT reduced the worst-case latency by nearly 88 percent to under 225 microseconds, enforcing a direct wake-up path that mitigates OS noise. These findings demonstrate that while PREEMPT RT resolves scheduling variance, the residual jitter on modern SoCs is primarily driven by hardware memory contention.

</details>


### [581] [Safe Control using Learned Safety Filters and Adaptive Conformal Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18482)
*Sacha Huriot,Ihab Tabbara,Hussein Sibai*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: ACoFi结合学习型安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，通过动态调整切换阈值来保证控制系统的软安全，在分布外场景中显著优于固定阈值方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统安全滤波器合成方法难以扩展到高维系统，而学习型安全滤波器存在预测误差，无法提供可靠的安全保证。需要一种能处理学习模型不确定性并提供可证明安全保证的方法。

Method: 提出自适应共形滤波(ACoFi)，结合学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性安全滤波器与自适应共形推理。滤波器根据预测安全性的观测误差动态调整切换标准，使用名义策略输出的可能安全值范围来量化安全评估的不确定性，当范围表明可能不安全时从名义策略切换到学习的安全策略。

Result: 理论证明ACoFi保证对名义策略预测安全性的不确定性量化错误率渐近上界为用户定义参数。在Dubins汽车仿真和Safety Gymnasium环境中实证表明，相比固定切换阈值基线方法，ACoFi获得更高的学习安全值和更少的安全违规，尤其在分布外场景中表现更优。

Conclusion: ACoFi为学习型安全滤波器提供了一种可证明的软安全保证框架，通过自适应共形推理处理模型不确定性，在高维控制系统中实现了比固定阈值方法更好的安全性能。

Abstract: Safety filters have been shown to be effective tools to ensure the safety of control systems with unsafe nominal policies. To address scalability challenges in traditional synthesis methods, learning-based approaches have been proposed for designing safety filters for systems with high-dimensional state and control spaces. However, the inevitable errors in the decisions of these models raise concerns about their reliability and the safety guarantees they offer. This paper presents Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi), a method that combines learned Hamilton-Jacobi reachability-based safety filters with adaptive conformal inference. Under ACoFi, the filter dynamically adjusts its switching criteria based on the observed errors in its predictions of the safety of actions. The range of possible safety values of the nominal policy's output is used to quantify uncertainty in safety assessment. The filter switches from the nominal policy to the learned safe one when that range suggests it might be unsafe. We show that ACoFi guarantees that the rate of incorrectly quantifying uncertainty in the predicted safety of the nominal policy is asymptotically upper bounded by a user-defined parameter. This gives a soft safety guarantee rather than a hard safety guarantee. We evaluate ACoFi in a Dubins car simulation and a Safety Gymnasium environment, empirically demonstrating that it significantly outperforms the baseline method that uses a fixed switching threshold by achieving higher learned safety values and fewer safety violations, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios.

</details>


### [582] [Safety-Critical Contextual Control via Online Riemannian Optimization with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19639)
*Tongxin Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于样本的惩罚预测控制框架，通过在线黎曼优化将可行性流形压缩为基于分数的密度，利用黎曼几何指导规划器的梯度下降，实现安全关键上下文控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代世界模型过于复杂，无法获得显式动力学描述。需要研究安全关键的上下文控制问题，其中规划器只能使用黑盒模拟器提供的可行性样本来优化任务目标。

Method: 开发基于样本的惩罚预测控制框架，基于在线黎曼优化。模拟器将可行性流形压缩为基于分数的密度，为动作空间赋予黎曼几何结构，指导规划器的梯度下降。障碍曲率控制收敛速率和安全裕度。

Result: 建立了上下文安全边界，表明与真实可行性流形的距离由分数估计误差和依赖于障碍曲率的比率控制，两者都随着上下文丰富而改善。在动态导航任务上的仿真表明，上下文PPC显著优于边缘和冻结密度模型。

Conclusion: 基于样本的惩罚预测控制框架通过黎曼几何有效处理复杂世界模型，障碍曲率作为关键参数替代未知动力学的Lipschitz常数，上下文信息显著提升安全性和性能。

Abstract: Modern world models are becoming too complex to admit explicit dynamical descriptions. We study safety-critical contextual control, where a Planner must optimize a task objective using only feasibility samples from a black-box Simulator, conditioned on a context signal $ξ_t$. We develop a sample-based Penalized Predictive Control (PPC) framework grounded in online Riemannian optimization, in which the Simulator compresses the feasibility manifold into a score-based density $\hat{p}(u \mid ξ_t)$ that endows the action space with a Riemannian geometry guiding the Planner's gradient descent. The barrier curvature $κ(ξ_t)$, the minimum curvature of the conditional log-density $-\ln\hat{p}(\cdot\midξ_t)$, governs both convergence rate and safety margin, replacing the Lipschitz constant of the unknown dynamics. Our main result is a contextual safety bound showing that the distance from the true feasibility manifold is controlled by the score estimation error and a ratio that depends on $κ(ξ_t)$, both of which improve with richer context. Simulations on a dynamic navigation task confirm that contextual PPC substantially outperforms marginal and frozen density models, with the advantage growing after environment shifts.

</details>


### [583] [Safe and Energy-Aware Multi-Robot Density Control via PDE-Constrained Optimization for Long-Duration Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15524)
*Longchen Niu,Andrew Nasif,Gennaro Notomista*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种具有空间安全和能量可持续性保证的多机器人系统密度控制框架，通过Fokker-Planck PDE编码随机运动，结合控制Lyapunov和屏障函数实现目标密度跟踪、避障和能量管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在不确定环境下需要同时保证空间安全（避免碰撞和障碍物）和能量可持续性（通过多次充电周期维持运行），现有方法难以同时处理这些约束。

Method: 使用Fokker-Planck PDE在密度层面编码随机机器人运动，结合控制Lyapunov函数（用于目标密度跟踪）和控制屏障函数（用于避障和能量约束），通过二次规划实现实时控制。

Result: 多机器人实验和大量仿真表明，该控制器在定位和运动不确定性下有效实现了目标密度跟踪、避障和能量可持续性，二次规划框架支持快速实时实现。

Conclusion: 该框架为多机器人系统提供了具有空间安全和能量可持续性保证的密度控制方法，能够处理实际环境中的不确定性，适用于需要长期自主运行的应用场景。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel density control framework for multi-robot systems with spatial safety and energy sustainability guarantees. Stochastic robot motion is encoded through the Fokker-Planck Partial Differential Equation (PDE) at the density level. Control Lyapunov and control barrier functions are integrated with PDEs to enforce target density tracking, obstacle region avoidance, and energy sufficiency over multiple charging cycles. The resulting quadratic program enables fast in-the-loop implementation that adjusts commands in real-time. Multi-robot experiment and extensive simulations were conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the controller under localization and motion uncertainties.

</details>


### [584] [Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13192)
*Donggeon David Oh,Duy P. Nguyen,Haimin Hu,Jaime Fernández Fisac*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习Q函数的鲁棒控制屏障函数（Q-CBF）框架，用于一般非线性系统在未知有界不确定性下的安全约束，通过将屏障函数提升到状态-动作空间并联合对抗性RL，实现了对黑箱动力学系统的安全滤波，在倒立摆和36自由度四足机器人仿真中验证了其比传统方法更低的保守性和更高的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒CBF方法大多依赖显式的闭环动力学结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，且只能保守地认证最大鲁棒安全集的子集。亟需一种不依赖显式动力学模型、适用于一般非线性系统的鲁棒安全约束方法。

Method: 首先证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；然后将屏障函数提升到状态-动作空间，引入Q函数概念，提出鲁棒Q-CBF约束用于安全滤波；最后结合对抗性强化学习，实现对黑箱动力学和未知不确定性结构的鲁棒CBF合成与部署。

Result: 在倒立摆基准上显著优于传统屏障基线方法，获得了更宽松的安全集；在36自由度四足机器人仿真中，即使面对对抗性不确定性实现，也能可靠地强制执行安全约束。

Conclusion: 提出了一种结合强化学习Q函数与鲁棒CBF的通用框架，摆脱了对显式动力学和不确定性模型的依赖，显著提升了鲁棒安全约束的可扩展性和适用性，为复杂系统安全控制提供了新范式。

Abstract: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

</details>


### [585] [Dynamic Multi-Robot Task Allocation under Uncertainty and Communication Constraints: A Game-Theoretic Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11954)
*Maria G. Mendoza,Pan-Yang Su,Bryce L. Ferguson,S. Shankar Sastry*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了不确定任务完成时间、时间窗约束和不完全信息下的动态多机器人任务分配问题，提出了基于迭代最佳响应（IBR）的分散式策略，并在城市级包裹配送场景中验证了其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理任务完成不确定性、时间窗约束和不完全信息（如有限感知与通信）的复杂动态多机器人任务分配问题时存在局限性，缺乏高效的分散式解决方案。

Method: 构建了基于枢纽感知区域（决定任务可见性）和通信图谱（控制信息交换）的不完全信息框架，提出IBR策略——每个智能体选择最大化其对局部观测社会福利的边际贡献的任务；与EDD、匈牙利算法、SCoBA三种基线进行对比。

Result: 在全通信和稀疏通信条件下，IBR在任务完成性能上与基线方法相当，但计算时间更低；实验场景为城市级包裹配送，包含多达100架无人机和多种任务到达模式。

Conclusion: IBR是一种在不确定性、时间窗约束和不完全信息条件下计算高效的分散式任务分配方法，具有实际应用的潜力。

Abstract: We study dynamic multi-robot task allocation under uncertain task completion, time-window constraints, and incomplete information. Tasks arrive online over a finite horizon and must be completed within specified deadlines, while agents operate from distributed hubs with limited sensing and communication. We model incomplete information through hub-based sensing regions that determine task visibility and a communication graph that governs inter-hub information exchange. Using this framework, we propose Iterative Best Response (IBR), a decentralized policy in which each agent selects the task that maximizes its marginal contribution to the locally observed welfare. We compare IBR against three baselines: Earliest Due Date first (EDD), Hungarian algorithm, and Stochastic Conflict-Based Allocation (SCoBA), on a city-scale package-delivery domain with up to 100 drones and varying task arrival scenarios. Under full and sparse communication, IBR achieves competitive task-completion performance with lower computation time.

</details>


<div id='stat.AP'></div>

# stat.AP [[Back]](#toc)

### [586] [Ground-Level Near Real-Time Modeling for PM2.5 Pollution Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18973)
*Zachary R. Fox,Janet O. Agbaje,Dakotah Maguire,Javier E. Santos,Jeremy Logan,Maggie Davis,Rima Habre,Jim VanDerslice,Heidi A. Hanson*

Main category: stat.AP

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的无网格方法，通过整合地形、气象和土地利用等多源数据，从稀疏分布的EPA监测站插值PM2.5浓度，实现高时空分辨率的近实时空气污染评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流行病学和公共卫生决策因无法近实时评估污染暴露影响而受阻，现有模型依赖未定期更新的输入数据源和固定网格，难以满足及时性需求。

Method: 采用深度学习模型以无网格方式从稀疏分布的EPA监测站插值地面PM2.5浓度；整合地形、气象和土地利用等易获取的多源数据；训练时随机化空间采样以增强在密集和稀疏监测区域的鲁棒性。

Result: 模型可在任意空间位置进行快速预测而无需计算整个网格；轻量级架构支持流式数据快速更新；在不同地理环境和尺度下具有灵活性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: 该模型适用于近实时部署，能够提供准确及时的空质量评估，并在公共卫生危机期间快速评估多种场景，为决策提供支持。

Abstract: Air pollution is a worldwide public health threat that can cause or exacerbate many illnesses, including respiratory disease, cardiovascular disease, and some cancers. However, epidemiological studies and public health decision-making are stymied by the inability to assess pollution exposure impacts in near real time. To address this, developing accurate digital twins of environmental pollutants will enable timely data-driven analytics - a crucial step in modernizing health policy and decision-making. Although other models predict and analyze fine particulate matter exposure, they often rely on modeled input data sources and data streams that are not regularly updated. Another challenge stems from current models relying on predefined grids. In contrast, our deep-learning approach interpolates surface level PM2.5 concentrations between sparsely distributed US EPA monitoring stations in a grid-free manner. By incorporating additional, readily available datasets - including topographic, meteorological, and land-use data - we improve its ability to predict pollutant concentrations with high spatial and temporal resolution. This enables model querying at any spatial location for rapid predictions without computing over the entire grid. To ensure robustness, we randomize spatial sampling during training to enable our model to perform well in both dense and sparse monitored regions. This model is well suited for near real-time deployment because its lightweight architecture allows for fast updates in response to streaming data. Moreover, model flexibility and scalability allow it to be adapted to various geographical contexts and scales, making it a practical tool for delivering accurate and timely air quality assessments. Its capacity to rapidly evaluate multiple scenarios can be especially valuable for decision-making during public health crises.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [587] [On Bayesian Softmax-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20551)
*Nicola Bariletto,Huy Nguyen,Nhat Ho,Alessandro Rinaldo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文对贝叶斯混合专家模型进行了系统的理论分析，重点研究了基于softmax的门控机制，并分析了后验分布在密度估计、参数估计和模型选择三个基本统计任务中的渐近行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合专家模型通过输入相关的门控机制结合多个专家模型，为学习复杂的概率输入-输出关系提供了灵活框架。尽管这些模型在现代机器学习中日益重要，但它们在贝叶斯框架下的理论性质仍未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，特别是针对普遍使用的softmax门控机制。

Method: 研究贝叶斯混合专家模型，重点关注基于softmax的门控机制。分析后验分布的渐近行为，包括：1) 密度估计的后验收缩率（固定已知专家数和随机可学习专家数两种情况）；2) 基于定制Voronoi型损失的参数估计收敛保证；3) 提出并分析两种互补的专家数选择策略。

Result: 建立了密度估计的后验收缩率结果，推导了参数估计的收敛保证（考虑了混合专家模型的复杂可识别性结构），并提出了有效的专家数选择方法。这些结果为贝叶斯混合专家模型提供了系统的理论分析框架。

Conclusion: 该研究为基于softmax门控的贝叶斯混合专家模型提供了首个系统的理论分析，揭示了后验分布在密度估计、参数估计和模型选择方面的渐近性质，为实际模型设计提供了理论指导的见解。

Abstract: Mixture-of-experts models provide a flexible framework for learning complex probabilistic input-output relationships by combining multiple expert models through an input-dependent gating mechanism. These models have become increasingly prominent in modern machine learning, yet their theoretical properties in the Bayesian framework remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we study Bayesian mixture-of-experts models, focusing on the ubiquitous softmax-based gating mechanism. Specifically, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of the posterior distribution for three fundamental statistical tasks: density estimation, parameter estimation, and model selection. First, we establish posterior contraction rates for density estimation, both in the regimes with a fixed, known number of experts and with a random learnable number of experts. We then analyze parameter estimation and derive convergence guarantees based on tailored Voronoi-type losses, which account for the complex identifiability structure of mixture-of-experts models. Finally, we propose and analyze two complementary strategies for selecting the number of experts. Taken together, these results provide one of the first systematic theoretical analyses of Bayesian mixture-of-experts models with softmax gating, and yield several theory-grounded insights for practical model design.

</details>


### [588] [Efficient Symbolic Computations for Identifying Causal Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20516)
*Benjamin Hollering,Pratik Misra,Nils Sturma*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种高效算法，用于在存在潜在混杂的情况下判定因果效应的可识别性，能在拟多项式时间内找到最低阶识别公式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性结构因果模型中，因果效应的可识别性判定是因果推断的核心挑战。现有基于Gröbner基的方法在双重指数复杂度下，无法扩展到大规模场景

Method: 开发高效符号计算算法，当存在预设最大阶数的识别公式时，能在拟多项式时间内找到最低阶识别公式

Result: 算法能有效处理超出传统Gröbner基方法规模的问题，提供实用的可识别性判定工具

Conclusion: 该工作将符号计算方法实际应用于因果效应可识别性判定，解决了传统方法计算不可行的问题，为大规模因果推断提供了实用工具

Abstract: Determining identifiability of causal effects from observational data under latent confounding is a central challenge in causal inference. For linear structural causal models, identifiability of causal effects is decidable through symbolic computation. However, standard approaches based on Gröbner bases become computationally infeasible beyond small settings due to their doubly exponential complexity. In this work, we study how to practically use symbolic computation for deciding rational identifiability. In particular, we present an efficient algorithm that provably finds the lowest degree identifying formulas. For a causal effect of interest, if there exists an identification formula of a prespecified maximal degree, our algorithm returns such a formula in quasi-polynomial time.

</details>


### [589] [Decentralized Machine Learning with Centralized Performance Guarantees via Gibbs Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20492)
*Yaiza Bermudez,Samir Perlaza,Iñaki Esnaola*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 首次证明在去中心化学习中无需共享本地数据集即可实现中心化性能，通过ERM-RER框架和前后向通信，仅需共享局部Gibbs测度即可达到与访问所有数据集的中心化ERM-RER相同性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决去中心化学习中隐私保护与性能权衡问题，避免共享敏感本地数据集的同时实现中心化学习性能，探索从数据共享转向归纳偏置共享的新协作范式。

Method: 采用经验风险最小化与相对熵正则化（ERM-RER）学习框架，建立客户端间的前后向通信机制，将客户端k产生的Gibbs测度作为客户端k+1的参考测度，通过参考测度编码先验信息，并基于本地样本大小特定缩放正则化因子。

Result: 首次证明在去中心化设置中，仅通过共享局部Gibbs测度即可实现与中心化ERM-RER相同的性能，无需共享原始数据集，为隐私保护的去中心化学习提供了理论保证。

Conclusion: 该研究开创了去中心化学习新范式，将协作策略从数据共享转向通过参考测度共享局部归纳偏置，为隐私敏感的分布式学习提供了理论基础和实践方向。

Abstract: In this paper, it is shown, for the first time, that centralized performance is achievable in decentralized learning without sharing the local datasets. Specifically, when clients adopt an empirical risk minimization with relative-entropy regularization (ERM-RER) learning framework and a forward-backward communication between clients is established, it suffices to share the locally obtained Gibbs measures to achieve the same performance as that of a centralized ERM-RER with access to all the datasets. The core idea is that the Gibbs measure produced by client~$k$ is used, as reference measure, by client~$k+1$. This effectively establishes a principled way to encode prior information through a reference measure. In particular, achieving centralized performance in the decentralized setting requires a specific scaling of the regularization factors with the local sample sizes. Overall, this result opens the door to novel decentralized learning paradigms that shift the collaboration strategy from sharing data to sharing the local inductive bias via the reference measures over the set of models.

</details>


### [590] [Properties and limitations of geometric tempering for gradient flow dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20301)
*Francesca Romana Crucinio,Sahani Pathiraja*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 研究通过几何退火在Wasserstein和Fisher-Rao梯度流中引入移动目标序列来加速采样收敛，分析连续/离散时间收敛性，发现Fisher-Rao情况下几何混合不会加速收敛，并推导自适应退火策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统采样方法通过最小化与目标分布的KL散度进行优化，但收敛速度可能较慢。研究旨在探索通过引入几何退火定义的移动目标序列$(π_t)_{t\ge0}$，在Wasserstein和Fisher-Rao梯度流框架下加速采样收敛过程。

Method: 1. 将采样问题转化为概率分布空间上的优化问题，最小化与目标分布$π$的KL散度。2. 引入通过几何退火定义的移动目标序列$(π_t)_{t\ge0}$。3. 在Wasserstein和Fisher-Rao梯度流框架下分析收敛性。4. 研究连续时间和离散时间（时间离散化）的收敛性质。5. 推导自适应退火调度策略。

Result: 1. 在连续时间下，两种梯度流都实现了指数收敛，并获得了新的收敛界。2. 在Fisher-Rao情况下，用初始分布和目标分布的几何混合替换目标分布不会加速收敛（连续和离散时间均如此）。3. 推导了梯度流结构下的自适应退火调度策略。

Conclusion: 几何退火在Wasserstein梯度流中可能加速采样收敛，但在Fisher-Rao梯度流中通过几何混合不会带来收敛加速。研究为理解退火采样方法的收敛性质提供了理论框架，并提出了自适应退火策略以优化采样效率。

Abstract: We consider the problem of sampling from a probability distribution $π$. It is well known that this can be written as an optimisation problem over the space of probability distributions in which we aim to minimise the Kullback--Leibler divergence from $π$.
  We consider the effect of replacing $π$ with a sequence of moving targets $(π_t)_{t\ge0}$ defined via geometric tempering on the Wasserstein and Fisher--Rao gradient flows.
  We show that convergence occurs exponentially in continuous time, providing novel bounds in both cases. We also consider popular time discretisations and explore their convergence properties.
  We show that in the Fisher--Rao case, replacing the target distribution with a geometric mixture of initial and target distribution never leads to a convergence speed up both in continuous time and in discrete time. Finally, we explore the gradient flow structure of tempered dynamics and derive novel adaptive tempering schedules.

</details>


### [591] [Online Survival Analysis: A Bandit Approach under Cox PH Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20296)
*Yang Xu,Wenbin Lu,Rui Song*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 将生存分析整合到在线学习环境中，在Cox比例风险模型下解决交错进入、延迟反馈和右删失等挑战，通过改编经典bandit算法实现治疗策略的优化学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生存分析在在线学习环境中尚未得到充分探索，特别是在bandit框架下需要顺序决策以优化治疗策略。传统生存分析方法如Cox PH模型主要关注静态数据分析，无法适应在线学习场景中数据随时间到达、需要实时决策的特点。

Method: 将三种经典bandit算法适配到Cox比例风险模型框架中，以平衡探索与利用。方法处理了交错进入（患者在不同时间点进入研究）、延迟反馈（结果需要时间观察）和右删失（部分结果未观察到）等生存分析特有的挑战。

Result: 理论分析证明了次线性遗憾界（sublinear regret bounds）。通过大量模拟实验和使用SEER癌症数据的半真实实验验证了方法的有效性，表明能够快速学习接近最优的治疗策略。

Conclusion: 该研究首次将生存分析整合到纯在线学习环境中，为在Cox PH模型下进行在线决策提供了可行框架，能够有效处理生存数据特有的挑战，并在理论和实验上证明了其有效性。

Abstract: Survival analysis is a widely used statistical framework for modeling time-to-event data under censoring. Classical methods, such as the Cox proportional hazards (Cox PH) model, offer a semiparametric approach to estimating the effects of covariates on the hazard function. Despite its importance, survival analysis has been largely unexplored in online settings, particularly within the bandit framework, where decisions must be made sequentially to optimize treatments as new data arrive over time. In this work, we take an initial step toward integrating survival analysis into a purely online learning setting under the Cox PH model, addressing key challenges including staggered entry, delayed feedback, and right censoring. We adapt three canonical bandit algorithms to balance exploration and exploitation, with theoretical guarantees of sublinear regret bounds. Extensive simulations and semi-real experiments using SEER cancer data demonstrate that our approach enables rapid and effective learning of near-optimal treatment policies.

</details>


### [592] [Analytical Extraction of Conditional Sobol' Indices via Basis Decomposition of Polynomial Chaos Expansions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19165)
*Shijie Zhong,Jiangfeng Fu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于预训练全局多项式混沌展开(PCE)模型的分析框架，利用其基函数的张量积性质，将条件Sobol'指数的计算转化为纯代数后处理步骤，无需重复建模或额外采样，在数值鲁棒性和计算效率上优于传统逐点方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统条件Sobol'指数计算依赖逐点建模，计算成本高且在整个参数空间上缺乏一致性，亟需一种高效、一致的分析方法。

Method: 利用预训练全局PCE模型的张量积基函数性质，将全局展开重构为依赖于条件变量的解析系数场；基于条件概率测度下正交性的保持，推导出条件方差和Sobol'指数的闭式表达式。

Result: 数值基准测试表明，该方法保证了物理一致性，并在数值鲁棒性和计算效率方面优于传统逐点方法。

Conclusion: 该框架将条件敏感性分析转化为纯代数后处理步骤，无需重复建模或额外采样，为参数化响应系统（如空间场或可变运行条件）提供了一种高效且一致的敏感性分析工具。

Abstract: In uncertainty quantification, evaluating sensitivity measures under specific conditions (i.e., conditional Sobol' indices) is essential for systems with parameterized responses, such as spatial fields or varying operating conditions. Traditional approaches often rely on point-wise modeling, which is computationally expensive and may lack consistency across the parameter space. This paper demonstrates that for a pre-trained global Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) model, the analytical conditional Sobol' indices are inherently embedded within its basis functions. By leveraging the tensor-product property of PCE bases, we reformulate the global expansion into a set of analytical coefficient fields that depend on the conditioning variables. Based on the preservation of orthogonality under conditional probability measures, we derive closed-form expressions for conditional variances and Sobol' indices. This framework bypasses the need for repetitive modeling or additional sampling, transforming conditional sensitivity analysis into a purely algebraic post-processing step. Numerical benchmarks indicate that the proposed method ensures physical coherence and offers superior numerical robustness and computational efficiency compared to conventional point-wise approaches.

</details>


### [593] [Fast estimation of Gaussian mixture components via centering and singular value thresholding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19091)
*Huan Qing*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于奇异值阈值的高斯混合模型成分数估计方法，无需迭代拟合或先验知识，在温和分离条件下可一致估计真实成分数，适用于高维、多成分及严重类别不平衡场景，计算速度极快（一分钟内处理千万级样本）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无监督学习中估计混合模型成分数是一个基础性挑战，尤其在高维数据、多成分或成分大小严重不平衡的情况下，现有方法（如似然比、BIC等）计算复杂或性能不佳。

Method: 对数据中心化后计算奇异值，统计超过某一阈值的奇异值个数作为成分数的估计。无需迭代拟合、无需似然计算、无需先验知识。

Result: 在温和分离条件下，该估计量一致地恢复真实成分数；在高维（维度远大于样本量）、成分数随样本量增长、成分大小严重不平衡等场景下均有效；实验验证了在挑战性设置下的准确性。

Conclusion: 所提方法简单、快速且理论上保证一致性，为高斯混合模型成分数估计提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Estimating the number of components is a fundamental challenge in unsupervised learning, particularly when dealing with high-dimensional data with many components or severely imbalanced component sizes. This paper addresses this challenge for classical Gaussian mixture models. The proposed estimator is simple: center the data, compute the singular values of the centered matrix, and count those above a threshold. No iterative fitting, no likelihood calculation, and no prior knowledge of the number of components are required. We prove that, under a mild separation condition on the component centers, the estimator consistently recovers the true number of components. The result holds in high-dimensional settings where the dimension can be much larger than the sample size. It also holds when the number of components grows to the smaller of the dimension and the sample size, even under severe imbalance among component sizes. Computationally, the method is extremely fast: for example, it processes ten million samples in one hundred dimensions within one minute. Extensive experimental studies confirm its accuracy in challenging settings such as high dimensionality, many components, and severe class imbalance.

</details>


### [594] [Beyond Bellman: High-Order Generator Regression for Continuous-Time Policy Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18972)
*Yaowei Zheng,Richong Zhang,Shenxi Wu,Shirui Bian,Haosong Zhang,Li Zeng,Xingjian Ma,Yichi Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在非时齐动力学下，从离散闭环轨迹进行有限时域连续时间策略评估的问题。通过多步转移的矩匹配系数估计时间依赖生成器，并结合反向回归，提出了一个二阶估计器，在理论上给出了完整的误差分解和决策频率区间图。实验表明，该二阶估计器在多个基准测试中一致优于贝尔曼基线，并在理论预测的可见增益区间内保持稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续时间策略评估的标准方法（贝尔曼基线）仅有一阶精度，限制了其在精细时间离散化下的性能。本文旨在通过高阶生成器回归提高评估精度，并明确其适用条件。

Method: 利用多步转移的矩匹配系数抵消低阶截断误差，估计时间依赖生成器，再结合反向回归构建二阶估计器；并给出完整的端到端误差分解（生成器误设、投影误差、池化偏差、有限样本误差、启动误差）及决策频率区间图。

Result: 在标定研究、四尺度基准、特征与启动消融实验以及增益失配压力测试中，二阶估计器一致优于贝尔曼基线，并在理论预测的可见增益区间内保持稳定。

Conclusion: 高阶生成器回归是一种可解释的连续时间策略评估方法，具有明确的操作区间，能够有效提升评估精度。

Abstract: We study finite-horizon continuous-time policy evaluation from discrete closed-loop trajectories under time-inhomogeneous dynamics. The target value surface solves a backward parabolic equation, but the Bellman baseline obtained from one-step recursion is only first-order in the grid width. We estimate the time-dependent generator from multi-step transitions using moment-matching coefficients that cancel lower-order truncation terms, and combine the resulting surrogate with backward regression. The main theory gives an end-to-end decomposition into generator misspecification, projection error, pooling bias, finite-sample error, and start-up error, together with a decision-frequency regime map explaining when higher-order gains should be visible. Across calibration studies, four-scale benchmarks, feature and start-up ablations, and gain-mismatch stress tests, the second-order estimator consistently improves on the Bellman baseline and remains stable in the regime where the theory predicts visible gains. These results position high-order generator regression as an interpretable continuous-time policy-evaluation method with a clear operating region.

</details>


### [595] [Revisiting Active Sequential Prediction-Powered Mean Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18569)
*Maria-Eleni Sfyraki,Jun-Kun Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了主动序列预测驱动均值估计问题，提出一种基于无遗憾学习的查询概率自适应方法，理论和实验表明查询概率会收敛到忽略协变量的最大值约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
