Temporal analysis across all ten years shows that the young-adult PA effect has been eroding over the past decade, with the 18-24 OR reaching 1.01 (null) in both 2018 and 2024 -- paralleling the deepening youth mental health crisis. Causal Forest via Double Machine Learning independently identifies age as the dominant driver of treatment effect heterogeneity (feature importance = 0.39, 2.5x the next predictor). E-value sensitivity analysis, propensity score overlap checks, placebo tests, and imputation comparisons confirm the robustness of the findings. These results suggest that the well-documented exercise--mental health link may not generalize to the youngest adult population, whose distress appears increasingly driven by stressors that PA alone cannot mitigate.

</details>


### [709] [Intentional Updates for Streaming Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19033)
*Arsalan Sharifnassab,Mohamed Elsayed,Kris De Asis,A. Rupam Mahmood,Richard S. Sutton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"意图更新"（intentional updates）方法，通过预先指定更新目标并求解步长来实现，应用于流式深度强化学习，提出了Intentional TD和Intentional Policy Gradient算法，在流式设置下达到了与批处理方法相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在梯度下降学习中，参数空间的步长无法预测函数输出的变化量，导致流式设置（batch size=1）下更新不稳定，随机性未被平均化，更新幅度可能任意变大或变小。

Method: 提出"意图更新"策略：先指定更新的预期目标，再求解近似实现该目标的步长。具体包括：1) Intentional TD：旨在固定比例减少TD误差；2) Intentional Policy Gradient：限制每次更新的策略变化范围（局部KL散度）。结合资格迹（eligibility traces）和对角缩放（diagonal scaling）实现实用算法。

Result: 实验表明，所提方法在流式设置下达到了最先进的性能，经常与使用批次或经验回放缓冲区的传统方法表现相当。

Conclusion: 通过显式指定更新意图并反向求解步长，可以有效解决流式深度强化学习中的更新不稳定问题，为在线学习提供了一种新的范式。

Abstract: In gradient-based learning, a step size chosen in parameter units does not produce a predictable per-step change in function output. This often leads to instability in the streaming setting (i.e., batch size=1), where stochasticity is not averaged out and update magnitudes can momentarily become arbitrarily big or small. Instead, we propose intentional updates: first specify the intended outcome of an update and then solve for the step size that approximately achieves it. This strategy has precedent in online supervised linear regression via Normalized Least Mean Squares algorithm, which selects a step size to yield a specified change in the function output proportional to the current error. We extend this principle to streaming deep reinforcement learning by defining appropriate intended outcomes: Intentional TD aims for a fixed fractional reduction of the TD error, and Intentional Policy Gradient aims for a bounded per-step change in the policy, limiting local KL divergence. We propose practical algorithms combining eligibility traces and diagonal scaling. Empirically, these methods yield state-of-the-art streaming performance, frequently performing on par with batch and replay-buffer approaches.

</details>


### [710] [Policy Gradient Primal-Dual Method for Safe Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19024)
*Qiang Liu,Adrienne Kline,Ermin Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将安全强化学习从人类反馈（Safe RLHF）形式化为无限折扣约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），提出两种无需拟合奖励模型、支持灵活轨迹长度的Safe RLHF算法，并证明了全局多项式收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Safe RLHF方法依赖固定视界奖励模型和固定长度轨迹，缺乏理论基础。人类与模型的交互本质上是持续序列而非有限回合，需要更通用的理论框架来保证安全性和收敛性。

Method: 将Safe RLHF建模为无限折扣CMDP，提出两种基于原始-对偶方法的算法：无需奖励模型拟合，支持可变轨迹长度，在策略梯度迭代、轨迹样本长度和人类偏好查询三个维度上实现多项式收敛速率。

Result: 两种算法均达到全局收敛保证，且收敛速率在策略梯度迭代次数、轨迹样本长度和人类偏好查询次数上均为多项式级。这是首个在人类反馈下研究无限折扣CMDP并建立全局非渐近收敛性的工作。

Conclusion: 该工作为Safe RLHF提供了更严谨的数学基础，扩展了CMDP理论在人类反馈场景中的应用，为开发更安全、更高效的大语言模型对齐方法奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: Safe Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (Safe RLHF) has recently achieved empirical success in developing helpful and harmless large language models by decoupling human preferences regarding helpfulness and harmlessness. Existing approaches typically rely on fitting fixed horizon reward models from human feedback and have only been validated empirically. In this paper, we formulate safe RLHF as an infinite horizon discounted Con- strained Markov Decision Process (CMDP), since humans may interact with the model over a continuing sequence of interactions rather than within a single finite episode. We propose two Safe RLHF algorithms that do not require reward model fitting and, in contrast to prior work assuming fixed-length trajectories, support flexible trajectory lengths for training. Both algo- rithms are based on the primal-dual method and achieve global convergence guarantees with polynomial rates in terms of policy gradient iterations, trajectory sample lengths, and human preference queries. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to study infinite horizon discounted CMDP under human feedback and establish global, non-asymptotic convergence.

</details>


### [711] [FG$^2$-GDN: Enhancing Long-Context Gated Delta Networks with Doubly Fine-Grained Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19021)
*Pingwei Sun,Yuxuan Hu,Jianchao Tan,Xue Wang,Jiaqi Zhang,Yifan Lu,Yerui Sun,Yuchen Xie,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FG²-GDN和FG²-GDN+，通过将delta规则中的标量学习率替换为通道级向量（类似从SGD到AdaGrad/Adam的改进），并进一步解耦键值缩放以独立控制擦除和写入强度，在保持线性复杂度下提升了关联记忆和长上下文理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性注意力机制（如GDN和KDA）中delta更新的学习率β_t仍是标量，限制了模型对不同通道进行差异化适应的能力，亟需引入维度特定的自适应学习率。

Method: 1) 将标量β_t扩展为通道级向量，实现逐通道自适应学习率（类似AdaGrad/Adam的per-coordinate优化）；2) 在FG²-GDN+中进一步解耦键和值的缩放，分别控制擦除强度和写入强度。

Result: 在合成数据和真实世界基准测试中，FG²-GDN及其变体在关联记忆和长上下文理解任务上优于GDN和KDA，且计算效率相当。

Conclusion: 通道级自适应学习率和键值缩放解耦能有效提升线性注意力的表达能力，为未来高效长序列建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: Linear attention mechanisms have emerged as promising alternatives to softmax attention, offering linear-time complexity during inference. Recent advances such as Gated DeltaNet (GDN) and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) have demonstrated that the delta rule, an online gradient descent update, enables superior associative recall compared to simple additive updates. While KDA refined the coarse head-wise decay gate into channel-wise decay, the learning rate $β_t$ in the delta update remains a scalar, limiting the model's capacity for dimension-specific adaptation. We introduce FG$^2$-GDN, which replaces the scalar $β_t$ with a channel-wise vector analogous to the transition from SGD to per-coordinate adaptive optimizers such as AdaGrad and Adam. We further propose FG$^2$-GDN+, which decouples the scaling for keys and values, enabling independent control of erasure strength and write strength. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that FG$^2$-GDN and its variant improve associative recall and long-context understanding over GDN and KDA, with comparable computational efficiency.

</details>


### [712] [Local Linearity of LLMs Enables Activation Steering via Model-Based Linear Optimal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19018)
*Julian Skifstad,Xinyue Annie Yang,Glen Chou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将LLM推理建模为线性时变动态系统，利用线性二次型调节器（LQR）计算闭环反馈控制器，通过层间雅可比矩阵引导激活向语义设定点对齐，实现无需离线训练的高效、细粒度行为控制，在毒性、真实性、拒绝等任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法采用非前瞻性干预，忽略扰动在Transformer层间的传播且缺乏在线误差反馈，导致开环控制效果欠佳。

Method: 1) 实验证明Transformer逐层动态可被局部线性模型良好近似；2) 将LLM推理建模为线性时变动态系统；3) 利用层间雅可比矩阵适配经典LQR计算反馈控制器；4) 提出自适应语义特征设定点信号实现闭环控制。

Result: 在毒性、真实性、拒绝及任意概念调控任务上取得最先进效果，超越基线引导方法，且计算开销极小、无需离线训练。

Conclusion: 基于局部线性近似和LQR的闭环激活引导方法能实现鲁棒、细粒度的LLM行为控制，并提供了设定点跟踪误差的理论界，保证引导性能。

Abstract: Inference-time LLM alignment methods, particularly activation steering, offer an alternative to fine-tuning by directly modifying activations during generation. Existing methods, however, often rely on non-anticipative interventions that ignore how perturbations propagate through transformer layers and lack online error feedback, resulting in suboptimal, open-loop control. To address this, we show empirically that, despite the nonlinear structure of transformer blocks, layer-wise dynamics across multiple LLM architectures and scales are well-approximated by locally-linear models. Exploiting this property, we model LLM inference as a linear time-varying dynamical system and adapt the classical linear quadratic regulator to compute feedback controllers using layer-wise Jacobians, steering activations toward desired semantic setpoints in closed-loop with minimal computational overhead and no offline training. We also derive theoretical bounds on setpoint tracking error, enabling formal guarantees on steering performance. Using a novel adaptive semantic feature setpoint signal, our method yields robust, fine-grained behavior control across models, scales, and tasks, including state-of-the-art modulation of toxicity, truthfulness, refusal, and arbitrary concepts, surpassing baseline steering methods. Our code is available at: https://github.com/trustworthyrobotics/lqr-activation-steering

</details>


### [713] [Decompose, Structure, and Repair: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Autoformalization via Operator Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19000)
*Xiaoyang Liu,Zineng Dong,Yifan Bai,Yantao Li,Yuntian Liu,Tao Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DSR框架，将自动形式化重构为模块化流水线，通过分解、结构化和修复流程，在Lean 4的PRIME基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将形式化代码视为扁平序列，忽视了数学语句中固有的层次化逻辑结构，导致自动形式化效果受限。

Method: 提出DSR（分解、结构化、修复）神经符号框架：将语句分解为逻辑组件，映射为结构化算子树，利用拓扑蓝图通过子树精确定位和修复错误。

Result: 在包含156个本科及研究生级别定理的PRIME基准上，DSR在同等计算预算下持续超越所有基线，达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: DSR通过引入层次化结构先验，有效提升了自动形式化的准确性和可修复性，数据集、模型和代码将开源。

Abstract: Statement autoformalization acts as a critical bridge between human mathematics and formal mathematics by translating natural language problems into formal language. While prior works have focused on data synthesis and diverse training paradigms to optimize end-to-end Large Language Models (LLMs), they typically treat formal code as flat sequences, neglecting the hierarchical logic inherent in mathematical statements. In this work, we introduce Decompose, Structure, and Repair (DSR), a neuro-symbolic framework that restructures autoformalization into a modular pipeline. DSR decomposes statements into logical components and maps them to structured operator trees, leveraging this topological blueprint to precisely localize and repair errors via sub-tree refinement. Furthermore, we introduce PRIME, a benchmark of 156 undergraduate and graduate-level theorems selected from canonical textbooks and expertly annotated in Lean 4. Experimental results demonstrate that DSR establishes a new state-of-the-art, consistently outperforming baselines under equivalent computational budgets. The datasets, model, and code will be released to the public soon.

</details>


### [714] [Low-Rank Adaptation for Critic Learning in Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18978)
*Yuan Zhuang,Yuexin Bian,Sihong He,Jie Feng,Qing Su,Songyang Han,Jonathan Petit,Shihao Ji,Yuanyuan Shi,Fei Miao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将LoRA作为off-policy强化学习中critic的结构化稀疏正则化器，通过冻结随机初始化的基矩阵并仅优化低秩适配器，将critic更新约束在低维子空间中，从而缓解过拟合和不稳定性。在SimbaV2基础上开发了兼容的LoRA变体，在DeepMind Control和IsaacLab基准上验证了该方法能持续降低critic loss并提升策略性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩大critic容量是提升off-policy RL性能的有前景方向，但更大的critic在基于经验回放的bootstrap训练中容易过拟合且不稳定，需要有效的正则化方法。

Method: 采用Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)作为结构化稀疏正则化器：冻结随机初始化的基矩阵，仅优化低秩适配器，将critic参数更新约束在低维子空间。在SimbaV2基础上设计了兼容的LoRA变体，在冻结骨干训练下保留其超球面归一化几何结构。

Result: 在SAC和FastTD3算法上，于DeepMind Control locomotion和IsaacLab机器人基准测试中，LoRA方法在训练过程中持续取得更低的critic loss和更强的策略性能。

Conclusion: 自适应低秩更新为off-policy RL中的critic学习提供了一种简单、可扩展且有效的结构化正则化方法。

Abstract: Scaling critic capacity is a promising direction for enhancing off-policy reinforcement learning (RL). However, larger critics are prone to overfitting and unstable in replay-buffer-based bootstrap training. This paper leverages Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a structural-sparsity regularizer for off-policy critics. Our approach freezes randomly initialized base matrices and solely optimizes low-rank adapters, thereby constraining critic updates to a low-dimensional subspace. Built on top of SimbaV2, we further develop a LoRA formulation, compatible with SimbaV2, that preserves its hyperspherical normalization geometry under frozen-backbone training. We evaluate our method with SAC and FastTD3 on DeepMind Control locomotion and IsaacLab robotics benchmarks. LoRA consistently achieves lower critic loss during training and stronger policy performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that adaptive low-rank updates provide a simple, scalable, and effective structural regularization for critic learning in off-policy RL.

</details>


### [715] [Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13504)
*Shentong Mo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，利用大语言模型和代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制，通过贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，实现高效鲁棒的奖励函数设计，在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准测试中表现更优且评估成本更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习奖励函数设计依赖大量人工设计与评估，存在效率低、不一致性高、忽略中间决策点局部不确定性等问题。

Method: 1) 代码不确定性量化结合文本与语义分析的相似性选择机制，识别并重用最相关的奖励函数组件；2) 贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，减少冗余评估，搜索最优奖励反馈。

Result: 在IsaacGym的9个环境和Bidexterous Manipulation的20个任务上，CoUR取得了更优性能并显著降低了奖励评估成本。

Conclusion: CoUR框架有效解决了传统奖励函数设计的低效与不一致问题，通过LLM驱动的智能选择与优化，实现了高性能与低成本兼得。

Abstract: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

</details>


### [716] [Mechanistic Anomaly Detection via Functional Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18970)
*Hugo Lyons Keenan,Christopher Leckie,Sarah Erfani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将机械异常检测（MAD）重新定义为功能归因问题，利用影响函数通过参数空间采样测量测试样本与参考集之间的功能耦合，从而检测模型异常行为。在多种模态（视觉、语言模型）和异常类型（后门攻击、对抗样本、分布外样本）上均取得了最先进结果，且不受特定架构限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MAD方法要么依赖潜在空间分析（易受混淆攻击），要么局限于特定架构和模态，缺乏通用、鲁棒的异常检测方法。

Method: 将MAD重构为功能归因问题，通过影响函数计算测试样本与可信参考集之间的功能耦合程度，利用参数空间采样衡量归因失败程度来标识异常行为。

Result: 在后门检测任务上，BackdoorBench基准中平均防御有效性（DER）达0.93（七种攻击、四个数据集），远超次优方法（0.83）；在LLM后门检测上也显著优于基线，包括显式混淆模型；可检测对抗样本和分布外样本，并能区分单模型内的多种异常机制。

Conclusion: 功能归因是一种有效、模态无关的异常检测工具，适用于部署模型中的多种异常行为检测。

Abstract: We can often verify the correctness of neural network outputs using ground truth labels, but we cannot reliably determine whether the output was produced by normal or anomalous internal mechanisms. Mechanistic anomaly detection (MAD) aims to flag these cases, but existing methods either depend on latent space analysis, which is vulnerable to obfuscation, or are specific to particular architectures and modalities. We reframe MAD as a functional attribution problem: asking to what extent samples from a trusted set can explain the model's output, where attribution failure signals anomalous behavior. We operationalize this using influence functions, measuring functional coupling between test samples and a small reference set via parameter-space sampling. We evaluate across multiple anomaly types and modalities. For backdoors in vision models, our method achieves state-of-the-art detection on BackdoorBench, with an average Defense Effectiveness Rating (DER) of 0.93 across seven attacks and four datasets (next best 0.83). For LLMs, we similarly achieve a significant improvement over baselines for several backdoor types, including on explicitly obfuscated models. Beyond backdoors, our method can detect adversarial and out-of-distribution samples, and distinguishes multiple anomalous mechanisms within a single model. Our results establish functional attribution as an effective, modality-agnostic tool for detecting anomalous behavior in deployed models.

</details>


### [717] [Self-Improving Tabular Language Models via Iterative Group Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18966)
*Yunbo Long,Tejumade Afonja,Alexandra Brintrup,Mario Fritz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabGRAA是一个面向表格数据生成的自改进框架，通过自动化反馈信号（如二样本区分性分类器或距离奖励）对生成样本进行分组，并优化群组相对优势目标，实现从静态统计复制到动态自我改进的生成范式。实验表明其在保真度、效用和隐私方面优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言模型在表格数据生成中存在两个根本局限：(1)静态微调使模型无法从自身生成样本中学习和自我纠正；(2)自回归目标只保留局部token连贯性而忽略全局统计特性，降低表格质量。强化学习虽有潜力但需设计平衡多个竞争目标的奖励函数，这对表格数据不切实际。

Method: TabGRAA采用迭代自改进框架：每轮使用自动化质量信号（如二样本区分性分类器或距离奖励）将新生成的样本划分为高质量和低质量两组，然后优化群组相对优势目标，强化真实模式同时惩罚伪影。质量信号是模块化选择，每轮基于新生成的合成样本重新计算，语言模型仅在这些自生成信号上微调，不暴露额外真实记录。

Result: 实验表明TabGRAA在保真度、效用和隐私方面优于现有方法，匹配或超越基于扩散的生成器，将表格合成从静态统计复制推进到动态自改进生成。

Conclusion: TabGRAA通过自动化反馈机制实现了表格数据生成模型的自我改进能力，有效解决了静态微调和局部连贯性忽视全局统计特性两大问题，同时通过仅使用自生成信号进行对齐来降低数据泄露风险。

Abstract: While language models have been adapted for tabular data generation, two fundamental limitations remain: (1) static fine-tuning produces models that cannot learn from their own generated samples and adapt to self-correct, and (2) autoregressive objectives preserve local token coherence but neglect global statistical properties, degrading tabular quality. Reinforcement learning offers a potential solution but requires designing reward functions that balance competing objectives -- impractical for tabular data. To fill the gap, we introduce TabGRAA (Tabular Group-Relative Advantage Alignment), the first self-improving framework for tabular data generation via automated feedback. At each iteration, TabGRAA uses an \emph{automated quality signal} -- such as a two-sample distinguishability classifier or a distance-based reward -- to partition newly generated samples into high- and low-quality groups, then optimizes a group-relative advantage objective that reinforces realistic patterns while penalizing artifacts. The specific signal is a modular choice rather than a fixed component of the framework. This establishes a virtuous feedback cycle, where the quality signal is re-computed against newly \emph{generated synthetic} samples at each round; the language model is only fine-tuned on these self-generated signals, so no additional real record is exposed during alignment, mitigating data-leakage risk beyond the initial supervised fine-tuning. Experiments show TabGRAA outperforms existing methods in fidelity, utility, and privacy, while matching or exceeding diffusion-based synthesizers, advancing tabular synthesis from static statistical replication to dynamic, self-improving generation.

</details>


### [718] [Distillation Traps and Guards: A Calibration Knob for LLM Distillability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18963)
*Weixiao Zhan,Yongcheng Jing,Leszek Rutkowski,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了知识蒸馏中的三大陷阱（尾噪声、离策略不稳定性、师生差距），并提出了一种基于强化微调（RFT）的事后校准方法，首次实现对教师模型可蒸馏性的控制，既能提升学生模型性能，又能通过不可蒸馏性保护模型知识产权。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识蒸馏存在不可预测的失败模式，且可能导致模型泄露风险，需要深入理解蒸馏失败的根本原因并提出可控的解决方案。

Method: 提出一种事后校准方法，通过强化微调（RFT）优化包含任务效用、KL锚点和跨分词器校准奖励的综合目标函数，实现对教师模型可蒸馏性的控制。

Result: 在数学、知识问答和指令遵循任务上，从可蒸馏校准教师蒸馏出的学生模型优于SFT和KD基线；不可蒸馏校准教师保持自身性能但导致学生模型崩溃。

Conclusion: 该方法为知识蒸馏和模型知识产权保护提供了实用的控制手段，连接了鲁棒的师生迁移与部署感知的模型保护。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers capabilities from large language models (LLMs) to smaller students, yet it can fail unpredictably and also underpins model leakage risks. Our analysis revealed several distillation traps: tail noise, off-policy instability, and, most fundamentally, the teacher-student gap, that distort training signals. These traps manifest as overconfident hallucinations, self-correction collapse, and local decoding degradation, causing distillation to fail. Motivated by these findings, we propose a post-hoc calibration method that, to the best of our knowledge, for the first time enables control over a teacher's distillability via reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT). Our objective combines task utility, KL anchor, and across-tokenizer calibration reward. This makes distillability a practical safety lever for foundation models, connecting robust teacher-student transfer with deployment-aware model protection. Experiments across math, knowledge QA, and instruction-following tasks show that students distilled from distillable calibrated teachers outperform SFT and KD baselines, while undistillable calibrated teachers retain their task performance but cause distilled students to collapse, offering a practical knob for both better KD and model IP protection.

</details>


### [719] [Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13366)
*Angelo Moroncelli,Matteo Rufolo,Gunes Cagin Aydin,Asad Ali Shahid,Loris Roveda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将系统辨识建模为上下文元学习问题，对比了确定性序列模型与扩散模型在机器人正向动力学预测中的表现，发现扩散模型在分布偏移下具有更强的鲁棒性，且通过热启动采样可满足实时控制需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人动力学建模在分布偏移和实时约束下仍然具有挑战性，现有确定性模型鲁棒性不足，需要更鲁棒且满足实时性的系统辨识方法。

Method: 将系统辨识形式化为上下文元学习问题；采用Transformer元模型作为确定性基线；引入两种扩散方法：(i) 修复扩散（Diffuser），学习联合输入-观测分布；(ii) 条件扩散模型（CNN和Transformer），基于控制输入生成未来观测。

Result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下显著提升了鲁棒性；修复扩散在所有实验中表现最佳；热启动采样使扩散模型能够在实时约束下运行。

Conclusion: 生成式元模型（尤其是扩散模型）是实现机器人鲁棒系统辨识的有前景方向，具备在实时控制中应用的潜力。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

</details>


### [720] [TabEmb: Joint Semantic-Structure Embedding for Table Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18939)
*Ehsan Hoseinzade,Ke Wang,Anandharaju Durai Raju*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabEmb通过解耦语义编码和结构建模，先利用LLM生成每列的语义嵌入，再通过图模块注入列间关系，从而生成联合语义-结构表示用于表格标注，在多项任务上持续优于强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格标注方法依赖将二维表格线性化为一维序列并用预训练语言模型编码，导致语义质量有限、对未见或稀有值泛化能力弱，且因二维到一维的展平及上下文长度限制造成结构建模能力下降。

Method: TabEmb采用解耦策略：首先利用LLM为每个列生成语义丰富的嵌入，然后通过一个基于图的模块对列间关系进行建模，将关系信息注入到嵌入中，最终得到联合语义-结构表示用于表格标注。

Result: 在多个表格标注任务上，TabEmb一致性地优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 解耦语义编码与结构建模能够有效提升表格标注性能，同时利用LLM的语义能力和图结构的关系建模能力是解决表格表示学习的关键方向。

Abstract: Table annotation is crucial for making web and enterprise tables usable in downstream NLP applications. Unlike textual data where learning semantically rich token or sentence embeddings often suffice, tables are structured combinations of columns wherein useful representations must jointly capture column's semantics and the inter-column relationships. Existing models learn by linearizing the 2D table into a 1D token sequence and encoding it with pretrained language models (PLMs) such as BERT. However, this leads to limited semantic quality and weaker generalization to unseen or rare values compared to modern LLMs, and degraded structural modeling due to 2D-to-1D flattening and context-length constraints. We propose TabEmb, which directly targets these limitations by decoupling semantic encoding from structural modeling. An LLM first produces semantically rich embeddings for each column, and a graph-based module over columns then injects relationships into the embeddings, yielding joint semantic-tructural representations for table annotation. Experiments show that TabEmb consistently outperforms strong baselines on different table annotation tasks. Source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/hoseinzadeehsan/TabEmb

</details>


### [721] [Fine-Tuning Small Reasoning Models for Quantum Field Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18936)
*Nathaniel S. Woodward,Zhiqi Gao,Yurii Kvasiuk,Kendrick M. Smith,Frederic Sala,Moritz Münchmeyer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次对小型（7B参数）推理模型进行针对理论物理学的学术微调研究，开发了可验证的数据生成流程，在量子场论领域生成2500+合成问题并改编arXiv等资源的人类问题，通过强化学习和监督微调实验评估性能提升及跨领域泛化能力，深入分析了微调前后推理错误的变化模式，并公开了数据流程、训练数据和约2亿token的推理轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型在理论物理学中的应用日益增长，但少有学术研究探索领域特定物理推理能力在模型训练过程中的发展机制，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 开发了可验证的数据生成流程（包括合成问题和人类改编问题），以量子场论为主要领域，采用强化学习和监督微调两种训练策略，并通过分析模型思维链前后变化来理解推理错误演化。

Result: 生成了2500+合成量子场论问题及来自arXiv和标准教学资源的人类改编问题，在7B参数推理模型上完成了强化学习和监督微调实验，并公开了数据流程、训练数据和约2亿token的推理轨迹。

Conclusion: 通过系统的微调实验和思维链分析，揭示了领域特定物理推理能力在强化学习和监督微调中的发展规律，为理论物理领域的大语言模型训练提供了方法论和数据基础。

Abstract: Despite the growing application of Large Language Models (LLMs) to theoretical physics, there is little academic exploration into how domain-specific physics reasoning ability develops while training these models. To investigate this, we perform the first academic fine-tuning study of small (7B-parameter) reasoning models dedicated specifically to theoretical physics. Because open-source verifiable training data required to train such capabilities is scarce, we developed a robust data generation pipeline that can both create synthetic problems and make existing human-authored problems suitable for model training. Selecting Quantum Field Theory (QFT) as our primary domain, we generated over 2,500 synthetic problems alongside a curated collection of human-adapted problems sourced from arXiv and standard pedagogical resources. We conduct both Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) experiments, benchmarking performance gains as well as generalization to other physics domains. We perform an extensive analysis of model chains-of-though before and after fine-tuning, to understand how reasoning errors evolve during RL and SFT. Finally, we publicly release our data pipeline, verifiable QFT training data, and $\sim$200M tokens of QFT reasoning traces.

</details>


### [722] [Collaborative Contextual Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18912)
*Chih-Yu Chang,Qiyuan Chen,Tianhan Gao,David Fenning,Chinedum Okwudire,Neil Dasgupta,Wei Lu,Raed Al Kontar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CCBO（协作式上下文贝叶斯优化）框架，允许多个异构客户端在可控上下文下联合执行CBO，支持在线协作、离线初始化及隐私保护，理论证明亚线性遗憾界，实验验证显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上下文贝叶斯优化（CBO）需要在上下文空间到最优设计的整个映射上进行逼近，同时进行跨上下文的探索和每个上下文内的利用，难度高于标准BO；而实际应用中多个异构但相关的客户端面临相似任务，协作可提升学习效率，但缺乏统一框架。

Method: 提出CCBO统一框架：支持多客户端联合执行CBO，具备可控上下文机制；支持在线协作与离线初始化（利用同伴历史信念）；提供可选的隐私保护通信机制；理论分析给出亚线性遗憾界。

Result: 通过大量仿真实验和一个真实世界的热轧应用场景，证明CCBO在客户端异构条件下仍显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: CCBO为多客户端协作式上下文贝叶斯优化提供了统一有效的解决方案，兼具理论保障与实用性能。

Abstract: Discovering optimal designs through sequential data collection is essential in many real-world applications. While Bayesian Optimization (BO) has achieved remarkable success in this setting, growing attention has recently turned to context-specific optimal design, formalized as Contextual Bayesian Optimization (CBO). Unlike BO, CBO is inherently more challenging as it must approximate an entire mapping from the context space to its corresponding optimal design, requiring simultaneous exploration across contexts and exploitation within each. In many modern applications, such tasks arise across multiple potentially heterogeneous but related clients, where collaboration can significantly improve learning efficiency. We propose CCBO, Collaborative Contextual Bayesian Optimization, a unified framework enabling multiple clients to jointly perform CBO with controllable contexts, supporting both online collaboration and offline initialization from peers' historical beliefs, with an optional privacy-preserving communication mechanism. We establish sublinear regret guarantees and demonstrate, through extensive simulations and a real-world hot rolling application, that CCBO achieves substantial improvements over existing approaches even under client heterogeneity. The code to reproduce the results can be found at https://github.com/cchihyu/Collaborative-Contextual-Bayesian-Optimization

</details>


### [723] [Harmful Intent as a Geometrically Recoverable Feature of LLM Residual Streams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18901)
*Isaac Llorente-Saguer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，大语言模型的有害意图在残差流中具有几何可恢复性：大多数层表现为线性方向，在投影方法失效的层表现为角度偏差。12个模型（涵盖4个架构家族和3种对齐变体）的实验显示，基于soft-AUC优化的线性方向可达到平均AUROC 0.98、TPR@1%FPR 0.80；类均值探针在不到1ms的拟合成本下达到0.98和0.71；有监督角度偏差策略在投影方法崩溃的中间层达到AUROC 0.96。有害意图与拒绝行为是表征中功能解耦的特征，检测在包括abliterated模型在内的变体中保持稳定。AUROC在0.97+区域可能高估可检测性，建议同时报告TPR@1%FPR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型是否在其表征空间中存在可几何恢复的有害意图信号，以及该信号与对齐训练（如拒绝行为）的关系，从而理解模型对齐的内部表征机制。

Method: 在12个模型（Qwen2.5、Qwen3.5、Llama-3.2、Gemma-3，含base、instruction-tuned、abliterated变体）上，采用6种方向寻找策略（3种成功：soft-AUC优化线性方向、类均值探针、有监督角度偏差策略），在单轮英语评估下从残差流中恢复有害意图的几何表征。

Result: soft-AUC优化线性方向达平均AUROC 0.98、TPR@1%FPR 0.80；类均值探针在<1ms拟合成本下达0.98和0.71；有监督角度偏差策略在投影方法崩溃的中间层达AUROC 0.96、TPR 0.61。有害意图与拒绝行为是表征中功能解耦的特征。方向在AdvBench上训练后迁移至HarmBench和JailbreakBench，最差AUROC 0.96。跨模型规模（Qwen3.5从0.8B至9B）AUROC稳定≥0.98。

Conclusion: 模型作为通用语言理解的一部分而获得线性可解码的有害意图表征，对齐训练改变的是模型对这些输入的响应方式而非重新组织上游识别信号。AUROC在0.97+区域可能高估可检测性，建议在安全评估中同时报告TPR@1%FPR。

Abstract: Harmful intent is geometrically recoverable from large language model residual streams: as a linear direction in most layers, and as angular deviation in layers where projection methods fail. Across 12 models spanning four architectural families (Qwen2.5, Qwen3.5, Llama-3.2, Gemma-3) and three alignment variants (base, instruction-tuned, abliterated), under single-turn, English evaluation, we characterise this geometry through six direction-finding strategies. Three succeed: a soft-AUC-optimised linear direction reaches mean AUROC 0.98 and TPR@1\%FPR 0.80; a class-mean probe reaches 0.98 and 0.71 at <1ms fitting cost; a supervised angular-deviation strategy reaches AUROC 0.96 and TPR of 0.61 along a representationally distinct direction ($73^\circ$ from projection-based solutions), uniquely sustaining detection in middle layers where projection methods collapse.
  Detection remains stable across alignment variants, including abliterated models from which refusal has been surgically removed: harmful intent and refusal behaviour are functionally dissociated features of the representation. A direction fitted on AdvBench transfers to held-out HarmBench and JailbreakBench with worst-case AUROC 0.96. The same picture holds at scale: across Qwen3.5 from 0.8B to 9B parameters, AUROC remains $\geq$0.98 and cross-variant transfer stays within 0.018 of own-direction performance
  This is consistent with a simple account: models acquire a linearly decodable representation of harmful intent as part of general language understanding, and alignment then shapes what they do with such inputs without reorganising the upstream recognition signal. As a practical consequence, AUROC in the 0.97+ regime can substantially overestimate operational detectability; TPR@$1\%$FPR should accompany AUROC in safety-adjacent evaluation.

</details>


### [724] [AC-SINDy: Compositional Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18889)
*Peter Racioppo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AC-SINDy，用算术电路替代显式特征库，通过线性函数和乘法交互的组合构建非线性特征，并结合潜在状态推断与共享动力学，实现噪声鲁棒且可扩展的稀疏动力学识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SINDy依赖预定义特征库，扩展性差且在高维或复杂系统中组合爆炸，需要更紧凑、可扩展的表示方法。

Method: 采用算术电路作为结构化特征表示，通过线性函数和乘法交互的组合来构造非线性特征，在计算图上直接施加稀疏性；同时引入潜在状态推断与共享动力学的多步监督框架，分离状态估计与动力学识别。

Result: 在非线性系统和混沌系统实验中，该方法能够恢复准确且可解释的控制方程，且比标准SINDy具有更好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: AC-SINDy通过算术电路的结构化特征表示，在保持可解释性的同时，提升了稀疏动力学识别的可扩展性和噪声鲁棒性。

Abstract: We present AC-SINDy, a compositional extension of the Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy) framework that replaces explicit feature libraries with a structured representation based on arithmetic circuits. Rather than enumerating candidate basis functions, the proposed approach constructs nonlinear features through compositions of linear functions and multiplicative interactions, yielding a compact and scalable parameterization and enabling sparsity to be enforced directly over the computational graph. We also introduce a formulation that separates state estimation from dynamics identification by combining latent state inference with shared dynamics and multi-step supervision, improving robustness to noise while preserving interpretability. Experiments on nonlinear and chaotic systems demonstrate that the method recovers accurate and interpretable governing equations while scaling more favorably than standard SINDy.

</details>


### [725] [ParamBoost: Gradient Boosted Piecewise Cubic Polynomials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18864)
*Nicolas Salvadé,Tim Hillel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ParamBoost是一种新型广义加性模型(GAM)，通过梯度提升算法学习三次多项式形状函数，并支持多种参数化约束（连续性、单调性、凸性、特征交互、模型规范），在保持可解释性的同时实现了优于现有GAM的性能，且允许用户根据需求灵活施加约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有玻璃箱模型（如GAM）虽然可解释，但无法融入建模者的专家知识或对形状函数施加参数化分析中常用的约束，限制了模型在特定应用场景中的适用性。

Method: 提出ParamBoost，使用梯度提升算法在叶节点拟合三次多项式函数来学习形状函数，并引入了五种参数化约束：C2连续性、单调性、凸性、特征交互约束和模型规范约束。

Result: 无约束的ParamBoost在多个真实数据集上持续优于最先进的GAM模型；施加约束后以适度的性能代价换取了完全符合应用需求的可解释性和参数化分析能力。

Conclusion: ParamBoost成功弥合了玻璃箱可解释性与参数化专家知识融入之间的鸿沟，允许建模者根据应用需求灵活权衡预测性能与可解释性约束。

Abstract: Generalized Additive Models (GAMs) can be used to create non-linear glass-box (i.e. explicitly interpretable) models, where the predictive function is fully observable over the complete input space. However, glass-box interpretability itself does not allow for the incorporation of expert knowledge from the modeller. In this paper, we present ParamBoost, a novel GAM whose shape functions (i.e. mappings from individual input features to the output) are learnt using a Gradient Boosting algorithm that fits cubic polynomial functions at leaf nodes. ParamBoost incorporates several constraints commonly used in parametric analysis to ensure well-refined shape functions. These constraints include: (i) continuity of the shape functions and their derivatives (up to C2); (ii) monotonicity; (iii) convexity; (iv) feature interaction constraints; and (v) model specification constraints. Empirical results show that the unconstrained ParamBoost model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GAMs across several real-world datasets. We further demonstrate that modellers can selectively impose required constraints at a modest trade-off in predictive performance, allowing the model to be fully tailored to application-specific interpretability and parametric-analysis requirements.

</details>


### [726] [One Step Forward and K Steps Back: Better Reasoning with Denoising Recursion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18839)
*Chris Cameron,Wangzheng Wang,Nikita Ivanov,Ashmita Bhattacharyya,Didier Chételat,Yingxue Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出去噪递归模型（Denoising Recursion Models），通过对数据添加噪声并训练模型在多个递归步骤中逆转噪声，为循环变压器提供可学习的中间状态课程，在ARC-AGI任务上优于Tiny Recursion Model。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环变压器在解决需要搜索式计算的困难问题时需要长轨迹的迭代精炼，但训练时仅提供目标解而无中间路径监督，导致学习困难。扩散模型虽然通过噪声扰动解决了部分问题，但其单步去噪训练与测试行为不一致。

Method: 提出去噪递归模型（Denoising Recursion Models），对数据进行不同幅度的噪声破坏，训练循环变压器在多个递归步骤中逐步逆转噪声，从而提供可学习的中间状态课程，同时保持训练与测试行为的一致性。

Result: 在ARC-AGI基准上，该方法显著优于Tiny Recursion Model (TRM)，后者近期在该任务上取得了突破性性能。

Conclusion: 去噪递归模型通过多步递归去噪策略有效解决了循环变压器在长轨迹精炼中的监督缺失问题，为非贪婪、前瞻性生成提供了更好的训练范式。

Abstract: Looped transformers scale computational depth without increasing parameter count by repeatedly applying a shared transformer block and can be used for iterative refinement, where each loop rewrites a full fixed-size prediction in parallel. On difficult problems, such as those that require search-like computation, reaching a highly structured solution starting from noise can require long refinement trajectories. Learning such trajectories is challenging when training specifies only the target solution and provides no supervision over the intermediate refinement path. Diffusion models tackle this issue by corrupting data with varying magnitudes of noise and training the model to reverse it in a \textit{single step}. However, this process misaligns training and testing behaviour. We introduce Denoising Recursion Models, a method that similarly corrupts data with noise but trains the model to reverse the corruption over \textit{multiple} recursive steps. This strategy provides a tractable curriculum of intermediate states, while better aligning training with testing and incentivizing non-greedy, forward-looking generation. Through extensive experiments, we show this approach outperforms the Tiny Recursion Model (TRM) on ARC-AGI, where it recently achieved breakthrough performance.

</details>


### [727] [Curvature-Aware PCA with Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation for Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18816)
*Alexandre L. M. Levada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种融合曲率感知与测地一致性的几何拓展PCA方法（GTSA-PCA），通过局部切子空间聚合与测地对齐算子实现流形感知的谱嵌入，在少量样本和高曲率场景下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PCA是全局线性方法，无法捕捉弯曲流形上的数据结构；而流形学习方法虽能建模非线性，但常牺牲谱结构和PCA的稳定性。需要一种既能保持PCA谱分解优势又能感知流形曲率的统一方法。

Method: 1) 在k近邻图上构建曲率加权的局部协方差算子，替代全局协方差，得到适应流形并抑制高曲率畸变的局部切子空间；2) 引入测地对齐算子，结合内在图距离与子空间亲和度，全局同步局部表示；3) 对该算子进行谱分解，主导成分构成几何感知嵌入；4) 可融入半监督信息指导对齐。

Result: 在真实数据集上，GTSA-PCA在少量样本和高曲率场景下一致优于PCA、Kernel PCA、Supervised PCA以及UMAP等强基线方法。

Conclusion: GTSA-PCA在统计方法与几何方法之间建立了原则性的桥梁，为降维任务提供了兼顾谱结构稳定性与流形曲率感知的统一框架。

Abstract: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a fundamental tool for representation learning, but its global linear formulation fails to capture the structure of data supported on curved manifolds. In contrast, manifold learning methods model nonlinearity but often sacrifice the spectral structure and stability of PCA. We propose \emph{Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation PCA (GTSA-PCA)}, a geometric extension of PCA that integrates curvature awareness and geodesic consistency within a unified spectral framework. Our approach replaces the global covariance operator with curvature-weighted local covariance operators defined over a $k$-nearest neighbor graph, yielding local tangent subspaces that adapt to the manifold while suppressing high-curvature distortions. We then introduce a geodesic alignment operator that combines intrinsic graph distances with subspace affinities to globally synchronize these local representations. The resulting operator admits a spectral decomposition whose leading components define a geometry-aware embedding. We further incorporate semi-supervised information to guide the alignment, improving discriminative structure with minimal supervision. Experiments on real datasets show consistent improvements over PCA, Kernel PCA, Supervised PCA and strong graph-based baselines such as UMAP, particularly in small sample size and high-curvature regimes. Our results position GTSA-PCA as a principled bridge between statistical and geometric approaches to dimensionality reduction.

</details>


### [728] [Preserving Clusters in Error-Bounded Lossy Compression of Particle Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18801)
*Congrong Ren,Sheng Di,Katrin Heitmann,Franck Cappello,Hanqi Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于修正的技术，在损失压缩后保持单链聚类结构，通过聚类感知校正算法、优化公式和GPU加速实现，在宇宙学和分子动力学数据集上验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有损失压缩器仅提供粒子位置的逐点误差界，无法保证聚类结果（如单链聚类/FoF）的保真性，微小扰动可能导致聚类连通性改变，影响科学分析的有效性。

Method: (1) 聚类感知校正算法：通过空间划分和局部邻域搜索识别脆弱粒子对；(2) 优化公式：使用投影梯度下降，以编码成对距离违例的损失函数强制执行聚类一致性；(3) 可扩展的GPU加速和分布式实现。

Result: 在宇宙学和分子动力学数据集上，该方法有效保持聚类结果，同时相比SZ3、ZFP、Draco、LCP和空间填充曲线方案，保持有竞争力的压缩性能。

Conclusion: 所提技术能在损失压缩后可靠地保持单链聚类结构，为关注聚类分析的科学应用提供了一种有效的后处理保障方案。

Abstract: Lossy compression is widely used to reduce storage and I/O costs for large-scale particle datasets in scientific applications such as cosmology, molecular dynamics, and fluid dynamics, where clustering structures (e.g., single-linkage or Friends-of-Friends) are critical for downstream analysis; however, existing compressors typically provide only pointwise error bounds on particle positions and offer no guarantees on preserving clustering outcomes, and even small perturbations can alter cluster connectivity and compromise scientific validity. We propose a correction-based technique to preserve single-linkage clustering under lossy compression, operating on decompressed data from off-the-shelf compressors such as SZ3 and Draco. Our key contributions are threefold: (1) a clustering-aware correction algorithm that identifies vulnerable particle pairs via spatial partitioning and local neighborhood search; (2) an optimization-based formulation that enforces clustering consistency using projected gradient descent with a loss that encodes pairwise distance violations; and (3) a scalable GPU-accelerated and distributed implementation for large-scale datasets. Experiments on cosmology and molecular dynamics datasets show that our method effectively preserves clustering results while maintaining competitive compression performance compared with SZ3, ZFP, Draco, LCP, and space-filling-curve-based schemes.

</details>


### [729] [HELM: Harness-Enhanced Long-horizon Memory for Vision-Language-Action Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18791)
*Zijian Zeng,Fei Ding,Huiming Yang,Xianwei Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HELM是一个模型无关的框架，通过引入情节记忆模块、状态验证器（学习模型）和驾驭控制器，系统性地解决了VLA模型在长 horizon 操作任务中的记忆缺口、验证缺口和恢复缺口三大执行循环缺陷，在LIBERO-LONG上比OpenVLA提升23.1个百分点（58.4%→81.5%），远超单纯扩展上下文窗口（+5.4点）或LoRA微调（落后12.2点）的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在短期任务上表现良好，但在长 horizon 操作任务中系统性失败。作者发现这种失败并非单纯通过扩展上下文长度就能解决，而是源于执行循环中的三个结构性缺陷：记忆缺口（无法有效利用历史信息）、验证缺口（无法在执行前预测动作失败）和恢复缺口（缺乏从失败中恢复的机制）。

Method: HELM包含三个组件：(1) 情节记忆模块（EMM），通过CLIP索引的关键帧检索任务历史；(2) 状态验证器（SV），一个学习模型，从观察、动作、子目标和记忆条件化上下文中预测动作是否会在执行前失败；(3) 驾驭控制器（HC），执行回滚和重新规划。其中SV是核心学习贡献，其有效性关键依赖于情节记忆的访问。

Result: 在LIBERO-LONG上，HELM将任务成功率从OpenVLA的58.4%提升至81.5%（+23.1点）。对比实验：扩展上下文窗口至H=32仅提升5.4点，同预算LoRA微调仍落后12.2点。在CALVIN上同样提升了长 horizon 性能，在受控扰动下显著提升了恢复成功率。消融实验隔离了各组件的贡献。

Conclusion: 长 horizon 操作任务的失败无法仅靠扩展上下文长度解决，需要专门设计机制来弥补记忆、验证和恢复三个缺口。HELM的模块化框架有效解决了这一问题，其中基于学习的状态验证器与情节记忆的协同是关键。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fail systematically on long-horizon manipulation tasks despite strong short-horizon performance. We show that this failure is not resolved by extending context length alone in the current reactive execution setting; instead, it stems from three recurring execution-loop deficiencies: the memory gap, the verification gap, and the recovery gap. We present HELM, a model-agnostic framework that addresses these deficiencies with three components: an Episodic Memory Module (EMM) that retrieves key task history via CLIP-indexed keyframes, a learned State Verifier (SV) that predicts action failure before execution from observation, action, subgoal, and memory-conditioned context, and a Harness Controller (HC) that performs rollback and replanning. The SV is the core learning contribution: it consistently outperforms rule-based feasibility checks and ensemble uncertainty baselines, and its effectiveness depends critically on access to episodic memory. On LIBERO-LONG, HELM improves task success rate by 23.1 percentage points over OpenVLA (58.4% to 81.5%), while extending the context window to H=32 yields only a 5.4-point gain and same-budget LoRA adaptation remains 12.2 points below HELM. HELM also improves long-horizon performance on CALVIN and substantially boosts recovery success under controlled perturbations. Ablations and mechanism analyses isolate the contribution of each component, and we release LIBERO-Recovery as a perturbation-injection protocol for evaluating failure recovery in long-horizon manipulation.

</details>


### [730] [Efficient Mixture-of-Experts LLM Inference with Apple Silicon NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18788)
*Afsara Benazir,Felix Xiaozhu Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NPUMoE是一个专为Apple Silicon设计的运行时推理引擎，通过将MoE大模型的密集静态计算卸载到ANE（神经处理单元），同时保留CPU/GPU处理动态操作，实现了1.32x-5.55x的延迟降低、1.81x-7.37x的能效提升和1.78x-5.54x的CPU周期减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE大模型在NPU上推理面临三大挑战：专家路由不可预测导致动态张量形状与NPU的形状约束冲突；top-k、scatter/gather等不规则算子不适用于NPU；启动大量小型专家内核带来巨大的调度和同步开销。NPU本用于从CPU/GPU卸载AI计算，但目前MoE推理无法有效利用这一能力，特别是在长上下文预填充阶段消耗大量系统资源。

Method: NPUMoE通过离线校准估计专家容量和流行度，驱动三项关键技术：(1) 静态层级的专家容量分配，应对动态路由；(2) 分组专家执行，缓解NPU并发限制；(3) 负载感知的专家计算图驻留，减少CPU-NPU同步开销。

Result: 在Apple M系列设备上，使用三种代表性MoE大模型和四种长上下文工作负载进行实验，NPUMoE相比基线方法，延迟降低1.32x-5.55x，能效提升1.81x-7.37x，CPU周期使用减少1.78x-5.54x。

Conclusion: NPUMoE成功实现了在Apple Silicon上将MoE推理的密集静态计算卸载到NPU，同时通过CPU/GPU回退路径处理动态操作，显著提升了推理效率和能效，验证了NPU在MoE模型推理中的有效利用潜力。

Abstract: Apple Neural Engine (ANE) is a dedicated neural processing unit (NPU) present in every Apple Silicon chip. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) LLMs improve inference efficiency via sparse activation but are challenging for NPUs in three ways: expert routing is unpredictable and introduces dynamic tensor shapes that conflict with the shape-specific constraints of NPUs; several irregular operators, e.g., top-k, scatter/gather, etc., are not NPU-friendly; and launching many small expert kernels incurs substantial dispatch and synchronization overhead. NPUs are designed to offload AI compute from CPU and GPU; our goal is to enable such offloading for MoE inference, particularly during prefill, where long-context workloads consume substantial system resources.
  This paper presents NPUMoE, a runtime inference engine that accelerates MoE execution on Apple Silicon by offloading dense, static computation to NPU, while preserving a CPU/GPU fallback path for dynamic operations. NPUMoE uses offline calibration to estimate expert capacity and popularity that drives three key techniques: (1) Static tiers for expert capacity to address dynamic expert routing (2) Grouped expert execution to mitigate NPU concurrency limits (3) Load-aware expert compute graph residency to reduce CPU-NPU synchronization overhead. Experiments on Apple M-series devices using three representative MoE LLMs and four long-context workloads show that NPUMoE consistently outperforms baselines, reducing latency by 1.32x-5.55x, improving energy efficiency by 1.81x-7.37x, and reducing CPU-cycle usage by 1.78x-5.54x through effective NPU offloading.

</details>


### [731] [Streaming Structured Inference with Flash-SemiCRF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18780)
*Benjamin K. Johnson,Thomas Goralski,Ayush Semwal,Hui Shen,H. Josh Jang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flash-SemiCRF 通过前缀和查找、流式前向-后向算法和零中心化累积分数，将半马尔可夫条件随机场的空间复杂度从 O(L·D·K²) 降至 O(L+K²)，使得在基因组规模（>100K位置）和大标签集上可进行精确的段级推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的半CRF实现需要物化一个巨大的边势张量，其大小随序列长度、最大段长和标签数增长，在语音规模的态空间和基因组规模（超过10万位置）上变得不可行，限制了精确段级推理在长序列和大标签集上的应用。

Method: 1) 用前缀和数组替代存储边势张量，内存减少因子为段长与标签数的乘积；2) 流式前向-后向传播配合检查点边界归一化，保持工作内存亚线性于序列长度；3) 零中心化累积分数控制数值漂移，并在标签不平衡下引入自适应持续时间先验。这些方法集成在融合的Triton内核Flash-SemiCRF中。

Result: 实现了在之前不可解的问题规模上进行精确半CRF推理，内存占用大幅降低，支持基因组级长度（>100K）和大标签集。

Conclusion: Flash-SemiCRF通过计算换存储的设计解决了半CRF的内存瓶颈，使精确段级推理在长序列和大标签场景下变得实用。

Abstract: Semi-Markov Conditional Random Fields (semi-CRFs) assign labels to segments of a sequence rather than to individual positions, enabling exact inference over segment-level features and principled uncertainty estimates at their boundaries. However, existing implementations must materialize a large edge potential tensor whose size grows with sequence length, maximum segment length, and label count, becoming prohibitive for speech-scale state spaces and intractable at genomic scales where sequences can exceed 100,000 positions. This memory bottleneck has limited the adoption of exact segment-level inference for long sequences and large label sets. We identify that the core inefficiency is materializing edge potentials that can instead be evaluated on-the-fly from a compact prefix-sum array, and make several improvements. First, replacing the stored edge tensor with prefix-sum lookup reduces the memory footprint by a factor proportional to the product of segment length and label count. Second, a streaming forward-backward pass with checkpoint-boundary normalization keeps working memory sublinear in sequence length while preserving exact gradients. Third, zero-centered cumulative scores control numerical drift and induce an adaptive duration prior under label imbalance. We integrate these ideas into Flash-SemiCRF, a fused Triton kernel that enables exact semi-CRF inference on previously intractable problem sizes. Available at https://github.com/biobenkj/flash-semicrf.

</details>


### [732] [Towards Understanding the Robustness of Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18756)
*Ahson Saiyed,Sabrina Sadiekh,Chirag Agarwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在推理阶段将预训练的稀疏自编码器（SAE）集成到Transformer残差流中，在不修改模型权重或阻断梯度的情况下，将越狱攻击成功率最多降低5倍，并揭示了稀疏性与防御效果之间的单调剂量-响应关系以及层相关的防御-效用权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型仍易受利用内部梯度结构的优化型越狱攻击，而SAE虽广泛用于可解释性研究，但其对模型鲁棒性的影响尚未被充分探索。

Method: 在不修改模型权重或阻断梯度的前提下，在推理阶段将预训练SAE集成到Transformer残差流中；在四个模型族（Gemma、LLaMA、Mistral、Qwen）上，针对两种强白盒攻击（GCG、BEAST）和三种黑盒基准进行测试，并进行参数消融实验。

Result: SAE增强模型相对于未防御基线将越狱成功率最多降低5倍，并降低了跨模型攻击的可迁移性；存在L0稀疏度与攻击成功率之间的单调剂量-响应关系，以及中间层在鲁棒性与干净性能之间实现平衡的层相关防御-效用权衡。

Conclusion: 这些发现与表征瓶颈假说一致：稀疏投影重塑了越狱攻击所利用的优化几何结构。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to optimization-based jailbreak attacks that exploit internal gradient structure. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used for interpretability, their robustness implications remain underexplored. We present a study of integrating pretrained SAEs into transformer residual streams at inference time, without modifying model weights or blocking gradients. Across four model families (Gemma, LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) and two strong white-box attacks (GCG, BEAST) plus three black-box benchmarks, SAE-augmented models achieve up to a 5x reduction in jailbreak success rate relative to the undefended baseline and reduce cross-model attack transferability. Parametric ablations reveal (i) a monotonic dose-response relationship between L0 sparsity and attack success rate, and (ii) a layer-dependent defense-utility tradeoff, where intermediate layers balance robustness and clean performance. These findings are consistent with a representational bottleneck hypothesis: sparse projection reshapes the optimization geometry exploited by jailbreak attacks.

</details>


### [733] [Handling and Interpreting Missing Modalities in Patient Clinical Trajectories via Autoregressive Sequence Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18753)
*Andrew Wang,Ellie Pavlick,Ritambhara Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将临床诊断重新框架为自回归序列建模任务，利用大语言模型的因果解码器建模患者多模态轨迹。通过引入缺失感知的对比预训练目标整合缺失数据中的多模态信息，在MIMIC-IV和eICU基准测试中优于基线方法，并利用可解释性技术分析缺失模态对模型行为的影响，最终构建了一个安全、透明的临床AI框架来处理缺失模态问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗多模态机器学习面临的关键挑战是训练和部署期间模态缺失问题。临床数据集天然具有时间性和模态稀疏性，如何在保留模型可解释性的同时通过诊断性多模态ML模型捕获潜在的预测信号，是一个持续存在的挑战。

Method: 1) 将临床诊断重新定义为自回归序列建模任务，使用大语言模型的因果解码器建模患者多模态轨迹；2) 提出缺失感知的对比预训练目标，在共享潜在空间中整合存在缺失的多模态数据集；3) 在MIMIC-IV和eICU基准上进行微调评估；4) 运用可解释性技术分析模型行为。

Result: 采用基于Transformer架构的自回归序列建模在MIMIC-IV和eICU微调基准测试中优于基线方法。可解释性分析发现，移除不同模态会导致模型行为出现分歧，而对比预训练能够缓解这一问题。

Conclusion: 通过将临床诊断抽象为序列建模并解释患者住院轨迹，本文开发了一个框架来分析和处理缺失模态问题，同时满足了安全、透明的临床AI这一核心要求。

Abstract: An active challenge in developing multimodal machine learning (ML) models for healthcare is handling missing modalities during training and deployment. As clinical datasets are inherently temporal and sparse in terms of modality presence, capturing the underlying predictive signal via diagnostic multimodal ML models while retaining model explainability remains an ongoing challenge. In this work, we address this by re-framing clinical diagnosis as an autoregressive sequence modeling task, utilizing causal decoders from large language models (LLMs) to model a patient's multimodal trajectory. We first introduce a missingness-aware contrastive pre-training objective that integrates multiple modalities in datasets with missingness in a shared latent space. We then show that autoregressive sequence modeling with transformer-based architectures outperforms baselines on the MIMIC-IV and eICU fine-tuning benchmarks. Finally, we use interpretability techniques to move beyond performance boosts and find that across various patient stays, removing modalities leads to divergent behavior that our contrastive pre-training mitigates. By abstracting clinical diagnosis as sequence modeling and interpreting patient stay trajectories, we develop a framework to profile and handle missing modalities while addressing the canonical desideratum of safe, transparent clinical AI.

</details>


### [734] [Beyond Coefficients: Forecast-Necessity Testing for Interpretable Causal Discovery in Nonlinear Time-Series Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18751)
*Valentina Kuskova,Dmitry Zaytsev,Michael Coppedge*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过预测必要性（而非系数大小）评估非线性时间序列模型中的因果关系，并基于边消融和预测比较构建了解释性评估框架。以神经加性向量自回归模型为案例，对139个国家的民主发展面板数据进行分析，发现相似因果得分的关系在预测必要性上存在显著差异，原因包括冗余性、时间持久性和制度特定效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性机器学习模型在时间序列因果发现中应用日益广泛，但其输出的因果分数常被错误地类比为回归系数，导致对统计显著性的误导性声明，因此需要更可靠的因果解释方法。

Method: 提出基于系统性边消融（edge ablation）与预测比较的可解释评估框架，通过测试候选因果关系是否为准确预测所必需（forecast necessity）来判断因果相关性，并以神经加性向量自回归（NAVAR）为案例模型进行验证。

Result: 相似因果分数的关系在预测必要性上可能差异巨大；冗余性、时间持久性和制度特定效应是导致这种差异的主要原因。

Conclusion: 预测必要性测试能够支持更可靠的因果推理，为高风险领域中非线性时间序列模型的解释提供实践指导。

Abstract: Nonlinear machine-learning models are increasingly used to discover causal relationships in time-series data, yet the interpretation of their outputs remains poorly understood. In particular, causal scores produced by regularized neural autoregressive models are often treated as analogues of regression coefficients, leading to misleading claims of statistical significance.
  In this paper, we argue that causal relevance in nonlinear time-series models should be evaluated through forecast necessity rather than coefficient magnitude, and we present a practical evaluation procedure for doing so. We present an interpretable evaluation framework based on systematic edge ablation and forecast comparison, which tests whether a candidate causal relationship is required for accurate prediction. Using Neural Additive Vector Autoregression as a case study model, we apply this framework to a real-world case study of democratic development, modeled as a multivariate time series of panel data - democracy indicators across 139 countries. We show that relationships with similar causal scores can differ dramatically in their predictive necessity due to redundancy, temporal persistence, and regime-specific effects.
  Our results demonstrate how forecast-necessity testing supports more reliable causal reasoning in applied AI systems and provides practical guidance for interpreting nonlinear time-series models in high-stakes domains.

</details>


### [735] [Sessa: Selective State Space Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18580)
*Liubomyr Horbatko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Sessa提出了一种将注意力机制置于循环反馈路径中的解码器架构，通过创建多条基于注意力的路径来连接过去和未来状态，在长上下文场景下实现了幂律记忆衰减（O(ℓ^{-β})，0<β<1），比Transformer和Mamba类基线衰减更慢，并支持灵活的选择性检索，在长上下文基准测试中表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列建模两大主流——Transformer的自注意力机制在注意力分散时单个token的影响力被稀释，而结构化状态空间模型（如Mamba）的循环状态传播在长上下文中可能丢失远距离敏感性。两种机制在长上下文的保持和选择性检索信息方面均面临挑战。

Method: 提出Sessa解码器，将注意力机制放置在循环反馈路径中，构建多条基于注意力的路径，使得过去的token可以通过多条路径影响未来状态，而非依赖单一的注意力读取或单一的循环链。

Result: 在明确假设下，Sessa实现幂律记忆衰减O(ℓ^{-β})（0<β<1），衰减速度慢于Transformer和Mamba类基线。Sessa是唯一能实现灵活选择性检索的模型类，包括影响不随距离衰减的配置。在长上下文基准测试中取得最强性能，同时在短上下文语言建模中与基线的竞争力相当。

Conclusion: Sessa通过将注意力嵌入循环反馈路径，在理论上和实验上证明了其在长上下文建模中的优势，能够同时兼顾长上下文的记忆保持和选择性检索能力。

Abstract: Modern sequence modeling is dominated by two families: Transformers, whose self-attention can access arbitrary elements of the visible sequence, and structured state-space models, which propagate information through an explicit recurrent state. These mechanisms face different limitations on long contexts: when attention is diffuse, the influence of individual tokens is diluted across the effective support, while recurrent state propagation can lose long-range sensitivity unless information is actively preserved. As a result, both mechanisms face challenges in preserving and selectively retrieving information over long contexts. We propose Sessa, a decoder that places attention inside a recurrent feedback path. This creates many attention-based paths through which past tokens can influence future states, rather than relying on a single attention read or a single recurrent chain. We prove that, under explicit assumptions and matched regimes, Sessa admits power-law memory tails $O(\ell^{-β})$ for $0 < β< 1$, with slower decay than in the corresponding Transformer and Mamba-style baselines. We further give an explicit construction that achieves this power-law rate. Under the same assumptions, Sessa is the only model class among those considered that realizes flexible selective retrieval, including profiles whose influence does not decay with distance. Consistent with this theoretical advantage, across matched experiments, Sessa achieves the strongest performance on long-context benchmarks while remaining competitive with Transformer and Mamba-style baselines on short-context language modeling.

</details>


### [736] [Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18578)
*Yunke Ao,Le Chen,Bruce D. Lee,Assefa S. Wahd,Aline Czarnobai,Philipp Fürnstahl,Bernhard Schölkopf,Andreas Krause*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BRRL框架，推导出具有单调性能改进保证的分析最优解，并据此开发BPO算法。BPO通过最小化优势加权散度来逼近最优策略，为PPO的剪切目标提供了理论解释，并统一了信任区域策略优化和交叉熵方法。实验表明BPO/GBPO在MuJoCo、Atari、IsaacLab及LLM微调中匹配或超越PPO/GRPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PPO虽因可扩展性和经验鲁棒性成为在线强化学习的主流算法，但其启发式剪切目标与信任区域方法的理论基础之间存在显著脱节，缺乏理论上的严密解释。

Method: 提出BRRL框架，构造一个新的正则化约束策略优化问题并推导解析最优解，证明该解保证单调性能改进。针对参数化策略类，开发BPO算法，最小化策略与BRRL解析最优解之间的优势加权散度，并建立BPO损失函数与期望性能下界之间的联系。此外将BPO扩展为GBPO用于LLM微调。

Result: 在MuJoCo、Atari和复杂IsaacLab环境（如Humanoid locomotion）上的实验表明BPO在稳定性和最终性能上匹配或超越PPO；在LLM微调任务中GBPO匹配或超越GRPO。

Conclusion: BRRL框架弥合了PPO与信任区域方法之间的理论鸿沟，为PPO的成功提供了新的理论视角，并统一了TRPO和CEM。BPO/GBPO作为理论驱动的替代方案，在多个领域表现出竞争力。

Abstract: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) has become the predominant algorithm for on-policy reinforcement learning due to its scalability and empirical robustness across domains. However, there is a significant disconnect between the underlying foundations of trust region methods and the heuristic clipped objective used in PPO. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing the Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning (BRRL) framework. We formulate a novel regularized and constrained policy optimization problem and derive its analytical optimal solution. We prove that this solution ensures monotonic performance improvement. To handle parameterized policy classes, we develop a policy optimization algorithm called Bounded Policy Optimization (BPO) that minimizes an advantage-weighted divergence between the policy and the analytic optimal solution from BRRL. We further establish a lower bound on the expected performance of the resulting policy in terms of the BPO loss function. Notably, our framework also provides a new theoretical lens to interpret the success of the PPO loss, and connects trust region policy optimization and the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM). We additionally extend BPO to Group-relative BPO (GBPO) for LLM fine-tuning. Empirical evaluations of BPO across MuJoCo, Atari, and complex IsaacLab environments (e.g., Humanoid locomotion), and of GBPO for LLM fine-tuning tasks, demonstrate that BPO and GBPO generally match or outperform PPO and GRPO in stability and final performance.

</details>


### [737] [A multimodal and temporal foundation model for virtual patient representations at healthcare system scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18570)
*Andrew Zhang,Tong Ding,Sophia J. Wagner,Caiwei Tian,Ming Y. Lu,Rowland Pettit,Joshua E. Lewis,Alexandre Misrahi,Dandan Mo,Long Phi Le,Faisal Mahmood*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Apollo是一个多模态时间序列基础模型，基于美国某大型医院系统30年、250亿条记录（720万患者、28种模态、12个专科）训练，学习统一患者表示空间。在322项预后与检索任务上验证了其预测5年内新发病风险、疾病进展、治疗反应等能力，并展示了可解释性及多模态医学搜索引擎潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型无法整合临床记录的完整广度与时间深度——多模态医疗数据分散于不同系统，缺乏统一患者表示方法。作者旨在填补这一空白，构建能学习"医学概念图谱"并建模完整患者诊疗历程的模型。

Method: Apollo使用超过10万种临床事件、影像及文本构建统一表示空间，将患者的结构化和非结构化事件序列压缩为虚拟患者表示向量。训练数据涵盖28种医疗模态、12个专科，基于720万患者、250亿记录的大规模纵向数据。

Result: 在1.4百万患者的留出测试集上构建了322个任务：95个疾病新发风险预测（长达5年）、78个疾病进展、59个治疗反应、17个不良事件、12个医院运营任务，以及61个检索任务。通过特征归因显示预测与临床可解释的多模态生物标志物一致。

Conclusion: Apollo建立了可计算医学的基础——患者的完整诊疗背景信息可被计算推理所利用，展示了作为多模态医学搜索引擎和临床预测工具的广泛潜力。

Abstract: Modern medicine generates vast multimodal data across siloed systems, yet no existing model integrates the full breadth and temporal depth of the clinical record into a unified patient representation. We introduce Apollo, a multimodal temporal foundation model trained and evaluated on over three decades of longitudinal hospital records from a major US hospital system, composed of 25 billion records from 7.2 million patients, representing 28 distinct medical modalities and 12 major medical specialties. Apollo learns a unified representation space integrating over 100 thousand unique medical events in our clinical vocabulary as well as images and clinical text. This "atlas of medical concepts" forms a computational substrate for modeling entire patient care journeys comprised of sequences of structured and unstructured events, which are compressed by Apollo into virtual patient representations. To assess the potential of these whole-patient representations, we created 322 prognosis and retrieval tasks from a held-out test set of 1.4 million patients. We demonstrate the generalized clinical forecasting potential of Apollo embeddings, including predicting new disease onset risk up to five years in advance (95 tasks), disease progression (78 tasks), treatment response (59 tasks), risk of treatment-related adverse events (17 tasks), and hospital operations endpoints (12 tasks). Using feature attribution techniques, we show that model predictions align with clinically-interpretable multimodal biomarkers. We evaluate semantic similarity search on 61 retrieval tasks, and moreover demonstrate the potential of Apollo as a multimodal medical search engine using text and image queries. Together, these modeling capabilities establish the foundation for computable medicine, where the full context of patient care becomes accessible to computational reasoning.

</details>


### [738] [Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18567)
*Manan Gupta,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Latent Phase-Shift Rollback (LPSR)，一种无需微调或额外前向传播的推理时错误检测与纠正方法。通过在关键层监控残差流中的方向反转（相移），利用余弦相似度+熵双门控检测错误，并回滚KV缓存、注入预计算引导向量。在MATH-500上，8B模型达到44.0%（标准AR为28.8%），超出prompted self-correction（19.8%）24.2个百分点，超过Best-of-16（+7.8pp）且token成本低5.4倍，甚至超越70B模型（35.2%）且参数量少8.75倍。32层扫描揭示了检测-纠正分离现象：检测AUC在14层最优（0.718），但任务准确率在16层最优（44.0%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在生成过程中常犯不可恢复的推理错误：一旦某一步出错，后续token会累积错误而非纠正。现有方法如prompted self-correction效果不佳（甚至低于标准自回归），而其他方法需要额外计算开销。因此需要一种轻量级、无需微调、高效的在线错误检测与纠正机制。

Method: LPSR方法：在每个生成步骤，监控关键层l_crit的残差流；通过余弦相似度+熵双门控检测方向反转（相移）；检测到错误时，回滚KV缓存并注入预计算的引导向量。无需微调、梯度计算或额外前向传播。

Result: MATH-500上8B模型：LPSR达44.0% vs 标准AR 28.8%（+15.2pp, p<10^{-15}）；prompted self-correction仅19.8%；超出Best-of-16（36.2%）7.8pp且token成本低5.4倍；超越70B模型（35.2%）且参数量少8.75倍。检测-纠正分离：检测AUC在14层最优（0.718），准确率在16层最优（44.0% vs 29.2%）。

Conclusion: LPSR是一种高效、轻量级的推理时错误纠正方法，显著优于多种基线。发现检测与纠正存在最优深度分离现象，为未来优化提供了新方向。

Abstract: Large language models frequently commit unrecoverable reasoning errors mid-generation: once a wrong step is taken, subsequent tokens compound the mistake rather than correct it. We introduce $\textbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR): at each generation step, we monitor the residual stream at a critical layer lcrit, detect abrupt directional reversals (phase shifts) via a cosine-similarity $+$ entropy dual gate, and respond by rolling back the KV-cache and injecting a pre-computed steering vector. No fine-tuning, gradient computation, or additional forward passes are required. LPSR achieves $\mathbf{44.0\%}$ on MATH-500 with an 8B model versus $28.8\%$ for standard AR ($+15.2$ pp; McNemar $χ^2 = 66.96$, $p < 10^{-15}$). Critically, prompted self-correction, the most natural inference-time baseline, scores only $19.8\%$, below standard AR; LPSR exceeds it by $+24.2$ pp ($χ^2 = 89.4$, $p \approx 0$). LPSR also outperforms Best-of-16 ($+7.8$ pp) at $5.4\times$ lower token cost, and surpasses a standard 70B model ($35.2\%$) with $8.75\times$ fewer parameters at ${\sim}3\times$ the token budget. A 32-layer sweep reveals a novel \textbf{detection-correction dissociation}: error-detection AUC peaks at layer~14 ($0.718$) but task accuracy peaks at layer~16 ($44.0\%$ vs.\ $29.2\%$), demonstrating that optimal monitoring depth differs for detection and correction.

</details>


### [739] [A Note on TurboQuant and the Earlier DRIVE/EDEN Line of Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18555)
*Ran Ben-Basat,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Gal Mendelson,Michael Mitzenmacher,Amit Portnoy,Shay Vargaftik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文澄清了TurboQuant与EDEN（含DRIVE）的关系，指出TurboQuant是EDEN在次优参数设置下的特例，且无论在偏置还是无偏量化场景下，EDEN均优于TurboQuant。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 澄清TurboQuant与EDEN/DRIVE之间的关系，纠正对TurboQuant创新性的误解，并通过理论分析和实验证明EDEN在量化精度上优于TurboQuant。

Method: 通过理论分析阐明TurboQuant的两个变体（TurboQuant_mse和TurboQuant_prod）与EDEN的关系：TurboQuant_mse是EDEN在标量尺度参数S=1时的特例；TurboQuant_prod则是在偏置(b-1)位EDEN步骤后接无偏1位QJL残差量化的组合，存在三方面次优性。同时指出TurboQuant的部分分析方法与EDEN存在相似性。

Result: 理论分析和实验均表明：(1) 偏置EDEN（优化S）比TurboQuant_mse更精确；(2) 无偏EDEN明显优于TurboQuant_prod，通常超过一个比特的优势（如2位EDEN优于3位TurboQuant_prod）；(3) 在所有TurboQuant论文报告的精度实验中，EDEN均表现更优。

Conclusion: TurboQuant并非独立创新，而是EDEN在特定次优参数下的特例或次优组合方案；EDEN在量化精度上全面优于TurboQuant。

Abstract: This note clarifies the relationship between the recent TurboQuant work and the earlier DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) and EDEN (ICML 2022) schemes. DRIVE is a 1-bit quantizer that EDEN extended to any $b>0$ bits per coordinate; we refer to them collectively as EDEN.
  First, TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ is a special case of EDEN obtained by fixing EDEN's scalar scale parameter to $S=1$. EDEN supports both biased and unbiased quantization, each optimized by a different $S$ (chosen via methods described in the EDEN works). The fixed choice $S=1$ used by TurboQuant is generally suboptimal, although the optimal $S$ for biased EDEN converges to $1$ as the dimension grows; accordingly TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ approaches EDEN's behavior for large $d$.
  Second, TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$ combines a biased $(b-1)$-bit EDEN step with an unbiased 1-bit QJL quantization of the residual. It is suboptimal in three ways: (1) its $(b-1)$-bit step uses the suboptimal $S=1$; (2) its 1-bit unbiased residual quantization has worse MSE than (unbiased) 1-bit EDEN; (3) chaining a biased $(b-1)$-bit step with a 1-bit unbiased residual step is inferior to unbiasedly quantizing the input directly with $b$-bit EDEN.
  Third, some of the analysis in the TurboQuant work mirrors that of the EDEN works: both exploit the connection between random rotations and the shifted Beta distribution, use the Lloyd-Max algorithm, and note that Randomized Hadamard Transforms can replace uniform random rotations.
  Experiments support these claims: biased EDEN (with optimized $S$) is more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$, and unbiased EDEN is markedly more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$, often by more than a bit (e.g., 2-bit EDEN beats 3-bit TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$). We also repeat all accuracy experiments from the TurboQuant paper, showing that EDEN outperforms it in every setup we have tried.

</details>


### [740] [Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Risk-Sensitive Estimation via Conditional Value-at-Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18546)
*Feras Al Taha,Eilyan Bitar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于分布鲁棒优化的风险敏感估计方法，针对未知信号与观测信号的联合分布属于类型-2 Wasserstein球的分布集，以条件风险价值（CVaR）作为平方估计误差的度量，研究最小化最坏情况CVaR的仿射估计器计算问题。当名义分布为有限支撑时，该估计器可通过求解可处理的半定规划精确计算。在电力批发价格预测任务中，该方法相比现有方法实现了更低的样本外CVaR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统估计方法通常假设已知精确的概率分布或仅关注期望风险（如最小均方误差），但在实际中分布往往未知且存在不确定性，且许多高风险场景（如金融、能源）更关注尾部风险而非平均性能。因此需要一种既能处理分布不确定性、又能控制尾部风险的估计方法。

Method: 1. 将未知信号x与观测信号y的联合分布建模为属于以某名义分布为中心的Wasserstein球（类型-2）的模糊集；2. 采用条件风险价值（CVaR）作为平方估计误差的风险度量；3. 以最坏情况CVaR最小化为目标，考虑仿射估计器族；4. 针对名义分布为有限支撑的情况，将问题转化为可求解的半定规划（SDP）；5. 利用实际电力市场价格数据验证方法有效性。

Result: 所提出的分布鲁棒仿射估计器可通过求解半定规划精确计算；在电力批发价格预测的真实数据实验中，该方法相比现有方法实现了更低的样本外CVaR（平方误差），表明其在尾部风险控制方面具有优势。

Conclusion: 本文建立的分布鲁棒CVaR最小化框架为风险敏感估计问题提供了一种可计算的理论解决方案，在分布不确定性和尾部风险控制之间取得了有效平衡。该方法在电力价格预测等实际场景中具有应用价值，且半定规划的可处理性保证了其实用性。

Abstract: We propose a distributionally robust approach to risk-sensitive estimation of an unknown signal x from an observed signal y. The unknown signal and observation are modeled as random vectors whose joint probability distribution is unknown, but assumed to belong to a given type-2 Wasserstein ball of distributions, termed the ambiguity set. The performance of an estimator is measured according to the conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the squared estimation error. Within this framework, we study the problem of computing affine estimators that minimize the worst-case CVaR over all distributions in the given ambiguity set. As our main result, we show that, when the nominal distribution at the center of the Wasserstein ball is finitely supported, such estimators can be exactly computed by solving a tractable semidefinite program. We evaluate the proposed estimators on a wholesale electricity price forecasting task using real market data and show that they deliver lower out-of-sample CVaR of squared error compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [741] [Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11805)
*Mihir Prabhudesai,Aryan Satpathy,Yangmin Li,Zheyang Qin,Nikash Bhardwaj,Amir Zadeh,Chuan Li,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用物理模拟器生成合成问答数据，通过强化学习训练LLM的物理推理能力，在IPhO等真实物理基准上实现了零样本模拟到现实的迁移，性能提升5-10个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 互联网问答数据在规模和领域上存在局限（主要集中在数学等领域），物理等科学领域缺乏大规模高质量QA数据集来训练具备推理能力的LLM。

Method: 在物理引擎中随机生成场景，从模拟交互中创建合成问答对，并利用强化学习在合成数据上训练LLM。

Result: 模型展现出零样本的模拟到现实迁移能力：仅在合成模拟数据上训练，即在IPhO（国际物理奥林匹克）问题上实现5-10个百分点的性能提升。

Conclusion: 物理模拟器可以作为可扩展的数据生成器，使LLM获得超越互联网规模QA数据局限的深层物理推理能力。

Abstract: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. However, much of this progress has been fueled by the abundance of internet question-answer (QA) pairs, a major bottleneck going forward, since such data is limited in scale and concentrated mainly in domains like mathematics. In contrast, other sciences such as physics lack large-scale QA datasets to effectively train reasoning-capable models. In this work, we show that physics simulators can serve as a powerful alternative source of supervision for training LLMs for physical reasoning. We generate random scenes in physics engines, create synthetic question-answer pairs from simulated interactions, and train LLMs using reinforcement learning on this synthetic data. Our models exhibit zero-shot sim-to-real transfer to real-world physics benchmarks: for example, training solely on synthetic simulated data improves performance on IPhO (International Physics Olympiad) problems by 5-10 percentage points across model sizes. These results demonstrate that physics simulators can act as scalable data generators, enabling LLMs to acquire deep physical reasoning skills beyond the limitations of internet-scale QA data. Code available at: https://sim2reason.github.io/.

</details>


### [742] [IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18521)
*Aniruddha Adiga,Jingyuan Chou,Anshul Chiranth,Bryan Lewis,Ana I. Bento,Shaun Truelove,Geoffrey Fox,Madhav Marathe,Harry Hochheiser,Srini Venkatramanan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了IDOBE，一个标准化的疫情暴发预测基准数据集，涵盖13种疾病、10000多个暴发事件，并系统评估了11种基线模型的预测性能，发现MLP方法表现最稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前疫情预测领域缺乏标准化的基准数据集来评估不同方法，尤其是在缺乏历史数据的新型暴发场景下，对各种方法的性能理解有限。

Method: 从多个数据仓库中收集跨越一个多世纪的监测数据，通过基于导数的分割生成超过10,000个暴发事件，涵盖13种疾病的病例数和住院数等指标；采用信息论和分布度量量化数据集多样性；使用11种基线模型进行1-4周的多步短期预测，采用NMSE、MAPE和NWIS等指标评估点预测和概率预测性能。

Result: MLP方法在所有预测场景中表现最稳健，统计方法在暴发上升前期略有优势。

Conclusion: IDOBE数据集提供了标准化、可复现的疫情暴发预测基准，有助于推动该领域的方法比较与发展。

Abstract: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.

</details>


### [743] [Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18493)
*Zhenwen Liang,Yujun Zhou,Sidi Lu,Xiangliang Zhang,Haitao Mi,Dong Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对大模型强化学习中的策略崩溃问题，提出CUTS解码策略和Mixed-CUTS训练框架，通过均匀采样高置信度候选token来保持生成多样性，在AIME25基准上提升高达15.1%的Pass@1准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强基座模型在标准基准测试上达到饱和，产生正确但同质化的解，导致GRPO等算法的优势信号消失，策略陷入模式崩溃（mode collapse）。

Method: 提出CUTS（受约束均匀Top-K采样）——一种无参数解码策略，对高置信度候选进行均匀采样以展平局部优化景观；进一步提出Mixed-CUTS训练框架，协同利用剥削性与探索性rollout来放大组内优势方差。

Result: 在Qwen3模型上实验表明，该方法能防止策略退化并显著提升跨域泛化能力；在AIME25上Mixed-CUTS比标准GRPO提升Pass@1最高达15.1%。

Conclusion: 在语义流形内保持多样性对于严谨推理至关重要，验证了在高性能基座模型上仍需主动约束采样的探索策略以突破性能瓶颈。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enhances LLM reasoning, yet a paradox emerges as models scale: strong base models saturate standard benchmarks (e.g., MATH), yielding correct but homogeneous solutions. In such environments, the lack of failure cases causes the advantage signal in group-relative algorithms (e.g., GRPO) to vanish, driving policies into mode collapse. To address this, we propose Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling (CUTS), a parameter-free decoding strategy enforcing structure-preserving exploration. Unlike standard sampling that follows model biases, CUTS flattens the local optimization landscape by sampling uniformly from constrained high-confidence candidates. We integrate this into Mixed-CUTS, a training framework synergizing exploitative and exploratory rollouts to amplify intra-group advantage variance. Experiments on Qwen3 models demonstrate that our approach prevents policy degeneration and significantly boosts out-of-domain generalization. Notably, Mixed-CUTS improves Pass@1 accuracy on the challenging AIME25 benchmark by up to 15.1% over standard GRPO, validating that maintaining diversity within the semantic manifold is critical for rigorous reasoning.

</details>


### [744] [Train Separately, Merge Together: Modular Post-Training with Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18473)
*Jacob Morrison,Sanjay Adhikesaven,Akshita Bhagia,Matei Zaharia,Noah A. Smith,Sewon Min*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BAR通过独立训练领域专家并利用MoE架构组合，实现线性成本扩展且不降低现有能力，在7B规模上匹配或超越传统重训练方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全参数后训练语言模型在扩展新领域能力时面临根本性限制：从头重训练成本高且扩展性差，而继续训练会导致已有能力退化。

Method: BAR独立训练每个领域专家（经历中期训练、监督微调、强化学习），通过MoE架构和轻量路由器学习组合专家，支持独立更新单个专家。

Result: 在7B规模上，针对数学、代码、工具使用和安全四个专家，BAR平均得分49.1，匹配（50.5）或超越（47.8）重训练基线，且避免了灾难性遗忘。

Conclusion: 解耦的专家式训练是可扩展的替代方案，能够以线性成本独立更新领域，避免能力退化，优于传统的全参数重训练范式。

Abstract: Extending a fully post-trained language model with new domain capabilities is fundamentally limited by monolithic training paradigms: retraining from scratch is expensive and scales poorly, while continued training often degrades existing capabilities. We present BAR (Branch-Adapt-Route), which trains independent domain experts, each through its own mid-training, supervised finetuning, and reinforcement learning pipeline, and composes them via a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with lightweight router training. Unlike retraining approaches that mix all domains and require full reprocessing for any update (with cost scaling quadratically), BAR enables updating individual experts independently with linear cost scaling and no degradation to existing domains. At the 7B scale, with experts for math, code, tool use, and safety, BAR achieves an overall score of 49.1 (averaged across 7 evaluation categories), matching or exceeding re-training baselines (47.8 without mid-training, 50.5 with). We further show that modular training provides a structural advantage: by isolating each domain, it avoids the catastrophic forgetting that occurs when late-stage RL degrades capabilities from earlier training stages, while significantly reducing the cost and complexity of updating or adding a domain. Together, these results suggest that decoupled, expert-based training is a scalable alternative to monolithic retraining for extending language models.

</details>


### [745] [NI Sampling: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion Sampling by Token Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18471)
*Enshu Liu,Xuefei Ning,Yu Wang,Zinan Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对离散扩散语言模型（dLLMs）中采样效率低下的问题，本文提出神经指示器采样（NI Sampling），通过训练一个神经指示器来优化每一步中哪些token应该被采样，从而实现高达14.3倍的加速且性能损失极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
